Name: Berkmann Wine Cellars
Description:
Berkmann Wine Cellars is the UK’s leading independent agent/wholesaler. We supply the country’s restaurants and retailers with an unbeatable range, from household names like Duboeuf and Antinori to the most recherché small producers. 

As a family-owned company with roots in the restaurant trade, our goal remains the same as it always has been: to supply wines of outstanding character and typicity that are made to be drunk with food. Our vision is to develop our business and our range without compromising these values, and we choose to work with suppliers who share this philosophy, most of which are family-run themselves. With this in mind, we can afford to be fussy: from the humblest house wine to the grandest of grands crus, we make sure we select only the best. After all, life is too short to drink anything else!

Name: Distilleries Company of Sri Lanka PLC
Description:
The Distilleries Company of Sri Lanka PLC (DCSL) is one of the nation’s most respected and successful corporate entities with a proud tradition, rich heritage and a proven track record of excellence. Over the years, its corporate DNA has been defined by experience, innovation, resilience and an unwavering determination to succeed, making DCSL a true pillar of Sri Lanka’s business community.

The company’s origins trace back to 1913 with the establishment of the Excise Department of Ceylon, which oversaw the enforcement of the Excise Ordinance and the distribution of liquor products. In 1974, this mandate evolved into the State Distilleries Corporation, incorporated by statute to take over distillation and manufacturing. A significant transformation followed in 1989, when the entity was converted into a limited liability company under a government policy initiative.

A landmark moment came in 1992 when the present management acquired DCSL through the Colombo Stock Exchange. Since then the company has celebrated over 25 years of continued success as a publicly listed organization, marking its silver jubilee in 2017.

Guided by its principle of delivering only the highest quality products, DCSL has consistently expanded its turnover, asset base and nationwide presence. Today it stands as a symbol of corporate excellence in Sri Lanka, blending heritage with progress to shape a future of sustained growth.

Description:

Across these brands we offer a highly curated, global selection of products that deliver exceptional value and make it easier for consumers to enjoy great wine and spirits at great prices.

The company's flagship brand 90+ Cellars was launched in 2009 and is now one of the fastest-growing wine brands in the country and a top five premium/super premium wine brand in the Northeast.

RareWine was founded in 2006 by the Danish entrepreneur Rasmus Nielsen. The drive and passion that initially established RareWine still rings true today. It has grown RareWine into one of the leading fine wine merchants globally, with a selection that encompasses a plethora of different types of wine and spirits from all over the world.

We offer fine and rare wines from all over the world, including Bordeaux, Burgundy, Champagne, Rhône, Italy, Spain, USA, and Australia

With over 25.000 bottles representing more than 2.500 wines and vintages from the world's best and most exclusive wine producers, we offer the most comprehensive selection of fine wines in Scandinavia.

Our wines are sold to more than a thousand wine professionals, and shipments are sent daily from our warehouses to customers all over the world.

We boast a growing team of passionate and dedicated professionals who work with our winery partners in building the equity of their brands, and with our customers to drive value in their business. Our involvement in all aspects of the wine industry provides an exciting and diverse range of career opportunities.

Joval Wines is committed to encouraging the responsible enjoyment of our wines by our staff, our customers and the wider community. To follow us, you must be of legal drinking age in your country of residence.

Joval Wines is an Australian privately owned family company and is the parent company of a collection of highly successful, independent trading entities. We employ approximately 200 staff and have offices located throughout Australia and New Zealand, with alliances in Asia and Europe.

Name: Cru Wine

In the last ten years we’ve expanded to include a team of sommeliers, engineers, financial advisors and more, to build a platform where we wish to pass on our vast knowledge to our clients. 

Using our team’s expertise, alongside our state-of-the-art-technology we have since created a community where fine wine collecting is transparent, effortless and available to all.

Name: Tap & Joy
Description:
Over Ons: Team Tap & Joy

Welkom bij Team Tap & Joy! Wij zijn een familiebedrijf gevestigd in de kop van Noord-Holland, gespecialiseerd in de import van wijnen, prosecco’s en Spritz Aperitivo in fusten. Onze passie voor kwaliteitswijnen en innovatieve verpakkingen vormt de kern van ons bedrijf.

Onze Geschiedenis

Tap & Joy is ontstaan uit een rijke geschiedenis van innovatie en doorzettingsvermogen. Het idee kwam tot leven tijdens de ontwikkeling van de KeyKeg-verpakking door de familie Veenendaal. Deze revolutionaire verpakking wordt wereldwijd geproduceerd en gebruikt, en heeft de manier waarop wijnen en andere dranken worden verpakt en gedistribueerd, veranderd.

Hoewel we het bedrijf KeyKeg door de financiële tegenslagen van de Coronaperiode hebben moeten overdragen aan een investeerder, blijft onze missie om de wereld beter achter te laten dan we hem hebben aangetroffen voortleven. Onze ervaringen en de waardevolle relaties die we in de afgelopen 15 jaar hebben opgebouwd, vormen de basis van Tap & Joy.

Onze Missie

Bij Tap & Joy geloven we in duurzaamheid en kwaliteit. Met ons concept willen we de wereld van wijnliefhebbers in Nederland en daarbuiten kennis laten maken met de voordelen van wijnen van de tap. Door gebruik te maken van de innovatieve KeyKeg-verpakking, bieden we een milieuvriendelijk alternatief dat de kwaliteit van de wijnen behoudt.

Ons Assortiment

Dankzij ons uitgebreide netwerk van meer dan 400 wijnhuizen wereldwijd, kunnen we een divers en hoogwaardig assortiment aanbieden. Samen met een bevriend vinoloog hebben we zorgvuldig de beste wijnen geselecteerd die perfect passen bij onze visie.

Ons Team

Wij zijn Anita en Martijn, en samen met onze kinderen zetten we ons in om Tap & Joy tot een succes te maken. Ons doel is om heel Nederland kennis te laten maken met de unieke ervaring van wijnen van de tap. We nodigen u uit om samen met ons op ontdekkingstocht te gaan in de prachtige wereld van wijnen.

Contact

Neem gerust contact met ons op

Name: Gaudina Limited
Description:
Gaudina Limited brings you the best the wine world has to offer.

Based in Hong Kong, we are your trusted destination for premium wines and world-class glassware — thoughtfully curated for those who appreciate authenticity, craftsmanship, and sensory delight.

We proudly represent Lehmann Glassware, born in Reims, France, and designed in collaboration with top sommeliers. Each glass is a tribute to the meticulous work of winemakers, enhancing aroma, texture, and flavor with precision and style.

As a dedicated wine distributor, Gaudina works closely with a select group of family-owned, sustainable wineries from renowned regions around the world. Each brand we represent is chosen for its authenticity, craftsmanship, and commitment to quality:

- Xavier Vignon (Rhône Valley, France) – A visionary winemaker celebrated for his expertise and innovation in southern Rhône.
- Mas Amiel (Roussillon, France) – Iconic estate known for vibrant dry wines and legendary Vins Doux Naturels.
- Domaine Decelle & Fils (Burgundy, France) – Featuring prestigious appellations like Beaune 1er Cru “Clos du Roi” and Côte de Nuits-Village.
- Château Jean Faure (Saint-Émilion, France) – Grand Cru Classé estate led by Cabernet Franc and biodynamic vision.
- Domaine de la Fontainerie (Vouvray, Loire, France) – A historic estate producing expressive Chenin Blanc from the Vallée Coquette.
- Parés Baltà (Penedès, Spain) – Organic wines and cava from a family winery with roots dating back to 1790.
- Gratavinum (Priorat, Spain) – Organic wines from rugged slate soils, blending tradition and innovation.
- Te Pā Wines (Marlborough, New Zealand) – Rooted in Māori heritage, crafting wines with deep respect for land and sea.

Name: Mondlicht
Description:
Feel the taste of sophistication in every sip. Made with selected ingredients and a refined and handicraft production process, this is a unique experience for the most demanding palates.

Elevate your special moments with Mondlicht and let yourself be carried away by the pleasure of tasting something exceptional. 

- Mondlicht Vodka, made with barley malt, inspired by Scottish single malts, as it is a high quality cereal, it reduces the incidence of hangovers and feeling unwell the next day.

Its production process begins through fermentation with exclusive yeasts, after fermentation, the must undergoes 5 distillations in copper stills that serve to generate complexity, at the end of the distillation the spirit rests for 24 hours, after this rest we filter through 5x on charcoal activated mineral, to then standardize Mondlicht Vodka at 40% alcohol content using water from a natural source.

- Mondlicht London Dry Gin, we use selected grain alcohol with 50% alcohol content, we prepare a mixture of botanicals with: juniper imported from Germany, coriander from Argentina, a mix of peppers, Moscato grapes and other hand-selected spices, we leave it to macerate for 4 days, after which we distill in a copper still slowly, after this process the gin rests for 24 hours, we filter it through ceramic filters to give it shine, we standardize it with water from a natural source at 45%.

- Mondlicht Cachaça, it is a blend of cachaças aged in barrels made from different types of wood, including American oak, French oak and amburana, bringing a lot of complexity and citrus notes. Try it, and be surprised!

Name: Best Wines Distribution
Description:
Since 2016, Best Wines Distribution has been connecting outstanding wineries with discerning clients, gastronomy professionals, and collectors. 

Born from the merger of two successful companies – Best Wines Slovakia 
and Emozioni – BWD combines a passion for exceptional wines with a professional approach to distribution and service. Today, we operate across Slovakia and the Czech Republic, serving both B2B and B2C clients, including through our e-shop and personalized services. 

Every wine in our portfolio is carefully selected by our sommeliers, ensuring uncompromising quality and authenticity. We continuously refine and expand our offering to meet the evolving needs of our partners.

Our philosophy rests on four pillars: quality, authenticity, long-term relationships, and service. We collaborate with wineries that set new benchmarks in winemaking and provide our clients with much more than distribution – from tailored consultancy and education to lasting partnerships.

With a dedicated team of experts, we curate portfolios for gastronomy, corporate clients, and private collectors. Our mission goes beyond distribution: we build the market, introduce new standards, and create value. Always with precision, passion, and a commitment to growth – together with our winemakers and our partners.

Elevating Your Global Beverage Experience

Global Reach, Local Convenience
Our commitment to sourcing and delivering the best knows no borders. With an extensive supplier network and unwavering dedication to quality, we make sought-after spirits and wines from around the world accessible to businesses throughout India.

Your Trusted B2B Partner
Partnering with My Wines and Spirits opens a world of opportunities. Whether you operate a restaurant, hotel, bar, or retail store, we understand your business's unique needs. Our tailored B2B solutions not only meet but exceed your expectations.

A Diverse Portfolio of Excellence
Our portfolio features a comprehensive selection of premium wines, spirits, and liqueurs from renowned global distilleries and wineries. From classic labels to emerging craft producers, we offer diversity that caters to your discerning clientele.

Efficient Distribution, Swift Service

Sustainability at Our Core
We prioritize responsible business practices. Our commitment to sustainability extends from sourcing to packaging choices. We're dedicated to reducing our environmental footprint and making a positive contribution to society.

Growing Together
In the dynamic beverage industry, we adapt and innovate continuously. Our team of experts stays ahead of industry trends, providing valuable insights to help your business flourish.

Let's Raise the Bar Together
Let's collaborate to elevate your beverage offerings and create unforgettable experiences for your customers.

Connect with us today to savour the world.

Name: Vinos Lara
Description:
Vinos Lara es una pequeña bodega familiar que ofrece blancos y tintos con equilibrio, elegancia y carácter.
Desde su inicio, la de Vinos Lara ha sido una historia de ilusión, trabajo y compromiso.
Dotados de paciencia y dedicación suficiente, la bodega mima, año a año, las materias primas que han permitido conseguir, con la llegada de cada otoño, añadas pletóricas en fruta, vinos complejos, aromáticos y bien estructurados.
Por ello, todo el esfuerzo de Vinos Lara se orienta a poder dar forma en el tiempo a los frutos de la generosa tierra de Monterrei. En este sentido, se preocupa por huir de artificios y modas efímeras y trabaja para dar alma a cada una de sus botellas. Intenta rescatar el valor de lo esencial, ya que fue la admiración por la belleza de lo natural, lo que ha impulsado la creación de este proyecto bodeguero.

Name: Malkar Agency Limited
Description:

Located in Nairobi, Malkar's distribution area encompasses Nairobi, Mombasa, Naivasha, Kisumu, Lodwar, Nyeri, Embu, Nakuru among other cities.

Malkar Agency Limited is proud to service many of the highest profile venues in Nairobi and Mombasa. Our facility in Ruiru includes over 11,000 sq ft of warehouse and office space.

Malkar Agency Limited has an active account base of over 300 retailers both on/off premise. Malkar Agency Limited is proud of its employee family, facility and delivery fleet. As a service oriented company, our knowledgeable well-trained staff and delivery force is highly regarded as a valuable resource to our retail business partners.

Name: Vinum
Description:
Vinum steht seit Jahrzehnten für höchste Qualität und Leidenschaft im Großhandel von Wein und Spirituosen. Mit einem tief verwurzelten Verständnis für die Kunst des Weins setzen wir auf Fachkompetenz, Integrität und nachhaltiges Handeln als Grundpfeiler unseres Erfolgs.
Unsere Philosophie basiert auf einer klaren Differenzierung: Wir wählen ausschließlich Produkte aus, die durch ihre Qualität und Einzigartigkeit überzeugen und setzen dabei auf enge Partnerschaften mit Winzern und Produzenten. Nachhaltigkeit ist für uns nicht nur ein Trend, sondern ein Versprechen. 
Ob für Gastronomen, Fachhändler oder Weinliebhaber: Vinum ist der zuverlässige Partner für einzigartige Genussmomente.
Entdecken Sie mit uns die Vielfalt der Welt des Weins – geprägt von Exzellenz, Tradition und Respekt.
*
*
*
Vinum rappresenta da decenni qualità e passione nel commercio all’ingrosso di vini e distillati. Con una profonda conoscenza dell’arte del vino, ci basiamo su competenza, integrità e sostenibilità come pilastri del nostro successo.
La nostra filosofia si fonda su una chiara differenziazione: selezioniamo esclusivamente prodotti che si distinguono per qualità e unicità, collaborando con viticoltori e produttori di fiducia. Per noi, la sostenibilità non è una moda, ma una promessa.
Vinum è il partner affidabile per esperienze di gusto uniche per ristoranti, commercianti specializzati e appassionati di vino.

Scoprite con noi la ricchezza del mondo del vino, guidati dall’eccellenza, dalla tradizione e dal rispetto.

Name: The House of Wines
Description:
Na The House of Wines Brasil, selecionamos com curadoria e excelência alguns dos melhores vinhos do mundo para o mercado nacional. Atuamos como importadora e distribuidora especializada em vinhos finos, com forte presença nos canais on-trade e off-trade, atendendo desde restaurantes renomados até empórios e lojas especializadas.

Nossa missão é entregar não apenas rótulos, mas histórias engarrafadas — de pequenos produtores a vinícolas premiadas. Somos movidos por parcerias estratégicas, conhecimento técnico e uma paixão autêntica pelo universo do vinho.

Com um portfólio que combina tradição, inovação e identidade de terroir, oferecemos soluções completas para nossos clientes: desde o abastecimento de cartas de vinho até eventos de harmonização e ações de marketing sob medida.

Name: Mediterranea
Description:
Mediterranea è una joint venture composta da tre aziende: Persibald of Florida LLC, con una ventennale esperienza nella commercializzazione di alcolici in Sudamerica, Muse srl, società di consulenza in marketing e comunicazione con sede in Italia e Ceramglaz SL, azienda spagnola specializzata nell'esportazione di prodotti industriali in Sudamerica. 

Unendo le loro competenze e risorse, hanno creato una realtà ambiziosa e innovativa nel mondo degli affari e del commercio internazionale di alimenti, mirando a raggiungere importanti traguardi e a espandere la loro presenza in tutto il Sudamerica.

La missione di Mediterranea è quella di promuovere e diffondere la cultura del cibo europeo in Sudamerica, attraverso la commercializzazione di prodotti autentici e genuini, selezionati con cura per garantire la massima qualità e la fedeltà alle tradizioni enogastronomiche europee. L'obiettivo è quello di creare un ponte tra i due continenti, valorizzando le eccellenze culinarie europee e portando un'esperienza di gusto unica e autentica ai consumatori sudamericani.

Oltre 11.500.000,00 di fatturato

Name: Dryad Gin Ltd
Description:
Unique, small-batch Somerset gin made with majestic oak trees and distilled in traditional copper stills from the foothills of the Quantocks.

Our signature craft gin captures the sublime beauty of the Quantocks, from the wild, heather-soaked heathlands to the shaded combes, the vibrant village communities to the patchwork pastures where the gorse flowers bloom, making it the perfect gift for an authentic taste of Somerset.

The gin is due to be available for sale in September 2022. Alongside the gin this business supports the local community by providing a monthly Pop Up Pub called The Dryad Inn.

Name: Sumon Licores
Description:
At DISTRIBUIDORA SUMON, we take pride in our more than 40 years of experience, establishing ourselves as a prominent reference in the sale and distribution of liquors.

Our commitment is reflected in the personalized attention we provide to our clients. We have a highly trained team dedicated to advising and meeting the needs of a wide range of clients, including wholesalers, restaurants, bars, hotels, entertainment centers, service stations, markets, liquor stores, basket sellers, catering services, wedding and event planners, and end consumers.

We offer our clients a portfolio of over 6000 products, supported by a value proposition centered on the authenticity, quality, and reliability of each of our items. We strive to accompany our clients in every special moment with products of excellence.

Throughout our history, we have successfully adapted to new demands and trends in the world of mixology. For this reason, DISTRIBUIDORA SUMON not only engages in distribution but also imports internationally recognized brands, integrating them into our extensive product portfolio.

Name: Getränke Morelli AG
Description:
Der Grundstein zum italienisch-schweizerischen Familienunternehmen «Michelangelo Morelli AG» wurde bereits in den 50er Jahren gelegt: In diesen Jahren kam unser Firmengründer und Familienoberhaupt als Gastarbeiter aus Süditalien in die Schweiz.

Im Jahre 1960 baute Michelangelo Morelli gemeinsam mit seiner Frau und seinen Töchtern einen eigenen Getränkehandel auf.

Diese waschechte "Italianità" und unverwechselbare Authentizität zeigt sich bis heute in den verschiedenen Weinen und alkoholfreien Spezialitäten, welche Morelli direkt importiert. Auch der familiäre Zusammenhalt ist bis heute bestehen geblieben, was sich sowohl positiv auf das interne Arbeitsklima als auch auf die langjährigen Kundenbeziehungen auswirkt.

Name: Capricorn26
Description:
The originality of the Alps and the traditional craft of the Black Forest, our gin combines the best of both regions and expresses the home of the founder. 26 botanicals symbolize the 26 cantons of Switzerland, and the alcohol content of 42 percent represents the multiplication of the 12 regional associations and 4 administrative districts in our home state of Baden-Württemberg. 

Find out more on our website!

Name: Cork Distributors
Description: Cork Distributors is a best-in-class, locally owned and operated Nevada wine & spirits distributor. For the past decade, we’ve cultivated lasting partnerships with in-demand suppliers both domestically and internationally, to bring both established, and emerging wine and spirits to our customers throughout Las Vegas and beyond. We’ve joined forces with like-minded Nevada wine & spirits distributors to expand our portfolio of products and broaden our reach. And we’ve built lasting relationships with customers by understanding their unique goals and expectations, and then exceeding them.

In addition to locally-sourced whiskeys, top-shelf bourbons, and innovative craft gins and vodkas, Small Batch specializes in private, custom barrel picks from innovative craft distilleries across the United States.

Name: Clearbev Ltd
Description:
Clearbev Ltd stands among the United Kingdom’s most forward-thinking and premium beverage houses—an embodiment of craftsmanship, creativity, and global ambition. Headquartered in London, the cultural capital of Europe and a long-standing centre of fine beverage tradition, Clearbev has emerged as a trailblazer in the creation, development, and global distribution of innovative wines and spirits. With a portfolio that spans avant-garde spirit creations, contemporary wine expressions, and a growing category of new-age beverages, Clearbev has established itself as an influential voice within the modern beverage world.

Guided by the principles of meticulous artistry, technical innovation, and a relentless pursuit of excellence, Clearbev’s offerings are designed for the discerning consumer who values quality, authenticity, and originality. Our company’s ethos is founded upon the belief that every bottle should represent a narrative—one that tells the story of ingredients, craftsmanship, and the creative vision that shaped it. As both manufacturers and brand owners, we strive to create products that not only satisfy the palate but elevate the entire beverage experience.

Over the years, this commitment to integrity, innovation, and artistry has earned Clearbev several prestigious awards, further validating our approach and establishing our reputation as a premier global beverage creator. Today, Clearbev stands poised at the intersection of tradition and cutting-edge innovation, shaping the next chapter of the global drinks landscape.

Name: WEISSTRAD
Description:
WEISSTRAD is a Maldives based importer, wholesaler and distributor. We work directly with producers and brand owners.

We hold an extensive range of products. Our logistics network helps you meet your schedule. WEISSTRAD is a full-line wholesale distributor of alcoholic beverages and tobacco products to licensed customers in Maldives. We operate our own bonded warehouse for commercial purposes under license from the government of Maldives.

With a vast network of contacts and sales channels in the island nation of Maldives, WEISSTRAD is well positioned to distribute products in the achipelago. We partner with trusted, reputable brands who understand the challenges of distribution and logistics in the Maldives islands. With an active and engaged sales channel, WEISSTRAD is a trusted local partner who delivers on time, every time.

Our clients expect exceptional products and outstanding service. Every day we provide value with vision creating long term relationships that deliver mutual benefit.

With over 15 years of experience in scaling brands internationally, United Spirits brings operational excellence and strategic insight to support distributors in successfully onboarding new brands and launching them in their markets.

With decades of cumulative experience across market development, brand incubation, and value chain optimization, our team has successfully steered brands from regional presence to international recognition.

We specialize in forging long-term, strategically aligned partnerships with distributors and brand owners who share our ambition for sustainable and accelerated growth.

The team is prepared to onboard new collaboration partners, offering end-to-end support – from tailoring products to meet specific market needs to delivering comprehensive marketing materials and toolkits.

Name: BENEVENT
Description:
Benevent offre un service professionnel sur mesure spécialisé dans la vente et la livraison des meilleurs vins. L'authenticité et la provenance sont essentielles pour nous. Nous nous attachons à vous fournir des vins directement issus des domaines viticoles renommés de Bourgogne, de la Loire, du Sud de la France, du Rhône, et de la Champagne, sans intermédiaire. Chaque bouteille est une authentique pièce de cave, garantie à 100%.

Notre service de conciergerie personnalisé est dédié à rencontrer nos clients où qu'ils soient, pour écouter leurs désirs et les assister dans la création de leur collection de vins personnelle. Notre service entreprise vous accompagne toute l'année pour vos cadeaux d'affaires et internes.

Nous assurons un service de livraison porte à porte à travers la France et par envoi en Europe.

Pour résumer, Benevent offre une solution sur mesure pour la livraison de beaux vins aux meilleurs prix, directement de la propriété à votre porte. Notre pôle entreprise est idéal pour les cadeaux d'affaires ou internes.

Providing Great Wine to Great People.

Name: Min Franske Vinimportør
Description:
Vi er passioneret omkring bæredygtig fransk vin. Vi arbejder udelukkende med nøje udvalgte vine fra unikke vinbønder i Frankrig, som har fokus på kvalitet fremfor kvantitet. 

Vinene udvælges ikke på de store udstillinger, men ved egne rejser til Frankrig, hvor et stærkt netværk og beherskelse af det franske sprog leder os frem til sjældne og eksklusive vine.

Eksklusiv betyder også, at det kun er Min Franske Vinimportør, der importerer vinen til Danmark.

Vores mission er at tilbyde rene og ærlige vine, der både afspejler terroir og vinbøndernes dygtighed.

Name: Pieroth Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Unsere Weinproben sind persönlich und professionell. Dafür erweitern wir ständig unser Wissen rund um den Wein. In leichter Wein-Sprache und in aller Ruhe finden wir gemeinsam zum individuellen Lieblingswein. Dabei spielt es wie gewohnt keine Rolle, an welchem Ort die Weinprobe stattfindet, denn wir sind in ganz Deutschland vertreten. Wir freuen uns auf ein Kennenlernen oder Wiedersehen.

Sämtliche Inhalte dürfen erst ab einem Alter von 18 Jahren genutzt und geteilt werden.

Name: Drink West

Invest in Drink West today. Our crowdfunding raise is now live on Birchal.
Visit https://www.birchal.com/company/drinkwest

Drink West was founded by iconic UFC fighters Tai (Bam Bam) Tuivasa & Tyson Pedro in 2019. Inspired by a passion for the people of Western Sydney, the boys wanted to create an easy-drinking lager based on the black and gold they grew up on.

Now backed by Nathan Cleary, Penrith Panthers NRL all star.

Name: Just Call Me Shirley
Description:
Whether it be that you drank Shirley Temples growing up, had a “Dirty Shirley” cocktail as your first legal drink, or simply can't get enough of that classic cherry flavor - Just Call Me Shirley unites and caters to all experiences.

Inspired by the iconic Shirley Temple, our RTD 5% canned cocktails & NA collection elevates a classic experience to a new level of refinement. Just Call Me Shirley is a nod to the past, a celebration of the present, and a promise of timeless sophistication. Enjoy the subtle sweetness of natural cherry and lemon-lime flavors. Expect retro red coloring without the harmful dyes.

Name: RADA Vietnam
Description: Representing key wine regions in Australia, RADA proudly presents Really Affordable, Deliciously Australian wines to those residing in Vietnam. RADA continues to grow their portfolio - currently partnering with 18 winery labels.

Name: That Drink Company (Pty) Ltd
Description:
That Drink Company was founded with the goal of creating high quality alcoholic beverages that are light, refreshing and almost 100% guilt free - without having to compromise on the taste. 

Simply put: A drink for everyone, from the sun seeker to the tekkie squeaker!

We launched a proudly South African Hard Seltzer range, Rivva, in November 2021. Rivva Hard Seltzers are, in our biased opinion, the "creme de la creme" of Hard Seltzers. The core flavours are all naturally gluten-free, contain zero sugar, zero carbs and only 74 Calories per 330ml - all while being absolutely delicious!

Name: Brewguru Australia
Description:
Brewguru: Redefining the Future of RTDs

Brewguru, headquartered in Seoul, is Korea’s leading RTD (ready-to-drink) producer and operator of the country’s largest whiskey distillery.  With a dominant market share and production capacity set to triple by Q3 2025, Brewguru is renowned for blending tradition with bold innovation to meet growing global demands.

Our signature innovation, the "Fresh Lemon Slice RTD", is a world-first in the category.  Each can contains a real fresh slice of lemon, delivering visual theatre, freshness, and a premium drinking experience unlike anything else. This breakthrough has sold over 60+ million cans across Asia and earned accolades at the Korea Wine & Spirits Awards, proving that consumers crave authenticity, quality, and excitement in their RTDs.

Building on this success, we are proud to introduce "RYSE", a brand created specifically for the Australian market.  Crafted through extensive consumer research, RYSE is designed to disrupt the RTD landscape with vodka, sparkling soda, and a "Fresh Lemon Slice" in every can.  Positioned for premium drinkers looking for a point of difference, RYSE delivers what Australians want: flavour, quality worth trading up for, and a story that sparks curiosity.

Brewguru’s vision is clear: to drive the evolution from RTD 1.0 to RTD 2.0 by offering products that inspire, excite, and connect with culture.  By combining cutting-edge innovation with local relevance, we are set to reshape the Australian RTD industry and create memorable experiences that resonate far beyond the first sip.

For any enquiries, please email sales.au@brewguru.com

Name: Reoboam
Description: Passionnés par le monde du vin et désireux de faire découvrir des produits de qualité, nous avons créé REOBOAM. Notre objectif est de proposer nos découvertes aux restaurateurs et aux cavistes français. REOBOAM c’est un voyage œnologique à travers le globe que nous avons entrepris pour vous dénicher des perles rares. Trois maîtres mots : Professionnalisme, Expérience et surtout, Passion. N’attendez plus et faites voyager vos clients grâce à nos vins du monde entier !

Name: Helba
Description:
Helba: Oltre gli spirits, un’icona di Mediterranean Lifestyle.

Helba nasce con una missione chiara: distillare l'essenza dell'Isola d'Elba in un brand capace di ridefinire i canoni del lusso nel settore Spirits. In soli 5 anni, ci siamo posizionati nella Top 15 dei brand artigianali in Italia, validati da partnership strategiche con leader globali.

-Validazione di Mercato: Presenza capillare nel canale HoReCa d'eccellenza.
-Innovazione Consapevole: Pionieri nel segmento Zero Alcohol & Healthy Drinks, rispondendo ai trend di consumo del 2026/27.
-Approccio Human-Centric: Una filosofia d'impresa che mette al centro il territorio e la persona.

Siamo attualmente in una fase di espansione internazionale (Cina, Spagna e UAE) e aperti a collaborazioni con partner industriali e investitori che vogliano condividere il futuro del Mindful Drinking.

Name: ASPIRIT - Finer wines & greater spirits
Description:
The Slovatik family has been in the wine & spirit industry for 5 decades.

Starting with one liqueur shop back in 1978 until becoming one of the biggest import, marketing & sales companies, covering nationwide, all the On, Off & Impulse segments and the no. 1 retail chain in Israel with over 60 stores.

Alongside the retail business, in 2012 the family has established its import companies – Aspirit and Miki Yenot.


We are proud to be the sole importer and marketer of some of the most prestigious brands in the world
Our ambition is to become the most trusted, respected and best preforming import, marketing & sales wine & spirit company in Israel & the PA.


משפחת סלובטיק עוסקת בתעשיית היין והמשקאות כבר 5 עשורים.


החל מחנות ליקרים אחת עוד בשנת 1978 ועד שהפכה לאחת מחברות היבוא, השיווק והמכירה מהגדולות ביותר בישראל וכיום בעלת רשת קמעונאית  בישראל עם למעלה מ- 60 חנויות.

לצד העסק הקמעונאי, בשנת 2012 הקימה המשפחה את חברות היבוא שלה – אספיריט ומיקי יינות.

אנו גאים להיות יבואן והמשווק הרישמי של כמה מהמותגים היוקרתיים בעולם!

השאיפה שלנו היא להפוך לחברת הייבוא, השיווק והמכירות הטובה ביותר בתחום בישראל וברשות.

Name: Grupo Primo Bebidas
Description:
Fundado en 2020 por dos emprendedores mexicanos con un sueño compartido, Grupo Primo Bebidas es un conglomerado de empresas con una visión audaz: transformar la industria de bebidas en México. 

Nuestra pasión por la innovación y el compromiso con la excelencia nos han llevado a ser pioneros en ofrecer experiencias de consumo de bebidas únicas y memorables.

En los primeros días, Grupo Primo Bebidas comenzó con una pequeña distribuidora local llamada Mr. Brown enfocada en llevar vinos y licores de alta calidad a consumidores exigentes.

Con el paso del tiempo, logramos identificar la necesidad de modernizar la cadena de suministro de bebidas en la industria de la hostelería. Fue así como nació Bebify, La Plataforma De Bebidas B2B.

A lo largo de los años, hemos cultivado relaciones sólidas con múltiples proveedores de renombre y hemos expandido el alcance para atender a diversos sectores, desde eventos y plataformas de comercio electrónico hasta restaurantes, bares y hoteles.

Hoy, Grupo Primo Bebidas sigue siendo impulsado por la misma visión que nos inspiró al principio: ofrecer a nuestros clientes la más amplia selección de bebidas de alta calidad y una experiencia única de servicio. 

A medida que continuamos creciendo, nos enorgullece ver cómo nuestra historia se entrelaza con la de aquellos que han confiado en nosotros para elevar sus experiencias de consumo de bebidas.

Name: For Friends Wine AB
Description:
For Friends Wine is a Swedish company that specializes in importing premium wines from the European Union (EU). Our mission is to bring the best of Europe's wine culture to Sweden, and to provide our customers with a diverse range of high-quality wines from different regions of the EU. We are passionate about wine and our focus is on building long-term relationships with our customers and providing them with exceptional service and value.
Our wine selection is curated by a team of wine experts, who have a deep understanding of the European wine culture and the unique characteristics of different regions. We work directly with wineries and wine cooperatives in the EU to source the best quality wines, and we are always on the lookout for new and exciting wines to add to our collection. We believe that every bottle of wine tells a story of the region it comes from, and we want our customers to experience the rich and diverse cultural heritage of the EU through our wines.

Our EU wine collection includes a wide range of wines, from full-bodied reds to crisp whites and refreshing rosés. We offer wines from some of the most renowned wine regions in Europe. Our selection also includes wines made from different grape varieties, such as Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Chardonnay, Pinot Noir, Fetesca Negra and Riesling.

At For Friends Wine, we believe that wine is more than just a drink, it's a lifestyle. We are committed to providing our customers with an exceptional wine experience, and we offer a range of services to help them discover new and exciting wines. Our website includes detailed information about each wine in our collection, including tasting notes, food pairings, and serving suggestions. We also offer regular wine tastings, and our team of wine experts is always available to answer any questions our customers may have.

At For Friends Wine, we are committed to providing our customers with the highest quality wines and exceptional service.

Name: Patriot Hard Seltzer
Description:
As Americans we are all united under the same star spangled banner, and we all know someone, whether a friend or relative, who has served this country. Far too often those heroes go unrecognized, and that’s where we at PATRIOT step in. 

In a world riddled with endless options of replicant beverages, there is only one proudly American-made, America-first premium hard seltzer. We are well aware of all the others out there, but nobody, not a single one is doing what we are.

We are unapologetic in our love for the greatest country in the history of mankind (it’s pretty obvious). So crack open an ice cold one, and enjoy the ‘Taste of Freedom’ to celebrate everything America, all year long.

Name: Huski Ice Spritz
Description: Huski created a new drink, Ice Spritz. Clean, crisp and light. With an authentic taste of lemon, a touch of sweetness and real vodka. Think of summer afternoons in Italy or Southern France, sitting in a café with a sparkling refreshment. Life goes by, and you feel like time has stopped. We may not be able to stop time for you, but we captured the taste of those relaxing afternoons in Huski Ice Spritz. Enjoy!

Name: Vinonista
Description:
Att njuta av ett riktigt bra vin är fantastik upplevelse. För att ett vin ska vara fantastiskt så krävs kärlek till druvorna och passion i vinmakeriet på vingården.

Vinonistas viner kommer från småskaliga vinbönder i Italien. Vårt mål är få fler att upptäcka och värdesätta kvalitén i hantverksmässigt producerade viner.

Vi säljer till restaurang och privatpersoner i både Danmark och Sverige.

Name: DIVI S.r.l.
Description:
Distribution Internationale de Vins Italiens.

D.I.V.I. Srl was founded in July 2015 and has a sole shareholder, Andrea W. Garwood. The concept of D.I.V.I. originated from input received from importers around the globe. We consistently heard the same identical “pains” from our clients, no matter from what country. Organizing orders from wineries in different regions was always problematic. Language barriers, different time zones, coordinating the pick –ups, collecting analyses…it all took time away from what our clients really wanted to, which is to sell wine. So D.I.V.I. was created with this in mind…to allow importers to choose wines from regions covering the entire peninsula and the islands, and not have to think about anything else. D.I.V.I. takes care of all the laborious tasks so the importer can focus on selecting and selling.

The main sales office is based in Trieste, Italy, Andrea takes care of all international markets, while Paris Jack is responsible for our social media and promotional activity.

The D.I.V.I. selection includes entry level wines, boutique wines, organic and vegan wines, natural wines as well as OEM/private label options. The one criteria to be included in the D.I.V.I. Selection is that the price to quality ratio must be honest.

The D.I.V.I. selection is not static, instead, a living element, and continuously grows with new discoveries that become additions. If you are a wine producer, please contact us and perhaps we can collaborate. D.I.V.I. is always reviewing new products in order to provide our importers with a unique and vast selection. 

Lastly, if an importer is searching for a specific product and D.I.V.I. does not have it, we will find it! Some of our best sellers are products that were identified for a client and have now become pillars of the selection.

Description:
A LITTLE TIRED OF THE USUAL SPRITZ?
Between you and us, the traditional spritz experience is getting a little boring.
Middle of the road, artificial, and orange.

SAME SPRITZ, DIFFERENT DAY.

MOGUL SPRITZ LIQUEUR

Finance

Logistic
The logistics are operated by our own in-house warehouse team, based in Blanquefort near Bordeaux. This warehouse allows us to monitor our stock condition and prepare parcels to be collected in optimal timeline.
Our secured and temperature-controlled warehouse, fully compliant to storage quality standards ensures optimal storing conditions, with 1500 references ready to be shipped worldwide.

We look forward to working together in the future.

The Wine and Export team

Name: OLD BAILE Irish Whiskey
Description:
Old Baile Irish Whiskey – Rum Cask Finished Timeless Craft, Modern Spirit

From an old mill to a bold new legacy, Old Baile Irish Whiskey is where tradition meets innovation. 

Rooted in the Old Carrick Mill Distillery, a historic flour mill in Carrickmacross, County Monaghan, this whiskey is a tribute to Ireland’s rich distilling heritage—crafted with authenticity, refined for today.Named after the Irish words for “Old Town,” Old Baile is a nod to the past while embracing the present.

 It stands for quality without compromise, tradition without limitations, and a drinking experience that feels both familiar and excitingly new.

Triple distilled in traditional copper pot stills, aged in American ex-bourbon barrels, and finished in Appleton Rum casks, Old Baile delivers a smooth, complex, and contemporary profile. Expect layers of vanilla, caramel, and toasted oak, with a subtle warmth of tropical spice and dark fruit from the rum cask influence.

Our naturally filtered limestone spring water enhances every drop, ensuring an exceptionally clean and balanced whiskey. It’s a taste of Ireland’s past, made for the modern drinker.

Raise a glass to Old Baile—where history is distilled, and the future is poured.

The Founders Behind Old Baile

Old Baile was born from a shared vision of three industry veterans—Steven, Eddie, and Artem—entrepreneurs with a combined 30+ years in hospitality. With deep expertise in bar culture, drinks trends, and spirits innovation, they set out to create a whiskey that bridges tradition with contemporary craftsmanship.

At the heart of Old Baile is Steven, our Master Distiller, whose passion for whiskey-making is unmatched. With an unwavering dedication to precision and quality, he blends time-honored techniques with modern refinement, ensuring every bottle delivers a bold yet balanced experience.

Together, they’ve built more than just a brand—they’ve crafted a whiskey that tells a story, sip by sip.

4. Age Statements Only

Many of our selections are single cask releases, each telling a unique story shaped by the wood it matured in. We're transparent about every detail, from the distillery to the specific cask type, so you know exactly what's in your glass.

Name: Por Osos Vodka
Description:
Por Osos Vodka? Absolutely. It’s the brainchild of your two favorite bears: Tom Segura and Bert Kreischer. This vodka doesn’t just boast top-notch taste—it’s made with all-natural ingredients and distilled using innovative, patented methods. The result is a spirit that’s as bold and unique as its creators.

And the name? It’s more than just catchy. “Por Osos” translates from Spanish to “for bears,” a nod to two friends who set out to make a vodka that inspires good times and new connections. It’s vodka crafted with a sense of humor, a love for friendship, and an embrace of bears from all walks of life.

Name: Greenwood Whiskey
Description: Greenwood Whiskey is a premium black owned whiskey brand that symbolizes a celebration of the commitment to excellence that you strive for in your day to day life. We were inspired by the Greenwood neighborhood in Tulsa, Oklahoma. In 1901 the community of Greenwood was the birthplace of “Black Wall Street”. Black Wall Street was home to 600 African American Owned Businesses. This was the largest concentration of black owned businesses in the US during a time where African Americans didn’t have many rights or resources. Our whiskey is a celebration of those innovative and persistent entrepreneurs that came before us.

Name: La Collongeoise
Description:
« La Collongeoise » est une marque de bière blonde artisanale reconnue pour sa légèreté, son amertume et ses notes légèrement maltées.

Profondément attachés à notre magnifique lac Léman, aussi appelé lac de Collonge-Bellerive , nous soutenons financièrement l'Association pour la Sauvegarde du Léman (ASL) https://asleman.org/. 

Pour le stockage de nos précieuses bouteilles, nous collaborons avec les Établissements Publics de l’Intégration (EPI) https://www.epi.ge.ch/les-epi/accueil/ . 

Pour assurer les livraisons chez nos clients, nous travaillons avec ADNprojet  https://adnprojet.ch/ qui a pour but de favoriser l’insertion professionnelle des jeunes adultes et adolescents en rupture de formation. 

L’équipe de « La Collongeoise » est heureuse de collaborer au quotidien avec ces organisations et d'apporter notre contribution à des causes qui nous tiennent à cœur. Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure locale, sociale et environnementale !

Name: Intimo Wines
Description:
Introducing - Intimo Wines LLC

Unlock the Hidden Treasures of Italian Winemaking with Intimo Wines.

For over 20 years, we didn’t just live in Italy, we became part of its winemaking soul. We walked the vineyards at dawn, shared meals with master vintners, and uncovered bottles never meant to leave their native soil. 

Now, we bring these rare, extraordinary wines to New England’s most discerning palates. 

At Intimo Wines, we go beyond importing and distributing wine, we curate an exclusive experience. 

Our Private Collection is more than a selection of fine wines; it’s a passport to the artistry, passion, and centuries-old traditions that define Italy’s most coveted vineyards. 

These are wines you won’t find in the usual places, they are crafted in limited quantities, hand-selected for their depth, character, and their ability to captivate the senses. 

Why settle for ordinary when you can taste the extraordinary? 

Each bottle we choose isn’t just a wine, it’s a story, a masterpiece, a moment waiting to be uncorked. Whether you’re an everyday wine drinker seeking the next great discovery or a top connoisseur craving authenticity, Intimo Wines delivers an experience that transcends the glass.

This is wine the way it was meant to be - intimate, rare, unforgettable. 

Are you ready to taste the difference?

The wines you'll find here are a private collection created from an authentic appreciation for Italy, and a true passion for the food and wine culture unique to the country.

After 15 years of living Italy to the fullest, we are proud to return home to present our portfolio of select award winning Italian wines.

Sharing our private collection of wines with those who share our passion for the grape. 

-Intimo Wines-

Name: SurfCraft Brewing Co.
Description:
Everything we do at SurfCraft is a creative collaboration between the beer and surf industry. We are celebrating our local history, craftsmanship, and transformational impact on modern-day surfing in every one of our beers.

Inspired by the Brookvale Six and the history of surfing on the Northern Beaches, the Six are largely credited to starting the surf industry and bringing modern surfing to Australia. Together, they ended up producing 90 percent of Australia’s surfboards and with the help of cheaper rent they turned Brookvale into the nation's surfing capital - Surf City. 

The Brookvale Six were no strangers to a beer or two, either, and used to rotate beer duties so they could enjoy a keg of the good stuff at knockoff. This tradition was held every friday after blowing foam all week in the factories.

Here at SurfCraft we have decided it's high time this area reforged the link between the two types of foam that have put us on the map. Our mission is to unite the worlds of shaping beers and crafting boards has led to SurfCraft, a beer label inspired by the style and spirit of the Northern Beaches surf culture.
Location: Factories of Modern-Day Surfing, Brookvale, NSW

Nasze produkty to nie tylko wyjątkowe trunki, ale także wyraz dbałości o najwyższy standard, czego przykładem jest linia alkoholi CZYSTA ODWAGA.

Nieustannie poszukujemy i selekcjonujemy najlepsze rzemieślnicze destylaty z całej Polski, tak, by zadowolić nawet najbardziej wymagające gusta. Odkryj z nami trunki najwyższej jakości, które łączą w sobie bogactwo smaku i głębię aromatu.

Name: Fushion Drinks
Description:
Fushion is een Premium mixdrank merk dat is opgericht in Nederland. De naam is ontstaan vanuit de fusie van twee woorden, fusion en fashion. Dit staat voor "een geïnspireerde levensstijl presenteren door middel van mode". Fushion is een Nederlands merk geïnspireerd door Zuid-Amerikaanse invloeden, waar het leven in het teken staat om het leven te vieren. Net als het zonnige en warme weer en het gevoel dat je krijgt als je in Zuid-Amerika bent, zorgt Fushion ervoor dat je je even in Zuid-Amerika waant.

Fushion is een moderne drank met een Fashion DNA waardoor iedereen zich met Fushion kan identificeren. Met onze drankjes kun je elke gelegenheid groot of klein vieren. Elke smaakbeleving is fantastisch, sensationeel & vooral smaakvol; dus waar wacht je nog op? Ontdek de smaaksensatie van Premium mixdrank van Fushion!

Wij experimenteren met originele ingrediënten, smaken en hoogwaardige bereidingswijzen voor onze dranken. In de snel evoluerende wereld waar we ons nu in bevinden zijn consumenten doorgaans op zoek naar nieuwe smaakervaringen binnen de mix dranken industrie. Daarom willen wij onze consumenten kennis laten maken de verrassende smaken van Fushion!

Name: Vinos con Historia
Description:
Elaborado a partir de una esmerada y cuidadosa selección manual de uvas de la variedad syrah, variedad de tinto procedente de Persia que los romanos llamaban uva alobrógica en la época alto-imperial romana.
En nuestro proceso de elaboración se han utilizado las técnicas practicadas en la época romana, realizando la fermentación en vasijas de barro y recubrimiento de miel y posterior macerado con flores. Rosas y violetas proporcionan un compendio aromático muy característico a este caldo.

LANCEMENT AOÛT 2025 !!!

Name: DRINKZ
Description:
Bij DRINKZ draait alles om hoogwaardige dranken, passie en persoonlijke aandacht. Ons exclusieve assortiment, rechtstreeks ingekocht bij de beste merkeigenaren, staat garant voor kwaliteit en authenticiteit.

Name: Paulaner Distribuzione Srl
Description: “Gut, besser, Paulaner”, ovvero "Buona, migliore, Paulaner": il noto slogan del birrificio Paulaner non è solo uno slogan pubblicitario, ma un principio guida per ogni dipendente Paulaner. Dal 1634, il nome Paulaner è sinonimo di altissima qualità e dell'arte bavarese della birra. I nostri mastri birrai creano una gamma diversificata: dai classici come la Weissbier e Münchner Hell alle specialità come la Salvator e la birra dell'Oktoberfest e alle creazioni di birre regionali tedesche. Da un'azienda tradizionale a conduzione familiare, Paulaner si è sviluppata in un'azienda di successo, moderna e di mentalità globale, le cui birre sono oggi esportate in oltre 80 Paesi in tutto il mondo. Paulaner Distribuzione è la sede unica per la commercializzazione dei marchi in Italia.

Name: Apex Brewing
Description:
Opening in 2015 as Alberta's first rural destination brewery, Apex Brewing was built by family and friends in the untamed wilds of Yellowhead County.

Name: Het Wijnhuis
Description:
Smaak is persoonlijk maar kwaliteit is dit echter niet. Om deze kwaliteit te bereiken is Het Wijnhuis nauw betrokken bij het productieproces. Samen met onze wijnbouwers ontwikkelen we een langdurig partnership, wat ons in staat stelt de wijnen te optimaliseren. Uiteenlopende wijnlanden met verschillende druivenrassen, geteeld op specifieke ondergronden, geven een waaier van smaken. Het Wijnhuis zorgt voor een divers aanbod aan smaken, in een uitgebreid gamma van wijnen exclusief op de Belgische markt. Het Wijnhuis-team luistert graag naar jouw unieke smaak!

Het Wijnhuis neemt vaak deel aan het productieproces om te diversifiëren en om specifieke behoeftes in de markt in te vullen (eigen ontwikkelde labels). Elk wijnjaar wordt zorgvuldig gecontroleerd.

Wij vertegenwoordigen meer dan 1000 wijnen, van meer dan 100 verschillende wijndomeinen. Het assortiment strekt zich niet enkel over de oude wereld, maar ook de nieuwe wereld komt ruim aan bod zoals Frankrijk, Italië, Spanje, Portugal, Duitsland, Luxemburg, Oostenrijk, Chili, Zuid-Afrika, Argentinië, Nieuw-Zeeland, Australië, Macedonië en Amerika. Alle wijnen worden exclusief op de Belgische markt
aangeboden.

Our logistics team ensures efficient delivery timelines, typically within 2 working days.

Join us at WineOnline.bg and elevate your wine offerings today. Together, we can create memorable wine experiences for your customers while driving growth for your business.

Name: Riddles Alcoholic Ice Tea
Description:
Riddles is here to celebrate those that live loud. A ridiculously refreshing alcoholic ice tea blend. Low in calorie. Big in flavour.  

Founded by Charlie Kaane, who discovered the powers of Moringa Tea when visiting his mother in Nigeria. Our vibrant canned cocktails are bursting at the seams with sunshine and taste. 

The first, a sunshine-drenched mango & aromatic dark rum blend and the second, a zesty citrus & fruity gold tequila mix.

Connect with us to stay updated on our latest flavourful creations and to be part of a community that knows how to #LiveLoud.

Name: Shelfdrop
Description:
We built Shelfdrop because we believe brands deserve another route to spirit distribution.

Our D2C-first approach connects spirit brands to millions of active monthly shoppers and builds a strong foundation: faster sell-outs, faster payments, recurring revenue, higher customer lifetime value, and brand loyalty.

Bonded warehousing to doorstep, Shelfdrop leverages modern distribution infrastructure built for direct to consumer. With end-to-end operations covering d2c, trade, marketplaces & quick commerce ordering platforms.

Shelfdrop removes legal, licensing, and logistical barriers that prevents brands from selling directly to millions of online grocery consumers in the UK & EU.

Name: La Manuela Mezcal
Description:
En La Manuela, transformamos la tradición mezcalera en una experiencia única, atrevida y auténtica. Elaborado con pasión en Oaxaca, nuestro mezcal celebra la riqueza del agave con tres sabores icónicos: Espadín Clásico, Spicy Tamarindo y Sandía.

Con el lema "Hazme el favor", llevamos un toque de picardía y diversión a cada botella, convirtiéndola en el alma de tus reuniones, brindis y momentos especiales. Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer un mezcal artesanal de la más alta calidad, mientras fusionamos tradición y modernidad en cada sorbo.

Porque en La Manuela, no solo bebemos mezcal: vivimos, reímos y brindamos con él.

Name: Bellissimo Vino Edinburgh
Description:
Welcome to Bellissimo Vino Edinburgh. 

We’re a family-run independent wine wholesale and merchant business. Our goal is to source true quality award-winning products from artisan wineries from across the globe. We only source and import what we love.

Our passion is wine and we want to reflect that with how we operate by providing the most exceptional service. Our team will go the extra mile for you.

We have an exclusive selection of wines and none of our labels can be found in any supermarkets or across the U.K.

From beginner to expert, house wines to fine wines, we have something for all. Whether you’re just looking for a nice glass of wine to enjoy or that something a little bit special, we have you covered. As well as wines, we have a fantastic selection of luxury wine gifts available all year round.

We promise you with every sip, you will want more and more. Truly Bellissimo!

Name: Vineyard Hamburg GmbH
Description:
Das VINEYARD…
… mehr als ein Weinhandel.

•	Großhandel für Restaurants, Bars, Hotels und Theater
•	Verkauf im Weinlager in der Osterstrasse 92 
•	Onlinehandel mit deutschlandweitem Versand
•	Präsentservice, individualisiert mit Versand
•	Weinseminare und Veranstaltungen für 15 bis 150 Personen
•	Weinbar

Wilkommen in der Welt des Weins.

Das VINEYARD in Hamburg ist der Wein-Großhändler für Gastronomie und Hotellerie.
Und auch in unserem Weinladen im Herzen Hamburgs sorgen wir mit einem umfangreichen Sortiment für hochwertigen Weingenuss für jedermann. Wir sind Ihr Experte für Weine und legen großen Wert auf natürliche Produkte und ausgezeichnete Winzer. 

Überzeugt Euch selbst!

Unsere Winzer setzen auf Nachhaltigkeit und Qualität.
In unserem Weinhandel in Hamburg-Eimsbüttel könnt Ihr Euch selbst von der erstklassigen Qualität der Weine überzeugen. Hier gilt es, sich zwischen mehr als 500 verschiedenen Weinen zu entscheiden, unsere Mitarbeiter beraten Euch dabei gerne.

Wir beliefern die Gastronomie im Großraum Hamburg und ganz Deutschland mit Weinen. Erstellen gemeinsam mit und für unsere Partner Weinkarten, führen Schulungen rund ums Thema Wein durch und führen Vernstaltung für unsere Kunden vor Ort durch.

Das aktuelle Sortiment findet Ihr natürlich auch in unserem Online Shop. 
Sehr beliebt sind unsere Produkte als Weingeschenke für Familie, Freunde oder Geschäftspartner. 

Gerne stehen wir bei Fragen Rund ums Thema Wein zur verfügung.

Das VINEYARD...
...mehr als ein Weinhandel.

Name: Signature Drinks Newcastle
Description:
With decades of experience and a fresh perspective, we’re here to serve venues, producers, and customers alike - bridging tradition and innovation in every interaction. 

Trade Wholesaling: Tailored solutions for bars, pubs, clubs, cafes, and restaurant. Supplying your venue with quality products that your customers will love.

Name: Box Bizar
Description:
In the idyllic Zenne Valley, located on the border with the picturesque Pajottenland in Belgium, the story of Box Bizar begins, an innovative concept deeply rooted in the world of spirits. Box Bizar, housed in the charming church of the hamlet of Ten Broek, is not just a company. It's a vision. A vision that started in 2019 with the purchase of the historic church, after a demanding buying process that lasted for more than a year.

A look at Box Bizar reveals an unexpected world. Here, five different aspects of the spirits industry have found each other, intertwined in harmonious balance. A shop offers the public a carefully selected assortment of spirits. A tasting room invites the tasting and enjoyment of the subtle nuances of each product. The tasting club brings together like-minded individuals to learn and share experiences. The independent bottlings reveal unique and rare editions. Lastly, the crowning achievement, the micro-distillery, a sanctuary where craftsmanship and innovation come together to create exceptional spirits.

The realization of Box Bizar was, however, not an easy task. In the early stages, progress was hampered by the COVID-19 pandemic and the war in Ukraine, making it a challenge to find contractors and construction workers. Over the first two years after the purchase, the Box Bizar team had to carry out various unforeseen works themselves. But against all odds, the project reached a critical milestone in the autumn of 2024: the completion of the renovation of the church into a home. This formed the starting point for the development of the heart of Box Bizar.

Today, Box Bizar is taking another next step in its development. Follow our journey and come enjoy with us the delights we have to offer.

No corn, no fillers.

High Desert Cactus Vodka is a labor of love we created for you, the trailblazer, the stargazer, the artist, and the muse.

Our first drink is a multi-award winning contemporary gin, that stands happily on its own as a sipping gin, mixes well with a wide range of tonics for a refreshing cocktail and whose orange and spice notes make it the perfect base for a Negroni.

Our second spirit is another award winning London Dry Gin with a contemporary edge, with lemon and grapefruit pushed to the fore and organic British oats milled in Cumbria, providing a smooth entry to this delicious citrus forward gin. Perfect for a classic G&T and exquisite in a Martini.

Description:
Based in Vancouver and established in 2017, 77 Spirits Inc. is the first black owned independent bottler of sugar cane spirits in Canada. We currently source craft rums from around the world and bottle them with local partners and distribute them across Canada. There is no one else in Canada with the same business model.

With each expression we produce approximately 1000 bottles of rum, as such they are limited release and no longer available once the batch is sold out. Our flagship brand is BIRA!  Under this brand we have three different sugar cane spirit expressions on the market with a fourth one scheduled to be bottled at the end of the year.

Name: Rego Fine Wine
Description: Rego wines are high-altitude wines (DOC) from Beira Interior which are easy to drink, super smooth, bare-minimum sulfates, fruitful and delicious.

Name: COQAR - Maison de Champagne
Description:
Je suis Cyril, fondateur de COQAR - Maison de Champagne, une jeune entreprise de négociant en vin de Champagne. Je travail en étroite collaboration avec un viticulteur de la côte des bar pour l’élaboration de notre nouvelle cuvée : Noir Ultra ! 

Nous vous proposons de déguster notre nouvelle cuvée Noir Ultra, 
Ce Champagne 100 % Pinot noir du sud de la champagne (côte des Bar), bénéficie d’au moins 6 ans de vieillissement en cave avant dégorgement !
Le dosage reste très sobre, pour donner à cette cuvée Extra brut, son plein potentiel et laisser  s’exprimer toute sa palette aromatique !

Name: Magic Drinks
Description:
A well-established wholesaler providing its customers with a full range of Wines, Spirits, Beers, Ciders and Soft Drinks.  

Suppliers to Bars, Restaurants, Pubs, Hotels, Offices and Schools.

We cater for Weddings, Engagements, Partys and all Events

Free delivery and excellent service with the most competitive prices.

Name: Weinhandel Trixi Bannert
Description:
Unser Motto lautet "Wir verbinden Menschen"!

Zu unseren Schwerpunkten gehören Weinseminare, Kochkurse und Weinproben in der Gastronomie oder in unseren eigenen Räumen, der Wein- und Kochschule am Buldernweg in Münsters Süden.

In unseren Räumen richten wir Ihre Firmen-und Familienfeiern aus, dazu bieten wir ein eigenes professionelles Catering. Von 10 bis 100 Personen können bei uns feiern, essen und trinken. Auch Hochzeiten, Jubiläen, Geburtstage und Weinproben können Sie bei uns erleben.

Selbstverständlich führen wir erlesene deutsche und internationale Weine, internationale Feinkost und schönste Präsente im Verkauf.

Unser Onlineshop ist voller Sekte, Champagner, Weißweine, Roséweine, Rotweine und Feinkost, lassen Sie sich beraten und inspirieren. Bestellen können Sie per Telefon, Email oder im Shop, wir haben einen Lieferservice oder Sie kommen uns im Weinhandel Trixi Bannert direkt besuchen.

Wir freuen uns auf Sie, Ihr Team Trixi Bannert

Name: SAOUFE Dégustation
Description:
Saoufé Dégustation est une petite entreprise familiale située au sud de la Sarthe. 
Nous proposons à nos clients une sélection de produits artisanaux et originaux.

Nous avons à l'idée de faire une liqueur arrangée dans laquelle on reconnaîtrait les fruits les yeux fermés.

Nous intervenons pour des évènements privés et professionnels. Grâce à la mise en place d'animations et de dégustations en plus des bouteilles individuelles.

Notre nom est devenu synonyme de qualité exotique sarthoise.

Notre promesse:

Un délicieux voyage gustatif.

Name: Lucky Girl Rosé
Description: Lucky Girl Rosé Wine has a smooth, elegant finish with a lingering hint of red fruit and a touch of oak spice. Well-balanced acidity that refreshes the palate and enhances the fruit flavors. Subtle minerality reminiscent of wet stone found in the terroir of the Ojai Valley.

Name: Schatzi Wines
Description:
Schatzi Wines operates a more direct and focused import model, strengthening the connection between wine growers and wine drinkers. We operate with integrity and transparency, in direct collaboration with growers, to bring the best wines to the market at the best possible prices.

Schatzi is derived from German, a diminutive of schatz, a term of endearment, literally and figuratively “little treasure.” Casually, schatzi is a term meaning a close friend—someone with whom you have fun, confide in and trust.

We are dedicated to working alongside growers to bring great wines to the market. The portfolio consists of environmentally-conscious winemakers from Germany, Austria, France (Champagne, Loire, Burgundy, and Beaujolais), Italy, Slovenia, Switzerland, and Luxembourg.  Collaborating closely with our growers, we can shrink margins and offer more diverse selections. This model benefits the grower, importer, distributor, wine shop, sommelier, and consumer. We will continue to grow the portfolio intimately and organically, representing wines that respect the earth and give voice to terroir—wines we care about and feel connected to.

Schatzi Wines will work with other schatzis, because life is too short to do otherwise. This applies to winemakers who understand and support our vision—who want a stronger voice regarding how their wines are represented in the United States—and to distributors, restaurants, and retailers who seek authentic, hand-crafted, terroir-driven wines at a fair price.

Name: Enogarage Vinoteca
Description: Somos Vinoteca Enogarage. Contamos con cuatro sucursales y una tienda online con la mayor variedad de vinos, espumantes, whisky y destilados. Nos destacamos por ser expertos en vinos. Realizamos catas y eventos con las mejores bodegas.
Location: Ciudad de Buenos Aires , Buenos Aires

Name: Bjorne Beer
Description: Bjorne Beer - La birra dell'orso è un brand presente sul mercato italiano dal 1987, inizialmente con la "8,3%", una birra ad alta gradazione dal gusto piacevole e inebriante, ma dal 2024 anche con la "Pils 4,6%", che con la sua gradazione leggera e il gusto avvincente, si propone come una nuova attrice nel settore delle birre.

Name: Tchin Tchin Premium Cocktails
Description:
Tchin Tchin Cocktails specializes in premix cocktails that effortlessly transform enthusiasts into masterful cocktail mixologists.

At the heart of Tchin Tchin is a dedicated trio united by their passion for the craft, cultivating an ambiance that beckons patrons to indulge. We meticulously refine every aspect, ensuring that our offerings collectively astonish, delight, and infuse evenings with memorable vibrancy among cherished friends or significant others.

Through Tchin Tchin Cocktails, we amalgamate decades of industry expertise into a single product, empowering establishments of all scales - be it restaurants, cafes, or bars - to treat their guests to an unparalleled ambiance that can only be cultivated by a top-tier cocktail experience.

Name: Raicilla Imports
Description:
Raicilla Imports LLC was formed by Amber Sellers and Ethan Lovell, both of Venice, CA, in 2018 with the express purpose of importing and launching select brands of Raicilla in the North American market. 
Our first brand to market, Raicilla De Una, launched in California in April 2020 and is now available for distribution through:

We are actively seeking investments to grow our brand through community building and grass roots marketing efforts. 
Distill your wealth,  invest with us! 
https://wefunder.com/raicilla.imports

Name: Seven Tails Brandy
Description: We follow our own path, perfecting the art of the blend to redefine brandy as tradition knows it.

Name: Tchin Tchin - The total barsolution
Description: Tchin Tchin specialiserer sig i håndlavede drikkevarer og samarbejder med B2B-kunder i hele Danmark. Vores sortiment består af mocktails (alkoholfrit), cocktails, shots og garnish, og vores mission er at være så bæredygtig som muligt, ved at begrænse vores spild og i stedet skabe nye produkter af restprodukterne. Alle produkterne er udviklet og håndlavet af Christophe Daudigny, som har +26 år på den store bartenderscene. Vi er et lille team, som holder til i Sabro Aarhus. Udover at producerer, tager Christophe også ud og hjælper barer/restauranter med at optimerer deres bar og skaber et godt flow i både service og gæsteoplevelsen. Vi tager til events, messer og festivaller med vores unikke "appelsin-bar" og det er både til privat og firma arrangementer.

Name: Astrolabio Whiskey & Spirits
Description:
Non ci riconosciamo nella definizione di “imbottigliatori indipendenti”, poiché non riflette appieno la nostra essenza. Siamo veri e propri selezionatori di esperienze uniche nel mondo del Whiskey e degli Spirits.

Selezionando con cura le migliori botti, creiamo un connubio perfetto tra le note intense del Whiskey e la complessità dei profumi del vino. La nostra passione per i distillati pregiati non si limita al Whiskey. Esploriamo un'ampia gamma di Spirits, selezionando con cura le migliori botti di Rum, Grappa e altri distillati d'eccellenza.

Ogni nostra bottiglia è un tesoro esclusivo, affinata in botti di vino pregiate, selezionate per conferire al Whiskey ed agli Spirits un carattere inconfondibile. Questo processo meticoloso, realizzato in collaborazione con le migliori distillerie scozzesi e irlandesi per i Whiskey, e italiane ed internazionali per gli Spirits, parte dalla selezione di singole botti, ognuna delle quali da vita a bottiglie uniche e numerate che raccontano storie di terre lontane e tradizioni.

Ogni bottiglia ripercorre la sua storia attraverso l'etichetta, ricca di dettagli e informazioni, dalla selezione della botte all’affinamento, per offrire un’esperienza di totale trasparenza. Un viaggio sensoriale che va oltre il gusto, dove ogni sorso è un capitolo di una storia di passione, innovazione e qualità senza compromessi.

Il nostro impegno per la ricerca dell'eccellenza si fonde con uno studio costante e con la spinta all'innovazione. Grazie alla nostra profonda conoscenza dei vini, principalmente italiani, e alle partnership con rinomate cantine, diamo vita a collaborazioni con l'obiettivo di esplorare nuove frontiere nel mondo del Whiskey e degli Spirits.

Name: BLVD Drinks
Description: We are changing the way the world enjoys quality pre-batched cocktails at home or on the go!

Name: Ron Calero
Description:
"A Symphony of Heritage and Grandeur."
Ron Calero is a rum brand that pays tribute to the "Caleros," the workers involved in the construction of the Panama Canal. This rum captures the unique essence of Panamanian rum and transports you to a world of history and tradition. Each bottle invites you to indulge in captivating flavors and raise a toast in honor of the Caleros' legacy.

Name: Premium Vinum
Description:
Premium Vinum est un caviste distributeur spécialisé dans la vente de vins et champagnes d'exception sur la Côte d'Azur et Monaco, et aussi en ligne sur toute la France, l’Europe et l’Amérique.

Nous sélectionnons les meilleures bouteilles de vin de chaque région selon leur complexité, équilibre et intensité. Un gage de qualité sans égal. Les plus beaux cols, fruit du travail de vignerons engagés, respectueux de la tradition, du terroir et de l’environnement. 

Fournisseur de vins et champagnes pour entreprises & CE, restaurants, traiteurs et hôtels en région PACA et Monaco, composition de caves, dégustations privées, mariages en Provence.

Expéditions en Europe/Monde via DHL et Chronopost, et localement en région PACA.

www.premiumvinum.com

Name: Vin Aventures
Description:
De globe-trotteurs à passionnés de vin
Depuis 25 ans, nous explorons… et aujourd’hui, c’est le Languedoc que nous voulons vous faire découvrir.
À travers nos coffrets de vins, nous partageons nos coups de cœur et notre première cuvée née à Faugères, terroir d’exception baigné de soleil.
Ouvrez un coffret, et laissez-vous embarquer… chaque bouteille est une escale.  

L'abus d'alcool est dangereux pour la santé, à consommer avec modération

Name: American Custom Distilling
Description:
American Custom Distilling proudly offers a full-service distilling solution for entrepreneurs, brands, and companies looking to create their own premium spirits. A division of Virginia Distillery Company, we specialize in producing American Single Malt Whisky with the same dedication to craftsmanship and quality that has defined our flagship brands, Courage & Conviction and Virginia Distillery Co.

Our expertise extends beyond single malt whisky production. With state-of-the-art facilities and a deep network of industry connections, we have the capability to produce, age, and bottle a wide range of distilled spirits. From concept to bottle, we serve as your one-stop solution to bring your spirits brand to life. Whether you're looking to create a unique American Single Malt Whisky or explore other categories, we provide the flexibility and resources to meet your specific needs.

At American Custom Distilling, we are more than just a distillery – we are your partner in creating exceptional spirits. Let us help you craft the perfect product for your brand, with the quality, precision, and dedication that you deserve.

Name: Mr. L's Cocktails
Description:
Mr. L's Cocktails is a unique product for the on-trade industry only. 

We don't believe that good cocktails should be full of fuss, take an excessive length of time to make, vary depending on the mixologist, or even result in a mess that must be cleaned up after each order.

Thanks to Mr. L's Cocktails, you can now have professional standard cocktails with no time constraints, no mess and no fuss. Just quality cocktails, each and every time.

Handcrafted cocktails created for the hospitality trade, enjoyed by all.

Name: New Asha Wine Stores
Description:
New Asha Wine Stores, established in 1996, is a leading liquor retailer in Sri Lanka with locations in Battaramulla and Borella. With nearly three decades of experience, we are known for delivering a premium selection of local and international wines, spirits, and beers — all at highly competitive prices.

We specialize in bulk orders, cater to multinational corporations, and provide certified premium bottles at some of the lowest prices in the market. Our commitment to authenticity, customer service, and long-standing partnerships has made us a trusted supplier for both private celebrations and large-scale corporate events.

Whether you’re planning a wedding, hosting a corporate function, or simply looking for top-tier liquor at great value, New Asha Wine Stores is your reliable partner in creating exceptional experiences.

 For inquiries, call us on 076 600 4420

Name: CAVES CAIREL
Description: Depuis 1844, la famille Cairel déniche pour vous les crus des meilleurs vignerons. Les Caves Cairel ce sont 300m² d'exposition de vins et de spiritueux. Nous proposons les crus des meilleurs vignerons, aux prix de la propriété aux particuliers, entreprises (notamment restaurateurs).

Name: Fleet Street Wine Merchants
Description: Fleet Street Wine Merchants is a fine wine importer and distributor servicing retailers and restaurants in New York, New Jersey, Delaware and Pennsylvania.

Name: Hunter Wine Marketing

Established in 1977 as a small bay area wine brokerage has grown into a regional broker and importer. In our market, the western area of Northern California, we represent:
Fine California wineries and Artisan wines from Argentina, Chile, France, Italy, Oregon, New Zealand, Spain and Washington We pride ourselves on our commitment to the highest level of customer service and the superior quality and value of the wines in our portfolio.
