Van service tot selectie, altijd maar één telefoontje verwijderd.

Wijnlevering | kelderbeheer | geschenken | klimaatkasten | wijnkaarten

Name: WineSelection.fr
Description:
EXIT LES COSTARDS-CRAVATE :
Chez WineSelection.fr, on est persuadés qu’on peut parler vin tout en restant fidèle à qui l’on est. En l’occurrence, un collectif de sommeliers passionnés par leur métier et une furieuse envie de le partager. Chez nous, jean-baskets riment avec conseils ultra-select.
Notre mission, transmettre toute l’expertise et le savoir de notre Wine Collectif avec simplicité, enthousiasme et sans filtres, pour une expérience d’achat du vin résolument cool mais surtout, résolument vraie.
ON TE PROPOSE :
Des avis honnêtes et clairs, sans descriptions à rallonge, des conseils personnalisés, et surtout de l’authenticité !
Que tu sois expert ou amateur, à la recherche d’un vin pour un barbec’ ou pour ton mariage, on sélectionne pour toi de super cuvées à prix justes, qu’on te présente sans en faire trop.
ET ÇA DONNE LE “WINE COLLECTIF” !
Un concept pensé sans prise de tête par des sommeliers passés par les plus belles Maisons, qui veulent démocratiser leur savoir en chahutant gentiment ta façon de consommer !
Plus fair, plus transparent, plus personnalisé – aussi bien en termes de prix que de provenance des produits : bref, un collectif au top pour des clients au top !

Name: 9AM Club
Description: Introducing 9AM Club, the newest breakthrough in the alcoholic beverage market. This vodka-based drink is made with vodka, 100% natural fruit juices and electrolytes. Tailored to fit your lifestyle, it was specifically formulated for a great night and better tomorrow. Drink 9AM Club today!

Name: Matto Gin
Description:
Mattō Gin gains its woody, grassy and spicy flavours from infusions with exclusive mountain seeds, berries, herbs and roots. 

Mattō Gin's unique recipe captures the mystical essence of immortal mountains that have stood since the beginning of time. It is a secret process that has been tried, tested and perfected over the years. 

Matto comes with an excellent brand story, stirred with top-quality ingredients and brewing techniques of the finest distillery. 

In 2022, Matto got recognised with three incredibly prestigious awards:
- Grand Gold Frankfurt International Trophy
- Silver Global Gin Masters
- Silver Meininger's International Spirits Award

Cheers! 
Hristo Drenski and Ben Pelz
Matto Gin Founders

Name: Evertons Wine Merchants and Shop, Est 1918
Description:
The Everton family have over 100 years’ experience working in the wine trade, dating back to 1918. Richard Everton is the third generation of the family to master the trade. Richard has spent his entire lifetime working in the wine industry, having travelled the world, working in wineries and vineyards for many years. With his son, Jack Everton, now working in the family business, they hope to take Everton's even further than before! Suppliers of wine in Worcester & Worcestershire and the whole of the UK.

The Everton family previously ran 21 independent wine shops and delicatessens around the West Midlands, as well as a large wholesale business, supplying to trade customers all over the UK. Evertons Wine Merchants and Shippers continues to grow everyday suppling local bars, clubs and restaurants with some of the finest products on the market.

Everton's Wine Merchants, your number one choice wine merchants in Worcester & Worcestershire.

Name: Huaca Sàrl
Description:
Huaca Sàrl est une entreprise passionnée dédiée à la découverte et à la diffusion de vins et spiritueux exceptionnels. Fondée sur l'amour du terroir et le respect des traditions viticoles, Huaca Sàrl se spécialise dans l'importation et la distribution de produits de qualité en provenance des Amériques, tout en promouvant activement les trésors viticoles suisses à l'étranger.

Notre mission est de faire voyager vos sens à travers une sélection rigoureuse de vins et de spiritueux, soigneusement choisis pour leur authenticité, leur qualité, et leur capacité à raconter une histoire. Chaque bouteille que nous proposons incarne l'essence du terroir dont elle est issue, qu'il s'agisse des vignobles ensoleillés de la Californie, des vallées luxuriantes du Chili, ou des domaines alpins de la Suisse.

Huaca Sàrl s'engage non seulement à offrir des produits de grande qualité, mais aussi à promouvoir des pratiques durables et éthiques. Nous soutenons des producteurs qui respectent l'environnement et valorisent des méthodes de production respectueuses de la nature, assurant ainsi que chaque produit que nous distribuons est un reflet de notre engagement envers l'excellence et la durabilité.

L'innovation et la tradition sont au cœur de notre démarche. Nous combinons le savoir-faire traditionnel avec une approche moderne pour introduire des produits uniques sur le marché international, en répondant aux attentes des amateurs de vin et spiritueux les plus exigeants.

Chez Huaca Sàrl, nous croyons que chaque dégustation est une occasion de célébrer la diversité, la culture et l'héritage des terres viticoles que nous représentons. Rejoignez-nous dans ce voyage sensoriel et découvrez des produits qui éveillent les passions et créent des souvenirs inoubliables.

Name: Bodega Mil Suelos
Description: Mil suelos nace de la amistad de tres profesionales de distintas áreas de la industria del vino en Argentina: Alejandro (Colo) Sejanovich, enólogo e ingeniero agrónomo, con una vasta experiencia en el conocimiento de los microclimas y de la influencia del suelo en el comportamiento de la vid y el vino en todo el territorio argentino; Jeff Mausbach, experto en comunicación y comercialización del vino argentino, con una gran trayectoria en la difusión de éste a nivel mundial; y Jorge Crotta, quien ha enfocado su carrera profesional en la gestión comercial y empresarial de los mercados internacionales y locales del vino.

Name: Mazzilli Beverage SRL
Description:

Da più di quarant’anni cogliamo le esigenze di pubblici diversi, accumunati da un unico interesse: il buon bere.

Made with clean ingredients, real booze, and natural electrolytes, this vegan, gluten-free, no added sugar, and naturally flavored cocktail will transport you to paradise, wherever you are.

Name: Carrington Wine Merchants

Our main aim therefore is to provide , unique single cask whisky at an affordable price. Every cask we source is a one-off, containing a never-to-be-repeated whisky just waiting to be discovered, opened, appreciated and enjoyed.

Name: Pineapple Drinks Club | Spirits & Drinks
Description:

Name: Front Door Kenya

Relationships and partnerships are what drive us in all facets of our business. We care about our employees and strive to create a rewarding and respectful work environment for our team. With offices in across the country, Icon Vins Fins provides our partners with a highly motivated, results-oriented and passionate sales and marketing team.

Name: Synerbrew
Description: Sustainable brewing technology powered by proprietary yeast synergy. Born from in-house R&D to enhance flavor, reduce hops, and optimize brewing efficiency.

Name: Bootleggers Beverages
Description:

Our dream is to pioneer a positive change in lifestyle via art and entertainment and create fulfilling experiences, one cocktail at a time.

Name: TAPTAILS

Quality, quantity and consistency - these are the cornerstones of TAPTAILS.

We‘re inspired by the challenge to deliver perfect cocktails, every time, everywhere, and in places you never thought cocktails could exist. Name: Talisman Tequila
Description: Talisman Tequila

Name: Le Contesse winery

Name: Zivatrade International Pvt Ltd
Description:
Zivatrade is a trade wing of Ziva international fze and Ziva Marketing ltd.We have branches in United Arab Emirates and India.we dealing alcoholic beverages soft drinks in European market and Aquaculture products  in indian market and .for beverages holding account with loendersloot ,revera ,top logistics and c land.
Aquaculture industry we are leading supplier for south India.

Name: Dynamic Vines
Description:
We work with independent winemakers who produce outstanding wine using sustainable practices in the vineyard and minimal intervention in the cellar. These talented and often pioneering individuals produce wines that offer an honest reflection of their origin, their terroir, and let their unique personalities shine through.
With a focus on European wines, we work with well-established producers such as Emidio Pepe, Nicolas Joly, Le Puy and Radikon alongside impressive, less well known winemakers such as Sicus, Divella, Clos Larrouyat and Ludovic Engelvin.
We sell wine directly both to the UK's top restaurants, bars and wine shops, and also to the general public.

Dynamic Vines was founded in 2005.

Today, the team work from under the historic railway arches at the Spa Terminus in London’s Bermondsey.

Name: Pleasure Wine & Arts
Description:
We offer you a huge selection of the best French wines, as well as foreign wines, and our door is open to the entire world. Prestigious items, selected by and for passionate people. Like a mantra, we follow this rule to the letter.

Pleasure Wine is a wine merchant located in Illkirch-Graffenstaden, right next to the Eurometropole of Strasbourg and at the heart of the Alsace region, which is one of the major winemaking regions in France. Our mission is to give you the best there is: great classified growths, rares vintages, renown domains, legendary bottles... A few names that you will see in our catalogue: Romanee-Conti, Haut-Brion, Angelus, Petrus, Armand Rousseau, Rothschild, Georges Roumier, Latour and last but not least, the mythical Chartreuse liqueur.

Pleasure Wine has a passion for beauty, luxury and the arts. Wine, however, has got something very few luxury goods possess: a vintage, especially some exceptional ones, can only "exist" once. It will be unlike all others and can never be replicated. This ephemeral aspect can help a wine reach the sublime, turning it into a true piece of art etched in time.

Pleasure Wine works for you day and night. We look for the best wines and the most prestigious of spirits, trying to find anything that stands out. For us, such items go beyond art, they become a piece of History. For example: each French wine we have in store is a gestalt of love for the terroir, technical skills, long work hours, intense creativity... It's the soul of a country that's put into a bottle. Nobody can claim ownership over the history of France, but you can brag about owning a piece of it, through a great wine.

Pleasure Wine guarantees you the best products, but we do not stop there. Our collection of great wines and spirits is stocked in our secure warehouses in Strasbourg, under optimal conditions. Your order will be delivered by a vetted professional carrier, directly to your cellar.

Name: Stravaig Spirits
Description:
Edinburgh based spirits company, specialising in Scotch whisky. 

Headed up by Ola Lopatowska and Ryan McCafferty, we are independent bottlers of Tri Carragh Scotch Whisky and Glenlaird Scotch Whisky.

Delivery of bottling projects to clients globally. Supply of casks and bulk whisky for white label/private label clients seeking friendly and knowledgeable experts who can act as a partner, supporting the process from whisky selection to bottle delivery.

Name: Comer Distributing Company, Inc.
Description: A family-owned beer distributor in South Carolina servicing the York, Chester, Fairfield, Lancaster, Kershaw, Lexington, and Richland counties market for 50+ years.

Name: "Homegrown" Boone's Beer
Description: "Homegrown" Boone's Beer is an fresh American Pilsner (a pre-prohibition barley mash) beer brand presented by the award winning "Homegrown" Boone's Bourbon label.

Name: Martini Mates
Description: MARTINI MATES is standardizing the perfect pre-made Espresso Martini Cocktails.  Packaged in alcoholic ready-to-drink(RTD) 200ml bottles and sold as a 4-pack to consumers.  With an Australian inspired branding, the cocktail is spirit based with premium vodka at 14%ABV.  Saving consumers the hassle of creating a cocktail from scratch, while still getting premium mixologist quality to enjoy wherever they please.

Name: Rynbende Spirits
Description:
After an absence of no less than 50 years, Rynbende Spirits is back on the market!  Rynbende has been independently at the top since 1793, and now we're back to make history with a completely new approach to genever, and the forthcoming aged version and biological gin. 

Meet our vintage genever, "The Mayor of Exploration," a masterpiece that pushes the boundaries of tradition through a unique crossover into whisky and gin. Discover the renewed world of genever, inspired by craftsmanship and infused with a spirit that craftsmanship leaders prefer. 

Our values define who we are and what we stand for:

    • Leadership in craftsmanship: Our genever is not just a drink, but an experience of unparalleled craftsmanship for craftsmen.

    • The spirit of the seven seas: In the heart of Schiedam, our home port, we embrace the legacy of spirits export and adventure across the seven seas.

    • Innovation for sustainability: Using biomimicry, nature-inspired innovations, we are working towards a sustainable future.

    • Perfect food and drinks pairing: Our genever is a versatile companion, perfect to combine with seafood, coffee, and surprising cocktails.

    • Take your time: Enjoy the moment with Rynbende, both alone and in good company, to relax and then continue your journey in this world rested.

    • Connection with cultures: Rynbende brings you into contact with other cultures, broadening and enriching your perspective on the world.

    • Collaboration with artists: We collaborate with majestic artists to bring you joy and pleasure.

Rynbende Spirits is not just a drink; it is a journey through time, taste and culture. Taste the renewed history and be inspired by the refined aromas and unparalleled taste.

Name: Wine of Austria
Description:
What sets us apart? Many talented Austrian wine producers struggle with limited resources for export. This keeps their exceptional wines hidden and prevents wine enthusiasts from experiencing the diverse range of Austrian treasures.
We present the perfect solution! Our objective is to unite producers and importers while prioritizing their desires, utilizing our extensive insider knowledge and expertise.

Name: Dialect Imports, LLC
Description: Dialect Imports, LLC is a US-based wine importer and wholesaler. The company is focused on multigenerational wineries that reflect a taste of place unique to regions across Italy, and utilize sustainable or organic methods.

Name: Alberta Over-Proofed Limited
Description:
At Alberta Over-Proofed, we are proud to bring you a Classic Spirit which has brought with it over one hundred years of heritage, history and refinement. Opening communications with Proud Distilleries from the thirteen states that all share in the tradition and history of providing their own signature branded Moonshine in the hidden locations deep in the Appalachian Mountain range along the Eastern seaboard of America. 
They are still in operation and producing their own secret recipes with the techniques that have brought the recognition with all their own brands of Moonshines that are still standing strong today.
Beginning with the introduction of the Prohibition and the 28th amendment in the United States of America back in 1922.

Name: Electra Beverages LLC
Description: Electra Beverages is committed to delivering you KAWAMA Tequila & Soda. Touting only 99 calories, real tequila, zero sugar, low carbonation, and a 4.5% ABV per 12oz can, KAWAMA offers a lighter and more refreshing taste profile than other ready to drink beverages. Our formula was designed to please all pallets and appeal to a wide variety of beverage enthusiasts, we are not just another seltzer, we are a tequila soda!

Name: Delikreta Wines from Crete
Description:
Ontdek DeliKreta

Welkom bij DeliKreta, een plek waar passie voor wijn, heerlijk eten en het prachtige eiland Kreta samenkomen. Onze reis begon jaren geleden, met Boas die al meer dan 35 jaar regelmatig Kreta bezoekt vanwege het familiehuis op het eiland. In de zomer van 2019 sloot Lodewijk zich aan bij Boas voor een bezoek aan Kreta. Al snel deelde hij dezelfde liefde voor Kreta en haar unieke producten.

De Beste Producten van Kreta naar Nederland

Ons doel is simpel: we willen het allerbeste van Kreta selecteren en heel Nederland laten kennismaken met de mooiste producten van het eiland. Of het nou gaat om wijn, olijfolie, balsamic glazes of huidverzorgingsproducten, wij kiezen alleen voor het allerbeste. 

Olijfolie uit Kreta

Griekenland, en met name Kreta, biedt een perfect klimaat voor de productie van wijn en olijfolie. Onze zoektocht naar de beste olijfolie leidde ons naar een Nederlandse olijfolie-sommelier. Met haar expertise leerden we de belangrijkste defecten in olijfolie herkennen. Dit bracht ons bij drie topmerken: Cretanthos, Pamako en Eladaki. Deze olijfolies zijn niet alleen bekroond met meerdere awards, maar worden ook gebruikt in de betere restaurants van Griekenland.

Wijnen uit Kreta

Sinds 2022 importeren wij ook wijnen uit Kreta. Ons assortiment omvat inmiddels 40+ wijnen van 8 verschillende wijnhuizen. We focussen ons vooral op kleine wijnhuizen die werken met inheemse druivenrassen zoals Vidiano, Muscat of Spinas, Thrapsathiri, Plyo, Malvasia di Candia, Kotsifali, Liatiko, Romeiko en Mandilari.

Boas: "Ik maakte jaren geleden kennis met de wijnen van Kreta in een van de beste restaurants op het eiland. In de loop der jaren zijn wij bevriend geraakt met een aantal wijnmakers die ons meenemen in hun passie. Bijna alle wijnen die wij importeren worden geschonken in de betere restaurants van Griekenland en verkocht in goede delicatessenwinkels en wijnwinkels.’’

Name: Levert & Schudel Wijnkopers
Description:
Over wijn doen talloze spreuken de ronde. Over wijn zijn talloze boeken geschreven, evenals over druivensoorten, wijngebieden, wijnproducenten of beroemde en minder beroemde wijnhuizen.
De deugden van wijn worden in allerlei talen bezongen, grote denkers hebben in de loop der eeuwen
in verheven woorden de wijn gelauwerd. De Griekse wijsgeer Ovidius zei in 43 voor Christus bijvoorbeeld al: “wijn geeft moed en maakt mannen geschikt voor passie”.

Levert & Schudel Wijnkopers kan (nog) niet bogen op een eeuwenlange traditie, maar het feit dat wij al wijnkopers zijn sinds 1891 zegt voldoende over onze kennis en ervaring.

Description: Beverage Control, Inc., established in 1961, is the premier distributor of premium spirits, and fine wines throughout East Tennessee. Name: The Strategic Sourcing Hub
Description:
From globally sourcing high-quality bulk spirits to overseas importing and exporting logistics, packaging and strategic distillery planning, The Strategic Sourcing Hub is a comprehensive creative solutions partner to the beverage alcohol industry.  

As a craft distiller and contract bottler for over ten years, The Strategic Sourcing Hub understands what independent bottlers are looking for when they make a sourcing decision. Clear information, fair pricing, and transparency. With the unique combination of our industry connections and licensing, we can source high quality spirits at reasonable prices from around the world and offer them for sale to emerging brands. The Strategic Sourcing Hub is far more than just a spirit broker – we also consult with growing distilleries to plan their roadmap to success as they build their brands.

Name: Tequilera Rios
Description:
En Tequilera Ríos nos especializamos en la producción de tequila artesanal de alta calidad, ubicado en San Juanito de Escobedo,  Jalisco.

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de productos tequila y tequila 100% agave, que incluyen tequila blanco, joven reposado, añejo y extra añejo, así como infusiones con frutas y sabores, desarrolladas bajo altos estándares de pureza y tradición.

Nuestro enfoque es 100% B2B, brindando soluciones integrales a empresas que buscan crear o escalar su propia marca de tequila. Atendemos a startups, distribuidores, empresas consolidadas y proyectos personalizados sin importar su tamaño, adaptándonos a sus necesidades técnicas, creativas y comerciales.

 Servicios que ofrecemos:

    Producción a terceros (maquila)

    Desarrollo de marcas privadas (white label o tailor-made)

    Asesoría técnica y comercial integral

    Servicios de exportación y cumplimiento normativo internacional

Contamos con una capacidad de producción sólida que nos permite atender desde lotes pequeños hasta volúmenes industriales, manteniendo siempre un control de calidad riguroso y procesos artesanales.

Además, aportamos a cada proyecto una red confiable de proveedores y aliados estratégicos (botellas, etiquetas, branding, distribución), facilitando así el desarrollo completo de una marca con respaldo y acompañamiento experto en cada etapa.

Somos más que una destilería: somos un socio estratégico para quienes buscan ingresar al competitivo mundo del tequila con autenticidad, visión global y excelencia.

Name: Inspired Drinks
Description:
Inspired Drinks is a sales and distribution company specializing in providing commission based sales representation & wholesale distribution solutions, servicing independent retail, national retail & hospitality venues through partnerships with beverage producers.

Our mission is to connect inspiring brands with the best hospitality & retail venues within NSW & the ACT, ultimately providing the consumers across the state the opportunity to purchase & enjoy quality beverages at their local venue. Being headquartered in Canberra we are in the unique position to provide coverage in Canberra, Queanbeyan, NSW South Coast as well as the major cities of Sydney, Newcastle, Wollongong & the major towns across regional NSW. 

We are committed to working with our partner producers & brands to develop a custom service model that best suits your business needs. We offer customizable brand representation including percentage sales commission via your existing wholesale model, utilizing our wholesale business with its extensive account base or fixed fee services. 

If you are looking to unlock the potential within NSW & Canberra for your brand please get in touch with Inspired Drinks founder John Bates to discuss the best solution to help your brands reach more consumers and grow your sales. 

Inspired Drinks was founded in March 2023 by John Bates after a long career in sales and leadership within major multinational organizations and independently owned businesses in Canberra, Sydney & Newcastle. Honesty, a mutually beneficial approach to sales partnerships & and a friendly and straightforward demeanor are the pillars that underpin John's ethos. Over the past 12 years John has worked exclusively in the beverage industry, most recently as head of sales for a brewery in Canberra, developing the strategy and building the sales team from infancy to one of the largest independent breweries in Australia within 5 years.

Name: Rare Character Whiskey
Description:
Rare Character Whiskey is a purveyor of fine American whiskey, focused on unique selections tailored to each of our customers and partners. Through special relationships with top distillers across the country, Rare Character has exclusive access to expressions that have never been released to the public.

With ambitious plans for future projects including new brands, special collaborations, novel barrel finishes, and more, Rare Character aspires to breathe life into the American whiskey category. Our dedication to innovation and evolution is driven by profound love and respect for incredible bourbons and ryes.

Through our unprecedented levels of access, strong emphasis on customization, and our driving motivation to challenge industry norms, Rare Character strives to bring you American whiskeys unlike anything you’ve tasted before. Our skillful team is dedicated to helping our customers create whatever they see as “the perfect whiskey”. We say yes where others say no.

Rare Character is a company born from a deep passion for amazing distilled spirits. We aim to pay respect to tradition, while simultaneously uplifting those who challenge the status quo. We know that American whiskey lovers have an appetite for unknown, interesting whiskeys, and we're in a unique position to provide access to some of these beautiful expressions. We believe people are tired of the same old whiskeys, and they're ready to be challenged by ones that have something to say. After all, what's a whiskey without Character?

Name: Pergola Drinks Ltd
Description:
Pergola: Redefining Tequila Cocktails and Vegan Liqueurs
At Pergola, we are reshaping the world of Tequila-based drinks through innovation, quality, and sustainability. Inspired by Mexico’s rich heritage, we craft premium cocktails and liqueurs that are vegan, preservative-free, allergen-free, and designed for both home enjoyment and the on-trade.
Signature Glass Bottles

Our Sunset and Poolside Margaritas elevate the classic serve with bold flavour and strength. The Sunset Margarita is a Vegan Choice Award winner and a Bronze medallist at the London Spirits Competition 2024. These flagship cocktails remain available in premium glass bottles.

New Vegan Cream and Caramel Liqueurs
We are proud to introduce our new liqueur range: Strawberry Cream, Banana Cream, Chocolate Cream, and Caramel. Crafted to the same high standards as our core products, these are offered in sustainable Frugalpac paper bottles, providing an environmentally conscious option for both direct customers and the on-trade.

Session-Style Canned Cocktails
Our Margarita and Tequila & Tonic (5%) cans continue to gain momentum across the UK and the Caribbean. Designed for convenience and versatility, they are listed in pubs, restaurants, retailers, and serve as the official drinks of the LIT7s Rugby Tournament at AFC Wimbledon.

Driven by Purpose
Sustainability guides our product development, from plastic-free cans to the adoption of Frugalpac packaging. Our goal is to deliver exceptional Tequila-led drinks with reduced environmental impact.

Join Us
Pergola is more than a brand—it is a hub for innovative, high-quality Tequila experiences with a touch of Caribbean influence. We welcome consumers, retailers, bars, restaurants, and distributors seeking distinctive, sustainable Tequila-based products.

Ready to redefine your beverage distribution experience? Partner with Brand Venture and elevate your brand to new heights!

Name: MEZCAL ENTRE BESOS
Description:
Mezcal Entre Besos: A Sip of Tradition and Passion

Welcome to Mezcal Entre Besos, where tradition, craftsmanship, and passion merge in every bottle. We proudly present our range of premium mezcals, handcrafted with dedication using the finest agave from Mexico.

Our Products:
Espadín: A smooth, rich mezcal made from the noble Espadín agave, delivering a perfect balance of smoky notes and a refined finish. Awarded Gold at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2024 and Silver at the Brussels Spirits Awards 2023.
Cupreata: Crafted from wild Cupreata agave, this mezcal offers a unique experience with its bold flavors and depth. Produced using capón agaves for a richer profile. Also a proud Gold winner at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2024 and Silver at the Brussels Spirits Awards 2023.
Mezcal Dark Blend: Our newest line of digestifs, distilled with high-altitude coffee, creating a sophisticated fusion of flavors that elevates mezcal to a new level.
At Mezcal Entre Besos, we honor Mexican heritage while innovating with every drop. Join us as we share our award-winning mezcal with the world.

Learn more at www.mezcalentrebesos.com and become part of our mezcal journey!

Name: Likeur- en Wijnhandel | Stokerij De Moor
Description:
Sinds 1910 staat De Moor garant voor een ruim assortiment aan wijnen, champagnes, spirits en likeuren. In onze stokerij distilleren wij naast tal van graanjenevers, ook heel wat specialiteiten waaronder een premium gin Flemish Gin 23, Elixir en Advocaat volgens het traditioneel recept.

In onze wandelwinkel kan je rustig alcohols, wijnen en producten uit onze eigen stokerij ontdekken. Daarnaast beschikken wij over een groot aantal accessoires zoals decanteerkaraffen, ijsemmers, kurkentrekkers, etc.
Onze ruime keuze aan originele cadeauverpakkingen in alle prijsklassen, zoals houten kistjes met wijn of jenever, geschenkmanden of combinaties fles + accessoire, zijn al jaar en dag ons handelsmerk ( klik hieronder DE GESCHENKEN).

Als familiebedrijf met meer dan 100 jaar vakmanschap proberen we elke dag onze klanten te verzorgen met een persoonlijke service en deskundig advies. Er worden geregeld themadegustaties gepland (zie AGENDA), en elke zaterdag zetten wij een nieuw product in the spotlight dat kan ontdekt en gedegusteerd worden(IN THE SPOTLIGHT).

Daarnaast beleveren wij een groot aantal horecazaken vanuit de groothandel en verzorgen wij de relatiegeschenken van talloze bedrijven.

For over 100 years, La Vinothèque SA – formerly Favre Tempia – has offered its expertise to wine professionals: restaurateurs, hotels, wine merchants, wholesalers, collectors, and discerning connoisseurs. Name: Elite Drinks SRL
Description:
ELITE DRINKS SRL est le détenteur de la marque Iced Gin.

Notre histoire prend ses racines dans la toundra sauvage de l'Arctique, en région de Baffin au Groenland, découverte par l’aventurier William Baffin en 1616, sublimée par le savoir-faire ancestral de la distillerie Radermacher, ancrée en Belgique depuis 1836.

Tout comme l'ours polaire de cette contrée millénaire, la base de nos plantes sélectionnée s'épanouit tout au long de l'année dans des températures négatives, mixée à la traditionnelle baie de genévrier.

Pour mettre à l’honneur le froid du Grand Nord, notre gin est parfaitement équilibré, glacé à -18°C, avec une réelle identité aromatique en bouche, et se conserve indéfiniment au congélateur.

Lorsque le gin atteint sa température idéale de dégustation, l'ours polaire, l'emblème de la marque, vire du blanc au bleu.

Une recette onctueuse, épurée, et rafraîchissante.
BE-BIO-01 CERTISYS

Name: Luigi Fassio
Description:
Amaro Mentha 1911, prodotto in uno storico opificio sulle colline dell’astigiano, è testimone di una bella storia torinese che affonda le radici agli inizi del secolo scorso. L’amaro, con la sua elegante etichetta è infatti il frutto del recupero, da parte di Monica Buzio, di alcune ricette contenute in un quaderno datato 1911 appartenuto al suo bisnonno Luigi Fassio, che dal 1905 al 1957 fu liquorista e gestore di diversi caffè del centro di Torino.  

Amaro Mentha combina l’opulenza dell’era d’oro della liquoristica torinese con la richiesta di eccellenza artigianale del mercato globale degli alcolici. La ricerca e l’accurata selezione degli ingredienti di base unita alle più moderne tecnologie nel settore fa di Amaro Mentha un prodotto premium.

Amaro Mentha 1911 si distingue per l’utilizzo di erbe officinali accuratamente selezionate e per l’eccezionale maestria nel bilanciare le diverse componenti in fase di produzione per ottenere un prodotto allo stesso tempo complesso e intrigante al palato. Al sorso mostra un corpo intenso, profondo e di lunghissima persistenza gusto-olfattiva.

L’Amaro è ottenuto da alcool di origine agricola con aggiunta di erbe officinali quali aloe, angostura, arancia amara, arancia dolce, china, quassio coriandolo, macis e genziana. Tutte queste note vengono esaltate dall’aggiunta di una nota di menta piemontese che lo rende particolarmente completo e fresco al palato. Il caramello contribuisce a conferire un bellissimo colore ambrato con screziature aranciate. Il suo profilo olfattivo regala prima note mentolate che cedono il passo a quelle aromatiche di china, caramello,erbe mediche, sentori amari di agrumi e cenni di spezie orientali.

Name: Keeling Andrew
Description:
Keeling Andrew is a wine importer and distributor based in Bloomsbury, London. Founded in 2017 by Noble Rot co-owners Dan Keeling and Mark Andrew, we supply the UK’s leading restaurants and shops with the world’s greatest wines.

Our agencies include Jean-Marc Roulot, Lamy-Caillat, Ulysse Collin, Frédéric Mugnier, Arnoux-Lachaux, Jérôme Prevost, Mugneret-Gibourg, Benoît Moreau, E&E Vocoret, William Kelley, François Rousset-Martin, Piero Busso and Suertes del Marqués, among others. Keeling Andrew offers a consultancy service running top restaurants’ wine programmes (including Brat, Endo and Honey & Co) and sells wine to the public through its Shrine to the Vine shops. 

Dan Keeling has won numerous awards for his writing about wine and food and previously worked as Head of A&R at Parlophone Records and MD of Island Records. Mark Andrew is a member of the Institute of Masters of Wine. Dan and Mark’s ‘The Noble Rot Book: Wine from Another Galaxy’ was named Drinks Book of the Year at the Guild of Food Writers Awards 2021.

Name: Captiva Spirits
Description:
Captiva Spirits Key Lime Honey Vodka has received a popular 5-star rating from consumers and is now being distributed across Florida. Available in Total Wine & More, ABC Fine Wine & Spirits, Hilton SeaWorld, Hyatt Centric Las Olas, and hundreds of other locations, it is also featured on many restaurant and bar menus. Additionally, it ships to 34 states. This gold medal, award-winning vodka, celebrated as "Florida's Formula for Vodka," boasts a unique recipe with all-natural ingredients, including Key Limes and Raw Honey. It is gluten-free, contains no added sugar, and is filtered 48 times, offering a smooth taste suitable for drinking on the rocks or in various cocktails.

Captiva Spirits not only prioritizes quality but also embraces sustainability and community support. Its business model is designed to create local jobs across various sectors such as distilling, farming, distribution, and retail. In a commendable effort to give back, a portion of every bottle sold contributes to local environmental organizations, reinforcing the company's dedication to social and ecological responsibility.

The growing demand for Captiva Spirits’ Key Lime Honey Vodka has led to its widespread availability in a diverse range of venu
es. Contact LibDib Wholesale Craft Spirits to carry our product at https://libdib.com/

Name: Grapes & More
Description:
Founded by Nico Ferrari, Grapes and More is a dynamic consultancy firm dedicated to providing unparalleled support to importers and distributors in the wine industry. Our comprehensive range of services includes product scouting, market visits, events and wine dinners, as well as logistics management.

At Grapes and More, we understand the challenges faced by importers and distributors in sourcing and promoting exceptional wines. That's why we go above and beyond to support you every step of the way. From identifying unique and high-quality wine offerings through extensive product scouting, to facilitating market visits that enable you to establish valuable connections, we are committed to maximizing your success.

Our expertise extends to organizing captivating events and wine dinners that showcase your portfolio to potential customers and influencers. With meticulous attention to detail, we create memorable experiences that leave a lasting impression and drive interest in your wines.

In addition to strategic marketing support, we excel in managing logistics. We ensure a seamless and efficient supply chain, handling everything from transportation to customs clearance, so you can focus on building relationships and growing your business.

Partnering with Grapes and More means gaining a valuable ally who is dedicated to your success. Our team of industry experts is passionate about the world of wine and committed to providing personalized solutions tailored to your specific needs. Together, we will elevate your import and distribution operations, ensuring that your wines captivate the palates of discerning customers around the globe.

Join us at Grapes and More and unlock the full potential of your wine business. Let's navigate the wine industry landscape together, seizing every opportunity and achieving remarkable results.

Description:
Vinimportör
Med kvalitets viner från spännande regioner.

Name: Les Vins de Paul
Description:
Les Vins de Paul c’est la cave à vin qui dégote ce que vous aimez, vous partage ses trésors et vous fait repartir avec le sourire ! 

Une entreprise créée par Paul et Solenne, l’un, expert en vin, diplômé d’un BTS viticulture et d’un bachelor en commerce des Vins et spiritueux qui pendant 5 ans n’a cessé de développer ses connaissances et son réseau en passant par différents postes dans le domaine des vins et spiritueux. Nous vous parlons bien sûr de Paul.

L’autre, vous l’aurez compris c’est Solenne. Diplômée d’un Master 2 en commerce et après plusieurs années à travailler dans la grande distribution en agroalimentaire, c’est tout naturellement qu’elle a rejoint son binôme dans cette aventure. 

Un couple d’entrepreneurs passionnés qui se complète avec caractère et équilibre, comme un bon vin finalement. 

Soif de découverte ? Chaque bouteille est remplie d’histoires. Et ces histoires on vous les transmet mais on les crée aussi avec vous lors de nos ateliers de dégustations personnalisés, ludiques et basés sur la découverte et la convivialité. 

Régalez vos papilles ! Que vous soyez restaurateur ou particulier, Paul vous conseillera selon vos envies et vos besoins. Du sur-mesure pour constituer votre cave en toute sérénité. 

Boire du vin, c’est boire du génie ! Découvrez notre sélection de pépites en bouteille derrière lesquelles se cachent de belles histoires de vignerons passionnés que les Vins de Paul mettent un point d’honneur à mettre en avant.

Name: RUMAKO
Description:
Společnost RUMAKO zajišťuje dovoz a distribuci nápojů a to zejména exkluzivních destilátů z charakteristických oblastí celého světa. Máme oficiální, tedy výhradní zastoupení značek prémiových rumů, ginů, whiskey, cognaců a dalších destilátů. Kromě toho také pravého champagne a výběrového prosecca.

Vybíráme pro vás to nejlepší, co lze mezi světovými destiláty dostat. Po celém světě objevujeme perly mezi karibskými rumy, anglickými giny, francouzskými koňaky a dalšími prvotřídními destiláty!

Ochutnejte a obohaťte svůj život o dokonalý smyslový zážitek našich produktů, které vám přinášíme! Kromě jedinečné kvality Vám nabízíme i odpovídající servis, zajímavé ceny a výhodné bonusy. Samozřejmostí je poskytnutí prodejní podpory a jiné zajímavé aktivity při dlouhodobé spolupráci. Budeme rádi, pokud projevíte zájem a velice rádi Vás navštívíme ve Vašem podniku s ochutnávkou, abyste i Vy mohli posoudit jedinečnou kvalitu našich produktů.
Pro velkoobchody a stálé zákazníky jme připraveni poskytnout profesionální podporu.

Name: LK Distillery
Description: Craft premium alcoholic beverages from the "LK Distillery" brand are made only from natural ingredients according to a unique recipe based on fruit alcohols of our own production.

Name: Winefactory Saar GmbH
Description:
Winefactory Spirits, Wine and More befindet sich in der Dreiländerregion Luxemburg, Deutschland und Frankreich – direkt im Zentrum des Saarlandes: Der Landeshauptstadt Saarbrücken.
Der Hauptsitz, zu dem auch der Flagship-Store mit 500 qm im denkmalgeschützten “Unique Cube“ gehört, sowie die drei Lagerhallen Siemens, Römer und Eschberg bilden die örtliche Grundlage des Unternehmens. Insgesamt verfügen wir derzeit zusammen über mehr als 3000 qm als Basis für den Vertrieb der Produkte aus unserem Portfolio.
Bereits seit 2010 entwickeln und vertreiben wir innovative und qualitativ hochwertige Spirituosen für Gastronomie, Fachhandel, Onlineshops und Einzelhandel. Die Geschwister Denis Reinhardt und Erik Wimmers folgen dabei als Inhaber, Entrepreneure und Geschäftsführer ihrer Leidenschaft für außergewöhnliche Getränke abseits des Mainstreams und fernab von herkömmlicher Massenware.
Neben den Eigenmarken rund um Ferdinand‘s Gin, Bonpland Rum, Doctor Polidori Tonic, Dreyberg und The Mosel Distillers importieren wir weitere exklusive Marken für den deutschen Markt und exportieren unsere Eigenmarken in mehr als 42 Länder weltweit. Zusätzlich vertreiben wir deutschlandweit Wein, Champagner, Spirituosen und Feinkost an fast 3500 zufriedene Kunden. Glaubwürdigkeit und Authentizität sind dabei wesentliche Elemente unseres zielgerichteten Handelns.

Name: Viteri Cervecería
Description:
Somos 3 hermanos que en el 2016 inscribimos nuestra primera cerveza al Festival de Cerveceros Artesanales de Colombia, una cerveza a base de trigo y cebada malteada. Un estilo alemán llamado "Weissbier" que traduce cerveza blanca que habíamos probado en un viaje a Múnich. Algo completamente nuevo a lo que estábamos acostumbrados a tomar en Colombia.

Nos llevaríamos la sorpresa de quedar en el primer puesto con medalla de oro. Ese día supimos que teníamos un excelente producto que junto con nuestra pasión por la cerveza llegaría lejos. 

Hoy, después de 2 premios más nos dedicamos a llevar cultura cervecera a donde lleguen nuestras botellas Únete y sé parte de la hermandad!

Description:

Hinter Grape & Grain stehen wir: Matthew Bywater und Thomas Hermann. Gemeinsam bieten wir ein auserlesenes Wein- und Spirituosensortiment für Gastronomie und Handel an. Mit über zwanzig Jahren Branchenerfahrung verfügen wir über ein breites Netzwerk und fundiertes Fachwissen, sind nah an den Trends und antizipieren neue Bedürfnisse im Markt. So können wir mit grosser Treffsicherheit individuell passende Angebote für Sie zusammenstellen.
Handwerk und Kultur – eine Faszination, die wir mit Ihnen teilen
Uns verbinden langjährige Beziehungen zu unseren Produzenten: Familienbetriebe, die ihr Handwerk und Land seit Generationen mit viel Leidenschaft und Kreativität pflegen. Weil wir die faszinierenden Geschichten, Menschen und Kulturen hinter den Produkten kennen, vertreiben wir sie mit genauso viel Leidenschaft, wie sie hergestellt werden. So ermöglicht jeder unserer edlen Tropfen auch einen Zugang zur Kultur seines Herkunftslands.
Genuss mit Perspektiven für die Zukunft – dafür stehen wir ein
Unsere Produkte und Angebote sind nach den Standards der Schweizerischen Bio-Verordnung zertifiziert. Wir arbeiten mit Produzenten, die Nachhaltigkeit als umfassende ökologische, soziale, wirtschaftliche und kulturelle Verantwortung leben. Mit unserer Arbeit leisten wir einen Beitrag, dass die Produzenten ihre Betriebe heute und in Zukunft nachhaltig weiterentwickeln können.

KINGSMAN IS A STYLE OF BEER THAT BOASTS A UNIQUE BLEND INGREDIENTS USED

Our Heritage

More than 335 years ago, Jean de Chaine from Wallonia founded a brewpub in Mannheim which he named after the germanised version of his family name: Eichbaum. It is the oldest company in Mannheim but also one of the most modern, with state-of-the-art bottling and brewing technologies and an annual output of 1.8 mn hl. Notre équipe de cavistes travaille au plus près des domaines, en lien direct avec le monde de la vigne. 
Rien n’est jamais considéré comme acquis : leur formation est permanente. 

Dans chaque boutique Plaisirs du Vin vous trouverez une personne à votre écoute, vous assurant un conseil précis et personnalisé, que cela concerne le service, la garde ou les accords mets et vins envisageables. 

On ne choisit pas une bouteille au hasard, chaque vin est porteur de son histoire, nous sommes là pour vous la raconter.

Name: MarGin London Official
Description:
How do you like your gin? In a martini, with an olive or a twist? Or maybe in a gin and tonic with ice and a slice? What about straight-up, or, at the very least, on the rocks? If your answer to that last one is “no thanks, that’s how I like my whisky but not my white spirits”, then you’re missing out – and here’s why. The most compelling reason to drink gin with nothing added is what makes gin unique in the first place: the bespoke mix of botanicals, one of which must be juniper, but all chosen with care by the distiller. This is what makes gin different not only to a neutral grain spirit such as vodka but makes one gin taste completely different to another. 

There are no less than nine different botanicals in MarGin, including aromatic cotton lavender and minty pink hyssop. Sipping MarGin neat is the best way to appreciate each of the botanicals that went in to making it but, more importantly, enjoy MarGin’s uncomplicated, clean taste and exceptionally smooth mouthfeel. Drinking gin by itself is nothing new, however. Gin was drunk neat when it first came to prominence in 18th-century London, though swigging it straight from the bottle rather than sipping it thoughtfully from a glass is what earned gin the nickname of ‘mother’s ruin’. Fast forward 100 or so years and tastemakers began to realise that gin’s complex flavour made it a great base for mixing: first the G&T that became the preferred sundowner for the expats of the British Empire, then the original mixologists of early-20th century America who made gin the essential ingredient of classic cocktails such as the martini, gimlet and clover club. Along the way, though, it was forgotten that gin tastes great alone – or with very little added. Make sure, however, that you have the right glassware: a rocks glass will bring the delicate aromas of MarGin close to the nose and enhance the intensity of the botanicals.

Pokud si nejste jisti, které víno je pro vás či konkrétní příležitost nejlepší, neváhejte nám napsat nebo zavolat. Rádi Vám s výběrem pomůžeme a vy budete mít jistotu, že jste vybrali správně.

FIRMY, SPOLEČNOSTI – lahev dobrého vína je perfektním dárkem nejen pro Vaše obchodní partnery a klienty, ale také zaměstnance. Pomůžeme Vám vybrat ideální víno pro každou příležitost a zajistíme degustaci přímo v sídle Vaší společnosti, stejně jako vinný catering pro podnikové večírky či oslavy.

VINOTÉKY, RESTAURACE – rychle a bezpečně doručíme kvalitní vína také do Vaší provozovny kdekoliv v ČR. V případě zájmu provedeme i analýzu Vašeho vinného lístku a navrhneme vhodné úpravy.

My vínem žijeme, Vy si ho vychutnejte!

Name: EarthCask
Description:
EarthCask: Bridging Borders in the World of Spirits

EarthCask is named to reflect our global reach and specialized focus on international spirits trade. "Earth" signifies our worldwide commitment, while "Cask" evokes traditional wooden containers for aging fine spirits. As a liaison in the import and export of spirits, we connect producers and consumers across borders, ensuring seamless transactions in the global market.

Our Mission:
We aim to facilitate the smooth flow of high-quality spirits across international borders. Leveraging our extensive network and expertise, we simplify the complexities of global trade for our clients.

Why Choose EarthCask?
Global Reach:Our network spans continents, accessing diverse markets and connecting a wide range of producers and consumers.
Expertise: With profound knowledge of international trade regulations and logistics, we navigate cross-border transactions with ease.
Quality Assurance: Partnering with reputable producers, we ensure every cask meets rigorous quality standards.
Efficient Transactions: From inquiry to delivery, we manage the entire trade process with precision, ensuring timely and cost-effective transactions.

Our Services:
Import and Export Facilitation: Handling all aspects of the process, from regulatory compliance to documentation, for a smooth experience.
Market Analysis and Entry Strategy: Providing market insights and strategies to help clients enter and expand in new markets.
Logistics and Supply Chain Management: Ensuring secure and efficient transportation from producer to consumer.
Quality Control: Implementing strict measures to ensure only the best products reach our clients.

At EarthCask, we blend tradition with innovation to elevate the global spirits market. Our commitment to excellence and passion for connecting the world through fine spirits set us apart as industry leaders.

Name: biodynamico AG
Description:
Kennen Sie unsere Philosophie?
Wir bieten ein exklusives und sorgfältig ausgewähltes Angebot an biologischen und biodynamischen Qualitätsweinen aus Italien. Die Auswahl der Weine und Winzer nehmen wir persönlich vor, wobei wir besonderen Wert auf Qualität, Umweltfreundlichkeit und faire Preise legen.

Was haben Wein und Geschichten gemeinsam?
Wir vertreten ausschliesslich kleine Winzerbetriebe, die pro Jahr zwischen 1.000 und maximal 10.000 Flaschen Wein produzieren. Bevorzugt werden nur solche Winzer, die nach biodynamischen oder biologischen Prinzipien arbeiten. Für unsere Kunden ergeben sich zahlreiche Vorteile: beste Qualität, gesunde Weinproduktion, Respekt für die Umwelt, Exklusivität, Einzigartigkeit, ein gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis und wunderschöne Geschichten.

Was ist der gute Grund für einen Besuch bei uns?
Neben den oben genannten Vorteilen finden Sie bei uns eine freundliche und lebendige Atmosphäre. Antonello Amato wird Ihnen den bestmöglichen Service bieten und Ihren Wünschen so weit wie möglich entgegenkommen. Bei uns entdecken Sie aussergewöhnliche Raritäten sowie bewährte Klassiker und Exoten für anspruchsvolle Weinkenner.

Name: Keltek Brewery
Description:
The deal was that if he could brew a superior pint, the landlord would put it on a pump at the bar. The landlord agreed and Stuart started brewing on a 2.5 barrel microbrewery in a disused stable block on the Roseland Peninsula in Cornwall.

After winning gold for his very first brew, demand for his new and exciting beers grew tremendously and expansion was needed. The first move was to a larger unit in Lostwithiel where the brewery’s capacity increased five-fold.

In 2007 Keltek expanded again, moving to its current home in Redruth. We now have the capacity to brew over 250 brewer’s barrels a week. In addition, we have our own fully automated bottling line which filters, carbonates, fills, labels and caps the beer. Everything’s done in-house.

In 2013 Keltek acquired four pubs in the vicinity of the brewery, becoming just the second brewery in Cornwall to own its own estate of public houses, and in 2016 acquired two more. Keltek remains a family owned brewery that adheres to the age old traditions of brewing by hand with care and craftsmanship using the finest whole hop flowers, British malts and hand-pitched yeast.

Name: Miradiva Tequila
Description:
Miradiva allows you to savor something that isn’t part of the past nor of the future. It’s the taste of a complex present unlike anything you’ve experienced before: it’s not just your ordinary tequila. Miradiva blends authentic flavours with international excellence, creating a luxurious and exclusive experience for those seeking moments and feelings that simply go beyond reality. An authentic, aromatic complexity that is hard to forget. With every bottle, we aim to create moments of connection and enrich our consumers’ lives by delivering exceptional quality. Miradiva is what you haven’t experienced yet but desire, it’s the way to access that sensation of pure pleasure.

Its name, Miradiva, is a combination of the words “Mira” which recalls the idea of observing, admiring, and “Diva” which evokes a sense of luxury, prestige and exclusivity.

A hand-painted, pure gold bottle, encasing a tequila of excellence, crafted using the finest agave plants and traditional distillation methods. With every sip, you can experience the rich flavours and smooth finish that only a truly premium tequila can deliver. A vibrant personality from the outside to the inside. Unique colours and refined flavours for emotions that transcend the simple act of drinking. A hand-painted ceramic bottle with pure gold details, which, much like a Mexican music festival, opens the doors of perception to the discovery of new worlds to experience.

We want to offer you more than just a bottle, but something that, besides creating pleasure to the palate, creates pleasure to the eye. Miradiva, with its precious and recognizable statuary design, blends perfectly with the surrounding environment. Its golden, curved lines lie elegantly on the surfaces. An object that stands out for its authentic aesthetics and refinement, and that remains with you over time as a tangible memory of luxury to relive.

Name: Poetry Vodka
Description:
Poetry Vodka is the rebellious brand by Co-founders, Dave Stewart; music legend and one half of the iconic Eurythmics, and Johan Holgersson; investment wizard and entrepreneur. Poetry is a product of the friends’ shared longstanding love for the vodka martini.

Poetry is produced in Kalisz, Poland, where grain vodkas have been of cultural importance since as early as the 17th century, this premium wheat-based vodka is crafted by a family-owned grower-distiller.

Name: BLUE SKY DRINKS CO.
Description:
WELCOME TO THE LAND OF BLUE SKY. 

We looked at the Australian beverage industry and thought: 
Why are we always drinking someone else’s story?
Blue Sky Drinks Co was born from a simple idea: Australian brands have the talent, the thirst and the guts. All they need is a leg up with someone to back them.

So, we’re having a crack at doing drinks differently. Where most beverage companies stick to the safe lane, we’re flying the Aussie flag and building four homegrown heritage challengers together.

Yeahs, we’re new on the block, but we bring decades of industry know-how — and we’re pouring it into our brand family: NED Australian Whisky, Grainshaker Vodka, Act of Treason Agave, and Gravity Drinks Co.

Because under a blue sky, anything’s possible.

Name: Arzeh Integrated Limited
Description:
ARZEH INTEGRATED LIMITED was established in 2004 to offer importation, distribution and brand building services for the beverage sector in Nigeria.

Our vision is to build a Wine & Spirits drinking culture amongst the Nigerian population, through a rigorous selection of products, intensive educational product training and masterclass.

Our Mission is to develop loyal relationships with international brands by providing extensive market knowledge, reliability and exceeding expectations.

Name: Resurrection Brands
Description: We are an entrepreneurial organization, focused on building and developing new and resurrected premium alcohol beverage brands, that is both sustainable and scalable.

Name: Have a Day Tequila Cocktails
Description:
Have a Day Premium Tequila Cocktails are just that - the ability to Have a Day - in a can. Capturing all the good times that can occur on the golf course, at home and with friends. Cultivated with Bob Does Sports and one of the most loyal online audiences. Clang 'em and bang 'em: Have a Drink, Have a Day. 

Chido Premium Tequila Cocktails are inspired by the pursuit of permanent vacation and a lifestyle of leisure. Chido provides fun innovative bold flavor for everyone alike. Community drives the brand, while quality leads through product.

Pink Reef is a business incubator for the alcohol space with a focus on acceleration of brands, products and distribution. Current Brands include Chido Tequila Cocktails and Have a Day Tequila Cocktails.

Name: Istuar
Description: Distribución de Champagnes y Vinos de Francia. Selección exclusiva de productores independientes.

Name: The Wine Department
Description:
The Wine Department is the leading distributor for alcoholic and non alcoholic beverages in Abuja, Nigeria. Our mission is to work with local and imported brands to drive their sales, marketing and distribution in Nigeria's competative market.

We work with brands right from the scratch, helping them understand market scenarios & trends, regulation, brand positioning, product pricing, launch strategies while also ensuring they have the right partners to serve and sell their brands through rigorous sales & distribution.

Name: Winesal
Description:
We are your direct link to the world's finest Italian wines. Experience effortless access to unparalleled quality, backed by our rigorously certified supply chain, ensuring every bottle delivers authentic excellence. 

We carefully curate our wine selection through a rigorous control process, ensuring only the finest products reach our customer. 

By empowering small, family-owned wineries, we provide them with access to international markets while maintaining a strict commitment to excellence. Our approach, not only supports local producers but also guarantees great quality and authenticity for the final consumer.

Elevate your offering with the true soul of Italy. Quality Wine, Quality Time.

Name: Bibendum Wine Company
Description:
Our role as a merchant of all things wine and spirits could not be simpler: since 2004 we have aimed to source the most delicious, most authentic, highest quality products possible from Australia and around the world; then offer these products to our clients with as much passion and information as possible.

Our artisanal producers work their hides off to make the best possible wines and spirits. As a result, almost all of them are recognised as benchmarks and, in many cases, pioneers. It’s a great privilege to work with these makers and we feel a strong duty of care to represent their labels in our market with the same level of diligence and integrity that they bring to their craft.

The Bibendum Wine Co. sales team are all, without fail, wine people first and foremost. They work with Bibendum because they love the wine trade, and we believe their experience, knowledge and enthusiasm is one of our greatest assets. The same can be said of our Bibendum Bar team in relation to spirits and the bar trade. In fact, across all areas of the business, from sales and customer service through to communication, technology and logistics, our experienced and skilled team enable us to strive for the highest possible standards. This in turn allows us to honour the hard work of our growers and producers, as well as repaying the loyalty and support of our customers, who we view as true partners in the Bibendum project.

Name: Schenk family Deutschland
Description:
Als Teil der internationalen Schenk-Familie in Deutschland setzen wir uns täglich mit Leidenschaft und Engagement für unsere Kunden im Lebensmitteleinzelhandel, dem Fachhandel und der Gastronomie ein. Es ist unser größtes Anliegen, ihnen als verlässlicher, kompetenter und innovativer Partner in Sachen Wein zur Seite zu stehen. Dank langjähriger persönlicher Partnerschaften mit Lieferanten in aller Welt sowie einem vielseitigen und qualitativ hochwertigen Weinsortiment sind wir in der Lage, unseren Kunden flexible Lösungen zu bieten, die genau auf die jeweilige Situation und das Umfeld zugeschnitten sind. 

Impressum: https://www.schenk-weine.de/impressum/

Datenschutz: https://www.schenk-weine.de/datenschutz/

Name: Showerings Cider
Description:
The Showering family has been making award-winning Somerset cider for over 180 years. The family’s ambition for Showerings, their first Triple Vintage, is simple – to make the best cider in the world.

Showerings is a cider for all seasons that serves with distinction as an aperitif or as the perfect dining companion. The expertly tuned balance of sharp and sweet can accent the qualities of any dish, from starter through cheese board and beyond.

Showerings uses aromatic late-season Dabinett apples from a single award-winning orchard in Somerset, the temperate heartland of British cidermaking and just seven miles from Showering’s cider mill. Cherished for their perfect balance of sugars and tannins, these apples are nurtured by an expert horticulturalist and harvested once a year and only at the point of perfect ripeness.

Each batch of cider is allowed to sit and settle for a minimum of four months, to soften the sharper acidic edges. Cold filtration ensures that the final cider is gluten-free and unsullied by artificial sweeteners or colourings. Each Showerings vintage is allowed to arrive at its natural ABV, determined by the sweetness of the apples.

Name: Destillerie Brunner GmbH
Description:
Wir produzieren in unserer Brennerei in St. Gallen mittels traditionellem und handwerklich bewährtem Mazerations- und Perkolationsverfahren, einmalige und charakterstarke Spirituosen.

Als Brenner arbeiten wir mit einer Small-Batch Methode (Kleinproduktion mit begrenzter Menge), wodurch wir eine aussagekräftige Spirituosen-Qualität in Kleinserie gewährleisten können. Nachhaltige BIO-Rohstoffe, regionale Lieferanten und kurze Anlieferungswege sind weitere Kernpunkte unserer Unternehmensphilosophie.

Name: RGMX
Description:
Somos una empresa comprometida con la tierra y con la calidad de nuestros productos, cuyas materias primas se cosechan a mano por los habitantes de este paraíso terrenal. 

El resultado es un producto de carácter internacional que combina las tradiciones, sabiduría y fortaleza de este pueblo mágico con los procesos mas vanguardistas para la elaboración de vino y productos regionales.

La innovación es parte fundamental de todo lo que hacemos, desde nuestros productos que puedes encontrar en tiendas físicas u online, hasta los eventos en el viñedo. Creemos en la mejora continua para ofrecer experiencias inigualables a nuestros clientes y así sorprenderlos con productos que nos enorgullecen.

Name: BUBL Cocktail Shots
Description:
Bubl is redefining cocktail shots with bold flavors and a signature pop that sets us apart. We take crowd-favorite cocktails and turn them into ready-to-pop shots that infuse bar-quality beverages with a surprising spark of fun.

We’re creating a fresh lane within the ready-to-drink world, one built on industry expertise, innovative food science, and social experiences people genuinely want to share. At home, out with friends, or incorporated into restaurant and hospitality drink menus, Bubl offers an easy way to make any moment more memorable.

With every cocktail we create, we’re shaping the future of shot culture- making it brighter, bolder, and full of celebrations people can’t wait to share.

21+ only. Drink responsibly.

Name: Black Alpha Irish Whiskey

Name: Wijnhalla
Description:
Welkom bij Wijnhalla, de leukste wijnhandel van Friesland! Of je nu een wijnkenner bent of gewoon opzoek bent naar een lekkere wijn voor thuis, wij hebben precies wat je nodig hebt. Ons team is gek op wijn en speurt de hele wereld af naar de beste wijnen voor elk budget. 

Ons assortiment is lekker divers: van heerlijke huiswijnen tot aan bijzondere wijnen voor speciale gelegenheden. We richten ons niet alleen op particulieren, maar ook op horecagelegenheden die een bijzondere wijnbeleving willen creëren. Dus, zoek je een wijn om je menu compleet te maken of om je gasten te verrassen? Wijnhalla helpt je graag.

Kom eens langs in onze winkel in Lemmer of duik in onze webshop. Het vinden van je nieuwe favoriete wijn is bij ons zowel gemakkelijk als leuk. Cheers!

Name: MSM Betastar LLC
Description:
Betastar LLC, a subsidiary of MSM Group LLC, was established in Mongolia in 1998. Officially distributes the following types of well-known beverages: Champagne, Wine, Processo, Cognac, Whiskey, Tequila, Mezcal, Rum, Liqueur, Gin, Vodka, Energy Drink, Juice, Mixers.

As an official distributor, Betastar LLC distinguishes its imported products with the excise stamp and highly secure and exclusive hologram labels, in order to distinguish its products from counterfeit products and to guarantee the genuine quality of its products.

We provide professional product knowledge and expertise through our Brand Ambassadors from all over the world.

Name: Obsidian Raicilla
Description:
Obsidian Silver Blanco, la culminación de años de dedicación y maestría en la destilación artesanal. Este producto premium, está meticulosamente elaborado para reflejar la rica herencia destiladora de México. Obsidian Silver Blanco no solo simboliza la excelencia y el compromiso con la calidad que define a Casa Casarín sino que también establece un nuevo estándar de referencia en el mundo de los destilados mexicanos.
Invitamos a aficionados  y expertos a explorar la profundidad y los matices únicos de Raicilla Obsidian. Descubra cómo este destilado encapsula la esencia de la tradición, ofreciendo una experiencia sensorial que trasciende lo ordinario y redefine la percepción de los destilados de lujo.

Name: RIVIERA CELLARS
Description:
L'amour du vin et la volonté de partager notre passion sont les moteurs de notre entreprise familiale Riviera Cellars.

Une passion transmise et partagée par un père à sa fille et le plaisir de pouvoir, jour après jour, mettre en exergue nos valeurs communes et notre savoir-faire dans le but de satisfaire nos clients et vous faire découvrir des vins d'exception : voilà ce qui caractérise Riviera Cellars !

L'aventure Riviera Cellars

Après une carrière dans la restauration Outre-Manche dans les années 1980-1990 et une expérience de caviste en France, c'est la naissance de Monte Carlo Wines, une cave à vin professionnelle située dans la principauté de Monaco et inauguré par le Prince Albert qui lance l'itinéraire dans l'univers du vin.

En 2009, et tout naturellement, une société de vente de vins spécialisée dans la livraison et l'affrêtement des yachts est créée.
2010 signe l'obtention du célèbre WSET (Wine and Spirit Education Trust) en Angleterre, suivi en 2013 par le diplôme de sommelier en France.

C'est en 2020 que l'entreprise devient véritablement familiale grâce à l'amour du vin partagé par une fille et son père. Une formation chez Franck Thomas se concluant par un titre de Sommelière Caviste Ambassadrice en Gastronomie suivie de trois certifications au WSET et c'est une reconversion choisie dans le monde du vin qui se dessine.

Ensemble et menés par une même passion pour le vin et le service haut de gamme, père et fille saisissent l'opportunité de racheter la société NHB Riviera qui devient alors Riviera Cellars et qui voue aujourd'hui son expertise au service des passionnés, amateurs et initiés dans le monde du vin partout autour du globe.
Riviera Cellars, une expérience reconnue dans le monde du yachting et de la villégiature !

L'expertise nourrie par notre passion du vin nous invite chaque jour à nous surpasser pour dénicher les plus belles pépites, trouver les meilleurs millésimes et satisfaire à chacune des demandes de nos clients pour une livraison

Name: Regimental Spirits Company LLC

Our Kentucky whiskey is made with all-natural American grains and finished in American oak for a finished product that is smooth, approachable, and patriotic.

Name: R6 DISTILLERY
Description:
R6 DISTILLERY is a veteran and family-owned distillery based in Los Angeles County, California.  Our story is one meant to share and inspire others - one of family heritage and passion - taking your vision and making it reality.  

My great-grandfather and his five brothers (6 Rubens brothers) opened the Rialto Theatre in Chicagoland in 1926.  Their great dream was a theatre company that brought friends and family together to laugh, talk, cry, and gather.  Mine is one of the same, but over great spirits - - R6 DISTILLERY spirits.  
R6 is a tribute to the 6 Rubens brothers who opened the Rialto Theatre in 1926 and I hope to inspire others to follow their passions and dreams just the same.
 -Rob Rubens, Founder

R6 offers Private Label and Contract Distilling Services. If you're considering taking your spirit brand to the next level, contract distilling could be the key to 
unlocking innovation and expansion. By leveraging the capabilities and resources of a contract distillery, you can focus on refining your brand while ensuring consistent and exceptional products for your consumers We also offer consulting services to those interested in entering into the world of spirits.
Ready to elevate your spirit brand to new heights? 
Contact us:
privatelabel@r6distillery.com

R6 Distillery has a beautiful pre-prohibition era Speakeasy for private events. Our Speakeasy and Distillery are available for private events as well as location shooting for the film industry.
For your private events and location shoots please contact us:
privatelabel@r6distillery.com

R6 DISTILLERY is proudly partnered with Soldiers Best Friend, a nonprofit organization that touches two lives at once by pairing veterans suffering from PTSD/TBI with service dogs that can help them more easily readjust to civilian life.
Visit Soldiers Best Friend to learn more and make a donation.
https://soldiersbestfriend.org/how-to-help/donate.html

Name: Baselbieter Weingalerie GmbH
Description:
In unserem liebevoll gestalteten Lokal verbinden wir Genuss, Geselligkeit und erstklassige Qualität. Wir bieten Ihnen eine erlesene Auswahl an regionalen Weinen, ergänzt durch Spitzenweine aus ganz Europa, die Sie direkt vor Ort verkosten und erwerben können.

Unser Lokal lädt dazu ein, bei einem guten Glas Wein, Bier, Whiskey, Gin oder Ihrem persönlichen Lieblingsgetränk zu verweilen und die Seele baumeln zu lassen. Die stilvollen Räumlichkeiten schaffen dabei eine entspannte und einladende Atmosphäre, die jeden Besuch zu einem besonderen Erlebnis macht.

Regelmässig veranstalten wir spannende Events wie Themenabende, Degustationen oder exklusive Tastings. Unsere Räumlichkeiten stehen Ihnen zudem für private Anlässe wie Geburtstage, Weihnachtsessen oder Aperitifs zur Verfügung – immer perfekt abgestimmt auf Ihre individuellen Wünsche.

Ergänzend dazu bieten wir in unserem Onlineshop die Möglichkeit, Weine und Spirituosen bequem von zu Hause aus zu bestellen. Lassen Sie sich von unserem vielfältigen Angebot inspirieren und geniessen Sie die Welt des Genusses in vollen Zügen!

Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie bei uns willkommen zu heissen!

Unsere Öffnungszeiten:

Samstag: 14.00 bis 23.30 Uhr

Name: NOVAW
Description:
En NOVAW no somos solo importadores y distribuidores de espirituosos, también construimos conexiones. Nacimos en un momento desafiante, pero con una visión clara: acercar marcas con alma a consumidores que buscan calidad, autenticidad y experiencias únicas.

Más que un negocio, una pasión
Nos mueve la idea de construir algo grande junto a nuestros socios. De ver crecer marcas, abrir nuevos mercados y generar las mejores experiencias. Porque al final del día, todo se trata de eso: de compartir, de brindar y de hacer que cada historia tenga su momento para brillar.

Somos un equipo de apasionados por el mundo de los licores y destilados, respaldados por más de 20 años de experiencia en importación, distribución y posicionamiento de marcas en Europa. En Novaw trabajamos diariamente para que cada marca tenga su espacio, su voz y su historia dentro del mercado.

Name: Viparmex
Description: Contamos con una selección de vinos traidos desde Italia, Francia, España, Chile, Argentina y EUA.

Name: Feels Botanical
Description:
Born in the ancient, wild and fertile Australian continent, we embrace the wonders of our natural home to deliver a holistic drinking experience and ignite feelings within us all. Feels Botanical utilises Australian grapes that have been turn into wine and then distilled into a Spirit, Eau de vie. We then distill a combination of unique native and natural botanicals into the Eau de vie spirit to create a unique and versatile flavour profile. Available in 4 expressions;

Feels Botanical Bask, 43%, Eau de vie grape spirit distilled with Hemp Quandong & Kakadu Plum
Feels Botanical Vivify, 43%, Eau de vie grape spirit distilled with Turmeric, Coconut & Ginger
Feels Botanical Rouse, 33%, Eau de vie grape spirit distilled with Rose, Horny Goat Weed & Davidson Plum
Feels Botanical Revel, 33%, Eau de vie grape spirit distilled with Ginseng, Coffee & Illawarra Plum

Distributed in Australia by Swift+ Moore; https://www.swiftandmoore.com.au/

Name: PKGD Group
Description:
At PKGD "Packaged," we don’t just import spirits; we steward legacies.

PKGD Group is a world-class national craft spirits importer, brand developer, and strategic consulting partner dedicated to the growth of authentic, producer-owned spirits. Based in Holland, MI, with deep roots across the agave-growing regions of Mexico, we bridge the gap between world-class makers and the discerning U.S. consumer.

Our Mission: Purpose Over Numbers
We believe the future of the spirits industry isn’t defined by scale, but by alignment. Our portfolio is meticulously curated based on three non-negotiable pillars:

Producer Owned: We partner exclusively with families and makers who deserve to own their own stories.

Transparency & Quality: We champion additive-free production and full-disclosure craftsmanship and ownership.

World-Class Representation: Every bottle in our portfolio, from the legendary G4 Tequila and Tequila El Ateo to our boutique Mezcal and Raicilla offerings, represents the pinnacle of its category.

As Brand Builders, we provide more than just distribution logistics. We offer a comprehensive suite of sales and marketing solutions, including:

National Distribution Management: Building robust networks that drive long-term revenue.

Creative Storytelling: Through PKGD Films and PKGD Magazine, we provide the education and emotional connection today’s consumers crave.

Market Execution: High-touch, "feet-on-the-street" advocacy to build quality points of distribution in key accounts and chains.

Why PKGD?
When you see the PKGD Stamp, you no longer need to research. You are holding a spirit that is fairly priced, transparently made, and rooted in truth. We are a family across borders—una gran familia—working every day to ensure that everyone in the supply chain, from the jimador to the bartender, wins together.

Join us in raising the standard for craft spirits.

Name: Vamos Drinks
Description:
Your success is our business:

Vamos is the team giving the world of alcohol distribution new flavour. Owned and managed by experienced drinks distributors, we connect successful challenger brands with global distribution partners and help propel them to success.

Our partnerships empower select global distributors with brands that capture the imagination of consumers. It’s our mission to bring bold, exciting brands to market around the world, delivering big wins for distributors and innovative creators alike. Our brands are on-trend, full of attitude and already resonating with consumers around the world. We’ve helped achieve incredible levels of growth for our brands, and are now focused on getting their drinks into the hands of new global audiences.

How we work:

We’re not an agency. We’re not a sub-distributor. We’re not adding costs or taking a cut. We’re an invested partner, with skin in the game.

And because we have an ownership stake in all the brands we represent, your contracts and transactions are direct with the brands – no complicated third-party arrangements. Put simply, it’s in our interest to make everyone involved as successful as possible.

Name: SHIVA TRADERS
Description:
INTRODUCTION

SHIVA TRADERS was established and registered in 2005 with its main office located in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh (India).
Over the past Seventeen years, SHIVA has accumulated a strong and healthy market trust through a simple principle that we follow:
Earn Trust with Business
SHIVA is among the leading distributors of Imported Liquors (Like, Scotch, Wine, Beer, Vodka, Tequila and other Assorted Alcoholic Beverages) products in the Uttar Pradesh Market for almost Seventeen years and in the Uttrakhand Market for almost Two years.
SHIVA has been providing supplies and services to all major Wholesalers, Hotels/Bar/Restaurants & Retail in the region across pan UP and have a presence in all big Distributors of UP.
SHIVA understands the responsibility of timely distribution in the Fast-moving consumer goods market. Liquor is yet another market where you cannot cover up the last day’s lost sales and hence distributing effectively is a big concern. With the same view in the years in 2005 the partnership firm under the name & style “Shiva Traders” was established on 1st April 2005 by taking a wholesale license (FL -2) and a FL-2D license (Distribution of BIO in Whole U.P.) in Ghaziabad and some retail license of liquor shops in Ghaziabad, Meerut, Gautam Budh Nagar & Bulandshahar in Meerut commissionaire and the turnover in 2005-2006 was Rs.90 Cr. and in 2006 2007 Rs. 105 Cr. and in 2007-2008 Rs. 125 Cr. In the year 2008-2009 and this turnover was inclusive of IMFL.
Later on, due to the special zone formation we were bound to move to Lucknow & Sitapur. We also carried out the business of BIO distribution through the above-mentioned FL – 2D License during 2008-2009 and later as well uptill the abolition of FL – 2D License in the year 2020-21. Now Shiva Traders is a proprietorship firm under the guidance of Mr. Vineet Goel & have a BI0-1 license in Ghaziabad. This BIO – 1 License is just as same to FL – 2D earlier and have a distribution width for whole Uttar Pradesh

Name: Rime Craft Distillers
Description:
Rime Craft Distillers rappresenta la quinta generazione della dinastia Maschio, mastri distillatori da quasi due secoli, nel cuore delle Tre Venezie.
Il nome Rime nasce dalle iniziali di River Mentana, il gin monobotanico di puro ginepro che ha ispirato la nostra giovane azienda dalle radici antiche, fondata nel 2018 a Venezia.

L’arte del mastro distillatore è un mestiere artigianale che non si impara sui libri, un sapere che si tramanda nel tempo, fondato sul gusto e l’olfatto, e la loro memoria. Memoria a cui ci ispiriamo per la nostra produzione artigianale di distillati e liquori, frutto di un lavoro autentico, rivolto alla perfezione, basato sulla fedeltà massima alla massima qualità.

Per rimanere fedeli alla massima qualità ci siamo imposti standard elevatissimi, sostenuti dalla profonda conoscenza dell’arte distillatoria e liquoristica veneta.
Grappa, gin, vodka, amaro, costruiamo brand che raccontano un territorio leggendario, dalle Dolomiti a Venezia e alla sua Laguna, con etichette iconiche, dal design audace, come la forte identità dei nostri prodotti.

Rime Craft Distillers si rivolge agli operatori appassionati, attenti alla qualità, alla ricerca di distillati e liquori raffinati, nel segno dell’eccellenza, che per noi vuol dire amore per il bello e il ben fatto.

Name: Viña El Principal
Description:
VIÑA

El Principal
Nuestra viña recibe su nombre del Cacique Picunche Andetelmo, “El Principal”, señor de las tierras que hoy albergan nuestro terroir, al pie de la Cordillera de los Andes, en el Valle de Alto Maipo. Su carácter visionario y pacifico le hizo ganar el respeto de los conquistadores españoles dando origen a una historia de apertura e intercambio que perdura hasta nuestros tiempos. Hoy, el espíritu de Andetelmo sigue vivo en nuestros vinos que expresan toda la nobleza y calidad de un terroir único.

Name: Deluxus
Description:
DELUXUS er specialister indenfor engros-salg, distribution og fremstilling af private label. Vi forhandler udelukkende lækre kvalitetsprodukter til special-handlen!

Vi har samlet en række fødevareproducenter under en samlet vifte således at vores kunder får det bedste udvalg indenfor ØL, VIN og SPIRITUS samlet i en pakke.

Hos DELUXUS kan og vil vi skabe værdi for vores kunder, vi er købmænd af natur og vi forstår vigtigheden af at vores kunder har de rette produkter, på rette tid, til den rette pris.

DELUXUS er distributør for Nibe Bryghus, Frederikshavn Bryghus, Vendia Bryghus og Hjort Beer
