Some of the most exciting music is on the flip side of the record and some of the most interesting wines we have yet to taste.

We will continue to explore small producers and exciting regions on the edges of the wine world. We will continue to play the music of these individuals and share them amongst friends. In so doing, we hope to spread joy and shape a community that embraces exploration, change and something uniquely different within food and beverage.

Name: Alfa Spirits
Description:
Chi siamo
Un storia nata “per caso”: dalla semplice passione abbiamo iniziato a studiare, sperimentare fino a dare forma alle nostre idee! Il nome dei primi tentativi? Alfa 1, Alfa 2… e oggi siamo noi Alfa Spirits.

 Lucius Dry Gin
Realizzato con prodotti piemontesi d’eccellenza, Lucius Dry Gin è il nostro primo prodotto e rappresenta una nuova “esperienza” da bere che racchiude in sé tradizione e innovazione.

 Le botaniche

- Gorgonzola: un’eccellenza così significativa per il nostro territorio – oggi prodotto per più del 60% nel novarese – non avrebbe potuto essere più rappresentativa.

- Ginepro: per poter creare un gin il più possibile piemontese utilizziamo il ginepro che cresce naturalmente sulle montagne della Val d’Ossola, punta settentrionale della regione che guarda verso la Svizzera.

- Mischio e lichene: a far da legante ai due ingredienti principali abbiamo utilizzato muschi e licheni, botaniche inusuali nel mondo del gin che ci hanno permesso di accentuare il sentore di sottobosco delle giornate di pioggia.

Pallas Wines is part of the Delta Wines Group consisting of DGS Wijn, Coenecoop Wine Traders and Global Wine Operations in The Netherlands, Anka Wines in Poland and Adveal in Czech Republic . Together, they form one of the leading importers of Europe.

Name: Dionysos Casa de Vinuri Selecționate
Description:
We are Dionysos - Casa de Vinuri Selectionate, national distributor of wines through all modern trade channels. We are the exclusive distributor of some traditional wines.
It is a business with more than 20 years of experience in the field of wine production and distribution.
Our portfolio contains legendary ranges and special selections. It was selected to reflect the mission we have chosen: to nurture people's curiosity in the journey of discovering quality wines, inspiring their passion for it. The wines of our portfolio were chosen so that they can accompany the journey of a future wine connoisseur, a journey full of aromas and seductive tastes.

Name: Barti Rum
Description:
Barti Rum is a spiced rum brand proudly born in Pembrokeshire, West Wales back in 2017. 

Inspired by a local pirate story and the underrated Welsh ingredient laver seaweed, Barti was born. After combining expertly distilled Caribbean rum with a symphony of classic spiced rum ingredients including vibrant vanilla, clove, cinnamon and a hint of sweet citrus, the wild-picked local seaweed goes is infused to add depth and enhance the other flavours. 

Barti is vibrant enough to stand up in any mixer, try it with cola, ginger beer, or one of our favourites, cloudy apple juice and loads of ice. 

More than just a drink, Barti advocates a lifestyle of finding joy and contentment in the everyday, every day. Always drink responsibly.

Name: Top Selection Ltd
Description:
Top Selection is an award-winning wine and spirits importer, supplying the UK's leading restaurants, hotels and retailers. Established in 2000 by husband and wife, Ákos and Michelle Forczek, we remain to this day a proudly independent, family owned business, with a commitment to excellence.
 
Ultimately, Top Selection is more than a supplier. We are a trusted partner, offering not just exceptional wines and spirits, but also the expertise, flexibility, and dedication that help our clients succeed in an increasingly challenging and competitive marketplace. 

With over 25 years of experience, we combine agility and personal service with one of the UK’s most desirable portfolios; proudly representing over 100 family-owned producers from across the globe, several of whom, such as Egon Muller and Istvan Szepsy, craft some of the world’s most sought after wines.

We are proud to have been named SWA Fine Wine Merchant of the Year for three consecutive years, from 2018-2020 and to be ranked in the top 20 of the  2024 Harpers Wine & Spirits Top 50 Wholesalers.

Name: NORMANDIN - MERCIER
Description: Se concentrant uniquement sur les cognacs produits à la fois en Petite et Grande Champagne, Cognac J Normandin-Mercier est basé dans le magnifique environnement du Château de la Peraudière. La marque reste fidèle à ses traditions centenaires pour créer des cognacs allant du VSOP à la sélection de Pineau de Charentes. Cette maison de cognac familiale est aujourd'hui dirigée par Edouard, Jean-Marie et Audrey Normandin, qui s'efforcent ensemble de garantir que leurs produits sont créés avec la touche personnelle et le savoir-faire qui ont fait la réputation de la marque.

Name: UGLY Vodka
Description:
UGLY Vodka: Where Imperfect Apples Find Purpose 

Born from a mission to combat food waste and CO2 emissions, we're transforming 'ugly' apples from the Goulburn Valley into a premium, five-times distilled vodka.

20,000 Kg of apples, once destined for waste, have been repurposed, reducing methane emissions and supporting local farmers.

Our bottles are designed with sustainability in mind, using 30% less glass, minimizing our carbon footprint. We're not just carbon neutral; we're carbon negative, offsetting emissions by saving apples.

Powered by Untitled Group, 80Proof Liquor & Underscore_

Name: Estado Líquido - Wines & Spirits
Description:
A Estado Líquido é uma garrafeira especializada em vinhos e destilados de todo o mundo. 
Acreditamos que cada garrafa conta uma história e combinamos a curadoria com critério, a curiosidade de ir mais longe e a vontade de marcar momentos que merecem ser celebrados. 
Para quem procura um ícone do Velho Mundo ou um nome emergente do Novo Mundo, a Estado Líquido é o ponto de partida para a descoberta dos melhores vinhos e destilados. 
Selecionamos com rigor mais de 9000 referências para o ajudar a marcar e celebrar cada momento, porque sabemos que uma boa bebida vale tanto quanto o momento em que é servida. 
Estado Líquido. Marcamos cada momento.

At EP Consulting, we don’t just help brands grow, we accelerate value creation and protect investor capital.

Led by Ella Parlor, a commercial operator who has driven over $1B in revenue across global beverage and CPG portfolios, EP Consulting partners with private equity funds, independent sponsors, VC, family offices and founders to:

EllaParlor.com

EP Consulting: Operational Value Creation for Investors and Brands

Name: Boroka Beverages
Description: Boroka Spirits is redefining the drinking experience with premium gin and gin-based RTD beverages. Our mission is to create drinks that are instantly enjoyable, breaking the barriers of traditional acquired tastes. Join us in celebrating a lifestyle of boldness, adventure, and modern sophistication.

Name: Maison Daucourt
Description: At the heart of the famous Charente "Spirit Valley", the Maison Daucourt took on an ambitious challenge 20 years ago in the heart of the terroir. They decided to create a whisky brand. Produced in France and named Bastille 1789, a strong symbol evocative of its origin and revolutionary, this spirit took off internationally as early as 2010. The Maison Daucourt is recognized for the quality of its spirits, tradition, the art of distillation and blending, as well as for its expertise in elegant and refined design. This family-owned company composed of a reactive and perfectionist team has the will to strive for excellence. Maison Daucourt has therefore committed itself without compromise to the world of whisky with patience, rigor, elegance and sobriety. Recognized as one of the haute couture houses in the development of this spirit, it produces a whisky with a French touch combining aromas and know-how. Since then, its range has been constantly expanding, notably with the creation of liqueurs and vodka.

Name: LYQD
Description:
LYQD is redefining the whiskey cask market, simplifying how casks are bought, sold and matured. Built for security, trust and ease, the platform blends technology with tradition to open this exclusive market to a new generation of whiskey enthusiasts, cask owners and distilleries.

By redefining how whiskey is valued, exchanged and experienced, LYQD is bringing liquidity, confidence and simplicity to one of Ireland’s most storied assets.

Name: Getränke Ziegler GmbH
Description:
Wir als Getränkefachgroßhandel in der Metropolregion Nürnberg verstehen uns als Partner und logistischer Dienstleister für die Getränkehersteller und die Abnehmer im Getränkeeinzelhandel sowie im Lebensmittelhandel und in der Gastronomie. Wir sorgen für die komplette Beschaffungs-, Lager- und Distributionslogistik aller Getränkegebinde: durch unser breites und tiefes Sortiment bieten wir ein umfangreiches Angebot an Mehrweggetränken. Neben einem umfangreichen Sortiment an Dauer-Lagerartikeln, betreiben wir auch Saisonläger für Spezial-Artikel, die nicht das ganze Jahr verfügbar sind.

Unser umfangreicher und leistungsstarker Fuhrpark bringt die Mehrweggetränke zuverlässig zu unseren Kunden. Die Kastensortierung des zurückgegebenen Leerguts sowie die Rückführung aller Mehrweggebinde rundet unsere logistische Dienstleistung ab. Aufgrund der immer stärker werdenden Flaschenvielfalt gewinnt die Sortierung von Individualflaschen gegen separate Vergütung an Bedeutung.

Name: Winelot
Description: Our principal is high quality service for our customers. We work directly with Wine Estates from Greece, Italy and France. Our mission is to provide fast and accurate shipping solutions for our clients alongside unbeatable wholesale pricing,  in Greece, Spain, Germany and Dubai as well as in countries in E.U.

Name: TANICA
Description:
TANICA is an award-winning Australian aperitif that’s made from gently distilled, fresh botanicals and slow-soaked Davidson's plum. Best enjoyed as a refreshing spritz. 

Sure, the bottle is beautiful (thanks for noticing), but inside is where the magic really starts with a new approach to traditional distilling, avoiding direct contact with high temperatures and slow-soaking to bring out fresher flavours.

Our goal for TANICA is more than just fresh, fruity spritz. We are a female founded brand that expresses a new appreciation for the good-nature of Australia - our way of living and the native botanicals in our own backyard.

Name: Arte in Vigna srl
Description:
Arte in vigna nasce dalla passione e dalla competenza di due operatori del settore, Antonio e Alessandro, che hanno deciso di fondere insieme le proprie forze e le proprie competenze al fine di creare un nuovo soggetto distributivo.

Arte in vigna affonda radici profonde nel vero mondo agricolo fatto di piccoli, ma “grandiosi”, produttori veri che quotidianamente dedicano il proprio tempo ad elaborare prodotti genuini, di grande qualità nonché espressione della loro terra e della loro storia.

Contestualmente si proietta sul mercato con approcci moderni ed innovativi orientati al futuro e a cogliere sempre più e sempre meglio le esigenze degli operatori professionisti del mercato del vino di qualità cercando di rispondere con grande efficacia e competenza alle loro esigenze e alle loro necessità.

Name: Lime Bro's

Name: THE VIEW VODKA
Description:
The creation of THE VIEW vodka is a story of friendship, where Dona and Ewelina - two friends from Zielona Góra (Green Mountain in Polish), a city in Poland famous for its vodka, gin and wine history, decided to create a unique vodka characterised by its smoothness, excellent taste and aroma.

THE VIEW vodka has been distilled from the highest quality Organic certified Polish wheat grains, but its secret lies in the addition of 1% Polish macerated apple distillate. This combination delivers a truly unique aroma and taste, further emphasised by the use of crystal-clear water from our own deep well, platinum filtration - which provides enhanced smoothness, and 60-day maturation process, where THE VIEW rests and gains its character and body.

The name THE VIEW is associated with the beautiful view on our label and looking at everything from a wider point of view.

Savour THE VIEW

Name: BrandStar Alliance
Description:
BrandStar Alliance is an internationally acclaimed and award-winning Swedish entrepreneur and innovation driven company that have developed some of the world's foremost and most tasty drinks, today ten different spirits in the ultra-premium segments. BrandStar Alliance offer a series of exclusive spirits with distinguished experiences of tastes combined with Swedish craftmanship and design. Characteristic and niche lifestyle brands, focusing on good and genuine drink experiences that contributes to increased quality of life.

The GIN-trilogy; Enastående - Magnificent - GIN, Stjärnklar - Starry - GIN and Supermåne - Supermoon - GIN, combines quality, originality and innovation and is the company’s first release. It comes as a result of a close companionship with some of Sweden’s very best and most experienced professionals. 

BrandStar Alliance´s ten spirits are developed by a close collaboration with Solveig Sommarström, one of Europe’s finest, award-winning and recognized master blender, chemist, aroma- and water expert. 

"We are a small company and the development and hard work leading up to ten different products have been toilsome as well as challenging, but they all have their own story to tell."
Steven Kautzky Andersson, founder and CEO of BrandStar Alliance, spirit enthusiast. Entrepreneur and works in brand management. He also has enjoyed experience from having been an internationally noted and Grammis nominated guitar player. 

"We nurture a strong love for small-scale and genuine craftmanship. Our demands are high regarding ingredients as well as the conceptualization in originality, with a modern touch."
Catherine Engelbrekt, co-owner of BrandStar Alliance, enjoys vast experience in design and development of crafty and lifestyle premium products. Under the direction of founder Erling Persson she established H&M in Europe. She also participated in the launch of Björk & Berries, one of the first brands of natural perfume in the world.

Name: Procevinos
Description:
En Procevinos, nos enorgullecemos de nuestra amplia selección de vinos licores, nuestro compromiso con la calidad es evidente en todos los aspectos de nuestro proceso de producción, desde seleccionar cuidadosamente los mejores ingredientes hasta utilizar tecnología de punta, nuestro objetivo es brindar a nuestros clientes productos de la más alta calidad.

Nuestro equipo de profesionales experimentados se dedica a garantizar que cada uno de nuestros licores cumpla con los más exigentes estándares de calidad, creemos que cada detalle cuenta y nos esforzamos por lograr la perfección en cada botella, tanto si es un conocedor experimentado como si acaba de empezar a explorar el mundo de los licores, estamos seguros de que encontrará algo que le encante en nuestra colección, desde sabores clásicos hasta mezclas únicas, lo invitamos a experimentar la calidad y el sabor excepcionales de los licores Procevinos.

Name: Vininova
Description:
Vininova to importer i dystrybutor win i alkoholi mocnych z całego świata – w naszym portfolio dostępnych jest ponad 1300 butelek, wśród których można znaleźć słynne i uznane winnice oraz mniejszych, butikowych producentów. W portfolio Vininova znajdują się takie marki jak słynny szampan Lanson – jedna z najbardziej rozpoznawalnych marek szampańskich na świecie, legendarne wina Barons de Rothschild, uznana hiszpańska winnica Marques de Riscal, niemicki Dr. Loosen,  znakomita argentyńska Catena Zapata czy znany i ceniony producent Nieeport. Wina konwencjonalne, które są przeważającą częścią oferty Vininova uzupełniane są o cieszące się dużym uznaniem wina naturalne, które zdobywają coraz większą rzeszę fanów. 
W ofercie alkoholi mocnych, będących częścią portfolio Vininova Spirits, dostępne są takie marki jak Glengoyne, Equiano, Tamdhu, Smokehead, Mezan czy Foursquare.

Oprócz dystrybucji w kanałach HoReCa i B2B, Vininova buduje również sieć salonów stacjonarnych w największych miastach Polski, takich jak: Warszawa, Poznań, Kraków, Gdańsk, Wrocław czy Katowice.

Name: Ohio Liquor (OHLQ)
Description:
Ohio Liquor (OHLQ) is a unique public/private partnership that ensures the safe and fair distribution of high-proof liquor across our state and directs profits from the sale of liquor to fund economic development in Ohio. In everything we do, advocating for responsible consumption is always our top priority.

OHLQ is a partnership between the Ohio Department of Commerce’s Division of Liquor Control and JobsOhio Beverage System (JOBS), formed to use the profits from the sale of high-proof liquor in Ohio to fund job creation and bring new capital investment to the state. The Division selects and prices products and manages the sale of liquor in Ohio. JOBS supplies the products to OHLQ locations and owns the profits from the sale of all high-proof liquor in the state. JOBS uses these profits — not taxes — to provide stable and dedicated funding for JobsOhio, a private nonprofit corporation dedicated to Ohio’s economic development. Privately owned OHLQ locations (sometimes referred to as Contract or State Liquor Agencies) contract with OHLQ to sell high-proof liquor on consignment.

Name: Sustaina Wines
Description:
Sustaina Wines, the brainchild of wine industry veteran Peter Douglas, launched in 2023 as a Berlin-based boutique wine agency.

Our mission: to source and distribute wines exclusively from producers who meet our exacting standards. We're all about top-tier wine quality, exceptional service, transparent availability, and an unyielding commitment to sustainability, spanning every step from vineyard practices to packaging.

We proudly represent a diverse array of wineries, from small artisans to large producers, who share our passion for environmental responsibility, ethical business practices, and cutting-edge wine production. These producers are on the frontline of sustainability, utilizing practices like lightweight packaging, renewable energy in production, and innovative packaging solutions, all geared towards slashing their carbon footprint.

Name: Alexander Wines
Description:
AW has always taken pride in sourcing a relevant wine selection and providing a bespoke customer service since it was founded by Fraser Alexander in 1981.  In 2018 Alexander Wines joined the Dunns Food and Drink Family.  Dunns, one of Scotland’s best-known food and drink suppliers, is a family business, with a history dating back to 1875 when a 26 year old Joseph Dunn started his soft drinks business in the east end of Glasgow.

AW is a people orientated company which aims to work with the Scottish on and off trade to be your partner in wine.
We understand that no two businesses are the same. That’s why we deliver a personal, responsive service tailored to the unique needs of each customer. Whether you're curating your first wine list, seeking fine wine, training staff, or looking for something unexpected to elevate your menu. 

Our expert team tastes, debates, and hand-selects every wine in our portfolio with passion and purpose. We proudly import wines from South Africa, France, Italy, and Spain, and work closely with key partners ABS and SOV to offer exclusive access to world-class portfolios — covering a range of styles and price points to suit any business.

It is our mission to be the go-to wine supplier for Scotland’s hospitality and retail sectors, to help them achieve their wine goals, whatever they may be.  Between us we have years of experience within the on and off trade sectors, so we understand the needs and wants of businesses in this constantly changing marketplace. Whether you want help building your wine list from scratch, want to source some fine wine, some unusual additions to your menu, or need training for your staff; the AW team are here to work with you to build a lasting relationship.

Name: AMKA - Weine, Biere, Spirituosen
Description: Die AMKA GmbH ist ein Importeur von Qualitätsweinen, Spirituosen und Craft-Beer. Mit Wurzeln im dänischen Traditionsunternehmen der Familie Søndergaard sind wir seit 2009 mit unserem Firmensitz in Harrislee bei Flensburg auch im deutschen Markt aktiv und verkaufen unsere Produkte bundesweit im Fach- und Einzelhandel, an Hotel- und Gastronomiebetriebe, Caterer und Schiffsausstatter sowie speziell auch im deutsch-dänischen Grenzhandel. Name: Martine's Wines
Description:
In 2012, founder Martine Saunier hand-selected Greg Castells to continue her legacy as the new owner of Martine’s Wines, and the two struck a deal. Today, Greg and his business partner, Kate Laughlin, lead the company forward with their vision to celebrate all that’s right with wine.

The wines we represent are carefully curated and rightfully sought after. Each bottle represents the strength of our relationships, some that have lasted decades and others that are starting anew. These years of experience have served us well, and Martine’s Wines is an industry leader specializing in importing, compliance, warehouse, marketing, sales, and distribution. We self-distribute in California, New York, and Illinois, and are fortunate to be represented by an extensive network of top distributors across the rest of the country. It is our ambition to guide the industry forward in promoting sustainable practices, starting in the vineyard and progressing throughout the supply chain. We are grateful to be a part of this lively and pleasurable business of wine.

Name: IVALDI SPIRITS
Description:
Born in 1909 at the height of the Belle Époque, Maison IVALDI once stood as a shining star among the great houses of Cognac.

Today, it is reborn through IVALDI SPIRITS — a subsidiary dedicated to exceptional spirits, built on French elegance, artisanal precision, and a boldly modern creative vision.

Based in the heart of Cognac, the company brings together ancestral know-how, contemporary spirit, and uncompromising craftsmanship to create outstanding spirits :

• DUSSARD, an emblematic house from Cognac’s Premier Cru — Grande Champagne — symbol of elegance and nobility.

• LOYAL BANDIT, a French whisky of character — free-spirited and audacious.

• BEN COCKY, a bold and modern whisky with an irreverent edge.

• LIM VODKA, pure and crystalline, the reflection of absolute precision.

Name: A LAS ROCAS
Description:
A LAS ROCAS  busca un espacio de tradiciones, donde la calidad, historias e internacionalidad hablen por sí solas, y lo conseguimos.
Nos inspira la idea de acercar los mejores productos del mundo hasta la mesa y el bar de los chilenos, ayudarlos a descubrir nuevas experiencias y paladear nuevos sabores en su propia casa, o en los mejores bares y restaurantes del país. Para lograr nuestro propósito, a través de los años hemos desarrollado un portafolio de productos exclusivos, cada uno de ellos único y singular en su categoría y de inigualable calidad.
Cada botella trae consigo una experiencia directamente desde el país de origen, todo ensamblado con una gran historia que las respaldan.
Trabajamos cada día para que nuestra oferta siga siendo única y a la vez incorpore las últimas novedades disponibles en el mercado. Para lograrlo viajamos por el mundo, visitamos ferias, nos asesoramos con expertos y permanentemente buscamos productos de innovación.
Nuestros productos tienen cada uno su propia historia, los invitamos a detenerse un minuto en nuestra página y conocerlas. Esto no solo hace comprender mejor su valor, sino también potenciar la sorprendente experiencia de disfrutar de la mejor cerveza, un vino memorable, o un destilado incomparable.
Amamos nuestros productos, sabemos que te acompañan en tus momentos de celebración, por lo mismo son también un muy buen regalo para entregar a otros. Al comprar por nuestra página siempre podrás estar seguro de que recibirás tu compra perfectamente empacada para que comiences a disfrutar desde que llegue a tus manos.
Bienvenidos a A LAS ROCAS!

Name: Virtuoso Wine & Spirits
Description:

We value our customers and welcome your feedback and suggestions.

Name: Faktoria Win
Description:
Faktoria Win od początku istnienia wspiera i kształtuje zwyczaje konsumenckie Polaków. Chcemy, żeby wysokiej jakości wino było produktem łatwym w wyborze oraz dostępnym dla każdego i wszędzie. Po wielu latach pracy nasz cel został osiągnięty!

Dziś wino jest najbardziej dynamicznie rosnącą kategorią alkoholi w Polsce.
Wykorzystaj to z Faktorią Win!
Wprowadziliśmy unikatową formułę sprzedaży wina skierowaną do małych i średnich sklepów detalicznych, która umożliwia skuteczne konkurowanie w tej dziedzinie z dużymi sklepami sieciowymi.

Zapewniamy gotowe rozwiązanie - począwszy od starannej selekcji win z całego świata w korzystnych cenach, przez pełne wsparcie marketingowe, aż po najwyższej klasy ekspozycję wina w Państwa sklepie oraz doradztwo w zakresie doboru selekcji win przez nasz zespół Doradców Klienta.

Dołącz do grona ponad 6000 sklepów lub 1000 restauracji sprzedających wino pod szyldem Faktorii Win. Zapewnij sobie szybkie i skuteczne wejście do świata win.

Name: HABECO (Habeco Co.,LTD)
Description:
Tiền thân của Tổng công ty Cổ phần Bia - Rượu - Nước giải khát Hà Nội là Nhà máy bia Hommel được người Pháp xây dựng từ năm 1890, là khởi đầu cho một dòng chảy nhỏ bé cùng song hành với những thăng trầm của Thăng Long - Hà Nội. Ngày 15/8/1958, trong không khí cả nước sôi sục chào mừng kỷ niệm 13 năm Cách mạng Tháng Tám thành công, khai sinh ra nước Việt Nam Dân chủ Cộng hòa, bốn năm Thủ đô hoàn toàn giải phóng; chai bia Việt Nam đầu tiên mang nhãn hiệu Trúc Bạch ra đời trong niềm vui xúc động lớn lao của cán bộ công nhân viên Nhà máy.

Một sản phẩm khẳng định quyền làm chủ của người lao động, phục vụ nhu cầu thiết yếu của xã hội trong giai đoạn khôi phục và phát triển. Từ cột mốc này, Nhà máy bước vào thời kỳ mới – thời kỳ khẳng định thương hiệu của ngành Công nghiệp nước ta nói chung và ngành Đồ uống nói riêng, là niềm tự hào của Hà Nội và cả nước. Từ đó trở đi, ngày 15/8 hàng năm được chọn là Ngày truyền thống của Bia Hà Nội.

Ngày 6/5/2003, Bộ trường Bộ Công nghiệp (nay là Bộ Công Thương) có Quyết định số 75/2003/QĐ-BCN thành lập Tổng công ty Bia - Rượu - Nước giải khát Hà Nội (viết tắt là HABECO). Từ ngày 16/6/2008, Tổng công ty chính thức chuyển đổi mô hình tổ chức từ một Tổng Công ty Nhà nước  sang Tổng Công ty Cổ phần. Đây là bước ngoặt quan trọng để Bia Hà Nội khẳng định vị thế của mình trong giai đoạn hội nhập.

Trải qua gần 130 năm lịch sử với hơn nửa thế kỷ khôi phục và phát triển, đến nay, Habeco đã trở thành một trong các doanh nghiệp hàng đầu của ngành Đồ uống Việt Nam.

Những dòng sản phẩm nổi tiếng làm nên thương hiệu Habeco như Bia hơi Hà Nội, Bia lon Hà Nội, Bia Trúc Bạch, Hanoi Beer Premium… đã nhận được sự tin yêu của người tiêu dùng về cả chất lượng và phong cách, chinh phục những người sành bia trong và ngoài nước.

Name: La Route des Vins Caviste
Description:
Créée par Laurence et Jean-Marc Avram, La Route des Vins voit le jour en 1982.
Ils implantent leur première boutique au coeur de Marseille.
Rigueur et volonté permettent au couple de passionnés de redonner
rapidement sens et valeur à un métier quelque peu délaissé, celui de caviste.
Jean-Marc Avram, porte-parole de la profession défendra son métier et lui
donnera un statut officiel et reconnu : Caviste Indépendant.
La Route des Vins devient la vitrine d’une passion et une adresse incontournable
pour tous les amoureux du vin.
D’année en année, la Maison gagne la confiance des oenophiles et devient
aussi le gage d’un choix de cadeaux d’affaires réussis. Avec leur présentation
« signature » de la maison, les petits colis bleus raffinés s’invitent chez tous.
Le succès de La Route des Vins est lancé !

Name: Maison Bleu Agave
Description:
« Militer afin de faire connaître la Tequila 100% Agave » tel est notre objectif depuis 2012. Dès l’organisation d’événements, en passant par la vente/distribution de Tequila et la fabrication de produits artisanaux à base de Tequila, Bleu Agave n’a cessé de s’agrandir depuis.
En Octobre 2018 nous ouvrons « La Maison Bleu Agave - 100% agave » au 60 rue de la Jonquière, dans le 17ème arrondissement de Paris. Une boutique installée au 
rez-de-chaussé de Be Coworking, un espace de coworking dont les univers communs se mélangent parfaitement.

Il s’agit d’une adresse spécialisée dans les alcools et fermentés issus de cette plante, à savoir : Tequila, Mezcal, Raicilla, ou encore du Pulque. Ce lieu, inauguré en Octobre 2018, a pour ambition de faire le lien entre producteurs, distributeurs et amateurs de ces produits dans le but de faire connaître leur splendeur et leur importance dans la culture mexicaine, loin des clichés. À travers différents types d'événements, et une boutique dédiée à ces produits, nous vous ferons voyager directement au terroir de chacun de ces distillats, fermentés et autres dérivés pour vous en faire découvrir la richesse, résultat d'une longue tradition mexicaine .

Name: Cidrerie Lacroix
Description:
Verger Lacroix et Cidrerie maîtrise l’art de cultiver la pomme sous toutes ses formes. Que vous aimiez l’autocueillette, les cidres de grande qualité ou les produits gourmands, vous trouverez tout ce que vous cherchez.

Cidres

Connaissez-vous les cidres de feu, cidres de glace et cidres pétillants du Verger Lacroix et Cidrerie? Plusieurs d’entre eux sont reconnus au Québec et mondialement pour leurs goûts uniques qui évoquent les saisons, les couchers de soleil et même le ciel! 

Que ce soit pour siroter un verre de cidre bien froid en bonne compagnie ou pour réserver une commande privée pour votre restaurant ou votre événement, le Verger Lacroix et Cidrerie offre une large gamme de cidres, de transformation artisanale,  pour plaire à tous les palais.

Produits gourmands

Cuisinées sur place à partir de pommes fraîchement cueillies, les spécialités gourmandes du Verger Lacroix et Cidrerie ajouteront une touche de passion à vos repas en famille ou entre amis. Faites vos provisions pour la route ou encore pour offrir en cadeaux à vos proches.

Name: Small Lot Wine & Spirits
Description:
About Small Lot Wine & Spirits

Founded in 2011, Small Lot Wine & Spirits is a modern importer–distributor on a mission to connect real products with real people. From our home base in Minnesota, we proudly serve partners across Minnesota, North Dakota and South Dakota—founders and families crafting distinct beverages, and the retail and restaurant professionals who bring them to life.

What We Do
We curate a balanced, fast-growing portfolio across four core categories:

Wine: Our origin—authentic producers spanning global regions

Spirits: A handpicked, innovative mix of domestic and imported labels

THC & NA Beverages: Forward-looking alternatives that meet today’s evolving consumer preferences

Craft Logistics Services: End-to-end support—including warehousing, final-mile delivery and compliance tools—designed for emerging brands




At Small Lot, we believe our work is never “finished.” Every day brings new market shifts, new stories and new opportunities to learn and refine. Fueled by an extraordinary team and a culture of scalable execution, we’re growing stronger together—and we can’t wait to see where the next glass takes us.

 Vous êtes un particulier ?
Profitez d’une dégustation privée chez vous ou dans un lieu atypique, pour un anniversaire, une soirée entre amis, en famille, ou toute autre occasion spéciale.

 Une sélection personnalisée

 Et si un vin vous plaît ?

Avec ParfaiteHarmonie, élevons l’art du vin, ensemble !

Name: TERRAVIGNA AG
Description:
Hallo, wir sind TERRAVIGNA! Wir sind eine familiengeführte Weinhandlung und sind in Utzenstorf, Kanton Bern zu Hause. Was uns einzigartig macht? Das generationenübergreifende Zusammenspiel. Die Balance zwischen wertvoller Erfahrung und neuen Ideen. Die Offenheit für Veränderung und das Verständnis für Qualität und Konstanz – und der Mut, auch mal aus der Reihe zu tanzen. 
Familiarität wird bei uns grossgeschrieben. Nicht nur, weil wir ein Vater-Tochter-Sohn-Gespann sind, sondern vielmehr, weil unser grossartiges Team die erweiterte Familie ist und wir alle zusammen an einem Strang ziehen, um Ihnen den besten Service zu bieten. 
Dieses Zusammenspiel macht uns als Unternehmen aus und widerspiegelt sich auch in unserem Sortiment. Unser Portfolio-Mix besteht aus zeitlosen Klassikern und renommierten Brands sowie aufstrebenden, kreativen Jungwinzern. Wir sind unglaublich stolz, so viele wunderbare Winzer-Persönlichkeiten in der Schweiz vertreten zu dürfen. Es ist für uns eine Herzenssache, ihre Geschichten, ihre Leidenschaft und ihre Kreationen an unsere Kundschaft weiterzutragen. Mit vielen von ihnen pflegen wir jahrelange Partnerschaften, die zu Freundschaften wurden. Ob Supertuscan, biodynamisch oder Natural Wine: Unsere Weine können schweizweit an Top-Adressen genossen werden – sei es in der gehobenen Gastronomie oder bei trendigen Newcomern und Pop-ups.

Name: Kalevala Distillery
Description:
Founded in 2012, Kalevala Distillery stands at the edge of Europe — where wild Finnish nature meets timeless tradition.
As a small, family-run distillery, we craft spirits by hand, combining scientific precision with genuine passion.
Our signature Kitee Dry Gin pays tribute to our home region and its pure northern character.
We also create a low-alcohol spirit for those who enjoy a lighter way to savor fine flavors.
Inspired by the moonshiners of the 1930s, we continue their legacy with craftsmanship, quality, and soul — distilling the essence of Easternmost Finland into every bottle.

Name: Bambara Selection
Description:
Bambara Selection est une agence de représentation de vin basée Québec. Nous sommes une petite équipe de professionnels jeunes et dynamiques qui priorisent l'innovation, la durabilité et l'authenticité. Notre mission est d'enrichir la culture et la vie à travers le vin. 

Bambara Selection is a wine distribution and marketing agency in Quebec. We are a small team of young and dynamic professionals with focus on innovation, sustainability and authenticity. Our mission is to enrich culture and lives through wine.

Name: Mitchell & Son Wine Merchants
Description:
Established in 1805, Mitchell & Son is Ireland's oldest fine wine and spirit merchant.  It is now run by the 6th and 7th generation of the Mitchell family.  

With two locations in Dublin, the CHQ and Glasthule, Mitchell's sells wine from all over the world across all price ranges and specializes in fine wine from Bordeaux and Burgundy.  We also sell Green Spot Whiskey and Riedel Glassware.

Name: Esencia de Viña
Description:
Esencia de Viña nace en España con la voluntad de romper lo establecido y transformar el vino en una experiencia completamente nueva.

Creamos granizados de vino elaborados a partir de vinos con denominación de origen, logrando conservar el aroma, el sabor y la identidad real del vino. La textura, cuidada al detalle, aporta una nueva dimensión sensorial sin alterar la esencia del producto.

Sin gluten, sin aditivos, sin azúcares añadidos y completamente vegano.

No hacemos vino.
Hacemos que el vino se viva de otra manera.

Nos dirigimos a quienes buscan lo excepcional, lo diferente. A quienes entienden que la sofisticación también puede ser inesperada, disruptiva y refrescante.

Esencia de Viña es una marca pensada para los espacios, momentos y personas que entienden que el lujo no siempre está en lo clásico, sino en lo auténtico, lo nuevo, lo que deja huella.

Somos una nueva categoría dentro del universo del vino.
Una nueva forma de sentir, de brindar, de disfrutar.

Esto no es solo una bebida.
Es vino, pero no como lo conocías.

Esencia de Viña.
Rompiendo el vino.

Name: The Original Pickle Shot
Description:
You never forget your first 
We’ll never forget tasting our final recipe for the first time and we bet you won’t either. The Original Pickle Shot is big, bold pickle flavor, done right. 

There’s a reason we’re the no. 1 selling pickle spirit
When we first bottled The Original Pickle Shot in 2018, we knew a new pickle era was upon us, and we were happy to lead the way. There are plenty of flavored vodkas that taste like vodka with a hint of whatever flavor is listed on the label. But that wasn’t our goal for The Original Pickle shot — we wanted to make the best tasting, pickle-forward shot possible, so we spent a really, really, reallyyy long time developing a proprietary recipe that’s won over both pickle lovers and pickle skeptics since day 1. The key to our recipe?

Our brine makes us shine
Not all brines are created equal (iykyk). Once we crafted the pickle brine of our dreams , we knew we had something special so we…
Blended it with five-times distilled Iowa vodka at an intentionally low ABV to keep that pickle flavor 
Hard passed on artificial flavors or sugars 
Tried a whole lot of versions  until we got it just right 
Overcame a laughable (tragedy + time = comedy) number of obstacles as a start-up with no outside help, investors, or celeb partners 

We hope you’ll stick around to see where we go from here.

Name: MM Antverpia
Description:
Bij MM Antverpia zetten we de trotse traditie van ambachtelijke distillatie voort, rechtstreeks vanuit het hart van Antwerpen. Als een premium merk staan we bekend om onze eigen unieke distillaten die de zintuigen prikkelen en de ware essentie van onze stad vastleggen. Ons assortiment omvat een selectie van verfijnde smaken, waaronder Amaretto, Gin, Limoncello, Rum en Pastis, die met toewijding en vakmanschap worden gecreëerd.

Wat ons onderscheidt, is onze thuisbasis in Kapellen, waar we onze distillaten van begin tot eind vervaardigen. Ons team van gepassioneerde vakmensen zorgt ervoor dat elk flesje doordrenkt is met de rijke geschiedenis en hedendaagse elegantie van Antwerpen. We geloven in het behoud van onze lokale wortels terwijl we streven naar internationale erkenning, en we zijn er trots op dat onze producten te vinden zijn in gerenommeerde slijterijen en toprestaurants.

Name: Fah Mai Holdings Group, Inc.
Description:
Fah Mai Holdings Group, Inc. (FMHG) started with a vision and was founded in early 2017. We are now the world’s first SEC-registered, publicly traded company, with subsidiaries in the UK and Thailand. Our ticker symbol is FMHG, and you can find us trading on the OTC stock exchange in the US.

Investing in whisky has long been the reserve of the super-wealthy or the whisky expert. Fah Mai Holdings Group, Inc (FMHG) is here to change that! Here at FMHG, we own and operate what we aim to become the world’s most extensive collection of rare and collectable single-malt Scotch whisky.

As a publicly traded company, we are launching the world’s first "investable whisky collection", allowing you to invest in our 100% owned and managed "Fah Mai Rare Whisky Collection."

We provide content only for educational purposes. It is the sole responsibility of the purchaser/investor to obtain appropriate advice (including legal, tax, and investment advice) from other persons before any purchases and investments. Fah Mai Holdings Limited does not offer financial, legal, or tax advice.

Name: Stocchetti Beverage Service
Description:
La storia dell'azienda affonda le sue radici nella selezione e distribuzione del vino e con un percorso graduale va a includere la selezione e distribuzione di birre e dei distillati più ricercati. Da sempre attenta alle referenze e alla qualità dei suoi prodotti, Stocchetti Beverage Service è una delle aziende di riferimento nel mondo dell'Horeca, grazie alla sua capacità di coniugare idee innovative e tradizione, frutto del costante lavoro di un team attento a tutte le evoluzioni dei consumi e ai nuovi trend del settore. 
Stocchetti Beverage Service, tuttavia, non è solo un grossista bevande di alta qualità: l'azienda ha ampliato la propria offerta, investendo e scommettendo nel campo della formazione .
Da oltre vent'anni Stocchetti Beverage Service è membro di CDA, il più importante consorzio di settore di cui fanno parte oltre 100 aziende di distribuzione bevande operanti su tutto il territorio nazionale. 

È nata così nel 2017 la Stocchetti Beverage School: un progetto in cui la formazione è in primo piano ed è rivolta non solo agli operatori del settore ma anche ai privati, dando loro la possibilità di crescere e avere una conoscenza completa del settore del beverage a fini professionali, o per passione e inclinazione personali.
Vuoi conoscere nel dettaglio la nostra proposta formativa? Ti invitiamo a consultare la sezione del nostro sito dedicata ai corsi di formazione.

Description:
Alpinum Group produces a one-of-a-kind gin. Crafted in the heart of Switzerland, Alpinum Gin is a true masterpiece made with the finest botanicals sourced from the Swiss Alps, glacier water, and premium vodka distilled from the highest-quality grains. Each sip delivers a unique and refreshing taste that transports you to a world of alpine purity and sophistication.

Only for legal age, consume with moderation.

Description:
A Slattery Group Company

A dynamic and disruptive force in the on-trade drinks industry in Ireland. With the legacy of The Slattery Group behind us, TIP'L Wines & Spirits is focused on high standards, expertise, and top-class customer service.

The Slattery Group has been at the heart of the drinks industry in Ireland for over 60 years.

Name: Longhirst Spirits
Description:
At Longhirst Spirits, we are passionate about crafting the finest spirits inspired by our beautiful home and family. 

Longhirst Gin is our first product and was created and founded in the Northumbrian village of Longhirst. Surrounded by green velvet fields and natural woodland, our flavours were discovered right here!

Each bottle at Longhirst Spirits is lovingly crafted and influenced by botanicals grown organically on our own land. We believe in the provision of  mother nature and aim to create exceptional flavours that pay homage to her and our heritage.

To ensure each bottle is unique and one of a kind, our wax labels are hand crafted and applied by us personally.

We are a blended family with 3 out of 5 neurodiverse children. Our journey began with the intention of providing security and success for our children whom may otherwise have difficulty finding opportunities in today's society.

We truly are a family run business!

For more information on this please see 

'Our Future Intentions'.

Name: 21+ Whisky
Description:
21 Plus is an exquisite blend of Scotch, Indian Matured Malts, and meticulously hand-picked Indian grain spirits, resulting in a harmonious amber nectar adorned with captivating flecks of Rich Golden color.

This whisky unveils rich earthy cereal tones interwoven with soft malted notes and delightful fruity highlights. For the best experience, add a dash of freshly drawn water to lift the aromas and enhance the tasting journey.

The palate reveals a delightful combination of sweet and gentle flavors, exhibiting a slight firmness at its core while remaining highly approachable and eager to please.

This exceptional blend is enriched by subtle oak wood notes that contribute their distinct character to the overall profile. The medium finish leaves a lingering impression of rich fruits followed by a subtle dryness from the oak.

Indulge in the sophistication and allure of 21 Plus - a whisky that embodies elegance, craftsmanship, and an unforgettable tasting experience. Enjoy it responsibly and savor every moment of this exceptional blend.

Description:
Welcome to Novel Whisky—a community that's about more than just whisky. 

We’re building a space where people can come together, unwind, and connect—whether you’re a whisky lover or not. At Novel, we believe in finding balance. That’s why we embrace the "work hard, play hard" lifestyle, combining social moments with a passion for fitness and well-being.

This isn’t just about drinks—it’s about escaping the noise of everyday life, stepping away from screens, and enjoying real conversations. 

We host everything from laid-back social gatherings to fitness events that energise and motivate. 

Whether you're sipping on a cocktail or pushing your limits in a workout, our community is for those who want to live life fully, both in and out of the glass.

Here, you just need to love great company, active living, and a good time. Who knows, by the end, you might love whisky as much as we do.

Welcome to Novel. Let's raise a glass to balance!

Name: MJ Wines International
Description:
MJ Wines International is a specialist wine distributor renowned for its meticulously curated selection of wines from around the globe. This extensive range from both the OId World and New World ensures that we provide an eclectic mix of traditional and contemporary wine styles, suitable for different occasions and palates. In Singapore, MJ Wines International distributes these exceptional wines through on-trade channels (such as restaurants, hotels, and bars) and other online platforms.

Apart from distribution, MJ Wines also specializes in wine-centric events, including tasting sessions and dining events in collaboration with our F&B partners. We also continually educate about the artistry of winemaking with our enthusiast friends and the industry, aiming to deepen the appreciation of the craft.

Name: Bundu Brands
Description:
Born from a passion for premium craftsmanship and authentic storytelling, Bundu Brands is a dynamic house of spirits that captures the wild heart of adventure. With a portfolio that includes Wildebeest Brandewyn and Bobbejaan Herbal Liqueur, we create exceptional, high-quality beverages that blend tradition with innovation.

Rooted in South African heritage, our brands are designed to bring people together, whether around a braai, on a sun-soaked beach, or at a lively music festival. Each product is crafted with a commitment to quality, authenticity and the spirit of celebration, ensuring that every sip tells a story.

As we expand beyond borders, Bundu Brands continues to grow through strategic partnerships, innovation and a deep connection with our consumers. We believe in bold flavors, unforgettable moments, and the power of shared experiences.

Drink the adventure. Live the story.

Name: Morales Beverage Group (MBG)
Description:
Morales Beverage Group (MBG) is a national beverage and spirits distributor focused on bringing high-quality brands to market through disciplined execution and strong local partnerships.

Operating across key markets including Texas, Florida, California, Louisiana, and South Carolina, MBG ensures brands reach retailers and consumers efficiently, compliantly, and with consistency. Our strength lies in local market expertise, trusted relationships, and day-to-day execution at the ground level.

As part of the broader Mexcor organization, MBG drives Hispanic brands through relentless distribution execution, working side by side with retailers and suppliers to outperform in every market we serve.

Name: B-Wine Invest - The Wine Company
Description:
At B-wineinvest we offer more than 15 years of experience with wine and all it brings of great experiences, and we take great pride in helping our clients find the best wine  suited for long term investment. 

Historically, wine is considered a better investment than shares and stocks. A low risk with stable returns is always considered a good investment. Combined with quality assurance and low investment costs,  confirmed wine knowledge, and proper handling and storage, and you have something worthwhile and tangible to be building a longterm relationship on.

Why choose B-wineinvest?

We operate as a one man company. For that same reason you dont need to pay the fees you would have to do in bigger companies who would need to cover salaries for their employees as one example.

For the same reason we offer you the wines at a better price and your return becomes bigger.

We are at the moment two people working the company and to us both wineinvestment is a passion and not just a company where making money justifies the means. 

We believe in longterm client relationship and consider the success of our clients the success of our way of doing business.

You avoid all the small fees the other companies have, and pay only for the wine and the insurance/storage.

Part of the business is staying in touch keeping the client updated on their investment.

We are committed to delivering both outstanding wines and hospitality to our accounts. Our work is relationship-driven and rooted in integrity.

We represent family-owned, artisanal wineries of a historical nature or those that are creating new histories. Those are the stories we tell. Those are the wines we sell.

Name: Sunset Juicee
Description:
Launched in October 2023 - At Sunset Juicee, we are not just crafting drinks; we are curating experiences. 
Our award winning premium alcohol pre-mixed cocktail juices are meticulously blended with a variety of spirit bases, using 100% natural, gluten-free, vegan-friendly, and fat-free ingredients. 
We pride ourselves on our unique mixology approach, dedication to quality, and commitment to innovation, distinguishing us in today's ever-evolving market.

Here are some compelling reasons why Sunset Juicee should be your beverage of choice:

1. Innovative Product Line: Explore our diverse range of exciting products, such as the crowd-favorite Rum Punch, refreshing Blue Wave, and modern Gin n Juice. 
Each of these beverages promises an unforgettable taste experience, all with a 10% ABV. 
Our unique branding appeals to diverse demographics.

2. Health-Conscious Options: As consumer preferences lean towards healthier choices, Sunset Juicee meets the demand for all-natural, gluten-free, and vegan-friendly options.

3. Proven Success: Since our launch, Sunset Juicee has received attention and accolades, including a recent GOLD medal at The Low and No Masters 2024 by The Spirits Business Magazine.

4. Versatile Packaging Options: Whether for individual enjoyment with our mini 100ml or the 250ml bottles or larger gatherings with our Juicee on Tap boxes containing 3 liters of pure delight, we offer versatile packaging options. Our 3 litre option comes with a solid tap, refillable pouch, a convenient handle, ideal for events, BBQs, and more.

Exciting Update: Now, we're thrilled to offer our signature Juicee's in larger-than-life Hybrid lightweight carbon friendly one way 20L or 30L kegs! 

So whether you're lounging by the pool, celebrating life's victories, or just hanging out with friends, sunset juicee is the ultimate go-to beverage that caters to all your needs!

Description:

Several successful brands have been developed since the start up of the company for wine importers and retail chains throughout the world.

Description:

Celebra con el mejor tequila, con AlmaQuiote!

Name: Everton's Wine Merchants and Shippers

The Everton family have over 100 years’ experience working in the wine trade, dating back to 1918. Richard Everton is the third generation of the family to master the trade. Richard has spent his entire lifetime working in the wine industry, having travelled the world, working in wineries and vineyards for many years. With his son, Jack Everton, now working in the family business, they hope to take Everton's even further than before! Suppliers of wine in Worcester & Worcestershire and the whole of the UK.

The Everton family previously ran 21 independent wine shops and delicatessens around the West Midlands, as well as a large wholesale business, supplying to trade customers all over the UK. Evertons Wine Merchants and Shippers continues to grow everyday suppling local bars, clubs and restaurants with some of the finest products on the market.

Everton's Wine Merchants, your number one choice wine merchants in Worcester & Worcestershire.

Name: Terroir & Tradition
Description:
Welcome to Terroir & Tradition, the sanctuary of fine wines since 1982! Our passionate team excels in the selection of rare gems and pearls from the terroirs of Bordeaux, Burgundy and the far-flung vineyards of Italy, Spain and beyond. Our expertise enables us to guide you through a gustatory journey, and offer you an exquisite choice from over 1500 references.

At Terroir & Tradition, the quest for exceptional wine is in our DNA. A long-standing partner of Château Carignan, built in 1452 on Bordeaux's right bank, our trading company has evolved to become a global benchmark for fine wines. We are committed to offering you a unique experience, guided by rigor, availability and a love of wine.

Immerse yourself in our world, explore our prestigious vineyards, and let our passionate team guide you. Each bottle tells a story, each sip evokes the art of terroir. Discover excellence, savor authenticity. Welcome to the exceptional, welcome to Terroir & Tradition.

Name: Alpine Wines & Spirits
Description:
Founded in 2022 by Thomas Senger, the Alpine Wines & Spirits agency brings together a portfolio of carefully selected wines and spirits from the Alpine arc. Add to your menu a panel of premium and complementary spirits from different countries and for all tastes, all desires and all occasions. Be accompanied by your privileged contact: Thomas, formerly International Business Controller at Moët Hennessy for 10 years. Thomas has developed his passion and taste for good wines and spirits over the years in this emblematic company. Today, he will be able to advise and guide you on the product you need to satisfy a demanding clientele. 
Meticulous selection, privileged accompaniment and exceptional products, such is the motto of your Alpine Wines & Spirits agency.

Our spirits are enjoyed either in their purest form or integrated into endless cocktail recipes we've coined 'RÄKtails.'

Importantly, RÄK is universally best consumed with good company, family and friends.

Description:
At Nidhoggr Mead, our commitment to creating premium, sustainably sourced Mead is unrivalled.
Our aim to to bring Mead into the mainstream, with drinks that can be enjoyed by everyone, while still echoing the age-old methods and the essence of tradition. 
We meticulously ferment each expert batch, adhering to ancient techniques that honour the craft of mead-making. 
Our commitment to keeping this timeless indulgence alive ensures that each sip is not just a deliciously luxurious drink, but also a tribute to its Norse heritage.

Name: PEBBLE WINES

Name: Mixology Express
Description:
We are the exclusive distributor of Tommy’s Fizz Cocktails in the UK. A brand created by Tom Albani in 2020 to offer customers unique cocktail recipes to be enjoyed at home. Originally from Montpellier, Tom Albani began his career in the hotel and restaurant industry at the Hotel du Palais in Biarritz. He honed his skills in Montreal, delving into mixology while running successful venues. In 2015, he won the ‘Made with Love’ mixology competition in Quebec. Today, his brand thrives with eight Basque-inspired cocktails, culinary collaborations, training courses, and a boutique in Bayonne.  


Our shared vision and Tom’s expertise enriched our venture. We are two family businesses coming together to offer a truly special product in the UK, forging a partnership built on a commitment to provide quality and innovative drinks.

Name: NU ERA SPIRITS
Description:
Welcome to NU ERA SPIRITS....

We are the only Mauritius-inspired gin and rum brand in the UK. We believe we have created some truly fabulous artisan gins and rums that will excite your taste buds and lift your spirits! Working in collaboration with our award-winning master distiller, we have created a fine range of handcrafted British spirits using the best natural ingredients by British suppliers. 

There is a special story behind each of our products with every bottle and with every sip you take, you will have your own special tale to tell others.

Name: Tequila RG Legado
Description: We are a Mexican-Owned tequila company who prides in their 100% agave tequila presentations; founded with the purpose of honor the family, the tradition, and the roots of our beloved Mexican culture.

Name: Vina Domus Le Havre
Description:
L’EXPERTISE MAÎTRE CAVISTE
Vina Domus, toujours en recherche constante de la satisfaction de ses clients, démontre son expertise et son professionnalisme en devenant « Maître caviste » en 2021. Ce label distinctif et qualitatif valorise la profession et est un gage de confiance envers ses clients, fournisseurs et prestataires. Très sélectif, ce titre n’a été décerné aujourd’hui qu’à 33 cavistes en France. Ce titre officiel est défini par une charte stricte réunissant les 7 conditions suivantes : l’ancienneté, la connaissance du métier et de son actualité, la formation, la transmission de bons conseils, la sélection, l’« humain et le terroir » et l’implication.

Name: Mr. Alkohol - Cocktails & Drinks
Description: MrAlkohol.hu and our mother company Jan-ker 2001 Kft. is a 100% hungarian owned organisation specialized in selling and distributing alcoholic drinks and beverages through it's online and land based channels. On our website and in the drinkshops we are introducing thousands of different spirits from hundreds of world renowned brands and through their stories our main goal is to serve and educate our clientele in the belief of creating quality and responsible spirit culture.

Name: LAJON
Description:
SAS LAJON est une entreprise spécialisée dans la fabrication de boissons. Fondée il y a plusieurs années, elle a su développer son savoir-faire et sa notoriété pour devenir un acteur majeur dans son domaine.

Nous nous distinguons par la qualité de nos produits, qui sont fabriqués à partir de matières premières sélectionnées avec soin pour garantir une saveur unique et une expérience gustative inoubliable. Les boissons proposées par l'entreprise sont variées et adaptées aux goûts de chacun, allant des jus de fruits frais aux boissons gazeuses en passant par les boissons énergisantes et les Liqueurs.

La production de SAS LAJON est assurée par une équipe de professionnels passionnés et expérimentés, qui travaillent dans un environnement moderne et équipé des dernières technologies. La qualité est au cœur de toutes les étapes de fabrication, depuis la sélection des matières premières jusqu'à la mise en bouteille.

SAS LAJON s'engage également à respecter l'environnement et à limiter son impact sur celui-ci. L'entreprise utilise des emballages recyclables et des processus de fabrication éco-responsables pour minimiser son empreinte carbone.

Aujourd'hui, SAS LAJON est reconnue pour la qualité de ses produits et sa capacité à innover en permanence pour répondre aux besoins de ses clients. Elle est présente sur le marché national et international et travaille avec des partenaires de renom dans le monde entier.

En somme, SAS LAJON est une entreprise dynamique et ambitieuse, qui s'appuie sur l'excellence de ses produits et le savoir-faire de ses équipes pour offrir à ses clients une expérience unique et de qualité.

Name: Dormy vins
Description:
Dormy est domaine viticole familial et historique de Bourgogne.

Domaine au blason emblématique.

Nous produisons de beaux vins blanc et sommes spécialisés sur le cépage Chardonnay.

Adepte du sur-mesure en matière de culture de la vigne, Dormy recherche des solutions adaptées à chaque terroir afin de les mettre en valeur tout en préservant leur écosystème propre. Défenseur d’une viticulture raisonnée, écologique et responsable de l’environnement, cette approche est devenue pour Dormy, une philosophie.

At Lugia Vodka, we craft a premium-quality vodka designed for those who dare to stand out.

Distilled and bottled in France, our vodka  tradition and innovation to deliver a pure, smooth spirit with character.

Name: Enoteca Frati
Description:
La qualità data dell'esperienza, della conoscenza, da tanta passione per il vino ci ha portato in tutti questi anni a selezionare i migliori vini da proporre alla nostra clientela.
Enoteca Frati propone nel suo negozio di Rovato, a Brescia, una vastissima gamma di vini da tutte le regioni d’Italia. Dai vini rossi e corposi del Piemonte e della Toscana, ai bianchi aromatici, passando per la tipicità della nostra zona: Il Franciacorta.
Parlare con un appassionato è sempre un’esperienza unica. Si possono conoscere le caratteristiche, i segreti e le sfumature di ogni singola bottiglia apprezzandola nella degustazione.

Distribuidora de vinos, licores y cervezas de importación desde 1984.

En 1941 nace la agrupación de detallistas de Barcelona, bajo la denominación de Industrial San Gervasio. Esta agrupación de minoristas proveía a las tiendas de comestibles y bebidas desde la calle Sant Joanistes de Gracia.
En 1976 un grupo de jóvenes liderado por José Luis Torres Tejel compró la sociedad y se dedicó a la representación y venta de exclusivas de vinos, cavas, licores y cervezas de importación.
En 1984 nace la marca RAIMSA y en 1989 se traslada a las instalaciones en Terrassa, sede actual de la empresa de representación y distribución.

Name: Bare Wood Spirits
Description:
Bare Wood's patented bottling design ages spirits, right in the bottle. 

When the gold foil tab is peeled off the top, the wooden rod running through the cork is exposed to air. This allows genuine barrel-breathing to begin again, literally aging the spirit in the bottle as if it was still in a barrel. This results in the spirit inside the bottle becoming extraordinarily smooth, and it becomes imbued with distinct flavors from the wood and it's finish.

Thanks to this patented design, every single production from Bare Wood Spirits is a barrel-pick. We are able to obtain spirits from distilleries all over the nation and experiment with hundreds of combinations of various woods and finishes.

Name: Lech Life Austria
Description:
Lech Life Gin – Ein Lech Life Produkt und die Essenz des Lechs. Jetzt offiziell aus Österreich

Wir freuen uns, die Gründung der Lech Life Products GmbH in Österreich bekannt zu geben. Diese neue Gesellschaft unterstreicht unser Engagement für höchste Qualität und authentischen Genuss, der die Kraft und Schönheit des Flusses Lech in sich trägt – jenes Flusses, der nahe des Formarinsees entspringt und bald darauf den malerischen Ort Lech am Arlberg durchfließt.

Der Ursprung und die Inspiration

Der Lech entspringt am Formarinsee und fließt durch die unberührte Landschaft von Lech am Arlberg, einer Region voller Natur und Tradition. Diese Umgebung inspiriert uns, den Lech Life Gin zu kreieren, der die Ursprünglichkeit und Eleganz des Flusses einfängt und unsere Verbindung zu dieser besonderen Region unterstreicht.

Ein außergewöhnlicher Gin für Kenner

Der preisgekrönte Lech Life Gin vereint zehn handverlesene Botanicals, darunter die seltene Yuzu-Frucht, die ihm eine frische, fruchtige Note verleiht. Weich und dennoch komplex im Geschmack, mit einem Hauch Ingwer im Abgang, begeistert dieser Gin Kenner und Genießer gleichermaßen – ob pur, als Shot oder gemixt mit einem hochwertigen Tonic.

Ausgezeichnete Qualität und ein einzigartiger Charakter

Mit der Goldmedaille der International Wine & Spirit Competition (IWSC) prämiert, steht der Lech Life Gin für herausragende Qualität und Authentizität. Jeder Tropfen erzählt die Geschichte des Lechs: kraftvoll, elegant und von zeitloser Schönheit.

Für alle, die das Leben und den Moment lieben

Lassen Sie sich vom Spirit des Lech Life Gins verzaubern und erleben Sie ein Stück des wilden, ungezähmten Lechs. Für weitere Informationen besuchen Sie unsere Webseite www.lechlifegin.de und feiern Sie mit uns die Ankunft des Lech Life Gins in Österreich und in seiner Heimatregion rund um den Lech.

Description:
Laroma Cocktails is a company specialized in ready-to-serve alcoholic beverages, offering a range of premium quality products. Founded in 2023 by a mixology enthusiast, the company is determined to revolutionize the cocktail experience. Its mission is to bring people together around an exceptional tasting experience by offering products that will satisfy those looking for bar-quality cocktails. By eliminating the laborious steps of mixing and preparation, our goal is to allow people to focus on what matters most: fully enjoying the moment. We understand that during special events or gatherings with friends, it is important for everyone to relax and socialize without worrying about technical details. That’s why we have developed ready-to-serve products that provide convenience without compromising quality.

Laroma Cocktails est une entreprise spécialisée dans les boissons alcoolisées prêtes à servir, offrant une gamme de produits de qualité supérieure. Fondée en 2023 par une passionnée de mixologie, l’entreprise est déterminée à révolutionner l'expérience des cocktails. Sa mission est de rassembler les gens autour d'une expérience gustative exceptionnelle en proposant des produits qui sauront satisfaire ceux qui recherchent des cocktails de qualité de bar. En éliminant l'étape fastidieuse du mélange et de la préparation, notre objectif est de permettre aux gens de se concentrer sur l'essentiel : profiter pleinement du moment présent. Nous comprenons qu'à l'occasion d'événements spéciaux ou de réunions entre amis, il est important que chacun puisse se détendre et socialiser sans avoir à se soucier des détails techniques. C'est pourquoi nous avons développé des produits prêts à servir qui offrent commodité sans compromettre la qualité.

Ungerska premiumviner produceras i begränsade upplagor och letar sig sällan utanför hemlandet eftersom efterfrågan är stor. Därför är vi på Bamford Wines extra glada över att kunna introducera exklusiva och spännande viner från Ungern i Sverige. Vårt mål är att bredda erfarenheten av vad ungerskt vin kan vara, för det finns förstås mycket mer att upptäcka än söta Tokajviner (även om de förstås är ljuvliga!). Är du redo att ta vinupplevelsen till nästa nivå? Egészségére! eller skål!

Name: Clarity Cru Wine Merchants
Description:
NSW/ ACT Wine Distributor

At Clarity Cru Wine Merchants, we thrive on the challenge of building a successful wine business in today's dynamic landscape. Our motto, "Delivering wine with a difference," encapsulates our focus on ensuring that each bottle reaches its destination with excellence.

To us, delivery is not just a mere logistic task; it's a crucial element that sets us apart. We've made significant investments in transport, technologies, and a dedicated team of professionals who work to bridge the gap between the winery and distribution partners. Whether it's a rare vintage from a family winery or an iconic label from an established brand, our delivery process remains uncompromising in its attention to detail.

We are more than just a distributor; we are partners in your success. For wineries, we act as an extension of your sales and marketing team, working collaboratively to reach new markets and expand your brand's presence. For distribution partners, we offer a reliable and seamless experience, showcasing a thoughtfully curated selection of wines that resonate with your customers.

Our dedication to learning enables us to discover wines that stand out and add value to wine lists and venues. We understand the unique demands of the markets and have the network to seek out quality wines that cater to those needs. If the perfect wine isn't available, we collaborate with trusted winemakers to create something special.

Our community is built on a shared passion for wine and an appreciation for the people who make it all possible. We value the relationships we forge with winemakers and distribution partners alike, as we believe that together, we can create meaningful and lasting impact in the world of wine.
Location: Lane Cove West, New South Wales

Name: Stafford Irish Spirits Co
Description:
Our unbroken story of a landscape tended by the same family for generations, The Stafford family is as rooted in County Wexford as the harvest they lovingly produce. They are potato growers, famed for the quality and consistency of their crops.

Slaney Farms, home of Jackford Irish Potato Gin is based in Enniscorthy, County Wexford and the core ingredient of the gin is the Rooster potato.

John Stafford saw an opportunity to add more value to his expertly grown produce by creating his own take on the popular beverage. He features his own potatoes and several other carefully selected ingredients.

Our process of creating Jackford Irish Potato Gin is based on traditional distilling methods where a mash is produced and a Potato Neutral Spirit is created. Next, the magic happens, adding beautiful, high-level quality botanicals.

Carefully crafted, our Irish Jackford Irish Potato Gin delivers the earthy tones of the rich Wexford soil complimented by delicate fruit and spices.

Our Jackford Irish Strawberry Gin is sweet, caramel-like, fruity green and buttery on the nose with ripe strawberries & cream on the palate.
 
New Product Launch- *COMING SOON* - 2023

Name: Kohler Distributing Company
Description:
Kohler Distributing Company, headquartered in Hawthorne, New Jersey, is the largest beer distributor in its northeast New Jersey territory – Bergen, Passaic, Sussex, and Morris counties with recent expansion into Union, Essex and Hudson counties – selling more beer than all its competitors combined.

Kohler Distributing Company is a second generation family business that started from humble roots when Andy and Irene Graham purchased the Kohler Distributing Company in 1947. From that small business – selling 50,000 cases annually – Kohler has steadily grown in a 6.1 million case, $120-million, 200-employee, 60-truck operation that ranks in the top 50 beer wholesalers in the entire U.S.

Kohler’s growth through the years has been a result of hard work, attentive service, great brands, foresight, and a little bit of luck. Furthermore, the company’s advancement was continued without skipping a beat when the second generation – Gary and Scott Graham – took control of the company when their father retired in 1983.

In the ensuing consolidation of brewing companies, brands and wholesalers, Gary and Scott have made proactive steps to not merely survive, but to grow and prosper. As recently as 1990, Kohler was just a 3-million case distributor, with over a dozen competing wholesalers in its market area.

In 2004, Kohler invested in the future by opening its 190,000 sq. ft. state-of-the-art warehouse and offices in Hawthorne, New Jersey. Today – after 20 consecutive years of growth – Kohler has surpassed 6-million cases in annual sales.

Kohler Distributing Company is one of only a handful of servicing wholesalers, and – by far – the biggest in their market area with a 55 share. Kohler looks confidently to the future, with the operational capacity, people resources and management team to keep a step ahead of the ever-changing beer and beverage market.

Name: THE SPIRITISTS
Description:
THE SPIRITISTS
Wir lassen den Geist aus der Flasche

THE SPIRITISTS sind Entdecker und Reisende in der weiten Welt der Spirituosen. Wir navigieren mit unseren Gästen durch die Vielzahl wunderbarer Destillate und teilen mit ihnen unsere persönlichen Eindrücke, Erlebnissen und Erfahrungen. Unsere Passion sind die edlen Tropfen und daran werdet ihr Geschmack finden.

Wir widmen unsere ganze Arbeit und Leidenschaft den Spirituosen. Sei es der Distiller, Bartender, oder Spirituosenhändler, wir SPIRITISTS geben unseren Gästen den besonderen Einblick hinter die Kulissen. Lernt mit uns die Gastgeber des guten Geschmacks kennen. Ob am Brennkessel oder hinter dem Tresen, wir erzählen von den Menschen, Produkten und Geschichten aus der großen Spirituosenwelt. Erfahrt wie Bartender handwerklich ihrer Kunst eifern, Brennmeister das Beste aus jedem Tropfen holen und ganze Genusswelten von kreativen Köpfen kreiert werden.

Das ist der Geist der SPIRITISTS. Die Geschmacksexploration der Sinne.

The Spirit never ends.


THE SPIRITISTS
We let the spirit out of the bottle

THE SPIRITISTS are explorers and travelers into the whole world of spirits.
We navigate with our guests through many excelent destillates and share our personal impressions, stories and experiences with them. Our passion are the best liquids and you will get taste on it.
We focus our whole work and passion on spirits. Whether distiller, bartender, or spirits trader, we THE SPIRITISTS give our guests the special insight behind the scenes. With us you get in contact with the hosts of good tastes. At the pot still or behind the desk, we tell you about the people, products and stories from inside of the world of spirits. Get in touch with bartenders following their passion, Master Destillers creating the best out of each drop and a whole world of tastings is constructing by creatives.
That‘s the spirit of THE SPIRITISTS. The tasting exploration of sences.

The Spirit never ends.

CONVIÉRTETE EN NUESTRO PROVELIENTE

Con Paraleldrinks puedes beneficiarte de la simbiosis perfecta: ser PROVELIENTE.

Un PROVELIENTE es un proveedor que se convierte en cliente o un cliente que se convierte en proveedor. 

¿Qué quiere decir esto exactamente? 
Todos necesitamos algún producto, pero también tenemos algo que queremos vender: mercancía disponible por falta de mercado, stock viejo… Por ello, al mismo tiempo que te entregamos las bebidas que requieres, podemos llevarnos aquellas que ya no te interesan.

¿Y cuáles son las ventajas? 
Precios más competitivos
Reducción de gastos de transporte
Reducción de tiempos de entrega
Disminución de pérdidas
Aumento de la oferta

Verano | 7h a 15h

Name: Siefert
Description:
VI IMPORTERER OG DISTRIBUERER VIN PÅ FUSTAGE

Vin på fustage er en miljøvenlig tilgang til salg af vin.
Hver fustage sparer 32 vinflasker samt alt tilhørende emballage. Dette reducerer mængden af affald, og det betyder en stor pladsbesparelse ved transport.

Vores fustager garanterer høj kvalitet ved håndtering og præservering af vin fra første til sidste glas.
Den indvendige integrerede pose indeholder vinen, der dermed ingen kontakt får med luften. En yderst kompakt kompressor, pumper luft mellem fustage og pose, hvilket får vinen til at løbe – derfor ingen omkostninger til kulsyreflasker. Fustagen kræver en standard s-kobling og indeholder 24L vin, der har en holdbarhed på 12 måneder efter levering og 1½ måned efter tilslutning.

Hver palle vi fragter hjem indeholder dobbelt så meget vin, som en palle med flasker. Dette betyder færre fragtforsendelser, hvilket reducerer CO2 udledningen fra lastbilstransport.

Vores engangsfustager skal ikke returneres og rengøres, hvilket medfører mindre CO2 udledning og udelukker brug af kemisk vaskemiddel i modsætning til metalfustager. Hele fustagen er lavet af miljøvenligt og genanvendeligt plastik, hvilket gør den let at bortskaffe, hvorefter plastikken genbruges.

Description:
Company history

WhiskyNet Ltd. was established in 2007 by a couple, Katalin Szatmári and Zsolt Szigeti, both economists. Initially, they were importing premium whiskies to sell them online in Hungary.

Thanks to their wisely selected portfolio and the ever increasing circle of Scottish and Hungarian partners, within a few years this family venture has grown into a well-known and recognised player in the Hungarian market of premium spirits. Based on the success achieved in the field of whiskies the company has expanded its activities with further brands and new categories as well.

As a result, WhiskyNet today covers the entire vertical range of distribution and sales of quality spirits (rum, cognac, calvados, armagnac, gin, vodka, etc.) and other premium drinks (vermouth, tonic, etc.) on the Hungarian market.

The company’s more than 15-year-old history has inextricably linked with spreading and promoting quality spirits in Hungary and the demand for a civilized and informed way of drinking.

Our activities include import, excise duty administration and storage, Cash & Carry sales, online sales, selling premium spirits in our retail shop in Budapest, operating a reference bar – GoodSpirit Whisky&Cocktail Bar, wholesale trade, direct brand representation, distribution, marketing, education, training, tastings, competitions, events (Whisky Show Budapest, Budapest Bar Show, Rum Show Budapest)

Our philosophy

We always strive for excellence. We try to represent this attitude with our partners and the products entrusted to us while being open to novelties and innovative solutions.

Our team

Our team, initially consisting of two people, has been growing year by year due to our ongoing expansion. Today, in several fields, everyday tasks of our company are managed by nearly 70 enthusiastic and expert colleagues.

Name: Viña Indómita
Description:
Indómita nació el año 1995 con el objetivo de diferenciarse del resto de los viñedos chilenos a través de la calidad de sus productos. Por esta razón, es una de las pocas viñas que posee sus viñedos en los Valles de Casablanca y Maipo, dos de los principales y más importantes en Chile para la producción de vinos blancos y tintos, respectivamente. 
En estos años, Indómita se ha establecido como una de las principales bodegas de Chile, con exportaciones a más de 50 países y una capacidad de producción y almacenamiento de más de 27 millones de litros. Desde el viñedo hasta las botellas, las uvas y el vino posterior se monitorean cuidadosamente para obtener la mejor expresión de nuestra tierra. 
La bodega se encuentra en el Valle de Casablanca, a 70 km de Santiago y a 40 km de Valparaíso, uno de los puertos más importantes de Chile. Indómita tiene tanques de acero inoxidable y una sala de barriles, construida dentro de la colina, capaz de almacenar 2.000 barriles de roble. Esta sala de guardia está regulada naturalmente en términos de temperatura y humedad gracias a su construcción única.

Name: AMKA Nordic
Description:
From its humble beginnings as a garage startup, AMKA has evolved into a formidable group of 20 companies, subsidiaries, and brands. Operating across an extensive network that spans Norway, Sweden, Finland, Iceland, Denmark, Germany, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, and Portugal, AMKA has become a dynamic force in the market.
