Our collaborative efforts extend beyond internal operations. We actively engage with our partners, leveraging our collective expertise and resources to empower them. AMKA is dedicated to helping our partners maximize their sales potential and fortify their market positions. Through collaborative initiatives and cross-border coordination, we aim to create a unified front that resonates with strength and reliability.

As we continue to expand and diversify, AMKA remains committed to the principles that have fueled our growth – innovation, resilience, and a customer-centric mindset. The journey from a garage startup to a multi-national group is a testament to our unwavering dedication to excellence.

Unlock a world of endless possibilities by partnering with AMKA. As a dynamic force in the market, we offer an expansive reach through more than 12,500 sales points, spanning both on-trade and off-trade avenues. Working with us means  tapping into a vast network that opens doors to unparalleled opportunities for growth and success. 

Whether you are looking to expand your market presence, increase sales, or forge new partnerships, AMKA provides the platform for limitless potential. Join us in navigating the ever-evolving business landscape, and let's embark on a journey of boundless opportunities together.

Name: Jannec S.A.
Description:
Η Jannec S.A. ιδρύθηκε το 2003 από τους Γιάννη και Νεκτάριο Κατσίπη. Η ιστορία της όμως ξεκινά αρκετά χρόνια πριν, καθώς η σημερινή Jannec αποτελεί συνέχεια της, μικρής τότε, οικογενειακής επιχείρησης που ξεκίνησε ο Μιχάλης Κατσίπης το 1972. Με το πέρασμα των χρόνων, η οικογενειακή επιχείρηση μετατράπηκε σε μια από τις μεγαλύτερες εταιρείες εισαγωγής, προώθησης και διανομής αλκοολούχων ποτών στην Ελλάδα σημειώνοντας δυναμική ανάπτυξη στον χώρο της αγοράς του ποτού, διατηρώντας παράλληλα τις αρχές και τα ιδανικά με τα οποία ξεκίνησε.

Η Jannec S.A. χαρακτηρίζεται ως μια εταιρεία με ανθρώπινο πρόσωπο, που δημιουργεί κερδοφόρες σχέσεις και συνεργασίες αμοιβαίου οφέλους. Στόχος μας, η συνεχής και υγιής πρόοδος της εταιρείας μας, η διαρκής εξέλιξη και η συνέπεια. Με αυτούς τους στόχους, η Jannec θα συνεχίσει να συμπεριλαμβάνεται στη λίστα με τις καλύτερες εταιρείες διανομής αλκοολούχων ποτών στην Ελλάδα, που θα αγγίζει διεθνή πρότυπα. Παρέχουμε στους εργαζόμενους ελκυστικές αποδόσεις και εξαιρετικό περιβάλλον εργασίας, προσφέρουμε στους συνεργάτες μας καινοτόμες λύσεις και εμπορικές δεξιότητες, και αναζητούμε καθημερινά νέες και τολμηρές στρατηγικές επικοινωνίας και επιχειρηματικότητας.

Οι στιγμές απόλαυσης και χαλάρωσης που προσφέρουμε σε κάθε καταναλωτή ξεχωριστά μέσα από τη διανομή των προϊόντων μας, βασίζονται στην υπεύθυνη κατανάλωση αλκοόλ. Η εταιρεία μας υποστηρίζει και ενθαρρύνει συστηματικά την ιδέα του «απολαμβάνω υπεύθυνα», ενημερώνοντας τους καταναλωτές για τους κινδύνους που προέρχονται από τη μη υπεύθυνη και υπερβολική κατανάλωση αλκοόλ. Έχοντας επίγνωση του ρόλου της εταιρείας μας, πρώτοι εμείς δεν αγνοούμε τις βλαβερές συνέπειες της αλόγιστης κατανάλωσης αλκοόλ στον άνθρωπο και οφείλουμε να ενημερώνουμε και να εκπαιδεύουμε συνεχώς τους καταναλωτές και τους συνεργάτες μας.

Name: Wineworld Finland Ltd.
Description:
The future of wine is here!

Wine is a living and changing part of our history. It connects the past, today and the future, and it builds a bridge between different eras. Wine is also a piece of art in which soil, climate, and the skills of a winemaker combine uniquely into an excellent taste experience. But, above all, wine is a passion. It is an essential part of the present pleasure and leaves a permanent mark on our future.

At Wineworld Finland, we develop the future of wine. Our selection already consists of the Red Wine of the Year 2021 and the Champagne of the Year 2022, but our focus is already ahead of this. Will your wine be next year's winner?

We are a part of the Anora Group Plc., which is a leading wine and spirits brand house in the Nordic region and a global industry forerunner in sustainability. Anora was formed through a merger of two leading Nordic wine and spirits companies – Altia and Arcus – in September 2021.

The majority of the wines in our portfolio are listed in the assortment of the local monopoly, Alko and available to Finnish consumers. Furthermore, we are active also in the on-trade and the local travel trade operators. We have a full market penetration through our skillful sales team. 

We have both fresh eyes and great love for wines and our range covers wine for every winelover to be enjoyed. Regardless of the price range. We know the market and the Finnish consumer and constantly work to find new and exciting wines for them together with our partners.

Cooperation is a key word and one important key to success. Our first years of  operation shows extensive growth and we are on the track to be a leading premium wine importer in Finland. This demands a lot of work and passion.

Our partners in the wine world are often family businesses and small producers, but that is not a must. We strongly believe that big can also be beautiful. The balance and sensibility is what matters.

Name: Virtuous Vodka
Description:
A VODKA MADE TO TASTE

In 2013, Swedish chef Claes Stenmark introduced Virtuous, an organic, unfiltered, handcrafted vodka. His quest was to create a spirit that would have the same high quality and exceptional taste as the products he used in his kitchen. He wanted a vodka that reflected what Nordic food is all about - unfiltered, real taste. 
 
Claes tested various ingredients until he found what he was looking for in the unique character of rye. A grain that provides wonderful bready, peppery and sweet notes. He experimented with different methods and decided to use continuous distillation to make the rye distilled spirits. When making spirits like this, you cut away some of the head and some of the tail and use the heart for the final product. Virtuous Vodka uses only the very core of the heart. We call this the-heart-of-the-heart. Filtration wasn’t needed, the taste was amazing and he didn't want to change a thing. 
 
Going organic was a natural choice for Claes, who grew up close to nature, learning early on to appreciate all it had to offer. As a child, his passion for authentic taste and flavor took root as he gathered wild berries and herbs with his grandfather to flavor spirits in the Northern tradition. 
 
In a product category that historically has tried to get rid of as much taste as possible, Virtuous goes in the opposite direction. Virtuous Vodka is allowed to, and is supposed to, have an authentic taste of the raw ingredient. We want to keep the flavor of the wonderful bready, peppery and sweet notes of the organic rye it's made of. The result is a handcrafted small batch vodka full of character, yet super smooth.
 
How to best enjoy Virtuous Vodka Rye is of course a matter of personal taste, but we recommend that you try it off the rocks at least once. By savoring at room temperature, you will experience the full palate and all the flavor nuances. We hope you’ll understand why we are so proud of our vodka.

Name: Saffer Wein GmbH
Description:
Die Faszination für Wein ist für uns seit vier Generationen Antrieb und Motivation, unser Wissen darüber zu vertiefen und an unsere Kunden weiterzugeben – von der Arbeit im Weinberg bis hin zur Freude der Verbraucher an einer guten Flasche.

Wein ist ein Naturprodukt und wird von Menschen für Menschen gemacht. Das macht ihn für uns so besonders und unterscheidet ihn von den meisten Konsumprodukten. Naturbedingte Einflussfaktoren und menschliches Geschick sind jedes Jahr aufs Neue Voraussetzung für einen guten Wein. Unsere wichtigste Aufgabe: Die gewissenhafte Selektion der Winzer und Weine für unser Sortiment.

Dabei lassen wir uns vor allem von Qualität, Preis und Persönlichkeit der Weine und ihrer Winzer überzeugen, anstatt auf große Appellationen und wohlklingende Namen zu achten. Durch permanente Präsenz in den Erzeugergebieten erkennen wir neue Qualitätstrends frühzeitig und reagieren schnell darauf. Unser Sortiment ist ein Zusammenspiel von kleinen, innovativen Winzern, international anerkannten Spitzenproduzenten und leistungsfähigen Großkellereien, die in der Lage sind, Wein von hoher Qualität auch in bedeutenden Mengen zu produzieren. Immer wichtiger im Portfolio von Saffer: Die nur bei uns erhältlichen exklusiven Marken. Mit ihnen spielen wir unsere Kernkompetenz voll aus und wählen jedes Jahr aufs Neue die besten Weine bei den leistungsfähigsten Kellereien aus, ohne dass sich unsere Kunden auf wechselnde Etiketten einstellen müssen.

Name: ProKeSo GmbH
Description:
Bei uns steht Nachhaltigkeit im Mittelpunkt unsere Schaumweine, Spritzer und Weine Imports in Einweg-Kegs aus Kunststoff mit einem Fassungsvermögen von 20 Litern. Wir legen großen Wert darauf, umweltbewusste Entscheidungen zu treffen und unseren ökologischen Fußabdruck zu minimieren.

Unsere Produkte weden sorgfältig ausgewählt und von ausgewählten Weingütern bezogen, die umweltfreundliche Anbaumethoden und nachhaltige Weinherstellungsverfahren anwenden. Wir arbeiten eng mit unseren Partnern zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass die  Schaumweine, Spritzer und Weine höchsten Qualitätsstandards entsprechen und gleichzeitig ökologisch verantwortungsvoll produziert wird.

Die Verwendung von Einweg-Kegs aus Kunststoff bietet einige Vorteile in Bezug auf Transport und Haltbarkeit. Sie sind leichter als Glasflaschen und können somit den CO2-Ausstoß während des Transports verringern. Außerdem sind sie bruchsicher und ermöglichen eine längere Haltbarkeit der Produkte.

Vielen Dank für Ihr Interesse an unseren Produkten in Einweg-Kegs aus Kunststoff. 
Zögern Sie nicht, uns bei weiteren Fragen zu kontaktieren.
info@prokeso.ch

Name: Pepito Spirits
Description:
Descubre Pepito Spirits, el auténtico sabor de México en cada sorbo! Somos una destilería innovadora que fusiona la tradición artesanal con exquisitos sabores, ofreciéndote una experiencia única. Nuestro catálogo incluye una amplia gama de bebidas espirituosas: whiskey, gin y vodka, todos ellos infusionados con los sabores más emblemáticos de México.

En Pepito Spirits, nuestra pasión es crear destilados excepcionales que deleiten los paladares más exigentes. Nuestro whiskey cautiva con sus notas ahumadas y su suavidad seductora, mientras que nuestro gin sorprende con su frescura vibrante y toques de botánicos mexicanos cuidadosamente seleccionados. Además, nuestro vodka, destilado con maestría, ofrece una pureza inigualable que resalta su carácter suave, cristalino y picante!

¿Qué nos hace destacar? Nuestros auténticos sabores mexicanos son el corazón de nuestras creaciones. Cada botella cuenta una historia, capturando la riqueza de nuestra cultura y la pasión por la excelencia.

En Pepito Spirits, no solo nos preocupamos por brindarte bebidas excepcionales, también nos importa la sustentabilidad y el comercio justo. Utilizamos ingredientes locales de origen sostenible y nos asociamos con comunidades productoras de México, asegurando que cada trago que disfrutes sea una contribución positiva para nuestro país.

¿Estás listo para embarcarte en un viaje sensorial por México? Nuestros destilados son ideales para momentos especiales, ya sea que estés celebrando con amigos, relajándote después de un largo día o simplemente buscando saborear la autenticidad. Descubre el alma de México en cada botella de Pepito Spirits y déjate seducir por nuestros sabores inolvidables.

No esperes más y únete a la revolución de las bebidas espirituosas mexicanas. Pepito Spirits, el destino de los paladares aventureros en busca de la esencia de México!

Name: Middleton White Advisory Group
Description:
Middleton White Advisory Group is a full 360-degree collection of Wine and Spirit services: 

Brand Creation & Development, Brand Revitalization, Sales Alignment, Presentation Strategies, National Sales & Distribution, Distributor Management & Alignment, Business Alignment, Market Evaluation, Importing, E-Commerce strategies, Digital transformation support and Brand Tracking & Analytics.

Founded by innovators with centuries of leadership in the wine and spirit industry, they have seen factors such as unhealthy consolidations, antiquated business strategies, and fierce competition negatively impact alcohol distribution in the United States.

And, while the current system may be complicated to navigate, they remain passionate about what originally drew them to this business—meaningful relationships, discovery, and the art of living.

Knowing that the business they love has evolved, brands must do the same. Whether through technology or recalibrating relationships with distributors, there is an opportunity for wine and spirits brands to start doing things differently.

It was created to usher in a new era for wine and spirits brands—one built on a holistic approach, equitable relationships, transparency, realistic expectation, and more. At Middleton White, we provide personalized and strategic business solutions to inspire healthy and sustainable growth.

In your customized “Route to Market,” we align with the industry’s most capable distributors, servicing the most important markets. Market activation will be done in a deliberate fashion utilizing a systematic methodology while leveraging key distributor relationships.

Things that must be considered:
Embracing technology to scale your business.
Reframing relationships with distributors.
Balancing product knowledge with solid business acumen.
Repositioning your brand value.

Our mission is to create a healthy and sustainable wine and spirit ecosystem, responsive to the ever-changing landscape of the industry.

Name: PiùCinque Gin
Description:
Distilled by the traditional bain-marie method to ensure it’s dry and mighty. 

Ten botanicals, beautifully balanced in Italy, with bergamot and sage taking centre stage. 

It’s ultra dry, herbaceous, classic, refined.

A flavour profile built for classic cocktails and the ultimate G&T; PiùCinque, an elegant glass, ice, tonic; sage.

PiùCinque was developed by four friends who like gin so much that they decided to make their own. A fine gin, for those who appreciate things complex but not complicated.

Designing a classic dry gin with character took time. After many months of tasting and debating, one small bottle won. It was labelled PiùCinque (‘plus five’), which indicated the intensity of the botanicals. We liked it so much that it became our name.

Name: Langtry Farms Winery
Description:
Langtry Farms Vineyard and Winery is a celebration of legacy, innovation, and a deep connection to the land. Established in the heart of California’s Guenoc Valley, Langtry Farms continues the pioneering spirit of its founder, the legendary British actress Lillie Langtry, who discovered paradise here in 1888. 

At Langtry Farms, we believe in farming the right way—using sustainable practices that not only protect our environment but enhance it. With innovative technologies, we carefully manage our resources, from water conservation efforts to the introduction of natural wildlife habitats, ensuring that our vineyards thrive for generations to come.

Our wines, much like Lillie herself, are bold and unapologetically unique, offering guests a taste of the timeless beauty and rich history of the land. Visitors are welcomed to our tasting room to experience firsthand the blend of heritage, passion, and sustainability that defines Langtry Farms. Here, amidst rolling hills and ancient oak trees, we invite you to savor wines made with care, dedication, and an unyielding respect for the land.

Name: Casa Leyros
Description:
Destileria Leyros

Centrally located in Tequila, Jalisco distillery Leyros S.A. de C.V. is known as one of the six largest distilleries in Jalisco, Mexico. Leyros, born in the 21st century has introduced a manufacture process that departs dramatically from traditional tequila production. Distileria Leyros is well known for its large production capacity and exceptional quality control.

This innovative process is very friendly to the environment; it uses less than half the energy, and under 60% of the water normally required in traditional tequila making. Leyros produces some of the most premium tequila using only the best Highlands 100% Blue Weber Agave.

When distillery Leyros was first opened, it was opened with the idea to produce high Quality tequila for those needing those services. Leyros is known as we call in Spanish, Maquiladores (Producers). Leyros created many high quality brands for other brand owners.

Large production volumes afford a competitive ability to supply any market demand. Popular tequila produced by Leyros includes silver medal winner Don Fermin. The distillery supplies Tequila Blanco, Reposado, and Anejo for several companies that sell it under private brand names. The flavor and aroma remain constant for Leyros brands, and consumers always enjoy a top-quality tequila. With the necessary infrastructure to satisfy the needs of demanding customers, Leyros professionals can meet any client specifications.

Each of our mezcals will inspire you to adventure and explore the world of mezcal, a drink created to enjoy in the most important moments and with the people who accompany us along the way. Mezcal, more than a drink, is a partnership in crime, that which is treasured in the memory and to which it is always pleasant to return.

In a single drop of mezcal, you take a little piece of Oaxaca with you, and you become enveloped in the mysticism surrounding it.

Name: Love Spirit Brands
Description:
At Love Spirit Brands, passion, precision, and authenticity are at the heart of everything we do. We proudly craft award-winning, super-premium spirits in Sweden and curate an exclusive collection of wines rooted in Portugal’s rich winemaking tradition.

Our journey begins in Sweden, where the purity of nature and a dedication to craftsmanship define every bottle. Produced in our own bottling facility, our spirits reflect Swedish excellence — clean, bold, and designed to elevate every experience.

Our wine collection, deeply inspired by Portugal’s heritage, honors centuries of artistry and terroir. Together, they embody a brand that bridges tradition with a modern, global spirit.

But Love Spirit Brands is more than just exceptional beverages — it’s a celebration of life, culture, and giving back. We are proud to actively support and be part of prestigious international events, including:

The Global Gift Foundation Galas in Cannes, Paris, and Marbella,
Omar Harfouch concerts at the Vatican, in Paris, and Rome,
The Best Awards in Paris,
And many other high-profile cultural and philanthropic events across Europe.
Each appearance and collaboration reflects our mission: to connect people through unforgettable moments and authentic experiences.

Love Spirit Brands stands for more than premium quality — we stand for purpose, celebration, and excellence.
Rooted in Swedish purity, inspired by Portuguese heritage, and crafted for a global audience, we invite you to experience the world through the spirit of Love.

Love Spirit Brands: Swedish Purity. Portuguese Heritage. Global Spirit.

Description:
Crafted in the spirit of Norse tradition, our meads are brewed by a Norse Pagan master brewer using only the finest natural ingredients. Honouring ancient practices, we add no finings, artificial flavours, or preservatives, allowing each batch to develop its own unique character. Every bottle is a testament to our passion for mead-making, brewed in ritual and enjoyed across Europe. Whether shared at pagan festivals or intimate gatherings, Taylor’s Meadery embodies the connection between nature, tradition, and community. With each sip, experience the timeless art of mead-making, crafted for the gods and enjoyed among kin. Taylor’s Meadery is where ancient tradition meets modern craft. 
This business is not trading yet, but working towards opening in the coming years. I have a certificate for personal licence holders and a Level 2 certificate in Health and hygiene for drinks manufacturers. I have emailed the local council in regard to getting a premises licence and personal licence and awaiting their reply. After these are applied for and granted I will then have to register the company and register with excise. All of which will be a lengthy and potentially costly process. Wish me luck! If you are interested in investing, please drop me a message.

Name: Vodka Friday Inc.
Description:
We are an entirely women-owned Spirit company in Canada with an authentic story 14 years in the making. Donna and I love vodka, so we supplied it.  It was Friday night because we needed two days to recover. We were clear, this was not a support group but if you wanted to hang out and have some fun - if you could sing "Don't Stop Believing" out of tune - you were our people. "Vodka Friday" was born.

On October 6th, 2021, we trademarked "Vodka Friday" in Canada, the USA, and China.  What did we know about vodka?  Well ... we liked to drink it!  We soon found out that we needed more on our business plan and set out to figure it out.

One year later, we are in the LCBO!  We are distributed in Alberta and are growing at a fast rate.

You will buy our vodka, flavoured vodkas, and coolers because we have a cool brand name, but you will buy us again because we taste great!!!

It's Vodka Friday!!!  Everyone is welcome - Just show up!

- Broad product spectrum: over 1500 different products across various product categories like Japanese sake, fruit sake, shochu, and Japanese spirits to enhance your product portfolio
- Focused on quality: our premium sake is always stored cool to maintain the freshness and quality for that the end-user is looking for

- Small lot orders: as we have close connections to local breweries, you can also enjoy the luxury of just ordering a few cases.

UNE TRADITION FAMILIALE DE PLUS D’UN SIÈCLE

DÈS L’ORIGINE, LA MAISON PIERRE BOURRÉ COMMERCIALISE LES VINS AU DÉTAIL ET EN GROS AUPRÈS D’UNE CLIENTÈLE DE PROFESSIONNELS.

Suite aux circonstances d’une rencontre de cœur à la fin du XIXe siècle, Pierre Bourré choisi un petit village perché sur les premiers contreforts de l’Anjou, aux abords des sentiers touristiques de la route des vins, pour s’établir en famille. 
C’est ancrés sur ce lieu authentique, caractéristique des paysages ligériens, que 5 générations de tonneliers, vignerons et négociants-éleveurs ont successivement marqués de leur emprunte chaque pan de l’histoire familiale en veillant à se transmettre leur passion, connaissances et savoir-faire des métiers du vin.

De 1880 à la fin des années 1940, le commerce des vins est effectué en tonneaux et livré de village en village au pas des chevaux. Après la seconde guerre mondiale, la famille poursuit la culture de parcelles de vignes et fait l’acquisition des premiers véhicules motorisés permettant le développement du commerce régional de détail auprès des professionnels. La maison Pierre Bourré devient ainsi, à la fin des années 1970, l'un des plus importants metteurs en marché régional de vente de vins en litres consignés et en vrac à la citerne. L’activité et l’offre produit se diversifient ensuite progressivement jusqu'aux années 2000. 

La clientèle s’étend alors au niveau national (Grossistes-entrepositaires, Grande distribution). En 2012, un nouveau cap est fixé consécutivement au rachat de l’entreprise par Yohann et Mickaël Bourré. Des projets de développement assurés notamment par la certification d’une démarche qualité, une commercialisation structurée à l’export et une offre intégralement renouvelée (identité, positionnement, segmentation de gammes, marketing, conditionnements…).
Location: La Chapelle-Saint-Florent, Pays de la Loire

If you're pulling up to the pre-game, ditch the wine opener and don't worry about all the sophisticated bottles... just grab the case of PNKYS - (We don't even know what half of the cursive words mean on those boring bottles anyway)

Red wine has been too fancy, too snooty, and too boring for a little too long. PNKYS is "just red wine" nothing else. We don't care about the "notes" or "profiles" - we just know that it pairs well with vibes. 

The cracked pinky logo is our symbol to break the rules, break the norm, and break those fancy pinkies that are associated with drinking wine.

Name: Wijnhandel Pandora's Bottle
Description:
Weleens verliefd geworden op een wijn?
Wij ook. En op de wijnmakers, het landschap, het eten de techniek en de verhalen die achter iedere wijn schuilen. Omdat we onze wijnen zelf importeren kennen we die verhalen op ons duimpje. De goede, de romantische, de eerlijke en vaak grappige verhalen.

Wie?
Wij zijn Bart en Sarinah Clauwens, samen zijn wij Pandora’s Bottle.
Zijn? Zo voelt dat wel. Wijn is niet alleen al 10 jaar lang ons werk, we kunnen er geen genoeg van krijgen. Zélfs na 600 wijnen in 5 dagen proeven. Dat doen we ieder jaar op de internationale beurzen. Dan smaakt een wijntje bij het diner nog steeds lekker. Die slikken we dan zelfs door. We gaan ver.

Wijn import
Zonder onze wijnboeren zijn we nergens. Onze selectie valt of staat met hun kunsten in de wijngaard. Die mooie wijnen van die charismatische wijnboeren verkopen we graag. We durven te wedden dat als deze mensen je met passie van hun wijn laten proeven, jij ze ook het liefst koopt. Om ze vervolgens te drinken bij je favoriete gerecht, op de bank, in de tuin, in bed of in bad...

We zijn gespecialiseerd in Italiaanse wijnen. Puur omdat we daarmee ons hart volgen. Daarnaast verkopen we ook wijnen uit Frankrijk, Duitsland, Oostenrijk en Spanje. Omdat we zelf importeren kunnen we je alle ins en outs van de wijn vertellen en wijnen bieden die je niet snel ergens anders tegen zult komen. We blijven iedere jaargang kritisch proeven en selecteren alleen de wijnen waar we volledig achter staan.

Wijn verkoop
Je vindt onze wijnen in de webshop en in onze winkel in het centrum van Gouda.

Le Nez du Vin
Met trots zijn we het officiële verkooppunt in Nederland van Le Nez du Vin: een set van kleine flesjes waarin de geuren gevangen zijn die in wijn voorkomen. Hiermee train je de neus om de mooie geuren in een wijn te herkennen, maar ook om wijnfouten te kunnen ontdekken. Ideaal voor sommeliers, vinologen en de echte liefhebbers.

In 2010, EWC was recognized by its suppliers as well as by its customers for competitive distribution capabilities: The company established a new structure, increased its resources and developed strategic operations plans.

In 2011, the company gained 25% market share and was covering 2000 POS throughout Beirut and its suburbs, Shouf, Metn North and South, Kesserwan and Jbeil. By providing an unsurpassed value in the service offered, EWC also received the “Ease of Shop Project” award.
  
In 2014, the company expanded its operations into the Bekaa region gaining a strong foothold in the Lebanese market.

EWC continued success and eminent growth built up over the years, hinges on its extensive supply network, its sourcing expertise and strategic supplier partnerships. Name: Akari Gin
Description:
Akari is an authentic Japanese gin brand born in a small Tokyo distillery, where craftsmanship, tradition, and innovation meet. Rooted in the meticulous perfection of Japanese craftmanship, we honor heritage while pushing boundaries to create something bold, fun, and unforgettable.

We’re not your typical Japanese spirits brand. Our spirit is vibrant, eccentric, and designed to capture the nostalgic energy of Tokyo—the willingness to drift, to fall in love with a city, a stranger, or a perfectly made cocktail. It’s the feeling of being wrapped in neon and night air. Akari is our tribute to that spirit.

Crafted by a master distiller trained in the science of scent, Akari uses only the highest-quality ingredients and sustainable practices. Our base spirit is made from sake kasu, the prized by-product of premium sake brewing, transformed with patience into something extraordinary. We also upcycle Japanese ume plums from the finest plum wines, giving new life to flavors. 

To this foundation, we blend 18 botanicals including Japanese bitter orange, violet, rose petal, pink pepper, almond, and lemon peel balancing depth, elegance, and character in every sip.

They say you are what you love. We are the Spirit of Tokyo—carefully made, impossible to forget.

Entreprise familiale portée par Cédric et Flavien CLEMENTE, nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec des vignerons passionnés afin de proposer des produits authentiques et uniques.

 Nos services
 Vente aux professionnels (BtoB) : nous accompagnons restaurants, hôtels et bars dans la création de cartes différenciantes, avec une sélection adaptée à leur clientèle et un accompagnement personnalisé.
 Vente aux particuliers (BtoC) : nous proposons une gamme de vins et champagnes rigoureusement choisis auprès de vignerons de confiance, accessibles pour toutes les occasions – de la cave personnelle aux événements marquants.
 Dégustations privatives : à domicile ou au sein de notre cave, nous organisons des moments conviviaux pour découvrir et comprendre les vins et champagnes, que vous soyez amateur ou connaisseur.

 La nouveauté de la cave : depuis son ouverture, CCVins a élargi son offre avec une belle sélection de spiritueux (whiskies, rhums, gin, crèmes, liqueurs, verveine…), pour enrichir vos découvertes et vos moments de partage.

 Pourquoi choisir CCVins ?
	•	Une relation de confiance avec nos clients et nos partenaires vignerons.
	•	Une expertise solide des terroirs, des produits et désormais des spiritueux.
	•	Un service sur mesure, pensé pour chacun.

Name: Tri Carragh Scotch Whisky
Description:
Our name, Tri Carragh [tree ka-rah], is Gaelic for ‘three pillars’. It’s a nod and celebration to the foundation and three core ingredients which create Whisky.
 
Water, barley and yeast have been used for centuries to produce Scotland’s finest spirit and when put through their paces and left to rest for years in oak casks, they create a unique liquid, every single time.

Having both worked in the whisky industry for over 10 years, friends Ola Lopatowska and Ryan McCafferty decided to create Tri Carragh Scotch Whisky. An independent bottling brand, that reflects what they love about whisky, in particular, single cask whisky. A spirit of the highest quality, unique in character, to be enjoyed with friends and family.

We understand that when it comes to whisky, it’s a personal and often subjective choice. We’re not for those who believe a whisky drinker must look or drink a certain way. Tri Carragh is for those people who are open to sharing thoughts, experiences and stories.

We keep things simple and original; no colouring and non-chill filtered. 

Coincidently  Tri Carragh also represents our three core values. To be recognised as a brand of varied choice and excellent quality. The character of our unique single malts. The respect we have for every drinker’s opinion.

We hope Tri Carragh whiskies will take their place on your whisky shelves, and we both look forward to sharing drams with you over the months and years to come. Slàinte Mhath!


We currently have the following bottlings available for sale; Linkwood 12yo, Bunnahabhain 9yo and Tomatin 36yo.
Available directly: https://www.tricarragh.com/shop/
Or at retailers and bars in the UK and Worldwide:  https://www.tricarragh.com/stockists/

Name: Cognac Jean Fillioux
Description:
The House of Jean Fillioux belongs to a select group of traditional family estates who have successfully defended their upper quality niche over several decades by producing consistently authentic Cognacs that rest on century-old traditions, patience and love to become the masterpieces true connoisseurs appreciate.

“Perched on high to reach for the sky” could be the translation of the words written below the majestic cockerel on the family’s coat of arms. It is a fine, noble motto that defines our past, our history and our traditions. “Take the high ground to see far” would befit “La Pouyade”, our lovely estate that has been in the family since 1894. It is perched at the top of a hill where our handsome manor house overlooks our magnificent vineyard standing in the heart of the Grande Champagne of Cognac.

Pillars of Success

Knowledge - The Glunz Team member is an Educated Beer and Beverage professional whose passionate counsel should display open mindedness, while being creative, innovative, insightful and resourceful.

Integrity - A Glunz Team member should always be honest, trustworthy, respectful and dependable.

Stewardship - As proud members of the Glunz Team we are held accountable for leaving our work environment, our customers’ accounts, our suppliers portfolio better than it was before. What is the one last thing we can do to make sure we are successful?

Name: Bacchus Vinos
Description:
Bacchus es una sociedad fundada por un sommelier con certificación avanzada por la Court of Master Sommeliers Américas, Estados Unidos. José María Aguirre cuenta con más de 16 años de experiencia en la industria de vinos y alimentos. Nuestra selección curada es producto de su conocimiento y habilidades de cata. 

Trabajamos con productores que utilizan métodos artesanales y uvas que reflejan aspectos únicos como el terreno y clima que dan identidad a las denominaciones de origen. Y, por supuesto, elegimos de las mejores añadas. Valoramos calidad por encima de rentabilidad.

Somos cuidadosos con el transporte y almacenamiento, garantizando que el vino que ofrecemos conserve intactas sus cualidades. Bacchus utiliza flete marítimo refrigerado, manteniendo la cadena de frío desde nuestra bodega hasta tú domicilio.

Comunicamos in formación técnica sobre vinos y alimentos de manera simple y accesible a un público amplio, con el fin de educar y enriquecer tú experiencia.

Apostamos por productores artesanales, que utilizan prácticas sostenibles y tienen certificación orgánica. NO trabajamos con vinos industriales ni de grandes conglomerados que para conseguir mayores rendimientos, alteran los suelos, hacer acopio de uva de distintas regiones, o manipulan el mosto añadiendo pigmentos y sabores.

Hacemos uso de la tecnología para responder de manera eficiente y dar asesoría personalizada a los gustos e intereses de los clientes. Usamos tecnología de pago segura para garantizar las compras y hacemos despachos a domicilio de entre 24 a 48 hs.

Buscamos inspirarte, asesorarte y convertirnos en tú tienda de vino de confianza.

Name: Siding 14 Brewing Company
Description:
Grow  a better beer.  We start with our own craft-grown ingredients, highlighting their quality and character with an expert Brewer's attention to detail.  

We love craft beer, and we're proud to talk about our beer's journey, from Field to Glass.

It's  our goal to create a solid core of Mainline beers that are perfect for everyday, and a wide variety of Roundhouse offerings to keep your interest piqued.

Why Siding 14?  It's  a nod to our rich Alberta and western Canadian railway heritage.  Before the town of Ponoka was named, it was Siding 14 of the Calgary-Edmonton Railway Company.  The siding was a supply point  for steam locomotives making the run between the two major cities.  The railway  not only provided transportation between small towns and major centers, it was  historically the heart of communication and social interaction in communities across the province.

Name: Kintsugi Sake USA
Description:
Kintsugi Sake LLC produces the world’s most premier Sake. Kintsugi Sake is sold in very limited quantities. Luxury at its finest with sustainability at its core.

Our craft volume brand is Oishii Sake. 

We are distributed by Breakthru Beverage Group 

Sustainability and environmental awareness are a part of our mission but never at the expense of quality or flavor. We believe that we can produce the best-tasting sake in the United States that is also the most environmentally friendly. Kintsugi will become the first Net-Zero certified sake maker in the U.S. through a commitment to solar energy, locally sourced rice, and the goal of being a zero-waste manufacturer. We’re committed to creating a great product and being great stewards of the environment.

Name: Cremaura Tequila
Description:
Welcome to the official Cremaura Tequila company page, where we invite you to join us on a journey of taste and sustainability. Cremaura Tequila is more than just a plant based beverage; it's an experience rooted in quality, innovation, and environmental responsibility. 

As a plant based tequila cream brand, we offer a range of exquisite flavours, including Chocolate, Orange, Café, Rose, and more. Each of our products is a harmonious fusion of premium tequila and unique flavours, designed to delight your senses and elevate your drinking experience.

What truly sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to sustainability and eco-friendliness. We believe that creating exceptional products should not come at the cost of our planet. Our bottles are proudly made from post-consumer recycled glass, and we utilise natural synthetic corks to protect cork forests. Our fully recyclable paper labels, sugar cane heat seals, and recyclable cardboard packaging further demonstrate our dedication to reducing our environmental impact.

We are proud to be featured on drinks menus across the UK, a testament to the quality and excellence that Cremaura Tequila represents. Our presence in the beverage industry continues to grow, and we are dedicated to delivering products that are not only premium but also environmentally responsible.

At Cremaura Tequila, we are united by a passion for creating memorable moments and leaving a positive mark on the world. We invite you to connect with us, stay updated on our latest developments, and explore the unique world of Cremaura Tequila. Together, we can savour the fusion of 'crem' and 'aura' in every sip, while making a difference for our planet

Based on the experience over a period of 25 years in the field of Production, Marketing and finance the honorable Directors Founded Raahi Spirit in 2020 with a vision of building image by creating unique Liquor Brands. Company has introduced several brands of IMFL with unique design test and Design. All Products are blended by experienced and qualified blenders and tasted over a convenient period.  Welcome to Raahi Blenders & Distillers Pvt. Ltd.

At Raahi Blenders & Distillers Pvt. Ltd., we are passionate about crafting exceptional spirits that blend tradition with innovation. From our state-of-the-art facility at Mayell & Fraser in Sikkim, we create a diverse range of premium liquors designed to satisfy the refined tastes of connoisseurs and casual drinkers alike.

Our portfolio includes:
Master’s Legacy Whisky: A tribute to craftsmanship, designed for whisky aficionados.
Highland Club Whisky: Rich and smooth, a blend for every celebration.
Blue Hill Grain Whisky: A smooth, woody whisky with a fruity twist for everyday enjoyment.
Blue Bliss Vodka: Ultra-smooth, perfect for cocktails and pure indulgence.
XS Vodka: Distinct, bold, and crafted for those who live life in the fast lane.
MT Vanda London Dry Gin: Crisp, aromatic, and perfect for the discerning gin lover.
Black Boss XXX Rum: Bold and rich, for those who appreciate intense flavors.
Old Don XXX Rum: Smooth and robust, capturing the essence of traditional rum.
Golden Honey Bee Brandy: A delicate, honey-infused brandy for those who savor life’s sweeter moments.
With an unwavering commitment to quality, Raahi Blenders & Distillers Pvt. Ltd. continues to set new standards in the world of premium spirits. Whether you’re raising a glass to celebrate or savoring a quiet moment, our products are crafted to elevate every experience.

Crafting Excellence, One Sip at a Time.

Name: Monaco Cocktails
Description: The Original High Energy, High Impact, Full Flavor Canned Cocktail.

Name: ImpEx Beverages
Description:
In 2008, a new chapter began for Sam Filmus, after years in the business captaining JVS Imports. With ImpEx Beverages, his vision was to import premium and rare Spirits from around the world, with a special emphasis on the best of what Scotland has to offer.

In 2018, whisky veteran Chris Uhde joined Sam as his business partner in ImpEx Beverages and together they have expanded the portfolio and vision for ImpEx.

Now, ImpEx boasts an impressive portfolio, including some of the most notable small to medium sized distilleries and independent bottlers.

ImpEx Beverages imports Whisky, Gin, Rum, and Mezcal from Scotland, Wales, Japan, Israel, Mexico, England, the Caribbean, India, and New Zealand with future anticipated additions from unexpected destinations. We also feature a fine line of Liqueurs and Cordials produced in the US.

Regardless of your preference, you are sure to find something that pleases from the ImpEx Beverages Portfolio.

Name: KRUSHWELL
Description:
KRUSHWELL is an adult beverage brand where fitness meets flavor & fun!

We've introduced the first ever premium vodka seltzer with electrolytes, for those of us who KRUSH life and redefine how we celebrate our achievements.

Every sip supports a fitter future. KRUSHWELL gives back a portion of sales to local gyms to support their work in taking care of our communities. We envision the power of taking a small fraction of $1.7T global alcohol industry and dedicating it to advancing human health through exercise and community support.

KRUSHWELL is clean, crisp, and refreshing, made with 100% premium vodka and all natural ingredients Our flavor combinations are unique to what's currently out there, delivering the right amount of flavor. 

In each can of KRUSHWELL you'll find:

 100 Calories
 5.2% ABV
 0 Carbs
 0 Sugar
 Nothing Artificial
 Gluten Free
 Electrolytes: 28mg Magnesium | 151mg Potassium | 91mg Calcium | 55mg Sodium

KRUSH LIFE. DRINK WELL. KRUSHWELL

Name: Gin(e)pro
Description:
Founded in 2021, Gin(e)pro is the exclusive distributor in Luxembourg of exceptional artisanal spirits imported from Italy. Our catalogue includes a rich and diverse selection, featuring seven types of gin from various regions — Sicily, Tuscany, Friuli, and the Dolomites — along with a rum from the Dolomites, a whisky from Venetia, liqueurs, a vodka, and grappas, all originating from Sicily. Each of our spirits is the result of the craftsmanship of master distillers recognized among the best in Italy, ensuring unparalleled quality and tasting experience.

At Gin(e)pro, we are committed to offering only the highest quality products, distilled using traditional artisanal methods. We value artisanal expertise and strive to diversify the offerings available on the Luxembourgish market by introducing unique spirits that tell a rich and authentic story.

We distribute our spirits throughout Luxembourg, providing bespoke solutions for upscale bars, gourmet restaurants, and individual enthusiasts of fine spirits. Gin(e)pro also specializes in organizing exclusive events such as after-works, celebrations, as well as private and corporate anniversaries, creating memorable experiences that highlight the finesse of our products.

At Gin(e)pro, every glass tells a story.

Discover ours!

Gin(e)pro

Name: Calindia Wine and Spirits
Description:
Calindia Wines and Spirits is an independent wine and spirits distributor. Our agency brings the experience, partners, and knowledge of India’s wine market to U.S. wine producers and acts as a reliable gateway to propel your brand into one of the fastest-growing markets in the world.

Our goal is to identify and curate long-term partners in California, one of the premier wine-growing regions in the world, to provide a steady source of quality, high-volume wines in India that cater to Indian tastes and budgets. Our portfolio of entry-level and mid-level wines from various regions of California will allow wine lovers in India the opportunity to enjoy great wines at an affordable price.

We are committed to building compelling brands and delivering growth to our partners and believe in building trusted long-term partnerships looking to grow together.

If you want to enter this burgeoning market, please get in touch with us.

Name: X-LITE Social
Description:
X-LITE is an innovative alcohol company that produces low-calorie, sugar-free RTDs (Ready to Drink). Our light, crisp and refreshing flavours, amazing aromas and catchy colours provide a unique alternative to traditional alcohol offerings. 

At X-LITE our mission is to be a part of the most memorable moments in people's lives. Whether that's a big night out, a friend's birthday, or a festival. Make Memories.

Must be 18+ to follow.
Enjoy Responsibly.

Name: Enelalma
Description:
Enelalma is a luxury sipping tequila with no additives made in the Los Altos region of Jalisco, Mexico. The brand celebrates the rich legacy, heritage and shared traditions between indigenous and African-American cultures — both enslaved on their own lands who overcame historic adversity. 

Enelalma is the first United States export tequila from Peña Blanca distillery (NOM 1639). The blanco expression is the first production led by Master Distiller Oscar Vazquez, formerly of G4 Tequila and the inaugural brand for owner Melanie Shelby. 

Enelalma means in the soul, because we believe tequila is a spiritual experience. Join our journey of discovery at www.enelalmatequila.com.

Name: Wine&Earth │ B-Corp
Description:
We unearth quality small-batch wines worth drinking, which won't leave a hangover for Planet Earth.

Our artisanal winemakers nurture the earth from which the vines grow and each bottle has a net positive climate impact from vineyard to doorstep. 

We personally vouch for every bottle …. these are the wines we enjoy to drink and share with others, from casual nights-in to special occasions. 

To seriously good wine!

Name: Freshie Organic Tequila Seltzer
Description:
Freshie was crafted on a family trip in Mexico. We were over sugary margaritas and filling beers so we created this sparkling tequila recipe to be light and refreshing. We like to live an active life and Freshie is the perfect drink for wherever your adventures bring you whether it's chilling by the pool, the beach, barbecues, or a fun night out. We found joy in sharing it with family and friends, and we couldn't be more excited to share that experience with you!

Freshie combines great taste with all Organic ingredients. We don't round corners for a quick buzz. Our Organic & Non GMO agave takes 7 years to mature before it is sustainably farmed and distilled using 100% solar energy. The result is superior refreshment featuring citrus notes from our Organic Silver Tequila combined with Sparkling Water, Organic Lime and Organic Agave Nectar.

Name: Poetry Vodka
Description:
Born from friendship, artistry, and a shared obsession with the perfect vodka martini, Poetry Vodka is the rebellious creation of co-founders Dave Stewart - music legend and one half of the iconic Eurythmics - and Johan Holgersson, investment visionary and entrepreneur.

Distilled in Kalisz, Poland, where grain vodkas have held cultural significance since the 17th century, Poetry is crafted by a family-owned grower-distiller using sustainable crop rotation to produce premium Polish rye and wheat. The result is a vodka that doesn’t just elevate your glass: it inspires a movement.

At Poetry, we believe creativity flows best when the rules are bent and the lines are blurred, one pour at a time.

Name: Papa Salt Coastal Gin
Description:
Papa Salt Coastal Gin is a an easy drinking gin made for sharing. Our goal was simple – compliment any soda, taste great with tonic, and make a mean martini. Fifty nine recipes, and many joy filled sunny afternoons of gin tasting later, we present you with Papa Salt.

Papa Salt celebrates the subtle taste of native Australian botanicals. Flavours are brightened with zesty wax flower, hibiscus and citrus peel—all wrapped up with subtle hints of nutty wattleseed, the mild spice of pink peppercorn and an unmistakable minerality from a hint of oyster shell.  Yes, there’s a lot to it, but in the end we hope you notice just how easy it is to drink.

Have it long or short, this gin was made for sessionable drinking — our go-to is Papa Salt with soda, lots of ice and a wedge of fresh orange.

Name: Whisky With Us
Description: Whisky With Us creates premium, bespoke whisky gifts, private bottlings, and corporate gifting — with both alcoholic and non-alcoholic options. From client appreciation to team rewards, we offer beautifully packaged gifts tailored to your brand. Expertly curated, professionally delivered. Thoughtful gifting that leaves a lasting impression.

Name: SLIQ Spirited Ice
Description:
We choose different drinks for different reasons. A bottle of wine for a romantic dinner. A beer for a big sports game. A glass of whiskey for relaxation by a fire. So where do our premium frozen cocktail pops fit in?

They’re probably not the first thing you’d grab to raise a serious toast to someone (unless you’re trying to get a quick laugh at your sister’s wedding reception). They’re also not designed to make you look sexy, sad, or self-serious. If you can hold a straight face with one in your mouth, more power to you. Here at SLIQ, our pops were created for good times that run the gamut. Good times with friends. Good times with family. Good times on weekends, special occasions, and all those spontaneous laughs in between. And with our assortment of frozen cocktails available - ranging from Vodka Slushies, Agave Margaritas, Rum Daiquiris, and Whiskey Highballs - the combinations of flavors and festivities to enjoy them at are endless.

To ensure our offerings are anything but ordinary, we’re backed by a business that’s anything but new to this space. The Jel Sert Company started manufacturing ice pops in the 1960’s and has been at the forefront of innovation within the category ever since. Remember Otter Pops and Fla-Vor-Ice? That’s them. Tapping into the resources of the world’s leading pop producer, we at SLIQ have stuck to their playbook of creating high quality products that taste great. We’re now just adding alcohol to the mix – a grown up pop for a grown up you.

Name: Bodega Familia Traversa
Description:
Familia Traversa es una bodega familiar fundada en 1956 por Carlos Domingo Traversa junto a sus hijos, Dante, Luis y Armando. Carlos llegó a Uruguay en 1904 con sus padres desde Italia. En su juventud fue peón rural en granjas de viñedos y en 1937 junto a su esposa, María Josefa Salort, compró 5 hectáreas de campo en una zona de óptimas condiciones para cultivo de la vid en el departamento de Montevideo, Uruguay.

En la actualidad, Familia Traversa tiene más 300 hectáreas de viñedos propios en las regiones de Cuchilla Pereira, en Montevideo, y en la región de Paso Cuello en el departamento de Canelones. Asimismo, la familia adquiere la producción de uva de más de 100 pequeños productores, bajo un estricto seguimiento y control de calidad por parte del equipo técnico.

Cuatro generaciones de la familia hoy trabajan y viven junto a la viña de la bodega continuando con el sueño y el legado de su fundador.

Name: De Maison Selections
Description:
De Maison Selections is the exclusive US importer of exceptional beverages from our portfolio of artisanal producers in Spain, France, and beyond. The focus of our portfolio is representing exceptional family-held properties that are rooted in the land and demonstrate respect for their ecology and heritage. The result is that all of our releases are imbued with a true, unique cultural stamp and authenticity. It is this originality of identity and intent which defines our producers and is at the heart of our work.


Founded by André Tamers in 1996, De Maison Selections is an independent, family-owned business committed to meaningful, sustainable, and long-lasting partnerships between our producers and our customers. De Maison Selections encourages innovation, both internally and externally, by fostering an environment motivated by examination and the betterment of industry standards. We focus on inclusive growth within the beverage industry by encouraging new ideas and perspectives. 



We are driven by three core concepts: Innovation, Authenticity, and Sustainability. It is with gratitude that our customers continually choose our products, and we endeavor to honor that trust through our commitment to our core values.

Name: Destilados Delincuente
Description: We are Mezcal and Sotol makers, that harmonize the culture and traditions of two ancient towns. Our main goal is to join the best of our land in a single brand, putting together two spiritual drinks, one from the north and one from the southern Mexico, rescuing the traditional processes and taking care of quality for the tasters' pleasure. From the south, Mezcal from Sola de Vega Oaxaca, where the best Agave plants are born is put through a process that begins with the plants' heads burning in a conic oven and volcanic rocks, grounded with wooden mallen and clay pot double destination. From the north, Sotol from both Chihuahua´s forest and dessert, made with the best wild plants from Dasylirion a Liliaceous which ancient habitant from the Great Paquime, the most advanced agricultural civilization from the north of Mexico, used to ferment it in their ceremonial rituals.

Name: SALCO AG
Description:
High-proof spirits are our profession. For decades, we have been supplying various industries worldwide with alcoholic ingredients in bulk.
As the unique full-service supplier with its own production plants and warehouses throughout Europe, and unmatched stocks, we are your preferred specialist and partner for distillates, spirits and ethanol.

SALCO is an agile enterprise, managed by experienced owners, with its head office in the Zurich area. The products are manufactured in its own plants or procured from long-term production partners. 

SALCO has one of Europe’s biggest cask storage capacities. Short delivery times are ensured by a proprietary network of warehouses and distribution centres in the core European markets (Germany, France, Italy and Austria). The international, multilingual team of experienced specialists helps with Customs and excise tax-related issues and ensures efficient, punctual handling of shipments. 

SALCO: comprehensive, reliable, speedy and unique

Name: The Skandi Selection
Description:
The Skandi Selection | Premium Bottled Cocktails, Curated Spirits & Custom Solutions

At The Skandi Selection, we specialize in creating premium, ready-to-drink cocktails and curated spirits, including our own brand of gin and vodka. We offer a range of convenient formats, from 700ml bottles to large-scale solutions like 5L and 10L boxed bladders and kegs. Our cocktails include popular classics like Lychee Martini, Hazelnut Espresso Martini, Bees Knees, and more, crafted with locally sourced ingredients.

We also provide customization services for cocktails and spirits, including tailored botanical infusions, and offer white label solutions for businesses looking to create their own branded products.

Our Ethos: We support small, local suppliers to keep Australia profitable and sustainable, ensuring the highest quality ingredients in every product.

Why Choose Us?

Premium, locally sourced ingredients

Custom flavors and botanical curation

White label & corporate gifting options

Commitment to sustainability and local economy

Founded by event industry veterans Dave Lavelle and Gemma El Kazzi, The Skandi Selection delivers high-quality, personalized beverage experiences that elevate any occasion.

Discover more at wwwtheskandiselection.com.au.

Name: Lenterosa
Description:
Lenterosa brings you the taste of dolce vita.

It's the life of the yacht party, yet intimate enough for a sunset date. Enjoyed from directly or from a glass — doesn't matter.

Just drink and dance!

Name: Vesper House
Description: We are a leading independent wine house and trading company in Nepal, specializing in offering exclusive wines from around the world, many from boutique producers and established world renowned wineries. Our wide range of wines are carefully selected by us to ensure we offer the very best combination of quality, value and choice, catering for all tastes.

Name: Dutch Spirits Club
Description:
At Dutch Spirits Club we offer high-quality spirits and liqueurs at competitive prices, housed in 10-liter bag-in-boxes. By cutting out excessive marketing costs and unnecessary packaging, we pass the savings directly to you. By embracing refillable 70cl bottles, we’re making a conscious choice towards a greener future, one drink at a time.

We believe in empowering bartenders to chart their own course, without the burdens of obligations or restrictions. With Dutch Spirits Club, you have the freedom to curate your selection, whether it’s our DSC gin or renowned classics.

Name: LAVENDIMIA
Description: LAVENDIMIA es una importadora y distribuidora boutique de vinos premium. Representamos bodegas de varios países como Estados Unidos, Chile, Argentina, España, Italia entre otros.

Name: CoLab APAC
Description:
At CoLab, we're passionate about developing and distributing modern consumer brands across Asia Pacific. We believe that with our innovative and transparent approach to business, we can help our partners succeed in these dynamic markets.

Our FMCG distribution network is the foundational footprint that allows us to bring exciting new brands to new markets. As a channel partner, we can open up new lines of business from market entry all the way through to Direct To Consumer Market Management. We leverage our deep experience and relationships to allow our brands to reach new customers.

We take pride in our multi-category portfolio, which allows us to minimise crossover and deliver exceptional results for our brand partners. With local brand management and activation, we can serve as an extension of your team, helping you navigate the local markets and build your brand.

We're committed to fostering strong partnerships with producers and retailers alike. We believe that transparency, efficiency, innovation, and sustainability are key tenets of our business, and we incorporate these values from the outset.

Name: Latambroker Wines & Spirits
Description:
SOMOS BROKERS EXPERTOS EN VINO CONSISTENTE
Nos especializamos en adquirir y vender el vinos más destacado y emocionante del mundo.

Nuestras valoraciones de vinos se basan en los valores actuales de la demanda del mercado mundial, la popularidad y la disponibilidad actual a nivel local e internacional.
En enero de 2019, Liber Salinas fundó LATAM BROKER para atender la creciente necesidad de la industria de un importador y corretaje efectivo de FAIR WINES. Hoy en día, la empresa es reconocida como innovadora y líder del mercado que gestiona una cartera de rápido crecimiento de empresas vinícolas seleccionadas.

Es filosofía de LATAMBROKER que las únicas alianzas exitosas son aquellas de verdadera colaboración. En este sentido, el equipo de LB brinda la experiencia necesaria para comprender verdaderamente las distintas cualidades y características de sus ofertas de productos, a fin de relacionarse mejor con los minoristas y los clientes.

Name: Espaço Prime Bebidas

Name: Magnum Spirits & Wines Pte Ltd
Description:
Started in 1999, Magnum Spirits and Wine has grown from humble origins to become one of Singapore's leading wine and spirit distributors.

Trust is a key part of our business, we believe in building relationships with our brand partners and go beyond being a distributor.

We act as professional representatives for each of the brands that we work with and we are constantly on the lookout for opportunities to extend their reach.

Our portfolio of brands include Champagne Collet (FRA), Tenute Piccini (ITA), Marrenon Vignobles (FRA), Freixenet (ESP ), Luis Canas (ESP), Paul Hobbs Wines (USA), Vina Cobos (ARG), Santa Helena (CHI), Dr Hermann (GER), Lake Breeze Wines (AUS), Oyster Bay Wines (NZ), J.M. Cazes Selection (FRA), La Massa (ITA), Fraser Gallop Wines (AUS), Chateau Teyssier (FRA), Gustave Lorentz (FRA), Vinicola Aurora (BRA), Stark-Conde (S.A), M.A.N Family Wines (S.A) and more. 

We are also proud to be accredited with the Progressive Wage Mark in recognition of our unwavering commitment to supporting and uplifting lower-wage workers. Our dedication to providing Progressive Wages ensures a better quality of life for our valued team members.

Description: We produce a range of award winning spirits and liqueurs under the Redcastle, Toll House and Broughty Ferry brands and distribute a carefully curated selection of premium global brands.

Name: Against The Grain

Name: Cali Beverages Corp.
Description:
We’re not here to play it safe. We’re here to turn heads—and the bev-alc world on its ass.

At Cali Beverages, we don’t believe in shortcuts or pretending. We don’t use grape juice and slap on a fruit flavor label. We use the real juice of the fruit—pineapple, orange, peach, and more—blended with clean vodka or tequila to create cocktails that actually taste as good as they look.

Our brands, VACALI and TEQCALI, deliver more than flavor—they bring energy, edge, and a little heat. Crafted for bold drinkers and unforgettable moments, these aren’t your average RTDs… they’re dressed to impress—and designed to be undressed. 

From premium liquid to provocative packaging, we’re creating shelf-stopping experiences that drive trial, spark curiosity, and make waves. This isn’t your average canned cocktail—it’s California in a can, and it knows how to get attention.

#ARTOFTHEDRINK

 drinkvacali.com | drinkteqcali.com

Name: Grapedistrict
Description:

Name: Anthem Imports
Description: Anthem Imports specializes in finding and importing great spirits from great places!  We represent the most unique whisky portfolio available in the US.

Name: NOBLE Selection
Description: Shaped by 35 years of passion, Noble Sélection is considered one of Quebec's largest and most prestigious wine & spirits agencies. From great European grands crus to famous vineyards of the Americas, by way of mythical Scottish distilleries, it is committed to bringing together independent, family-run and renowned producers under a single umbrella of expertise, in order to make them shine in the eyes of Quebec wine lovers and professionals alike. Beyond the pleasure of sharing, the dedicated team at Noble Sélection strives every day to join its business partners around an exemplary professional ethic based on collaboration, agility and excellence.

Name: CASTEL (La Réunion)
Description:
CASTEL (La Réunion), entreprise historique implantée sur l'île depuis 1954, est un acteur clé de l’industrie locale.

 Nos activités principales :

Industrielles : un site d’embouteillage situé au Port, qui fait de nous le leader de l’embouteillage et de la distribution de vin à La Réunion.
Commerciales : importateur et distributeur de marques reconnues dans les domaines des vins, champagnes, bières, boissons sans alcool (soft) et NOLO (No/Low Alcohol).
Réseau spécialisé : en tant que master franchiseur des caves NICOLAS, nous développons un réseau de cavistes dans l’océan Indien, à La Réunion, à Maurice et à Madagascar.

Avec un héritage solide et une expertise diversifiée, CASTEL (La Réunion) s’engage à offrir des produits de qualité qui valorisent les savoir-faire locaux et internationaux, tout en répondant aux attentes du marché.

Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir nos produits, nos innovations et nos engagements.

Name: Casa Domecq Colombia
Description: We are a family-owned company with 70 years of experience, committed to the sustainable development of Colombia, dedicated to the production, importation, distribution, and commercialization of high-quality brands of wines and spirits.

Name: Alcopop Spirits
Description: Alcopop Spirits is a multi brand multi product platform for domestic and foreign liquor brands in India. We specialize in the manufacturing, distribution and import of alcoholic beverages across categories like wine, spirits and ready to drink beverages.

Name: Synergy Fine Wines Colorado
Description: Founded in 2001, Synergy Fine Wines is a premier wine, spirit, and beer distribution company with branches in Colorado, New Mexico, Arizona and Nebraska. Through our partnerships with local and international suppliers, we strive to provide our accounts interesting craft and boutique wine and spirit selections.
