Name: Harold & Hansa Ltd
Description: H&H The Madeira Rum Specialist was established in 2021, with the mission to turn the spotlight on lesser known, premium quality rums from Madeira. Co-founder Harold is from this beautiful Portuguese island and his family has been involved in the rum trade for many years. Using exceptional varieties of sugarcane and a meticulous production process, Madeira creates some of the best rums in the world. The team at H&H The Madeira Rum Specialist handpick the finest rums from the island to bring to the trade and consumers in the UK. The company also organises Rum Tasting events to take you on a journey to discover the spirit of Madeira, sip by sip.

Name: Weinkellerei Höchst by Bührmann
Description:
Weinkellerei Höchst by Bührmann
Herzlich Willkommen bei der Weinkellerei Höchst by Bührmann in Frankfurt, dem größten Weinhändler im Rhein-Maingebiet. Das 1885 gegründete Traditionsweinhaus und Familienunternehmen in der 4. Generation wurde unlängst zum „Weinhändler des Jahres“ (Meininger Verlag) und Filialleiter Herr Günsel zum TOP50 Sommelier (Schlemmer Atlas) ausgezeichnet.
 
In der Bolongarostraße in Frankfurt findet Ihr ein großes regionales, national und internationales Wein- und Schaumwein-Sortiment, edle Champagner und ausgewählte Raritäten, aber auch limitierte Eigeneditionen mit renommierten Weingütern. Zusätzlich natürlich auch zahlreiche Spirituosen und Gin- und Malt-Whisky-Sorten sowie regionale und internationale Feinkost-Spezialitäten und Delikatessen, hochwertige Präsente, Geschenkideen und Gutscheine.
 
Stöbert und probiert in einem schönen Ambiente mit persönlicher und kompetenter Beratung oder besucht eine Veranstaltung vor Ort, wie das Hummer-Event, die Hausmesse oder exklusive Weinproben.
 
...und falls Ihr auf der Suche nach einer besonderen Location seid – egal ob Firmen-, Familien- oder Geburtstagsfeier, Kunden-Event, Hochzeitsempfang, Taufe oder Jubiläum, Weihnachtsfeier oder ein Wein-, Rum-, Whisky- oder Gintasting – bietet die Weinkellerei Höchst Euch für jeden Anlass die passende Lösung, auf Wunsch auch als Gesamtkonzept mit musikalischer Begleitung.
 
Das Team der Weinkellerei Höchst freut sich auf Euren Besuch, entweder im Weinmarkt vor Ort oder 24/7 online auf www.weinkellerei-hoechst.de
 
Adresse: Bolongarostraße 88, 65929 Frankfurt am Main
Telefonnummer: 069 312085
E-Mail: info@weinkellerei-hoechst.de
Webseite: www.weinkellerei-hoechst.de
Öffnungszeiten:
Dienstag bis Freitag 10:00-19:00 Uhr
Samstag 10:00-16:00 Uhr
Besonderheiten: Weinhändler des Jahres, TOP50 Sommelier, internationales Wein- und Spirituosen-Sortiment, Raritäten, persönliche Beratung, Feinkost und regionale Spezialitäten, Präsente und Gutscheine.

Name: LimoRosso
Description:
LimoRosso – Arancello van Bloedappelsien 

LimoRosso is ontstaan uit een passie voor ambacht en smaak. We maken een unieke variant op limoncello, waarbij we de frisse en lichtzoete toets van bloedappelsien combineren met een traditioneel productieproces.

 Duurzaam & Ambachtelijk – We schillen de bloedappelsienen met de hand en werken samen met Distillery Massy om een kwaliteitsvolle arancello te maken. Het vruchtvlees gaat niet verloren, maar wordt hergebruikt voor sappen.

 Meer dan een digestief – LimoRosso is heerlijk puur, na een maaltijd, maar ook perfect in cocktails zoals een Arancello Spritz. Op de fles vind je een QR-code met recepten en serveertips.

 Waar te vinden? – We verkopen rechtstreeks aan familie en vrienden. Via sociale media en lokale samenwerkingen bouwen we verder aan ons merk.

Name: East West Beer Exchange
Description: East West Beer Exchange is a Colorado based craft beer export company. Proud ambassadors of American craft beer; we partner with highly sought after breweries with top quality products, then utilize our whole-market distribution network to expand their brand globally. East West Beer Exchange prides itself on being able to offer Craft breweries the same opportunities that the big breweries have; Incremental sales, global market distribution, international brand recognition. Today, we have grown to represent over 16 breweries with upwards of 150 styles of beer to choose from.

Name: Tailgate Spirits LLC / Mountaineer Brothers
Description:
Born from friendship and a deep love for their home state, Mountaineer Brothers Blue Lot Bourbon is a West Virginia-made spirit with a rich story to tell. Created by lifelong friends Bob Koleske (honored posthumously), Mike Greenblatt, and Tim Kesecker, this premium bourbon embodies the camaraderie, resilience, and unwavering spirit of the Mountaineer community.

Named after the mystical Mecca of Football celebration hubs, Blue Lot Bourbon goes beyond being just a beverage. Every sip evokes cherished memories and the unbreakable bonds formed in this hallowed ground.

Mountaineer Brothers Blue Lot Bourbon is a tribute to the deep connections and enduring legacy of West Virginia. It's a toast to Mountaineers, past and present, and the perfect companion for tailgating, sharing stories with friends, or simply enjoying a moment of reflection.

Name: Malvore Cocktails
Description:
Malvore Cocktails is a brand of premium ready to drink (RTD) handmade cocktails, which operates in the category of bottled alcoholic beverages, providing 4 world-class classic cocktails:
- Chocolate Old Fashioned;
- Esspresso Martini;
- The Manhattan;
- Rosemary Negroni. 

• Our old fashioned is a whiskey-based cocktail. The drink consists of chocolate liqueur, fig liqueur which brings a perfect balance to the whiskey giving it a fruited flavour which becomes perfect for cocktails. 

• Our espresso martini is a vodka-based cocktail. The perfect cocktail to please most palates, being a mixture of the universe of sweet cocktails but bringing a bitterness of espresso coffee in its combination. The composition is balanced between vodka, espresso coffee, sautéed caramel and coffee liqueur. 

• Our Manhattan is a whiskey-based cocktail. It consists of whiskey, maple syrup and sweet vermouth making it a perfect option for anyone who wants to sip with ice only. 


• Our Rosemary Negroni is a reinterpretation of the classic Negroni bringing an aroma and flavour of rosemary to its composition through infusion. The drink consists of our dry gin, the sweet vermouth and our reinterpretation of the "Campari" with natural ingredients. 

They are great shooters. 

Enjoy Responsibly

Name: Gio Distribuzione
Description:
Chi siamo
Siamo un’azienda specializzata nella distribuzione all’ingrosso di bevande e spirits, con sede a Cavaso del Tomba (TV), in Via dell’Artigianato 8 – 31034.

Distribuiamo con passione e affidabilità le migliori marche di bevande alcoliche e analcoliche, offrendo un servizio rapido, flessibile e orientato alle esigenze di bar, ristoranti, hotel, eventi e rivenditori.

Operiamo sia fisicamente sul territorio che attraverso il nostro servizio online, per garantire la massima comodità e competitività in ogni ordine.

 Perché scegliere noi
 Forniture all’ingrosso rapide e puntuali
 Ordini online facili, veloci e sicuri
 Ampio assortimento di spirits e bevande delle migliori marche
 Prezzi competitivi, senza compromessi sulla qualità
 Consegne affidabili in tutta l’area di riferimento

Name: Egeu Vinhos
Description: O objetivo da empresa não é vender vinho barato nem caro, é vinho de qualidade, entregar uma experiência, desde o momento de compra até o consumo do produto final. O mercado do vinho tem muitos misticismos e nosso diferencial é a transparência nas nossas relações e carinho nos mínimos detalhes.

Name: Mezcal Quiéreme Mucho
Description:
Hace 30 años iniciamos una reforestación de esta propiedad con árboles y plantas, con el tiempo hemos observado que volvió la fauna como conejos, águilas, leoncillos, murciélagos. 

Los locales utilizan la madera de Copal para fabricar sus “Alebrijes” -su única fuente económica-, así que los invitamos a pintar nuestras botellas con su estilo de Alebrijes y a trabajar en la producción del Mezcal Quiéreme Mucho. 


SAN PEDRO TAVICHE, OAXACA
Está relacionada con el ambiente natural y cultural que sus habitantes han desarrollado por generaciones, dando como resultado un sabor histórico: un sabor tradicional. Cada Maestro Mezcalero está vinculado con el sabor particular de su región


UNA HERENCIA ANCESTRAL
Los Maestros Mezcaleros vienen de una larga tradición del mezcal heredada por sus padres y sus abuelos.
La maestría del manejo de las herramientas, los procesos y el cuidado y la selección de los magueyes que los Maestros Mezcaleros tienen varía de región en región.

Name: Ellerkamp Getränkefachgroßhandel GmbH
Description: Ellerkamp Getränkefachgroßhandel GmbH ist ein Unternehmen aus dem Münsterland! Aktuell werden 12 eigene Getränkefachmärkte, Gastronomiekunden und Großverbraucher vom Standort Ahaus beliefert.

Name: Laurence Hayward & Partners
Description:
Located in Royal Tunbridge Wells, Laurence Hayward & Partners act as the UK sales office for a selection of quality focused wine producers based in Burgundy, Bordeaux and The Rhone Valley. 

Founded by Laurence Hayward in the 1960's, the company was originally a traditional wine shipper. Today the business model has evolved further to allow us to be as cost efficient for our customers as possible and therefore acting as our French suppliers UK Sales Office. 

We represent five quality driven companies whom we've held strong relationships with for between 15 and 40 years. These are as follows:

Cave de Lugny, Burgundy – the largest producer in the Mâconnais and a leading Crémant de Bourgogne specialist

La Compagnie des Vins d’Autrefois, Burgundy – a leading supplier of Burgundy Domaines, offering quality focused wines from Chablis down to Beaujolais

Sovex GrandsChâteaux, Bordeaux – under the ownership of the Ballande family, who also own Château Prieuré-Lichine, Sovex are one of the largest Négociants in Bordeaux and are one of the leading merchants of the Bordeaux wine trade

Les Grandes Serres, Rhone – a leading Rhone Négociant, based in Chateauneuf-du-Pape 

Cave Saint Desirat, Rhone – a Northern Rhone Syrah specialist & the biggest producer of Saint-Joseph

Name: BelVino AG
Description:
Bei uns steht neben qualitativ hochwertigen Produkten auch ein exzellenter Service im Mittelpunkt. Wir besorgen für Sie genau das, was Sie benötigen, und arbeiten zudem mit unseren Zulieferern und Produzenten sehr effektiv zusammen, um Ihnen das möglichst beste Preis-Leistungsverhältnis für das Engadin, aber auch für die gesamte Schweiz bieten zu können. In unserem Onlineshop finden Sie aktuell über 2000 Premium-Weinpositionen sowie diverse Edelspirituosen aus aller Welt. Unser live- Beratungschat via WhatsApp steht Ihnen hierzu immer zu Seite, um Ihnen bei Fragen oder Anregungen auch während des Bestellvorgangs behilflich zu sein. 

Wir grüssen Sie herzlich - Ihre BELVINO AG

Name: Caraway
Description:
Welcome to the world of CARAWAY, the exclusive Hamburg caraway spirit. A caraway alcohol in true Hanseatic style without any frills.

Based on the century old tradition of Hamburg and the goal to make caraway presentable again, we have created a timeless and charismatic spirit that combines both history and innovation with genuine regional craftsmanship. For our production we cooperate with a regional family distillery in the Alte Land, which process our handpicked typical North German caraway seeds in exclusive batches. We are very proud to continue this Hamburg tradition authentically and with real handwork to produce a caraway spirit that meets the highest standards.

Name: The Creators
Description: Witaj w świecie limitowanej serii whisky, która łączy pasję do rzemiosła z miłością do sztuki. Inspiracją są malarstwo, fotografia, film, literatura i architektura. Efekt? Whisky, która opowiada historię. Każda butelka to nie tylko smak – to emocje, detale i radość tworzenia.

Name: Vin chez Moi
Description: Vin Chez Moi, qu'est ce que c'est ? C'est un caviste qui vient chez toi. Je propose de soirées dégustations (pour n'importe quelle occasion), de vous aider pour vos accords mets et vins lors de vos repas, de gérer vos caves en vous proposants des assortiments. Je recherche moi-même les vins que je propose en allant rencontrer les vignerons sur leurs exploitations ou dans les salons.

Name: Vagabond Spirits
Description:
Fondée en 2022, sous l’impulsion créative de Nicolas Petit, caviste indépendant dans le sud de la France, Vagabond Spirits s’inspire du travail et de la folie de grands créateurs comme L. Gargano, A. Gabriel, G. Ferroni et tant d’autres qui réécrivent l’histoire des spiritueux.

Poussé par une envie de proposer des spiritueux inédits, avec une démarche de qualité et d’innovation, notre volonté est de mettre en avant des rhums, cognacs et armagnacs sortant des sentiers battus.

Utilisant notre science du vieillissement et un petit grain de folie, nous innovons chaque jour, découvrons de nouvelles expériences gustatives et proposons des produits toujours plus uniques.

Chaque cuvée est une invitation au voyage, à l’admiration du travail du temps, ainsi qu’à la découverte de multiples éléments : cannes à sucre, mélasse, bois, océan, roches, etc. C’est l’ensemble de ces matières, travaillées et respectées, qui donne naissance à nos créations, au travers de nos différentes collections.

Name: Amps Wine Merchants
Description:
Amps Wine Merchants is an award winning, 4th generation, independent wine business. We import wines directly from privately owned vineyards and small producers. We only stock what we believe are the very best in terms of quality, style and value for money.

We run wine tastings throughout the year, cater for weddings & private parties, deliver across the UK and supply many high-profile hotels, restaurants and pubs.

Name: Grand Labels AB
Description:
Grand Labels är ett svenskt företag med fokus på att hitta drycker som lyfter varje tillfälle till något extra. Vårt säljkontor finns i Dals-Ed och våra drycker lagerförs och distribueras från vårt lager Stockholm.

Våra leverantörer tillverkar sina produkter med förstklassigt hantverk och i begränsade utgåvor. Vår nyfikenhet att hitta nya leverantörer gör att vi ständigt utvecklar vårt utbud. Detta skapar också möjligheter för våra kunder att erbjuda sina gäster något speciellt för varje tillfälle.

Vår strävan att utvecklas märks framför allt i vårt proaktiva arbete med att kontinuerligt söka nya intressanta samarbetspartners med samma livsfilosofi som oss på Grand Labels - "Live Life Grand"

Name: Vinifera Wine Marketing
Description: For 35 years, we’ve built Vinifera Wine Marketing on the premise of providing exceptional customer service and building lifelong relationships with our producers and our accounts.

Name: Sorelle di Vino
Description:
Ciao! Wij zijn Sorelle di Vino, twee meiden die hun passie voor Italië en liefde voor wijn bundelen. We bieden een selectie van de heerlijkste uitsluitend Italiaanse wijnen, variërend van Alto Adige tot Puglia. 

Maak je bijeenkomsten bijzonder met onze boeiende wijnproeverijen, perfect voor bijvoorbeeld vriendinnen, beste maten, kookclubs of als teamuitje. Of je nu een verjaardag, speciale gelegenheid of pensionering viert, wij verzorgen de wijnen en hun verhalen. Eventueel uitgebreid met Italiaanse hapjes. 

Onze wijnen komen exclusief van Italiaanse wijnboeren die we persoonlijk hebben ontmoet en regelmatig bezoeken, waardoor we dicht bij de bron blijven.

Ontdek samen met ons de anekdotes van onze wijnreizen, we vertellen je er graag over! 

Proeverijen en leveringen mogelijk in zowel Nederland als België.

E-mail: sorelledivino@gmail.com

Name: Saragusta Spirits Co.
Description:
We’ve taken a ‘less is more’ approach when choosing our botanicals, carefully selecting for flavour notes we enjoy, but keeping in mind how they’ll compliment each other.

We distil our gins in a traditional Portuguese alembic copper still using the ‘one shot’ method. Only produced in small batches, every drop of spirit comes into contact with the copper, ensuring maximum smoothness.

We take inspiration from what we love! Our home, our family, adventures overseas… all have played their part in the design of our beautiful bottles, inspiring our selection of botanicals and creating our delicious gins!

Name: Stregatto Gin
Description:
Benvenuti in Stregatto Gin, dove l'arte della distillazione incontra la magia dei sapori. Siamo una distilleria artigianale dedicata alla creazione di gin di alta qualità, ispirati alla fiaba di "Alice nel Paese delle Meraviglie". Con una cura artigianale per ogni dettaglio, combiniamo botanicals selezionati con precisione per creare distillati unici e avventurosi che incanteranno il vostro palato.

Il nostro team di esperti distillatori lavora con passione e dedizione per garantire che ogni bottiglia di Stregatto Gin offra un'esperienza gustativa straordinaria. Utilizziamo solo ingredienti di prima qualità e seguiamo rigorosi processi di produzione per assicurarci che ogni lotto soddisfi i più elevati standard di qualità.

Name: Hausberg Spirituosen
Description:
Wir sind ein junges Unternehmen das sich des Vertriebs und der Entwicklung handwerklich destillierter Spirituosen verschrieben hat.

 In zahlreichen Gesprächen mit Barkeepern und privaten Genießern haben wir festgestellt, dass trotz zahlreicher Angebote ein großes Interesse an handwerklich hergestellten Feinbränden besteht.

Täglich entstehen neue Rezepte für Cocktails und Long-Drinks, die auf feinen Spirituosen basieren. Hier möchten wir Gastronomie, Barkeeper und Genießer in aller Welt mit neuen, anspruchsvollen Produkten unterstützen.

Den Erfolg der Marken Hausberg Gin und Hausberg Rum soll dabei ein Netzwerk ausgewählter Partner und Experten sicherstellen. Dies ermöglicht es uns, auch bei geringen Absatzzahlen einzelner Produkte ein verlässlicher Anbieter zu sein, der schnell auf neue Trends reagiert.

Wir sind wirtschaftlich unabhängig und vollständig aus eigenen Mitteln finanziert. Durch eine intelligente Lieferkette und flexible Logistik-Partner, wie die Firma Wacholderexpress GmbH in Eckernförde, können wir trotz kleiner produzierter Chargen schnell auf Ihre Wünsche reagieren.

Dabei bieten wir Ihnen werthaltige Produkte, die nie in großen Mengen verfügbar sein werden. Umfassende Rabattaktionen über unseren eigenen Webshop wird es nie geben, da wir die Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Partnern sehr schätzen.

Sollten Sie als Gastronomiebetrieb oder Fachhändler Interesse an unseren Produkten haben, schreiben Sie bitte an hausberggin@web.de. Bei Interesse an einer speziellen neuen Geschmacksrichtung oder einem Brand-Label Produkt für Ihre Hotels und Restaurants schreiben Sie uns bitte ebenfalls gerne jederzeit. Ebenso fertigen wir Weihnachtsgeschenke und Werbemittel (z.B. attraktive Tasting-Sets in einer Präsentbox mit dem Logo Ihres Unternehmens) auf Anfrage.

Name: Aguavawava
Description:
Aguavawava is The Original Guava Tequila Cocktail that is incredibly refreshing made with premium tequila and all-natural guava. 

Our mission is to disrupt the tequila cocktail market by bringing together the staples of both Mexico and Hawaii to create the most refreshing spirit in a can.

What does it taste like

The combination of fresh citrus and spice flavors combined with the sweet tropicalness of summery guava that make a refreshing cocktail with a bite.

Name: Big Twelve Distributors
Description:
Big Twelve Distributors is bringing a curated selection of the world's finest spirits and Texas-made products to your doorstep. Get ready to explore unique flavors, expand your palate, and experience the extraordinary with our diverse and memorable offerings.

Connect with Lindsey Walker, our Business Sales and Partnership Manager, to learn more about our exceptional products and services. Don't miss the opportunity to be among the first to join us on this exciting journey.

Lwalker@BigTwelveDistributors.com

Name: Bendito Vinho
Description:
A MUNDO SOMMELIER COMÉRCIO DE BEBIDAS, NASCEU A PARTIR DO PROGRAMA QUE TINHAMOS NA RÁDIO USP FM. ANOS DEPOIS SEU NOME FANTASIA TORNOUSE BENDITO VINHO, EM VIRTUDE DE UM NOVO PROJETO, ESTE DE LOJA FÍSICA.
OS ANOS SE PASSARAM E APÓS MAIS DE 15 ANOS DE MUITA LUTA NOS TORNAMOS EM 2020 IMPORTADORES. INICIALMENTE COM UMA BODEGA ARGENTINA, GENARO CACACCE E FILHOS. LOGO INCORPORAMOS CALAMACO, RICOMINCIARE, FAMILIA KRETSCHMAR E CARLOS TIZIO TODAS PROVENIENTES DA ARGENTINA, PORÉM DE DIFERENTES TERROARES. ENTÃO
VOLTAMOS NOSSOS OLHOS PARA O VELHO MUNDO E APÓS UM BELO REENCONTRO, PASSAMOS A SER EXCLUSIVOS DA VINÍCOLA PORTUGUESACASAL DA COELHEIRA. EM BREVE RECEBEREMOS VINHOS DA ITÁLIA, CHILE E ESPANHA.
NÃO SÓ IMPORTAMOS, COMO TAMBÉM DISTRIBUÍMOS OS VINHOS BRASILEIROS, VALMARINO, DOM LAURINDO E LEONE DE VENEZIA. NOSSA ÚLTIMA AQUISIÇÃO FOI EM MINAS GERAIS COM AS CACHAÇAS DO PAROL E CLANDESTINA, PRODUTOS QUE JÁ ESTAMOS EXPORTANDO PARA A AMÉRICA DO SUL.

Name: Grayson Distillers and Vintners
Description: Grayson Distillers & Vintners is a premier spirits manufacturer and marketer with a vision to provide high-quality and affordable alcohol brands to consumers. Grayson’s aims to create delightful and memorable experiences through the responsible consumption of spirits.

Name: UVAS Trading
Description: UVAS Trading is a newly established wine distribution company in Spain, working exclusively with carefully selected family-owned wineries of the most prominent wine regions, always considering best price-quality relation. The company is currently providing wines and champagne from France – Allocated Burgundy, Bordeaux, Rhône and Loire Valley, amazing rose  from Provence and Champagne but within the coming months start to include wines from other regions such as Italy and Spain and new world wine countries like Argentina.  Feel free to visit our warehouse in La Moraleja for a wine tasting and to meet the team who has a long and profound experience in the industry, having built one of the biggest wine distribution companies in Greater China over the last 20 years.

Name: Coburns
Description:
Coburns are fine spirit merchants, specialising in aging and selling whole barrels of quality award winning Australian whisky. 

Investing in cask whisky has been around for centuries, but only available to a select few. Coburns mission is to produce the world’s best whisky right here in Australia and open the opportunity for high growth gains to individuals interested in owning a part of this rich heritage.

Coburns is an end to end solution. We are not simply a go-between, connecting investors with whisky distilleries. We are involved at every step of the way – from manufacturing to buying the barrel back.

Contact our Barrel Master, Brad for a personalised consultation to discuss preferences, strategies, and how to build your ideal whisky portfolio.
Email: barrelmaster@coburns.com.au
Call or Text: 0417 920 536

Name: Ingoldby Mackenzie
Description: We are a micro agency. We develop commercial strategies for small and medium wineries.  Helping businesses reach their true potential.

Name: BB Liquors

Our packages are comprehensive, helping you easily get set up while our ongoing support will ensure your business is a success. Whether you are looking to get started with a liquor store from scratch or just need to acquire a liquor license, we have everything you need.

Name: Fine Wine Specialist
Description: Fine Wine Specialist is importeur en groothandel van wijn. Wij voorzien de betere horeca van prachtige en vaak unieke wijnen. tevens zijn we partner in relatiegeschenken.

Name: THE KINGS
Description:
A The Kings nasceu do sonho de um fã!

A The Kings nasceu do sonho de um apaixonado por cerveja. O primeiro negócio foi a WorldBeers, uma loja de cervejas artesanais que oferecia rótulos do mundo todo. Com o tempo, o fundador expandiu suas atividades e criou o Boteco dos Reis, onde passou a se envolver diretamente com distribuidores e grandes players da indústria cervejeira, especialmente com o Grupo Heineken, cujos produtos sempre foram seus favoritos.

Com a experiência acumulada e os ótimos resultados comerciais, a The Kings conquistou a distribuição exclusiva dos produtos do Grupo Heineken na Costa Verde do Rio de Janeiro.

Atualmente, a empresa conta com uma frota de 10 caminhões, um galpão de 1000m² e uma equipe preparada e dedicada. 
A The Kings Distribuidora continua a crescer, fortalecendo sua posição no mercado e ampliando sua parceria com a Heineken.

Missão:
Distribuir com excelência os produtos do Grupo Heineken, proporcionando aos clientes da Costa Verde do Rio de Janeiro uma experiência única com as melhores cervejas do mundo, sempre prezando pela qualidade, agilidade e atendimento de alto nível.

Visão:
Ser a principal distribuidora de bebidas na Costa Verde do Rio de Janeiro, reconhecida pela parceria sólida com grandes marcas, pelo atendimento excepcional e pela eficiência logística, tornando-se uma referência no setor de distribuição de bebidas.

Valores:
Paixão pela qualidade: Garantir que nossos clientes recebam sempre os melhores produtos com o mais alto padrão de qualidade.
Compromisso com o cliente: Atender com excelência, priorizando as necessidades de cada cliente.
Parceria e transparência: Manter relações de confiança e transparência com fornecedores, colaboradores e clientes.
Inovação e crescimento: Estar em constante evolução, buscando melhorias contínuas em nossos processos e serviços.
Sustentabilidade: Contribuir para um mundo melhor, praticando a distribuição consciente e responsável.

Name: Drinks Reimagined
Description:
Drinks Reimagined exists because we want to connect whisky lovers with bottlers who bring us independent bottling whiskies that are unique, full of character, and delicious.

We believe life is too short to taste the same whiskies over and over, and some of life’s most special moments deserve a special dram.

It’s an inevitable path. You start with the most accessible blend, then you are hooked with a single malt, then it’s the single casks, at full cask strength. 

Every new flavor is like a new stroke on a canvas, so don’t settle for boring shades when you can have a palette of flavors that will leave your taste buds tingling with excitement.

Find our bottles soon in specialty bars, restaurants, whisky shops in California or reach out to us so we can find you your very own cask of scotch for those special moments in life.

We’ve also teamed up with The Drunken Unicorn Beer Factory in Korneuburg to create Cúla Búla Pale Ale, a crowd favourite at Charlie P’s, now bottled and ready for you at HiGH SPiRiTS. 

Whether you're a restaurant owner seeking something unique or a beer and spirits enthusiast looking to discover something new, HiGH SPiRiTS has something special in store for you.

What We Offer

From Blacks Brewery & Distillery, Kinsale, Ireland

Whiskey:
- Black Smoke - heavily peated, big bold smoke.
- Triple Threat - aged in bourbon, sherry, and virgin oak.
- Blacks Triple Threat - tri-cask Irish whiskey with depth and balance.
- Rocketship IPA Cask Finish - bright, hoppy kick.
- Ace of Haze - triple-hopped IPA cask finish with a clean citrus twist.
- Ringrone Castle Small Batch - smooth, warm, rounded finish.

Craft Beer:
- Cúla Búla Pale Ale - full-bodied pale ale brewed with The Drunken Unicorn Brewery.

Gin:
- Black Beak Citrus Smash - bright, citrus-led Irish gin with a clean, refreshing finish.

The rum that we fell in love with at first sight, the rum which is perfect to drink neat, versatile enough for simple mixes, and bold enough as a base for any classic or tiki cocktail. In addition to its amazing aroma, developed in traditional Bourbon barrels, one of the main goals was to meet the objectives of barmen and partygoers, who appreciate easy handling and great price-performance ratio. All the rest is history, perfectly designed and bottled in 1.75 liters of pure love named “Happy Wife”. For the best parties in the best company. Try it, feel it and enjoy it… Cheers!

Vanja & Gašper

Name: Bodega Quotanes
Description:
Quotanes es un vino de autor, cuya elaboración está controlada por una sola persona o equipo, en este caso la familia Gutiérrez, comprometida personalmente en el diseño y supervisión de todos los procesos que se extienden desde el cultivo de la vid hasta la comercialización del vino. Esto determina que necesariamente elaboremos pequeñas partidas, pero que reciben cuidados extremos, otorgándole una alta calidad.

El nombre de nuestra bodega, Quotanes, procede de la antigua denominación que recibió la localidad zamorana de Cotanes del Monte en el documento más antiguo que conservamos, datado en el año 1038. Dicho documento, que se conserva en el Archivo de la Catedral de León ( B. T., ff. 176v‑178v [Monasterio de San Antolín del Esla]), contiene la donación que efectuaron los condes Rodrigo Galindi y su esposa doña Sancha, hija de Munio Fernández, al monasterio de San Antolín, sito en la villa de San Lorenzo (Granja de San Antolín), cerca de Coyanza. El documento narra en su exposición cómo el conde don Rodrigo, oyendo los milagros realizados por san Antonino entre los que acudían a orar a su tumba, emprendió viaje a Francia y trajo reliquias del milagroso santo, para las cuales hizo construir una iglesia, en la que expresa su deseo de ser enterrado. A fin de proporcionar al cenobio y a su abad don García los medios necesarios para su sostén y para las obras de caridad habituales de estos centros religiosos, lo dotan de un ajuar abundantísimo y valiosísimo para la iglesia, ceremonias litúrgicas y para la comunidad monástica allí establecida.

Entre los bienes de la condesa se encontraba el Villar de Cotanes, excepto el barrio en el que habitó Barrate, que era de las hijas de Froila Osóriz ("Concedo item Uillare de Quotanes ad integrum, exeptis barrio ubi abitaui Barrate quod est de filias de Froila Osoriz, illo alio ad integrum concedo").
Location: Cotanes del Monte, Castilla y León

Name: Mise en Place Service
Description:
Mise en Place Service é uma importadora de vinhos fundada em 2017, especializada no canal on-trade e dedicada à criação de cartas de vinhos exclusivas, pensadas para valorizar a identidade de cada cliente.

Nosso portfólio é composto por rótulos selecionados com rigor, que traduzem qualidade, autenticidade e experiências únicas à mesa. Mas vamos além da comercialização de vinhos: oferecemos treinamentos contínuos às equipes, realizamos eventos com produtores renomados, promovemos ações de sell-out e entregamos materiais gráficos personalizados, sempre com foco em potencializar a performance dos nossos parceiros.

Com uma equipe comercial altamente capacitada, nossa missão é entender a dor e a necessidade de cada cliente, entregando soluções completas e um atendimento de excelência. Acompanhamos de perto a jornada do vinho no estabelecimento, garantindo que cada garrafa se transforme em uma experiência memorável para o consumidor final.

Na Mise en Place Service, acreditamos que vender vinho é criar conexões, fortalecer relacionamentos e brindar ao sucesso dos nossos clientes.

Name: Long Dog Gin

Taking the boy’s red colour combined with their strong character and loyal and loving nature we sought to create a bold yet smooth gin of red citrus flavours that would stand out from the crowd.

We love nothing more than spending time with and exploring the local countryside with our beloved boys and meeting and talking to other dog owners.

The same love and pride we have for `Max` and `Paddy` has been put into the creation of our gin and we hope you are going to love it too!

We elevate the wine-drinking journey, meticulously crafting an exceptional experience that remains steadfast in both taste and quality. Our mission unites us with forward-thinking wine growers, distributors, clients, and consumers who share our audacious spirit.

Central to our philosophy are the merits of canned wines and wine-on-tap kegs. These formats flourish as perfect vessels for wines meant to be savored in their youthful splendor. Aluminium, infinitely recyclable, boasts an enduring legacy with a substantial portion of it still in use today. Moreover, our commitment to reducing carbon emissions during transport sets us apart from conventional packaging methods. Our kegs, generously accommodating up to 30 liters of wine, not only streamline transportation but also ensure wine's enduring freshness.

The wines we curate emerge from the hands of growers with minimal interference, nurturing the most genuine and high-caliber creations. Our devotion to authenticity manifests in wines imbued with minimal intervention – be they organic, biodynamic, or embodying the essence of natural winemaking.

Thirsting for freshness, texture, and a sense of place paired with interesting stories? You've come to the right place.

Though this gap still persists, there is a growing demand for wines that are environmentally conscious, that tell a story of their grower and maker, and that express their varietal through clarity and purity. Welcome to Minimalism Wines, where we import and distribute wines that are undressed, and reflective of their grower, maker, terroir, and varietal.

Korazon is designed to be a versatile and sophisticated beverage that can be enjoyed during casual gatherings or more formal events, making it an excellent choice for any occasion and any season.

Name: Manfred & Co
Description:
Manfred og Co er en vinforretning med en helt særlig baggrund og en sjov tilgang til vinens verden – her mødes kvalitet og legesyge med rødder helt ned til jorden. Det hele startede i 2019, da jeg opdagede et spændende marked, hvor der var plads til vine, der er lavet ordentligt, med fokus på kvalitet for pengene, og hvor der samtidig var et ønske om at gøre vin mere tilgængelig for den yngre generation. Jeg så potentialet i at tilbyde vine, der ikke bare var gode, men også havde en ærlig fortælling og et strejf af humor, så de kunne fungere som samtalestartere til hyggelige, sociale stunder.

Idéen var simpel: Hvorfor ikke bringe vin ned på jorden – et sted, hvor tradition møder fornyelse, og hvor alle kan være med uanset alder eller erfaring? Hos Manfred og Co har vi valgt at fokusere på vine, som er produceret med stor kærlighed og sans for detaljen. Vi går efter et sortiment, hvor der er noget for enhver smag – fra de eksperimenterende, friske vine til de mere klassiske favoritter, der stadig formår at overraske med deres dybde og karakter.

Vi ønsker at invitere den yngre generation til at opdage vinens mange facetter på en social og afslappet måde. Hos os handler det ikke om snobberi, men om at skabe et fællesskab, hvor man kan grine, dele historier og nyde en velsmagende vin i godt selskab. Vores events og vinsmagninger er designet til at være både lærerige og underholdende, så alle – uanset om du er en erfaren vinkender eller helt ny inden for vinens verden – føler sig velkomne.

Historien om Manfred og Co er en fortælling om passion, innovation og en utrættelig lyst til at gøre vin til en del af hverdagen for alle. Vi kombinerer de bedste vine med en uformel atmosfære, hvor kvalitet, ægthed og sjov går hånd i hånd. Kom ned på jorden og bliv en del af vores voksende fællesskab – her fejrer vi vin, livet og alle de uforglemmelige øjeblikke, der opstår, når vi deler et glas sammen.

Name: KAWÍ951
Description:
Artisanal Mezcal from Oaxaca Mexico, Handcrafted with love by 3rd generation Maestro Mezcalero, Don Fermin Santiago Velasco from the well known & respected Palenque "El Centenario". Nestled in the mountains of San Baltazar Chichicapam, known for its Zapotec roots, the town is recognized worldwide for producing some of the highest quality Mezcal. 
KAWI951, is a fusion of Culture & Art. Combining traditional methods used by the Zapotecs more than 2,500 years ago, in collaboration with local artists who design unique labels for each distil, giving each bottle a unique spirit!

Description:
Red Dot Wine is a specialty wine importer and e-retailer based in Singapore that offers a handpicked collection of premium wines from around the world. The company's strategy involves creating an efficient supply chain by sourcing the finest wines from a network of specialised suppliers located near Rotterdam, the main port of Western-Europe. By utilising an efficient and low-cost supply chain, maintaining low overhead costs and modest margins, Red Dot Wine is able to select the best wines from its suppliers' collections while minimising transportation and logistics costs.

The focus of Red Dot Wine is on delivering high-quality wines and rare, limited edition bottles at prices that remain affordable. The commitment to quality is evident in every bottle sold, ensuring customers enjoy a premium wine experience without breaking the bank.

Red Dot Wine offers B2C sales through its own e-commerce platform at www.reddotwine.sg and leading platforms in Singapore such as Shopee and Lazada. The platform's user-friendly interface ensures customers can browse and purchase their favourite wines with ease.

The company was founded by in 2020, initially as a hobby to access premium wines at an affordable price and share them with friends. With a growing community of like-minded people, the hobby has evolved in a successful e-retail company. Red Dot Wine is owned by two Dutch friends, who are both passionate about bringing the same “access-to-affordable-premium-wine” spirit to the Singapore market with a unique approach, an enjoyable communication and a strong focus on personalised service.

Apart from the e-commerce business, they offer (private) wine tastings, events, and wine consultancy services.

Name: Frontiersman
Description:
THE WILD, WILD EAST: LAND OF PINE CIDER, GIN, RUM AND AN UMQOMBHOTI BASED BRANDY

UPCYCLING THROWAWAY PEELS INTO WORLD CLASS CIDER AND SPIRITS
Deep in the heart of Frontier country, a modern day pioneering spirit is taking hold. Way back in 1865, one Charles Purdon noticed a row of floating pineapple tops on the window sill at his local barber, a chance occurrence that would eventually become the South African pineapple industry. 150 years down that Eastern Cape track and a group of good friends are intrigued by a similar opportunity; one also involving surplus pineapple products, lots of sunshine and ground breaking changes in the local community.

THE SPIRIT OF THE EASTERN CAPE
As unpretentious as the farmers and their campfires who have dotted these hillsides for generations, each of our products has a local story to tell and a global audience waiting to hear it.

PREMIUM PINE PRODUCTS FOR THE PEOPLE

Name: Tia Linda's Margarita
Description: Welcoming, always fun, and definitely the life of the party - our Aunt Linda has always been the one that brings our family and friends together. No matter the event, one thing is for certain, Tia Linda will have a batch of her "famous" margaritas ready for all to enjoy. Description:
At D'Cortés we put the name of Mexico high, proud representatives of our country and our people. We seek to capture our passion for excellence in our tequila.

We celebrate tequila, the country where it is born, its traditions and its people. We are an artisanal drink where tradition and contemporary come together, a transparent and honest promise to offer the best we have to give, producing the best tequilas with the seal of our house .

Village of the Altos de Jalisco, in the heart of the region of the agave landscapes.

Name: Hanbury Distillery
Description:
Our little distillery is tucked away among the houses on the corner of Linton Street and Mary Street. It is here that our gin is handcrafted in small batches using traditional methods in our beautiful 140-litre copper still, which stands proud for all to see in The Hanbury, Islington.

Hanbury is a premium London Gin inspired by London’s rich gin history and the heritage and character of Islington.

Habury Gin was born with one hope: to develop a new London Gin with greater flavour, character, and quality. As a result, Islington’s newest distillery opened in 2021.

We take great pride in the quality of our gins. Every batch of our gin is tasted by an expert panel to ensure that there are no compromises or shortcuts. Our gin is slowly distilled by hand, by real people with real passion for gin.

With feedback like this for our Negronis, Old Fashioneds, and Espresso Martinis, we’re confident your customers will love them as much as ours do.

Name: Maison Sarment Groupe
Description:
Maison Sarment Groupe est une société spécialisée dans la vente de vins et spiritueux qui propose une sélection exquise de produits de qualité. Avec une expertise solide dans le domaine, l'entreprise approvisionne les professionnels du secteur (restaurants, bars, hôtels..) depuis de nombreuses années. Passionnée par le vin, Maison Sarment Groupe s'engage également activement dans des pratiques responsables, mettant en œuvre des actions concrètes en matière de responsabilité sociale et environnementale.

Avec sa cave à vin et son bar à vin situés en plein coeur de  Toulouse, Maison Sarment Groupe offre aux amateurs de vin une expérience unique. Sa gamme soigneusement sélectionnée de vins d'exception permet de savourer des moments privilégiés. Ces moments peuvent être organisés de manière à privatiser le lieu pour profiter d'une soirée d'exception.
L'entreprise propose aussi des formations d'œnologie animées par des experts, favorisant l'accompagnement et le partage de connaissances.

En parcourant les terroirs renommés de France, d'Espagne, d'Italie, d'Argentine et du Chili, Maison Sarment Groupe sélectionne avec passion des vins d'exception, des champagnes prestigieux et des spiritueux envoûtants. Elle entretient des relations étroites avec des producteurs talentueux et réputés, tout en veillant à promouvoir des pratiques durables et respectueuses de l'environnement. 

Rejoignez Maison Sarment Groupe pour vivre une expérience vinique authentique, participer à ses événements uniques et découvrir sa passion pour l'excellence.

Name: sip Torne. espresso martini
Description: sip Torne. a canned RTD Espresso Martini that inspires moments of opulence and felicity. Made with real espresso, vodka, and nitro-infused foam, sip Torne., is the drink for all occasions!

Name: Vins Henri Grumel
Description:
Fondée en 1929 par Henri Grumel, fils de vigneron, l’entreprise familiale s’est imposée dans son domaine de négociant éleveur en vins.
Aujourd’hui, elle perpétue la tradition en intégrant la 4ème génération, alliant authenticité et savoir-faire unique.
Les vins de différentes régions de France sont sélectionnés pour représenter la diversité de nos terroirs. La variété, la qualité et la typicité des vins sont notre priorité.
Depuis des années, une réelle relation de confiance lie notre Maison avec les vignerons chez qui nos vins sont sélectionnés.
Les Vins Henri Grumel ont à cœur de valoriser le travail de ces hommes passionnés en privilégiant la culture raisonnée, l’agriculture biologique et la certification HVE (Haute Valeur Environnementale).
Les livraisons aux professionnels sont assurées dans toute la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes. Situées à Saint Maurice de Beynost, à proximité de Lyon, nos caves sont également ouvertes aux particuliers pour les ventes en direct. Les cavistes se font un plaisir de vous conseiller et vous faire découvrir les lieux ...

As the foremost importer and distributor of Italian premium sparkling wines in Vietnam, we take immense pride in meticulously curating an exquisite portfolio designed to cater to the diverse tastes of our valued clients, whether they be discerning individuals, esteemed restaurants, luxury hotels, or thriving retailers.

At Scavi & Ray Vietnam, our exceptional team embodies a passionate fusion of industry experts, connoisseurs, and dedicated professionals. Together, we labor tirelessly to provide an unparalleled level of service, aiming to elevate your wine and spirits experience to new heights. Our philosophy revolves around nurturing enduring relationships with our clients and partners, always guided by the principles of trust, transparency, and mutual success.

We don't stop at excellence in the world of sparkling wines; we also thrive in celebrating life's most joyful moments. As the premier sparkling wine in Vietnam, Scavi & Ray Vietnam is committed to enhancing these celebrations:

Join us on this thrilling journey as we delve into a world of diverse flavors, raise our glasses to unforgettable moments, and toast to the remarkable universe of Scavi & Ray Vietnam!

Description: Cahaya Kreasi Partindo is the official distributor of PT Nano Logistic in Jakarta, specializing in providing premium wines and spirits to the region. Name: GoDrinks Indonesia
Description:
Wine. It’s more than just a drink. Each bottle tells a story of hard work, practice, and patience. Each glass recalls a memory of happy times spent with friends and family.

Each sip carries you to different places and different people. Sharing wine is sharing life, at its simplest, and most profound point. Good wine is for everyone. Or at least, it should be.

Due to the high tariffs imposed on alcoholic imports, it may be more difficult than you think to afford your favorite glass of vino in Bali. But we believe you shouldn’t have to pay extra for paradise. Go Drinks was founded to provide you with the finest wine the world has to offer, at the fairest prices. So you can continue to share wine and share life’s best moments, worry-free.

The greatest wines take time to mature: and so does business excellence. With over 25 years of experience in the industry, we’ve worked hard to establish ourselves as trusted distributors of premium products. Our meaningful global presence has guaranteed us strong purchasing power in the international market. And while other companies rely on retail ‘middlemen’, our advanced logistics system allows us to process all of our imports and deliveries within Bali personally. For you, this means only the highest caliber for the lowest cost. For us, it means the culmination of our company’s vision: supplying good wine to good people.

But it’s more than just business with us: we care about quality, and we care about the community. Our team of experts has meticulously sourced products from a network of exceptional suppliers. And over many years, we’ve carefully cultivated long-lasting relationships with some of the best vineyards in the world, supporting sustainable practices and family-run farming. After all, good business is the same as good wine: it takes time and effort, but most of all, it takes a lot of love. Cheers to the good life, with Go Drinks.

Our portfolio features exclusive beverages sourced directly from Europe a curated selection of world-class beers, distinctive wines, rare champagnes, and premium to ultra-premium spirits.

- product and assortment consulting

Our mission is to redefine the concept of premium alcohol distribution. We are building a brand that prioritizes quality, uniqueness, and long-term partnerships. We believe that luxury doesn’t have to be out of reach, and that an extraordinary experience starts with a perfectly chosen product.
Infinitum Distribution is more than distribution it’s the beginning of infinite quality and taste. Through direct relationships with European wineries, breweries, and distilleries, we ensure access to rare vintages, limited editions, and market innovations. We are a partner who understands both the needs of the HoReCa sector and the expectations of clients seeking something truly exceptional.
Our ambition is to set trends & develop the luxury alcohol category with respect for tradition & sensitivity to evolving market preferences.

Name: Wybieramwino.pl
Description:
Wybieramwino.pl to nowoczesna firma, przybliżająca Polakom światowe wina.  
Działamy według zasady wyrażonej najlepiej przez Alberta Schweitzera: "Sukces nie jest kluczem do szczęścia. Szczęście jest kluczem do sukcesu. Jeśli kochasz to, co robisz - osiągniesz sukces." 
Dlatego nasz model biznesowy oparliśmy na połączeniu pasji z dogłębną znajomością rynku win.

Rynek wina w Polsce wykazuje trend wzrostowy, ale to wciąż dziedzina o wielu możliwościach. Analiza zakresu ogólnej wiedzy o winie naszych rodaków, a także rodzaju i częstotliwości spożywanych win, zainspirowała nas do uczynienia edukacji w zakresie degustacji naszą misją.

O tym, jak wiele ekscytujących możliwości biznesowych jeszcze przed nami, świadczą statystyki konsumpcji wina. Podczas gdy na zachodzie rocznie spożywa się 25-40 litrów per capita, w Polsce większość badań podaje zaledwie 3 litry rocznie na osobę.

Na szczęście, w naszej misji nie jesteśmy sami. Polacy to coraz bardziej świadomi, otwarci na nowe smaki konsumenci.

Chcemy im zaoferować to, co najlepsze, dlatego do współpracy zaangażowaliśmy uznanych koneserów wina. Nasze wina poleca Robert Makłowicz oraz Michel Moran, francuski mistrz kulinarny, juror MasterChefa.

Działamy na terenie całej Polski, jednocześnie obserwując z bliska europejskie trendy.

Name: Eros Intense
Description:
Tudo começou em uma pré-party… Uma noite, um copo de
vodka e suco. Percebi que ninguém vendia esse drink pronto no Brasil. Pesquisei. Nada. Vi uma oportunidade.

Algum tempo depois, viajei para a Grécia e conheci a história de Eros, o deus grego do amor. Aquilo ficou na minha cabeça. Dias mais tarde, sonhei com isso. Parecia um sinal.

No início, a ideia era apenas um rascunho, uma conversa entre amigos. Mas cada opinião, cada teste, tornava tudo mais real. Com o tempo, a Eros Intense começou a ganhar forma: a união do amor com a intensidade. Deixou de ser apenas um drink de vodka com suco que não causa ressaca e se tornou um movimento. Um símbolo de paixão, desejo e ambição.

O processo não é fácil. Enfrentamos desafios que fariam muitos
desistirem. Mas temos um propósito muito maior. Então seguimos.

Recentemente, grandes players do mercado se interessaram pelo

Name: TEMPLE WINES LTD
Description:
Temple Wines was established in 1977. Named after one of London’s most well-known tube stations, the company began life as an off-license based in Enfield, North London. Met with a good response, two further off licenses trading under the same name were opened in Marylebone and Wood Green respectively.

With the brand name firmly established Temple Wines began importing beers and wines directly from various continents under their own label, rendering them the first company in the UK to import bottled larger from abroad. It was certainly a daring move at the time but one that paid off. Beverages such as Super Trix, Baron Pils, and Linden beer are examples of such drinks imported under their own label.

After supplying to selected bars and other off-licenses, talks of further expansion began and the idea of opening a cash and carry dealing in beverages was considered. In 1989 this idea became
a reality when Temple Wines Cash & Carry Ltd was opened in Kingsbury, London. Dealing in on-trade and wholesale trading, the business rapidly attained success and further recognition. With such success, it made perfect sense to concentrate solely on the cash and carry and thus began trading entirely under the Kingsbury entity.

The company today
Today, Temple Wines continues to supply many of London’s finest bars, restaurants, clubs, and off-licenses. Their delivery network covers areas within and well beyond London.
Armed with vast amounts of experience and great knowledge of the drinks market, the company has sustained importing beers and wines directly from around the globe and is now extremely well-known for having the finest selection of wines and beers.

Temple Wines was also one of the first companies to bring Eastern European beers to the market and were agent of the popular Polish beer, Okocim.

They have recently started to cater large events and hope to carry on expanding.

Name: Tutto il Resto - Wine Experience Lab

Noi siamo Tutto il Resto Wine Experience Lab.

Wine perché il vino è un prodotto unico, specialmente se fatto con cura artigianale. E’ in grado di comunicare idee, emozioni e suggestioni, di coinvolgere e stupire.

Experience perché ciò che proponiamo va oltre la semplice bottiglia: è un viaggio nelle storie delle persone dietro ogni vino. Ogni nostro Challenger Wine Maker ha una storia unica fatta di lavoro, passione e dedizione, e che desideriamo condividere con te. Puoi vivere queste storie assaporando una delle loro bottiglie, incontrandoli di persona durante i nostri eventi di degustazione, o visitando direttamente le loro cantine. Ogni passo ti avvicina di più al cuore e all'anima dei nostri vini, scoprendo non solo un prodotto, ma una storia fatta di passione, tradizione e innovazione. 

Lab perché siamo un laboratorio che valorizza l’artigianalità, dal prodotto al nostro approccio di lavoro. Siamo una fucina di idee, dove il vino diventa il mezzo attraverso cui esprimiamo la nostra creatività.

Selezioniamo le Challenger Winery: uomini e donne che, con impegno, conoscenza, abilità e passione, trasformano i doni della natura in autentiche opere d'arte. 

La nostra mission è raccontare le loro storie attraverso i loro vini, offrendo un’esperienza che va oltre il gusto, abbracciando l’arte e la cultura del vino.

Tutto il Resto Wine Experience Lab è più di un nome, è una filosofia, un viaggio, una scoperta continua. Unisciti a noi.

Name: BARRELX
Description:
BARRELX is Democratizing High-End Barrel Aged Spirits Ownership through Fractionalizing Barrels of Kentucky Bourbon with NFTs and Blockchain Technology. 

BARRELX, a newly founded NFT marketplace for barrel aging spirits, is disrupting centuries old practices as it alters the way barrels of aging spirits are accessed, held and traded. A first of its kind marketplace has opened the door to opportunities traditionally, until now, reserved for industry insiders and heavily funded market makers.

Powered by the Ethereum blockchain, BARRELX democratizes barrel ownership rights, a commodity associated with historically outsized opportunities and more recently associated with extreme scarcity. BARRELX removes all barriers to entry and paves the digital road to access, authentication, storage and insurance. BARRELX enables everyday consumers and collectors alike to participate in acquiring interests in aging spirits held in barrels through the purchase of commodity based NFTs from leading distilleries and brands.

Each NFT corresponds to a tenth of a barrel of aging spirits. Each barrel of aging spirits is uniquely identified and secured in bonded rickhouses, primarily located in the State of Kentucky.
BARRELX has established a direct marketplace where its NFT holders can acquire (when available), trade, transfer or sell their NFTs.

Once the spirit comes of age, as predetermined by the smart contract, BARRELX NFT holders have the ultimate utility, the option to sell the rights associated with that NFT or redeem it for bottles of the actual spirits from the unique barrel.

NFT holders will also be able to, provided state and international law allows, have their spirits shipped direct to their residence.

BARRELX is currently slated to launch this summer. Look for more opportunities to participate in the bourbon barrel commodity market and claim your place in a virtual market with real scarcity and real utility.

Must be legal drinking age +21 to interact. Sip responsibly.

Name: F-8 Vodka
Description:
F-8 Vodka "Seasonally Smooth" | Ken Griffey Jr.   

F-8 Vodka was developed by Baseball Hall of Famer, Ken Griffey Jr. and spirits/beverage industry veterans Tyler Pierce, Doug Malmstom and Jason Roach.

Handcrafted from a proprietary gluten free corn mash, F-8 Vodka is distilled six times over by Head Distiller, Phil Brandon of Rock Town Distillery in Little Rock, Arkansas. Brandon has been recognized on an international stage, winning awards at the San Francisco WSC (World Spirits Competition) for his Bourbon, Gin, and Vodka.

The partnership between Griffey Jr., the operating partners and Rock Town Distillery will provide the brand with access to nationwide distribution networks, leading retailers, advanced marketing channels and sprit/beverage industry influencers. The F-8 name and brand identity were created by Griffey Jr. and his partners as it pays tribute to the long-held baseball practice of keeping score and specifically noting when a Center Fielder makes a catch. On many occasions throughout Griffey Jr.'s Hall of Fame career, he made the act of catching the most challenging of line drives and potential home runs look routine. His smooth and consistent presence in Center Field earned him 10 Gold Glove Awards.

Description:
Виното е страст!
За екипа на BNKwines.bg виното е съкровена мисия и като официален представител на премиум фамилни изби от Франция и Италия имаме удоволствието да предлагаме на нашия пазар вина от почти всички значими за развитието на винопроизводството райони. Така допринасяме за обогатяване на винената култура в България и даваме възможност на нашите клиенти да се докоснат до вина променяли хода на историята. Подхождаме с грижа за вината, като ги съхраняваме при оптимални условия и сме безкомпромисни в старанието си нашите клиенти да получат селекция, която най-добре пасва, както на характера и емоцията им, така и на личния повод или събитие. Доставяме с удоволствие тази страст, история и емоция до Вас.

Name: CLOS SYSTEY
Description:
Una nueva generación para Clos Systey: 

La narrativa prosigue!

Esta es la historia de un pequeño viñedo de 2 hectáreas, situado en el corazón de Saint-Émilion, fundado en 2015 por Sylvie Dulong, una enóloga apasionada, y Stéphan Grawitz. Su sueño: crear un vino excepcional, que respete la biodiversidad y los seres vivos. Este anhelo se materializó a través de Clos Systey, una auténtica joya vinícola. 

2024 marca un hito significativo: la décima añada de Clos Systey. Durante una década, nuestras viñas cultivadas de manera biodinámica y nuestros métodos de vinificación y crianza han permitido la creación de este vino, valorado tanto por catadores aficionados como por profesionales.

Hoy, Clos Systey inicia un nuevo capítulo: Sylvie y Stéphan transmiten el testigo a una nueva generación de entusiastas. Su sueño perdura bajo el liderazgo de la familia de los hermanos Dulong, quienes están listos para enfrentar nuevos desafíos e innovar sin renunciar a los valores fundacionales de la finca.

Fanny Dulong, junto a su esposo Juan Moretti, asumen ahora el liderazgo como nuevos viticultores. 
Junto a ellos se encuentran los hermanos de Fanny, Paul y Adrien Dulong. El primero, arquitecto, ha estado involucrado desde el inicio del proyecto en la renovación del inmueble y en el diseño de la sala de cubas; el segundo es un experto en nuevas tecnologías y desarrollo digital. 

Y, por supuesto, Sylvie Dulong, enóloga de vasta experiencia, continúa siendo nuestra asesora en vinificación y mezclas, al tiempo que comparte su conocimiento en la búsqueda de la excelencia.

El 2025 ya se vislumbra en el horizonte y juntos estamos organizando grandes sorpresas para ti!

Estén atentos, ya que comienza una nueva aventura para Clos Systey! 

 El equipo de Clos Systey.

Name: VĪNOGA.LV SIA
Description:
Mūsu veikali ir veidoti un iekārtoti tā, lai Vīnogas apmeklējumsbūtu ērts, patīkams un īpašs.

Klientu ērtībai pieejama bezmaksas auto novietošana pie pašām veikalu ieejas durvīm.

Pacienāsim katru apmeklētāju ar gardu bezmaksas kafiju vai arī kādu no veikalos piedāvātajiem dzērieniem.

Mūsu profesionālais personāls ļaus Jums justies ērti, jo “Vīnogas” veikalos klientus novērtē, atpazīst, un zina, kā vislabāk palīdzēt viņiem atrast meklēto. Ja nepieciešams, ar īsas sarunas palīdzību viegli piemeklēsim dzērienu vai dāvanu Jūsu budžetam, mērķiem un garšas niansēm. “Vīnoga” ir izcila vieta arī tiem apmeklētājiem, kuri vēl tikai plāno sev atklāt vīna pasauli.

Visus veikalos pieejamos dzērienus importējam paši, atlasot modernāko, kvalitatīvāko un piemērotāko saviem klientiem. Tieši tas mums ļauj piedāvāt unikālu sortimentu, kas atšķirs no jebkurā citā dzērienu veikalā pieejamās produkcijas.

Welcome to Signature Distributors UK Limited, where our passion for premium quality drives everything we do. As the exclusive distributor of Kingsman Beer in the United Kingdom, we are proud to introduce this exceptional German premium lager to discerning beer lovers across the nation.

**Our Mission**

At Signature Distributors UK Limited, our mission is simple: to deliver world-class beverages that stand out for their quality, craftsmanship, and taste. We believe that every sip should be an experience, and that’s exactly what Kingsman Beer offers—a perfect blend of tradition, excellence, and refreshment.

**Exclusive Partnership**

We are honored to have been appointed as the exclusive UK distributor for Kingsman Beer by **Dato’s Prakadeesh Kumar Suriyaprakasham**, the esteemed Managing Director of the **Plus Max Group of Companies**. This prestigious partnership allows us to bring a taste of Germany’s rich brewing heritage to the UK market, offering a beer that is as distinguished as it is delightful.

**What We Stand For**

- **Quality:** We are committed to offering only the finest products. Kingsman Beer is a testament to this commitment, crafted with precision to deliver an unmatched taste experience.
- **Reliability:** Our distribution network is built on efficiency and reliability, ensuring that our products reach our customers in perfect condition and on time.
- **Customer Focus:** We believe in building strong relationships with our customers, providing them with exceptional service and support at every step.

**Our Vision**

Our vision is to be a leader in the UK beverage industry, recognized for our dedication to quality, our strong partnerships, and our ability to introduce and expand the presence of premium products in the market. We aim to set new standards in beverage distribution, driven by our passion for excellence and our commitment to our customer

Each bottle is signed by our maestros cocuyeros, whose family generations have been passionate for Venezuelan agave for over 300 years producing cocuy and many other products with it. 

Each of our harvests are hand-numbered, segmenting the production batches with the characteristic name that represents their story. The launch of our most recent Bicuye vintage takes the name Cosecha Calicanto.

Our commitment goes beyond the bottle, with the purpose of creating  extraordinary experiences, personalizing every second to take the Venezuelan Agave to destinations uncharted. Innovation, quality and new processes are the means by which we are commitment to lead the agave cocui to places where it has never been before. 

We are partnering our product with Venezuelan high end gastronomy and cocktails to expose the versatility of the flavors of our cocuy.

Each bottle expresses the desire to produce the best quality cocuy in the world, as a result of authentic, innovative and sustainable processes that represent the maximum purity of our premium cocuy.

Name: Alchimie
Description:
Pour la petite histoire, Alchimie créée et produit des Rhums et Cognac arrangés sur La Rochelle. Elle a vu le jour en 2015, grâce à Éric Demunck qui lors d’un périple, a connu un véritable coup de foudre pour les arrangés pour ne pas dire une véritable Alchimie…

Vous vous demandez sûrement pourquoi La Rochelle ?

Et bien tout simplement, car La Rochelle fut un des ports des plus prolifique dans son commerce avec les Antilles. C’était l’endroit parfait !

Et la question clé, mais qu’est ce que leurs Rhums et Cognacs arrangés ont de si particulier ?

Et bien ils sont tout d’abord français, arrangés avec des fruits frais et pour la plupart du temps issus d’une agriculture biologique et française. En ce qui concerne les épices, elles aussi sont 100 % naturelles, brutes et en partie locales.
Pour nous, il est essentiel de travailler avec des produits de qualité et pour cela pas besoin de faire des kilomètres bien au contraire…

Nous sommes aujourd’hui trois à développer ce beau concept, mais sans vous rien est possible alors n’hésitez pas à aller découvrir nos créations sur notre site internet : https://alchimie-arranges.com et nous suivre sur les réseaux sociaux tels qu'Instagram et Facebook !

Name: Kaizen Vodka
Description:
Kaizen es un vodka venezolano producido con el mejor alcohol del país destilado por la Corporación Alcoholes del Caribe, macerado y embotellado sin azúcar por Industrias H.L. Ibarra en Charallave y distribuido a nivel nacional exclusivamente por Tamayo & compañía.

Nace en Caracas fundado por un grupo de amigos que empiezan a hacer vodka de forma artesanal para consumo propio. Con el pasar de los días, se dan cuenta que tienen un producto diferente. Un producto que gusta a sus cercanos e incluso por el que están dispuestos a pagar. Estando desempleados, ven a este producto como una oportunidad de negocio.

Con una capacidad productiva de 30 botellas semanales y sin capital para inversión, se inicia una aventura todavía sin nombre definido, pero con muchas ganas de lograr ser un producto que las personas tuvieran en cuenta a la hora de “tomarse unos tragos”.

Eventualmente, se une un tercer socio el cual les introduce la oportunidad de producir Kaizen en mayor escala y ayuda a re-dirigir un proyecto que inició como un producto netamente artesanal a una marca con todos los permisos sanitarios y jurídicos necesarios para llegar a todo el mercado venezolano y poder soñar con ser un actor importante en la industria licorera venezolana.

El nombre Kaizen, proviene de la filosofía milenaria que se basa en el constante cambio para bien. Que se amolda perfectamente a cómo ha venido siendo el avance de la marca. Con sus inicios en producción muy pequeña y presentación artesanal, cambiando poco a poco pero constantemente hasta llegar a la última versión, mucho mas estilizada y con mejor control de calidad.

Name: JM Limoncello
Description:
Als trotse producent van white label limoncello maken wij gebruik van de meest verfijnde citroenen afkomstig van de prachtige Amalfi Kust. 

Met een achtergrond als kok en passie voor het culinaire vak komt alle kennis tot uiting in het zorgvuldige proces van met de hand schillen en destilleren van de citroenen. Een uniek proces dat de ware essentie en smaak van de citroen op de voorgrond plaatst. 

Met respect voor traditie en authenticiteit selecteren wij elke citroen met de hand, waarbij wij de natuurlijke aroma's en smaken behouden.

Deze met de hand geplukte citroenen vormen de kern van ons receptuur en geven onze Limoncello een ongeëvenaarde puurheid en frisheid. 

Onze Limoncello, met zijn kenmerkende zachte en verfijnde smaak, biedt niet alleen een verfrissende ervaring, maar ook de mogelijkheid om je als ondernemer te onderscheiden met gepersonaliseerde flessen.

Wij werken samen met diverse horeca die streven naar kwaliteit, authenticiteit en vakmanschap waarvoor we op basis van hun huisstijl, verwachtingen en branding een gaaf label creëren dat opvalt.

Name: TRYBE Spirits
Description:
TRYBE - The Spirit of the Night

Inspired by the unparalleled beauty and charm of coastal Mediterranean towns, TRYBE is more than just a drink. It's an experience, an invitation to bask in the entrancing energy of the sun and sea. Every sip captures the allure that has captivated travelers for centuries, echoing stories of ancient gladiators who fortified their spirits with exotic brews before facing their destiny.

Dive into a distinctive, proprietary blend that combines the vibrant flavors of berry and citrus. Notes of delicate lavender and the intriguing taste of anise add depth, taking you on a journey through Mediterranean flavors. Crafted to be savored as a shot akin to tequila or whiskey, TRYBE Spirit is best relished chilled or on the rocks, accentuated with a hint of lemon.

Name: Noara Mediterranean Distillery
Description:
Noara Mediterranean Distillery is a third-generation family distillery.
Located in the Mediterranean, where we draw from to make our authentic spirits. 
With more than 75 years of experience, Noara's Master Distillers work daily to create spirits of the highest quality and expressiveness using traditional and modern methods. 

Noara has stood out for its commitment to innovation and the production of high-quality traditional spirits since its foundation in 1945, always focused on developing its products based on local raw materials. 
The distillery harmoniously combines tradition with research and innovation. The Noara manufacturing process is at the forefront of technology, which increases the effectiveness of security systems. 
The dosage of the raw material and the mixture of ingredients are carried out by means of an automatic program, thus minimizing the possibility of human error or external contamination. 

Thanks to its efforts in innovation and quality, Noara has positioned itself as one of the most modern distilleries in Europe, and its product catalog is increasingly in demand in the market.

Name: Julia Gin
Description:
Julia Gin is a premium botanical gin, distilled in New York City and inspired by the vibrant tapestry of the African diaspora. Crafted using a distinctive blend of botanicals, you'll taste notes of wild cherry bark, Bajan grapefruit, Ethiopian peppercorn, Malagasy ylang ylang, South African rooibos, American citra hops, and North Atlantic sea fennel - vibrant flavours selected to articulate our connections while tracing our origins.

Sourced from across Africa, the Caribbean, and the Americas, our botanicals reflect the lands where our heritage was born. Gluten-free and additive-free, Julia Gin is a spirit of purity, craftsmanship, and deep respect for tradition.

Created to honour the enduring influence of the African diaspora across the globe, Julia Gin reimagines what a premium spirit can represent. In a spirits market that has too often overlooked diverse narratives, Julia Gin proudly shares individual diasporic stories from diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and lived experiences.

Discover more than just a spirit - experience a celebration of cultures, traditions, and stories that unite us all.

Follow @drink_juliagin on Instagram or visit juliagin.com to find out more.

Name: Viche SUR
Description:
Destilado de caña tradicional originario de las comunidades afrocolombianas de la región Pacífica. Su elaboración en alambique artesanal, aporta toque ahumados únicos de la selva tropical. 

Viche SUR trabaja de la mano de la familia Caicedo desde 2019, Nicolasa y Alonso Caicedo son los maestros vicheros y productores de su marca ¨Producto Natural del Río Naya Nico y Alonso¨, quienes viven en la vereda El Trueno en la cuenca del Río Naya. Este corto río costero de la vertiente del océano Pacífico, nace en el Cerro Naya y limita con los departamentos del Valle del Cauca y Cauca. La familia Caicedo destila viche desde 1983 y esta tradición en su familia se realiza desde hace tres generaciones.

Nuestro objetivo general es Co-diseñar el paisaje vichero en el Río Naya, de la mano de unidades productivas familiares y alambiques existentes en la zona, a través de la agricultura, mejora de proceso de fermentación y destilación, generar comercio justo y bienestar en la cadena social. 

La elaboración de este viche contribuye a la preservación de las costumbres ligadas al territorio, y a la continuidad de los valores alimenticios, medicinales y espirituales de las comunidades afrocolombianas. VICHE SUR apoya la economía local e incentiva el uso tradicional de las plantas y hierbas del litoral pacífico.

Colaboramos con hoteles boutique, restaurantes de alto nivel, organizadores de eventos y empresas que buscan un mezcal auténtico para su carta, regalos corporativos con identidad oaxaqueña o proyectos de distribución a mediano y largo plazo.

En Casa Xamu ofrecemos:
Producción estable y formal
Acompañamiento comercial y comunicación clara
Compromiso con la cultura, la sustentabilidad y el valor del origen
 Si buscas un proveedor confiable de mezcal artesanal premium, conversemos.

Spirit Avenue a commencé comme une passion, née d'une profonde appréciation pour le rhum et ses nombreuses variantes. Description:
We founded the company to help promote the wine making and craft distilling skills of the Philippines. To be recognized in the world with our unique products that can compete in quality and taste and to help farmers and workers in this industry increase their income and expand their market. 

Like any other culture, the Philippines has pre-colonial history of fermenting and distilling crops abundant in the land even before the Spanish rule started more than 500 years ago from now. Such crops like coconut, mango, sugarcane, rice and wild berries are among the few natural and plant-based raw materials used to make these beverages. 

The Filipino food movement in countries like the United States and United Kingdom is gaining traction and now being featured and recognized in the press. Restaurants with a Filipino flair presented in a gastronomic fashion is now increasing in customs. To match their effort in the drinks category, we will work hard for the recognition they deserve because we are proud of our heritage and our premium world-class quality drinks are now ready for the world.

Roemwijn imports and promotes unique, high-quality wines from Romania—directly from winemakers. Romania is a hidden gem in the world of wine, and it’s my mission to introduce Dutch wine lovers to its rich traditions, indigenous grape varieties, and award-winning wines.

A personal passion, turned into a small business
I'm Cristina Andriescu, born and raised in Romania and living in the Netherlands since 1990. Alongside my work as a senior freelance marketing advisor, I started Roemwijn to share the wines of my homeland. My journey began in 2013 after completing WSET Levels 2 and 3, and I’ve been captivated ever since by the depth and quality of Romanian wines.

As a child, I spent summers in Cotnari, one of Romania’s most renowned wine regions. Surrounded by vineyards, I learned early on that wine is a labor of love, patience, and deep respect for nature. Roemwijn is my way of sharing that love—inviting you to discover the hidden treasures of Romanian wine.

Let’s raise a glass together. Noroc!

Name: SPIRITO COCKTAILS Nederland
Description:
Spirito Cocktails is een Italiaans merk dat is opgericht om iedereen - zelfs zonder enige ervaring - de vrijheid te geven om in slechts een paar eenvoudige stappen een ambachtelijke cocktail te bereiden die tot in de perfectie is gemixt.

Na veel onderzoek naar de beste sterke dranken, ambachtelijke likeuren, specerijen, kruiden en natuurlijke smaakstoffen; we hebben een verfijnde collectie cocktails gecreëerd in zakjes met één portie, gemixt in Italië en klaar om te drinken door simpelweg ijs toe te voegen. Drie simpele stappen zijn voldoende: schudden, schenken en proeven.

Wat wij u willen geven is een ervaring die het concept van een bar overstijgt en de meest geliefde plekken en momenten betreedt: de avond thuis, het aperitief in de tuin of op de boot, de borrel in het hotel, de proost op de verjaardagsfeestje..

Onze cocktails in éénportiezakjes zijn altijd klaar om te drinken, waar en wanneer je maar wilt, om zowel jouw speciale momenten als jouw ontspannende avonden te vieren met verfijnde smaken en aroma’s.

Kant-en-klare premium cocktails. Geniet van de vrijheid om waar en wanneer je maar wilt een uitstekende ambachtelijke cocktail te drinken.

Description:
Le Bambocheur AS is a Norwegian importer focusing on traditional beer styles and wines. 
From Traditional Lagers to Abbey types or Real Ales, at Le Bambocheur, a classic style is more than just a name; It's about a place, a process, ingredients, the water source, the land of origin, the people, what they did, and what they do.
Our wine selection starts with Champagne and a specific know how, terroir, history or philosophy. As our wine portfolio keeps expanding, make sure to follow our website!

Description: Ascendant Beverage Group offers consulting and sales agency services to wine, spirits and alterative beverage suppliers in the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic Regions. Name: Ofrenda Spirits
Description:
At Ofrenda Spirits, the art of traditional mezcal is our passion.

We’ve cultivated relationships with local farmers and artisans to source the finest, sustainably-harvested agave.

Our mezcals are crafted in small batches, using time-honored techniques passed down through generations of mezcaleros.

Every bottle is a reflection of our dedication to quality, craftsmanship, and the pursuit of perfection. From the carefully selected agave varieties to our bespoke bottles designed by local Mexican artists, every detail is a testament to our commitment to creating an unparalleled drinking experience.

Name: San Hagen Tequila
Description:
Building on the vibrant spirit and mexican heritage of San Diego and the innovative edge of Copenhagen, San Hagen Tequila brings together the unique flavors, traditions, and craftsmanship of two dynamic cities.

San Hagen Tequila is crafted with the singular purpose of creating a smooth and approachable tequila. Each flavor is designed to deliver a refined experience, blending unique and contemporary tastes that complement the character of a smooth, quality Tequila Blanco.

Our dedication to innovation ensures that every sip is both inviting and memorable, setting a new standard for modern tequila enjoyment. Perfect for sipping or mixing into cocktails.

Name: Horizon Wines
Description:
Een enthousiast team van wijnliefhebbers met een neus voor kwalitatief hoogstaande wijnen: dat is Horizon Wines. Sinds de oprichting in 2004 bieden Mick Kooistra en zijn medewerkers een collectie van de heerlijkste wijnen, waarbij we uitdrukkelijk niet hebben gekozen voor één land maar voor een brede horizon aan herkomsten.

Horizon Wines levert wijn aan drank- en wijnwinkels. Onze missie is om u kennis te laten maken met bijzondere wijnen die precies bij u èn uw klanten passen. Om te weten wat uw wensen zijn op wijngebied, is persoonlijk contact voor ons cruciaal en wij bouwen dan ook constant aan warme klantrelaties.

Ons assortiment blinkt uit in wijn van topkwaliteit: dat zijn niet alleen zeer exclusieve wijnen in het topsegment – die leveren wij ook! – maar ook prima wijnen voor prettige prijzen: een zeer brede keuze voor de ware genieters en in elke prijsklasse. Naast mooie wijnen uit Portugal, Italië, Spanje en andere Europese landen komen onze flessen ook uit Argentinië, Californië, Nieuw-Zeeland en Zuid-Afrika.

Ook met wijnmakers onderhouden wij graag goede contacten, en we hebben dan ook een netwerk opgebouwd van wijnmakers uit de hele wereld die hun pareltjes graag via ons delen. Het kenmerk van onze wijnmakers: authentiek, geïnspireerd door het terroir en met een moderne visie. Bekende merken die wij leveren zijn Niepoort, Barbeito, Rey Fernando de Castilla, Hess Family Estates, Mullineux, Valserrano, Mauro Molino en andere. Veel van onze wijnen zijn biologisch of biologisch-dynamisch geproduceerd, maar de kwaliteit en smaak staan altijd voorop, en duurzaam werken met aandacht voor bodem en natuur vinden wij van groter belang dan de juiste stempeltjes.
