Name: H R Drinks (wholesale) Limited
Description:
H R Drinks (Wholesale) Limited

H R Drinks (Wholesale) Limited is a leading, independent drinks distributor based in London, supplying a comprehensive range of beers, wines, spirits, and soft drinks to the hospitality sector. We serve bars, restaurants, pubs, hotels, event venues, and retail outlets across London and the surrounding areas.

Established in 2017, H R Drinks is a family-owned business built on strong relationships, reliability, and a commitment to quality service. Our dedicated team combines decades of industry experience with a personal approach, ensuring each customer receives tailored support, prompt delivery, and competitive pricing.

We are proud owners of Rockstar Spirits and Doctor Funks Tikki Spiced Rum, two innovative and fast-growing brands in the premium drinks market, giving our customers exclusive access to unique products that set them apart.

Alongside our drinks wholesale business, H R Drinks operates a national haulage division, running a modern fleet of 15 HGV vehicles delivering to companies all across the UK. Our integrated logistics ensure efficient, on-time delivery whether you’re in London or nationwide.

We partner with renowned global brands and exciting new producers to bring an unrivalled portfolio of products to our clients. From craft and premium spirits to best-selling beers and exclusive wines, we’re passionate about helping businesses elevate their drinks offering and grow their sales.

Our flexible logistics and responsive customer service have made us the trusted supplier for many of London’s leading hospitality operators. Whether you are a start-up venue or an established group, H R Drinks delivers the expertise, range, and support you need to succeed.

Name: WineHaze
Description:
This project, which we call love in a simple way, was born at the end of 2020, starting from a passion that led us to meet people, territories and wines that immediately remained in our hearts. The producers we work with are small artisans, who respectfully dedicate themselves to limited areas of vineyards, many agricultural organisms that live and exist in harmony with the ecosystem that surrounds them.
Over the years, the selection has been enriched with products from all Italian latitudes: first Veneto, then Tuscany, Umbria, Marche and today also Sicily.
The common thread: people. We consider all the producers we work with as friends, and we try to spend as much time as possible with them: in the vineyard, in the cellar, at the table, on the road. This is why when they ask us to define what we do in one word, the answer is ambassadors: our job is to bring to you a bit of the philosophy, the way of life, the territories of our producers, telling you anecdotes of the people who dedicate their soul and body for the bottle you are tasting, ready to improve, more and more every day.

Name: Blanco International Brand Spirits

Every drop tells a story. Ours is one of culture, quality, and connection.

Notre équipe de professionnels passionnés pourra vous aider à choisir les vins qui conviennent le mieux à vos goûts et à vos préférences. 

Service de Drive pratique et facile :

Nous sommes là pour répondre à toutes vos questions et vous conseiller sur les meilleurs vins à servir pour toutes les occasions. Si vous cherchez des recommandations pour un mariage, un dîner ou un événement spécial, nous sommes là pour vous aider à choisir les vins et spiritueux qui feront sensation.  

Des prix abordables :

Name: Team Spirit Whisky
Description: Jesteśmy entuzjastami whisky ze sporą wiedzą na temat tego rodzaju trunku. Chcielibyśmy szeroko rozpropagować naszą pasję i pokazać ludziom jak wiele czynników wpływa na to, jakie aromaty i smaki możemy odnaleźć w zawartości naszego degustacyjnego kieliszka. Uważamy, że każdy może cieszyć się smakiem tego wyjątkowego alkoholu. Postaramy się dotrzeć do indywidualnych pasjonatów, a także amatorów whisky i pomóc znaleźć im odpowiedni sposób na czerpanie pełnej radości i przyjemności podczas degustacji. Whisky jest alkoholem przywołującym wspomnienia, doznania jakich nasze zmysły doświadczyły podczas naszego życia… To niejako jedyny dostępny na rynku rodzaj wehikułu czasu , który pozwoli nam na oderwanie się od codziennej rzeczywistości. Pragniemy, aby każdy przekonał się, że ten wysokoprocentowy alkohol, odpowiednio podany i spożywany potrafi smakować np. świeżym ananasem, kompotem z suszu, czy też kryć w sobie nutkę rozgrzewającego imbiru. Czujecie? To obecność Ducha Whisky!

Name: John Lee Hooker Legacy Spirits
Description:
Crafting Premium Bourbons Inspired by the Soul of the Blues | #DistilledWithPassionAndSoul

About Us

John Lee Hooker Legacy Spirits is a family-owned company dedicated to honoring the legacy of blues legend John Lee Hooker. We believe that music and spirits share a common soul, and we strive to capture that essence in every bottle we create.

Our flagship bourbon, Boogie Chillen' "1948," is a testament to our commitment to quality and craftsmanship. Sourced from the esteemed Bardstown Bourbon Company, this award-winning bourbon boasts a smooth, complex flavor profile that's as unforgettable as the bluesman himself.

Awards & Recognition

Since our launch in April 2024, Boogie Chillen' "1948" has garnered seven prestigious spirits awards, a testament to its exceptional quality and taste. We're proud to be recognized as a rising star in the bourbon industry.

Our Legacy

We're more than just a spirits company; we're a celebration of John Lee Hooker's enduring legacy. Our brand is a tribute to his music, his passion, and his unwavering spirit. We strive to connect the worlds of music and whiskey, creating unique experiences that resonate with both enthusiasts.

Our Mission

We're passionate about crafting premium bourbons that inspire and delight. We believe that every sip of Boogie Chillen' "1948" should transport you to the heart of the blues, where passion and soul reign supreme.

Join Us on Our Journey

Follow us on LinkedIn to stay up-to-date on our latest releases, events, and partnerships. We're always looking for new ways to connect with fellow music lovers, whiskey aficionados, and those who appreciate a good story.

Experience the Legacy. Taste the Soul.

#johnleehooker #boogiechillen #legacyspirits #bourbon #whiskey #blues #music #distilledwithpassionandsoul #premiumspirits #awardwinning #craftmanship

Name: JB Champagne Portfolio
Description:
JB Champagne Portfolio specialises in Private Label Champagne for Michelin-starred Chefs and entrepreneurs all over the world.

The champagne range is from the Premier Cru rated village of Vertus (Blancs-Coteaux) with an emphasis on its star grape variety, Chardonnay. 

Private Labels can be made for any business or entrepreneur wishing to start their own brand. 
Now offering a wide range of custom made options such as metal plated bottles, engraved pewter labels. A personalized bottle service for company events is also available.

Name: ENOTECA S
Description:
ENOTECA S is een startend wijnproject, opgestart door Geert samen met dochters Margot en Ines.

We delen een liefde voor Italiaanse wijn die meer dan 20 jaar geleden begon. We kiezen wijnen die ons raken: door het métier van de wijnboer, de kwaliteit in het glas, maar vooral omdat we ze zelf graag drinken.

We brengen deze wijnen niet naar België omdat ze passen binnen een verwacht commercieel plaatje, maar omdat we ervan overtuigd zijn dat er anderen zijn die onze smaak delen.

Die overtuiging werd deze zomer onverwacht concreet. In Panzano, het dorp in het hart van de Chianti Classico waar we al jaren komen, vroeg Emilia van Fattoria Casaloste of we geen kleine Belgische invoerder kenden. Eén blik tussen ons drie volstond.
ENOTECA S was geboren.

Ons eerste event vond plaats begin december 2025. Het succes hadden we eerlijk gezegd wat onderschat. Vandaag is voorlopig enkel de Chianti Classico nog op stock in België, aanvulling volgt snel.

Wat kan je verwachten
•	Kwaliteit boven kwantiteit
•	 Italië als enige focus, het zal altijd uit de laars komen
•	 Stap voor stap: elk seizoen één nieuw wijnhuis
•	Regelmatige momenten om dat te delen:
        degustaties, pop-up enoteca’s,	kleine wijnfeesten
•	En vooral: we plaatsen onze wijnen graag bij horeca die erbij past

Vandaag & morgen
We startten eind 25 met het volledige gamma van Fattoria Casaloste.
In het voorjaar van 26 stellen we Carobbio voor.
Daarna volgt opnieuw een (h)eerlijk Italiaans domein, niet volgens een opgelegd tempo, maar aan de snelheid waarop we kwaliteit in het glas én service kunnen garanderen.

Voor wie?
Voor iedereen die houdt van een goed glas wijn.
Voor wie het gewoon lekker moet zijn.
En voor wie er professioneel mee bezig is.
Niet …voor blasé etiketdrinkers.

Wie zijn wij?
Liefhebbers van lekkers die dat graag delen.
Geen zware opleidingen, wel veel lezen, luisteren en bezoeken.
En ja, ook wat bagage van Spermalie en de Vlaamse Wijnacademie bij ons drie.
 geert@enotecas.be

KIM JESTEŚMY
Wine4you jest jednym z czołowych importerów i dystrybutorów wina w Polsce. Firma założona w 2004 roku przez Jarosława Cybulskiego (eksperta z 32-letnim doświadczeniem w branży winiarskiej), oferuje asortyment od prestiżowych i wielokrotnie nagradzanych domów winiarskich. Portfolio zadowoli zarówno początkującego znawcę wina, jak i osoby poszukujące perełek do domowych piwnic. Koneserzy znajdą u nas wyjątkowe kompozycje m.in. wina chilijskie, wina z Austrii, z Argentyny, Kalifornii, Nowej Zelandii, Włoch, Hiszpanii, Francji, Niemiec, Portugalii czy też nasze rodzime.

IMPORT WIN
Wine4you jest wyłącznym dystrybutorem prestiżowych marek wina. Swoim działaniem obejmuje teren całej Polski. Główny rynek sprzedaży stanowi segment HoReCa (hotele, restauracje, catering) 70%, oraz klienci prywatni i sklepy specjalistyczne 30%. Doświadczenie w branży winiarskiej naszych pracowników pozwala lepiej zrozumieć potrzeby klientów i przełożyć je na praktykę. W naszym portfolio posiadamy ponad 300 etykiet, a także 150 wyselekcjonowanych win dla koneserów, limitowane edycje i wina rocznikowe.

JAKOŚĆ WINA
Wine4you jest prężnie rozwijającą się firmą, która stawia na jakość wina i obsługę Klienta. Reprezentuje na zasadzie wyłączności najlepsze domy winiarskie zdobywające nagrody i wyróżnienia na międzynarodowych zawodach. Firma obok sprzedaży koncentruje się na działalności mającej podnieść wśród społeczeństwa poziom wiedzy o winie. Organizujemy warsztaty winiarskie, degustacje, spotkania z sommelierami oraz producentami. Dzięki temu pozwalamy naszym klientom odkrywać tajniki produkcji win oraz zarażamy ich pasją i miłością do wina.

Name: Goei Spul
Description:
Welkom bij Goei Spul, de thuisbasis van ambachtelijk bier uit Goirle! Onze heerlijke bieren van hoge kwaliteit brengt mensen samen in gezelligheid en feestelijkheid. We zijn trots op ons vakmanschap en gebruiken alleen de beste ingrediënten en technieken om onze bieren tot in de perfectie te maken.

Bij Goei Spul geloven we dat bier meer is dan een drankje - het is een ervaring. Daarom werken we onvermoeibaar aan een warme, gastvrije sfeer, waar zowel vrienden als vreemden kunnen genieten van onze bieren en elkaars gezelschap.

Ons streven naar kwaliteit blijkt uit elke slok van ons bier, dat met zorg en precisie wordt gebrouwen. Van klassieke stijlen tot innovatieve nieuwe creaties, elk bier van Goei Spul is een bewijs van onze toewijding aan de ambacht van het brouwen.

Dus hef samen met ons het glas op goede tijden, geweldig bier en het leven. Wij kunnen niet wachten om onze passie voor Goei bier met jou te delen.

Proost!

Name: Bevi Intelligente
Description: La nostra missione è quella di offrire prodotti unici e mai provati prima, anche grazie all'utilizzo dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nella creazione di nuove ricette e sapori. Siamo sempre alla ricerca di qualcosa di nuovo da sperimentare e da far conoscere sia al grande pubblico che agli intenditori. La nostra gamma di prodotti è in costante crescita, con nuove bevande alcoliche che vengono aggiunte regolarmente al nostro catalogo. Ciò che ci distingue è l'attenzione alla qualità e all'innovazione, con l'obiettivo di sorprendere e soddisfare i palati più esigenti. Siamo convinti che le migliori esperienze nascano dalla curiosità e dalla voglia di esplorare nuovi orizzonti, e proprio per questo abbiamo deciso di puntare sull'Intelligenza Artificiale per la creazione delle nostre bevande. Con Bevi Intelligente, l'innovazione ha trovato il suo posto nel mondo del beverage, dando il via ad una vera e propria rivoluzione. Siamo entusiasti di poter offrire ai nostri clienti prodotti all'avanguardia, capaci di stupire e di far parlare di sé. La nostra passione per le bevande alcoliche innovative e originali ci spinge a cercare costantemente nuove idee e a sperimentare nuove soluzioni, per offrire un'esperienza di degustazione unica e indimenticabile.

Suntail Drink Co. is a Vancouver‑based ready‑to‑drink cocktail brand on a mission to elevate every moment with crisp, flavor‑forward sips crafted from premium tequila and thoughtfully selected ingredients. We specialize in two signature SKUs:

Lemon Lime Margarita – a bright, zesty take on the classic margarita, balanced with natural citrus oils, micro‑carbonation, and 5% ABV.

Lemon Watermelon – a refreshingly sweet‑tart blend that marries sun‑ripened watermelon with a bright lemon kick, for a perfectly balanced, low‑sugar cocktail.

All Suntail beverages are lightly carbonated, low sugar, and infused with a touch of electrolytes and turmeric to help you stay refreshed and recover faster—whether you’re unwinding after work, cheering on your favorite team, or hosting a pop‑up tasting at your next event.

We partner with retailers, distributors, and event planners across British Columbia (with expansion into Alberta and Saskatchewan underway) to provide:

On‑premise & off‑premise distribution for restaurants, bars, and retail outlets

Custom sampling activations at charity tournaments, festivals, and private events

B2B partnerships for branded experiences and hospitality solutions

Join us as we bring bright, balanced tequila cocktails to every occasion—one Suntail at a time.

Geïnspireerd door frisse smaken en de levendige Amsterdamse cultuur, gaven we onze eigen twist aan hard iced tea. Na talloze brainstormsessies en smaaktesten was Zest Tea een feit. Name: Agnavi Inc.
Description: Agnavi is a prominent distributor of Japanese alcoholic beverages, specializing in SAKE. They offer refillment and distribution services for SAKE while featuring Japan's leading SAKE brands, "ICHI-GO-CAN" and "CANPAI." These brands are renowned for their compact size, stylish appearance, and convenient packaging in portable cans. Currently, Agnavi is actively promoting its 180mL Japanese SAKE cans, boasting a diverse selection of over 100 varieties from all corners of Japan. Their mission is to popularize Japanese SAKE consumption by consolidating and selling regional SAKE across the country, thereby highlighting the appeal of local breweries regardless of their scale. As the leading SAKE can distributor in Japan, Agnavi takes pride in its exclusive focus on canned SAKE, distinguishing itself from competitors who handle bottled alternatives. They adopt a unique approach by seeking partnerships with smaller breweries lacking filling facilities, empowering them to introduce canned SAKE. This strategy sets Agnavi apart and opens doors for significant expansion opportunities. Furthermore, Agnavi's strategic alliance with Toyo Seikan Group Holdings, the world's only comprehensive container manufacturer, provides them with additional advantages. In summary, Agnavi stands as a distinguished distributor, emphasizing premium canned SAKE and championing the diverse flavors of Japan's SAKE culture nationwide.

In a market with increasingly discerning and diverse palates such as Ireland, Silex Wines recognizes the need for a dedicated and passionate team to offer expert advice. Name: LDF - Les Deux Frangins
Description:
LDF, Les Deux Frangins, c'est une véritable amitié entre deux hommes dans le Sud de la France : David et Frédéric. L’un d’eux, Frédéric, a une véritable passion pour le gin, le rhum et les spiritueux d’exception. Au fil de ses découvertes, il déniche un produit rare, un dry gin élaboré et distillé en Suisse par Deux Frères. Avec David, ils obtiennent la distribution exclusive en France de ce magnifique gin. Ils distribuent maintenant des liqueurs, eaux-de-vie et autres produits de la distillerie suisse Morand. Les Deux Frangins ne s'arrêtent pas là : tonic et autres softs complètent le catalogue de produits d'exception. 

Ces collaborations avec des partenaires de qualité révèlent toute la philosophie des Deux Frangins : favoriser des distilleries avec un fort ancrage territorial, un savoir-faire familial, un talent indéniable pour l’innovation et une recherche perpétuelle de qualité.

L'objectif de LDF ? Partager avec le plus grand nombre (clientèle directe, bars, restaurateurs, hôtels, etc.), le plaisir de déguster un élixir de haute volée pur avec un glaçon ou bien en cocktail.

Tout cela dans le seul et unique but de partager, avec vous, l’excellence d’un cocktail 3S :
- Spiritueux exclusifs,
- Sensations uniques,
- Services premium.

Retrouvez l'ensemble de nos produits sur notre site internet : https://lesdeuxfrangins.fr

Vous êtes professionnels ? Vous souhaitez faire goûter nos produits à votre clientèle, veuillez nous contacter via le mail suivant : contact@lesdeuxfrangins.fr.

À très vite autour d'un moment d'exception

Фирмата разполага с модерна складова база, намираща се на бул. “Ботевградско шосе” № 247, оборудвана съгласно изискванията на европейските стандарти. Компанията поддържа оптимално продуктово портфолио, съобразено с нуждите на пазара и рационалното използване на складовите пространства, където има богат асортимент от над 4000 артикула висококачествени български и вносни високоалкохолни напитки и вина. Складовите площи, собственият автопарк, коректните взаимоотношения с клиентите и най-вече компетентният персонал позволяват фирмата да се утвърди като приоритетен доставчик и добър търговски партньор.
“С и Д Комерсиал” ООД успешно си партнира с водещи фирми, производители и вносители на високоалкохолни напитки, вина и тютюневи изделия и се е наложила като един от основните търговци на българския пазар. В портфолиото на фирмата може да откриете всичко, което Ви е необходимо за зареждането на Вашето заведение, магазин или парти, започвайки от добре познатите Ви български напитки, преминавайки през световноизвестните високоалкохолни продукти и стигайки до най-изтънчените вина и бренди.

Компанията разполага с добър екип, които работи в търговската мрежа. Благодарение на неговия професионален подход обслужването ни е коректно и точно. Нашият стремеж за максимално задоволяване на потребителското търсене преминава в трайно сътрудничество и партньорство с клиентите ни, което ни позволява да предлагаме индивидуални решения на проблемите им и да отговаряме на техните изисквания в най-кратък срок.

Name: Marlow Provisions
Description:
At Marlow Provisions, we are dedicated to sourcing and delivering the finest, purest provisions that have stood the test of time—ingredients cherished by humanity for thousands of years. From pristine natural rock salt and exquisite high-end olive oils to premium wines and artisanal vinegars, our products are a testament to the enduring legacy of purity and quality.


Authenticity is often questioned in an era of uncertainty. We promise that every product is a genuine, unadulterated treasure from the earth, crafted by nature and perfected by tradition. Our mission is to bring you the timeless essence of these ancient provisions, ensuring you experience the best and purest ingredients that have nourished civilizations.


With Marlow Provisions, you can trust that you are connecting with the past, present, and future of pure, authentic living.

Name: SPARK Champagne
Description:
Everything suddenly fell into place. The puzzle pieces matched. The feeling of true love that we both had experienced in our youth through our parents became reality. We like to share our story about our 'Spark' and how we poured it into a bottle with millions of bubbles full of 'love'.


Just as wonderful things arise, completely unexpectedly and spontaneously, we concluded a romantic week in Normandy with a dinner in a very charming restaurant. The glass of Champagne that we chose to toast with suddenly catched our full attention. The taste, purity, balance and quality of the Champagne blew our minds and reminded us about our chemistry as a couple. The glass turned into a bottle and to our surprise it matched perfectly with all chosen dishes. Having had this experience we decided to visit this Champagne house.

From there on things went crescendo. We got to know the vintager, a charming man with a lot of passion for his craft. The attention and love that is given to the grapes, the plucking, the entire process up to the finished product is unseen. And that's exactly what we tasted in that restaurant. When we got aware that the vintager spends almost all his time on it production process and focuses less on the sales of his Champagne we quickly realized that a magical collaboration was possible.

With the S for Silvie and the K for Kenny we share the “SPARK” that emerged between us. Through millions of “Bubbles of Love” we translate this into our exclusive Champagne.

This is our story. Taste, enjoy and feel the love…

Silvie and Kenny

Name: KP Distributions
Description:
At KP Distribution, we take pride in our extensive global warehouses, strategically located to provide seamless international services across Europe, Asia, North America, South America, Australasia, and Africa. This strategic positioning allows us to efficiently cater to the diverse needs of our clients, ensuring timely and reliable delivery of premium alcohol supplies worldwide. Full Transparency and Trust

We understand that each company is unique, requiring a personalized approach in communication, documentation, logistics, and finance. We believe in tailoring our services to meet your specific needs and standards, never relying on one-size-fits-all solutions. Your information security and confidentiality are always our top priorities, ensuring a secure and trustworthy partnership. Reach out to our friendly managers today to start a conversation and discover how we can support your business.

Meet Our Team

At KP Distribution, we pride ourselves on having a fully dedicated team of industry professionals committed to excellence in every aspect of our operations. Our experts in logistics, sales, accounts, and customer service work tirelessly to ensure that we meet and exceed our clients' expectations. Each member of our team brings a wealth of knowledge and experience, contributing to our reputation as a trusted leader in the distribution of premium spirits, wine, and champagne. Name: Industrias Montalvo S.A.C
Description:
Vinos Montalvo es una marca que honra la tradición vitivinícola de los valles de Cascas, combinando métodos artesanales con innovación para crear vinos de alta calidad. Su propuesta refleja el respeto por la tierra y el legado de generaciones dedicadas a la vid, ofreciendo productos que capturan la esencia de esta región emblemática.

Presente en diversos mercados nacionales, Vinos Montalvo se posiciona como un referente en el mundo del vino peruano, llevando la autenticidad de Cascas a cada copa. Además, la marca ofrece experiencias enoturísticas únicas, como visitas a los viñedos, catas dirigidas y recorridos que permiten conectar con la cultura y la pasión del vino.

Description:

Behind every bottle of MER wine, there's a story to be told and the vision and passion to promote local traditions and specialities, using innovative methods and technology in marketing and distribution.

Name: Bevendo Srl
Description:

Il progetto imprenditoriale fonde competenze commerciali, amministrative e di marketing e mira alla costruzione di due principali canali di vendita:

•	Digitale, tramite distribuzione, attraverso lo sviluppo di un e-commerce finalizzato alla vendita ai privati

La sostenibilità nella crescita e la valorizzazione dei brand saranno principi fondamentali della nostra attività d’impresa. La vendita dovrà sempre tutelare e rispettare la storia e l’identità dei marchi proposti, attraverso un posizionamento mirato e non massivo.

As well as a selection of Champagne, Rum, Cognac and Whiskey.
“With over 15 years of experience in the wine and spirits trade within large international groups, I created the company PVS with the aim to distribute wines and spirits at the best quality/price ratio that come from partenships with individual winegrowers committed to quality and sustainability. My expertise and the search for excellence combines both traditional and a modern approach to serve the customers.”
Romain Pierron
rpierron@pvsgroup.fr

Fondée en fin d’année 2024, la société PVS (Pierron Vins et Spiritueux) est à la fois un négoce de vins et spiritueux et une agence située en plein cœur de Bordeaux. Spécialisée principalement sur les marchés Européens (DROM-COM), Africains et Moyen-Orient (EMEA), nous proposons une gamme allant des châteaux indépendants de tous les vignobles aux Grand Crus Classés de Bordeaux mais aussi une sélection de Champagne, Rhum, Cognac et Whisky.
« Fort d’une expérience de plus de 15 ans dans le commerce des vins et spiritueux au sein de grands groupes internationaux, j’ai créé la société PVS dans le but de distribuer des vins et spiritueux au meilleur rapport qualité/prix qui proviennent de partenariats avec des viticulteurs engagés dans une démarche de qualité et durable. Mon expertise et ma recherche de l’excellence alliant à la fois tradition et modernité au service de nos clients». 
Romain Pierron
rpierron@pvsgroup.fr

Order Lay-Low online or find in-store today!

Nuestro objetivo es reunir experiencia e ilusión durante dos jornadas apasionantes en las que se podrán catar los vinos más importantes y las últimas novedades de la mano de las personas que mejor conocen la filosofía y tradición de cada bodega.

También contaremos con la presencia de productos gourmet, ibéricos, y una amplia exposición de cristalería y vajilla premium.

Todo esto, rodeado del mejor ambiente en una zona exterior habilitada con música en directo, Regina Schinglerova – Violín, DJ, concierto en directo de Los Salvapantallas y foodtrucks para recargar energías.

Name: I'm Thirsty LLC
Description:
We didn’t follow a blueprint. We didn’t craft our story in a boardroom.
We’re loud. We’re proud. We’re smooth as hell.
And yes—we started as a college joke.

We’re the vodka that breaks all the rules, makes people do a double take, laugh out loud, and come back for more.

But behind the playful name is something bigger.
Jooicy Tits Vodka is a premium, small-batch spirit that’s crafted with care and served with purpose.

Distilled in sunny Florida from non-GMO corn and naturally gluten-free, our vodka is ultra-smooth and dangerously drinkable—but this isn’t just about cocktails and a catchy name. It’s about doing good while having a good time.

A portion of profits from every bottle and every piece of merch goes directly to breast cancer charities doing amazing things.

So whether you’re toasting with your besties, shaking up a dirty martini, or raising funds for a cause that touches SO many—Jooicy Tits Vodka is here for it.

We’re shaking up the spirits industry with sass, style, substance, and a whole lot of heart.

Please sip responsibly.

Jooicy Tits Vodka is female founded and owned.
Our vodka is proudly made in Ft. Pierce, FL.

Description:

Working with renowned vineyards in France, Italy, Spain and beyond, we are committed to introducing a new group of U.S. consumers to the captivating flavors and aromas of Europe's centuries-old estates.

Our business is founded on respect for tradition, values and unique expertise gained through the centuries, meeting a modern and innovative vision.

Join us in celebrating European wine excellence!

Name: TC CRAFT Tequila
Description: TC CRAFT Tequila is an ultra-premium craft tequila brand produced in Jalisco, Mexico and founded by Todd and Chad Bottorff in 2017 in Nashville, Tennessee. Specializing in the highest quality craft tequila, it is made using 100% 8-year blue Weber Agave with no herbicides or pesticides, slow roasted in clay ovens and aged in white oak barrels. It is produced and distilled by master distiller Melly Barajas Cardeñas of Vinos y Licores Azteca, a female-owned and staffed distillery. TC CRAFT Tequila has won fourteen medals and “Distiller of the year” in taste competitions, including the SIP Awards, Tequila Aficionado and the Bartender Spirits Awards and has several varieties: Blanco, Reposado, Añejo, and Extra Añejo distributed in the U.S.

Offrir une large gamme de produits d’exception — du gin artisanal au mezcal , en passant par les Cognacs, Whiskies, Rhums, vodkas, tequilas, crèmes, liqueurs et pépites exclusives — pour sublimer chaque cocktail.

Name: Golden Triangle Beverage Company
Description:
Golden Triangle Beverage Company is a Vancouver-based premium beverage brand specializing in Asian-inspired alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks. 

• Mission: Redefine the premium RTD (ready-to-drink) category through authentic craftsmanship, cultural fusion, and sustainable production practices.
• Vision: Become the world’s most recognizable Asian-inspired alcohol brand — a cultural symbol that connects, unites, and celebrates community.

Its flagship product, Triple X.O.G. — the world’s first ready-to-drink cognac green tea cocktail. Crafted with French cognac, real jasmine green tea, and local Canadian honey, the brand merges Eastern tea culture and Western premium spirits to create a smooth, refined experience for modern drinkers.

We specialize in importing and distributing premium African products—beginning with Uganda Waragi gin—into the U.S. through retail, e-commerce, and culturally resonant marketing strategies tailored to the African diaspora and global consumers alike.

In parallel, The eHub Group manages a diversified real estate portfolio across the United States and East Africa, focused on long-term residential rentals and high-yield property investments. Our dual-continent footprint enables us to forge cross-border economic linkages that promote shared prosperity and strategic diaspora investment.

Our mission is to connect cultures by unlocking economic opportunity across borders through diaspora-led commerce, real asset investments, and brand-driven ventures that celebrate Africa’s richness and global potential.

Where Tradition Meets Innovation.

Name: Saxtons Distillery
Description: Saxtons Distillery makes unique spirits with fresh, local character. We began in 2006 with traditional recipes brought from Lithuania over 100 years ago building upon the wisdom and heritage of crafting fine liquors that has been passed down through the Stromberg family for generations. The distillery began on the banks of the Saxtons River in Cambridgeport, Vermont in a lightly-heated barn and moved to Brattleboro in 2011. We source maple syrup from local farms who boil down the syrup in classic wood fired evaporators, coffee from a local roaster, and grow our own ghost peppers. We craft every product on location with intention and creative expertise.

Name: Pelican Craft Brands
Description:
Conceived from a passion for craft beer and founded on the principles that everyone should have access to the market, our founder rented a warehouse, bought a truck, and started selling craft beer.  He put it all on the line for the “little guy”, and to bring quality 100% American craft beer to Louisiana.

Creating a craft beer universe in craft beer desert is no easy task.  Our team is comprised of brand builders, top notch sales people, and over all cool dudes, selling and building your brand along with you.  We invest ourselves in your success because it is tied to ours.  We maintain the little guy approach as we compete against the mega distributors in our market.  Customer service, education, and the desire to be better than the rest is what drives the Pelican ethos.

Knowledge for our stakeholders, disrupting the market, and helping consumers discover new choice and selection in beer is the Pelican way. We work hard to keep your beer fresh so your experience is maximized. We live by the FIFO (First In First Out) method, ensuring the only beer in our warehouse is super fresh. Make sure to honk when you see our trucks around town and pick up some craft beer to challenge the status quo!

Louisiana is a franchise state and distributors are becoming brand collectors.  We offer a new way forward free from draconian contracts.  We don’t believe a distributor should ever be able to hold your brand hostage.  Our terms are simple; we’ll work with you to develop your brand and get your beer to the best accounts in the state.  If you’re not satisfied, the contract is terminated without question.  As it should be. No one should be forced to do business!

Description:
Leuca is a vodka-infused water made simple...zero sugar, zero fizz, and just 72 calories.

Created from the frustration of heavy, overly sweet, and bubbly RTDs, Leuca offers a clean, easy-drinking alternative. After two years of development, we launched in 2025 with a mission to lead the fizz-free era delivering great taste without the bloat or compromise.

Crafted with premium vodka and natural fruit flavours, Leuca is made for those who want a lighter way to drink.

Name: GinUino - Lucania's Botanical Spirit
Description:
GinUino è un gin Italiano. GinUino è il primo gin della Basilicata, distillato con botaniche raccolte sul territorio Lucano. 

E' un gin composto da dodici botaniche di cui sei note: Ginepro, peperone crusco, liquirizia, foglie di ulivo, origano e camomilla. 

Abbiamo passeggiato, esplorato: ora lungo le coste ioniche e tirreniche, staccando bacche di ginepro dondolate dalla brezza di mare; ora sulle creste del Pollino, inebriati dal profumo dei fiori e delle erbe selvatiche, con un cestino sotto il braccio. Mare e terra, a valle e sulle vette. La Basilicata è una terra tanto vasta, quanto enigmatica. 
Sembra essere a tratti abbandonata, ma in verità, è solo riservata.

Dicevamo del primo sorso. Una sensazione piacevole, leggera: l’amaro lascia spazio alla freschezza della liquirizia e delle erbe aromatiche, per un gusto secco e stuzzichevole.

Non si prende troppo sul serio, non è da sorseggiare su una sedia in velluto con braccioli, piuttosto si presta a una panca in legno, all’aperto, con vista su Maratea. 

GinUino è il gin ideale per qualsiasi tipo di cocktail: un classico gin tonic oppure l’invenzione del barman. 

Ama lanciarsi in esperienze nuove.

Sarà perché è giovane.

Sarà perchè è un nuovo gin Italiano.

Name: HP Impex
Description:
HP Impex LLC - Premium Alcohol Trading and Distribution

Since 2017, HP Impex LLC has been a trusted name in the premium alcohol industry, specializing in retail and international trade across Azerbaijan. Name: Andean Spirits LLC
Description:
Andean Agave LLC produces CHAWAR, an agave spirit from Ecuador.

CHAWAR is an agave spirit made high in the Andes by Ecuador's first indigenous women's harvesting cooperative.

Our journey began as a research project dedicated to creating new value pathways for traditional plant-people relationships in rural farming communities in the tropics.

Name: Viñedos de la Reina
Description:
Los vinos de Viñedos de la Reina cuentan varias historias. Primero, la de nuestra familia, que constituyó con ellos un legado, un agradecido homenaje a las tierras bajacalifornianas que han sido generosas durante los más de 40 años de trabajo de Grupo Amaya Curiel en el Estado.

Nuestros vinos también hablan de las bondades de los Valles de Guadalupe y San Vicente, donde la tierra, el clima y la cercanía al mar, alimentan el milagro de las vides que año tras año nos obsequian cosechas únicas, irrepetibles. Hablan de esos valles que adoptaron las diversas monovarietales europeas que hoy ocupan nuestras más de 50 hectáreas de lomas y piedemonte.

En ellos, encontramos también la suma de las historias de nuestra gente, en el campo, en la vinícola, en los procesos y servicios. Encontramos la pasión, el trabajo, el compromiso de todos los que integramos esta casa.

Pero nuestros vinos hablan sobre todo del tributo del Arq. Roberto Curiel, nuestro fundador, a su Reina, a su esposa, a quién dedicó la visión que tuvo de producir vinos que lo trascendieran, que se quedaran por generaciones, contando su historia de amor y de familia.

Name: ALD IMPORTADORA DE VINHOS

Our Ten66 is extra-aged and breaks new ground by offering a serious look at a traditional Norman/French aperitif.

Name: Spring Wines
Description:

Combined with a commitment to ensure that most of our import options come from family-owned or charitable organizations, we have a passion for aligning the needs of our partners and customers on both sides of the Atlantic.
Spring Wines has sought to partner with environmentally-friendly high-quality producers in order to expand appreciation for reasonably priced wines that match the tastes of people across the Gulf Coast. By partnering with family-owned vineyards, as well as charitable organizations, we believe that we can help sustainable and ethical vineyards reach a broader market while providing quality that's affordable and brightens the lives of people closer to home.

Name: El Alquimico
Description:
El Alquímico es una fábrica de licores de especies y frutas infusionadas/Maceradas en Pisco (Destilado) elaborada artesanalmente en Cañete, Perú desde el 2018. 
Su sabor y aroma únicos provienen de Piscos Quebranta Galardonados, en un proceso artesanal de principio a fin; conservando la elegancia natural de las frutas y hierbas aromáticas de la más alta calidad. No tiene preservantes, ni edulcorantes, ni saborizantes.

Sus 03 presentaciones más icónicas son: 

PRUNUS - PISCO MACERADO DE CEREZA
Fórmula: Prunus Avium (Cereza), Pisco Quebranta, Clavo de Olor, Miel.
El Alquímico seleccionó al Prunus Avium (Cereza) para crear esta ambrosía, originaria de Mesopotamia, valorada en la antigua Grecia por sus propiedades mágicas, usada por los japoneses para atraer al amor, recreará en ti el dulce atardecer del placer de los sentidos.
CKOLLI - PISCO MACERADO DE CHICHA MORADA
Fórmula: Ckolli (Maíz Morado), Pisco Quebranta, Piña Golden, Canela y Membrillo.
El Alquímico eligió al Ckolli (Maíz Morado) como uno de los elementos, para crear este elixir que surge de las entrañas de los andes que alimenta el cuerpo y el alma; y darte todo el poder de las sensaciones gracias a sus fórmulas místicas.
ZEYLANICUM - PISCO MACERADO DE CANELA
Fórmula: Celian (Canela), Pisco Quebranta, Clavo de Olor y Anís Estrella.
El Alquímico seleccionó al Zeylanicum (Canela), para crear este elixir traído de los lugares más antiguos y místicos del oriente medio, cenit de las artes ocultas y el conocimiento cósmico que hará despertar tus sensaciones paganas.

Escolher a Setwines é investir em exclusividade, confiança e parceria. Deixe que nossos vinhos transformem seus eventos e conquistas corporativas em momentos inesquecíveis!

Name: Anytime Whisky
Description:
At Anytime Whisky, we believe life’s best moments deserve to be celebrated—whether they’re big milestones or simple everyday wins. Our whisky is crafted with care, blending tradition and innovation to create a smooth, rich spirit that’s perfect for any occasion. We want to be a part of those moments, offering you something exceptional to raise a glass with.

Anytime Whisky isn’t just about indulgence or luxury—it’s about connection. It’s about celebrating with the people who matter most, taking a pause from the everyday hustle, and savoring the here and now. Whether you’re enjoying a quiet evening at home or hosting a gathering of friends, our whiskey adds something special to the experience.

We know life doesn’t always go as planned, but that’s what makes those little victories even more meaningful. So why wait for the ‘perfect’ moment? Celebrate now. Celebrate often. With Anytime Whisky, every moment is worth toasting to, whether it’s a job well done, a new adventure, or just the joy of being together.

So here’s to you—and the stories you’ll create. Anytime Whisky is more than a drink; it’s an invitation to celebrate life’s simple pleasures, whenever and wherever they happen. We’re honored to be part of your journey, one glass at a time.

Anytime, Anywhere—raise your glass with Anytime Whisky

At Artesario, our journey begins amidst the sprawling agave fields of Mexico, where the soul of tequila and mezcal takes root. We are not just a company; we are aficionados, explorers, and curators of the finest spirits this ancient land has to offer.

Our story is one of passion, dedication, and an unyielding commitment to preserving the culture and craftsmanship that define tequila and mezcal.

Mission:

Unveiling Perfection
Immersed in Mexico’s cultural tapestry, our company is on an exhilarating quest for the ultimate tequila and mezcal selections. Fueled by a profound appreciation for tradition and craftsmanship, we tirelessly scour the agave fields and distilleries, determined to unearth the pinnacle of these cherished spirits.

Exquisite Curation
Meticulously handpicking only the most exceptional tequila and mezcal varieties, we showcase a refined collection that embodies Mexico’s diverse distillation artistry, catering to enthusiasts and collectors alike.

Cultural Connection
We forge meaningful partnerships with local agave growers and distilleries, honoring ancestral techniques and fostering sustainable practices, thereby preserving Mexico’s cultural legacy while delivering unparalleled authenticity.

Tasteful Exploration
Our immersive tasting experiences and expert guidance unravel the complexities of tequila and mezcal, empowering aficionados to embark on a sensory voyage through the heart of Mexico’s time-honored spirits.

Description:
O Esquadrão do Malte iniciou suas atividades em 2020, na cidade de Criciúma, com a missão de levar bebidas de qualidade aos mais remotos cantos com excelência.

O que começou com a revenda de cervejas para os amigos, se tornou uma distribuidora de bebidas com um catálogo variado, com marcas renomadas de vinhos, destilados e cervejas artesanais, com destaque para a exclusividade das marcas Roleta Russa, Imigração e Barbarella em todo o sul de SC. 

Consideramos cada entrega uma conquista para nós e para os nossos clientes.

Name: Sakhrani Distillery
Description:
Sakhrani is a modern whisky brand rooted in the Blue Zone of Okinawa — a region globally known for longevity, purity, and quiet strength.
We craft bold, small-batch whisky aged in rare Japanese woods, using an exclusive water source drawn from a protected World Heritage site.

Our spirits reflect who we are: intentional, precise, and deeply connected to the land that shapes them.

At Sakhrani, we don’t just create whisky.
We bottle legacy — one sip, one story at a time.

Our pillars:
– Female-led, family-founded
– Crafted in small batches
– Born in the heart of Okinawa’s longevity region
– Exclusive water source from a protected heritage site
– Focused on sustainability, storytelling, and innovation
– Made to be shared, not just sipped

Name: No.1 Beverages UK
Description:
No.1 was launched in 2007 and comes from the beautiful town of Vänersborg, Sweden. Vänersborg provided our founder Glenn Ström with the inspiration to start distilling spirits. The beautiful surroundings of Vänersborg and the pure water of Lake Vänern form the heart of the No.1 range.

Just come as you are, No.1 offers everybody a drink of choice. If it’s a vodka, a gin or a rum – we have it. 

We only use the finest Swedish grain sourced from local farms for the distillation of our No.1 range of premium Vodka and Gin. Distilled three times using the purest water sourced from Lake Vänern, the No.1 spirits range is uncomplicated and beautifully simple. 


No.1 is great for sharing – responsibly. With your friends and family. Great for indoor and outdoor parties and dinners. Skål!

Name: Cosmic Vodka
Description: Cosmic Vodka is a premium, Swedish-made spirit designed for cocktail enthusiasts who seek more than just great taste. Infused with butterfly pea flower (himmelsärt), it creates a unique, color-changing experience that adds a visual dimension to any drink. Whether shifting from deep indigo to bright lavender or fuchsia, Cosmic Vodka delivers an extraordinary and interactive element to cocktails, making every serve a conversation piece. As the first of its kind in Europe, our mission is to provide a show-stopping ingredient that stands out both in flavor and aesthetics, perfect for innovative bartenders and trend-conscious consumers alike.

Through Alcozon.ge, customers and partners gain access to a comprehensive portfolio that includes:

	•	 Cocktail Ingredients – professional mixers, syrups, and tonics
	•	 Wine and Sparkling Wine – from globally recognized vineyards
	•	 Non-Alcoholic Beverages – sodas, tonics, and zero-alcohol options

Our platform is designed to provide a secure, efficient, and user-friendly experience for both retail and corporate clients. In addition to single-bottle sales, Alcozon offers:

	•	 Ready-made cocktail and wine sets for different occasions

Implantées sur une véritable mosaïque de terroirs, les caves adhérentes produisent des vins de Bordeaux, Bordeaux supérieur, Côtes de Bordeaux, Ste Foy Bordeaux, Entre-deux-Mers, mais aussi Bergerac, Pécharmant, Côtes de Duras et IGP Vin de Pays de l’Atlantique…

Name: BRABO
Description:
BRABO is the bold new Brazilian Spirit redefining what it means to drink with meaning.

Created for those who seek authenticity, sophistication, and unapologetic flavor, BRABO is more than a spirit — it's a statement.
Distilled in Brazil and rooted in centuries of craft, BRABO blends tradition with edge, elegance with rebellion.

Born from Alchemy Spirits LLC, our mission is to bring the fearless energy of Brazil to every cocktail glass in the world.

Be BRAVE. Be BOLD. Be BRABO.

Name: Nolia Drinks
Description:
Meet Nolia.

A naturally light aperitif made with real magnolia petals, floral and bright with a gentle bitter twist. Blended in small batches using clean, carefully chosen ingredients.

Enjoyed in the glass or used to softly elevate food, from citrus desserts to roasted fruit.

Light in spirit, and made to savour.

Name: El Maximon
Description:
El Maximon er en skattet og tilbedt helgen, som har sin oprindelse fra den okkulte mayakultur. Det siges, at hvis man ofrer til El Maximon, så vil han til gengæld sørge for, at ens ønsker bliver opfyldt.

El Maximon bliver ofte afbildet med jakkesæt og hat, men bærer også i nogle traditioner bandana og solbriller. Han er dermed en højst aktuel figur at ofre til –også i dag.

Vores fortolkning af legenden El Maximon er at skabe en sanselig atmosfære og et magisk cocktailunivers, hvor hver af vores cocktails er omhyggeligt skabt, for at bringe dig en eksplosion af veldocerede smagsoplevelser, i en hyldest til El Maximons ånd.

Vi håber, at I vil tage del i ofringen og derigennem opnå.

SALUD, DINERO Y AMOR

Our patent pending models are used to valuate portfolios, predict pricing, forecast customer demand and more. Name: Edis6n Vodka
Description:
The brand inspired by Thomas Edison - Inventor of the Lightbulb, offers a unique and smooth tasting Artisan Vodka, distilled in UK and hand mixed to perfection.

Edis6n Vodka is the worlds first brand to use a fully illuminated bottle. In addition our bottles are handblown and decorated with great care and attention to detail, while using less glass, making our product Eco friendly. Each bottle contains its own unique light that runs the full length of the bottle via a 19cm inner glass tube, which can be turned on-off or flash at the push of a button. 

Behind this amazing brand are a unique team that strive for perfection and innovation and will keep bringing to you products like you have never seen before. Designed and created in 2021 when our team noticed a gap in the market and the idea came to light....Literally!!

Name: Rio Agave
Description:
Our Mexican roots run deep. That's why we created a beverage that could capture the essence of those roots in a single sip. Rio Agave Sparkling Ranch Water is made with masterfully crafted tequila from a seven-decade-old, family-owned, distillery in Jalisco, Mexico, combined with the freshest, Texas-grown fruit flavors. This produces the naturally refreshing and satisfying taste that drink lovers everywhere can appreciate and celebrate. Just crack open a sleek can of Rio Agave and savor the refreshing flavor profile. Here's to making life just a tad bit sweeter. Salud, friends!

Our Refreshing Flavors Include:

Rio Grande Valley Texas Lime

The perfect balance of sweet and tangy, this bright, bold citrus flavor has what it takes to beat the Texas heat and keep you feeling positively sublime.

Panhandle Cherry

Bursting with the sweetness of ripe, sun-soaked cherries, this flavor is a fresh take on a classic and will keep you chill even when Panhandle temps start to sizzle.

Fredericksburg Peach

Infused with the flavor of Fredericksburg peaches harvested during their peak ripeness, this flavor makes summer days last a little longer and makes memories just a tad sweeter.

Spicy Texas Watermelon

Sweetness with a zing, watermelon with a punch creates a flavor profile that will keep your taste buds on their toes and have em’ dancing the Texas two-step!

It is an original and patented recipe combined with a modern production cycle.

Name: Lunaire Liquors
Description:
Lunaire Liquors,

Maak kennis met de prachtige combinaties van luxe likeuren met een rijke en explosieve smaak.
Door de verhouding van de smaken met de juiste toevoegingen, ontstaat er een verrassingseffect die u nog nooit eerder heeft gevoeld. 

Ons eerste product, Mango Midnight, is een samenstelling van Mango en Munt. Door deze tropische en frisse smaken combinatie proeft u niet allen luxe, premium likeur maar een hele beleving. Bij de eerste slok is het alsof u mango's aan het plukken bent in Oost-Azië.
Na de tweede slok bent u in eens in Engeland munt aan het plukken van de eerste muntplant. 
Na de 3e slok bent u op de maan, want dat is waar Lunaire u heen brengt. 

Bezoek onze website en bestel onze best-seller vandaag nog.

Name: DESTILERÍA DEL MAR PERÚ
Description:
La Destilería Cuatro Ases es una destilería artesanal fundada en 2020 en Santa Cruz, Bolivia. Dedicada al
arte de la destilación en pequeños lotes, producimos meticulosamente solo 250 botellas por lote,
asegurando una calidad excepcional y atención al detalle en cada gota.
Como una marca orgullosamente boliviana, hemos crecido de manera constante en el mercado local y
ahora estamos fijando nuestra mirada en expandirnos más allá de las fronteras nacionales, aquí es donde
nace Destilería del Mar SAC para introducir nuestros productos en Perú. Nuestro compromiso con la
excelencia nos impulsa a invertir continuamente en aumentar nuestra capacidad de producción, mientras
preservamos la autenticidad y la superior artesanía que definen nuestras bebidas.
Nuestro portafolio cuenta actualmente con cuatro marcas distintivas: DHARMA GIN, un gin premium
refinado y equilibrado para el paladar exigente; GANESHA GIN, una mezcla exótica y aromática inspirada
en la riqueza de los botánicas locales; LICOR CHAIRÚ, una expresión única de sabores bolivianos; y ESPEJO
DE UYUNI VODKA, un tributo a la pureza y grandeza del salar más grande del mundo.
Con entusiasmo, estamos preparando la introducción de dos nuevas adiciones a nuestra línea: un ron
premium y un licor de hoja de coca, que muestran aún más la rica herencia y los diversos sabores de
Bolivia. En Destilería Cuatro Ases, no solo estamos elaborando bebidas alcohólicas, estamos creando
experiencias que encarnan tradición, innovación y pasión!

Here at Marabou Club we pride ourselves on producing the finest Vodka Sodas but without the sugar, sweeteners and colours that many of our competitors use.

Premium Vodka, Soda Water and Natural Flavours. Simple.

Grab a can and let the good times flow!

Name: Horology House Spirits
Description:
Horology House Spirits was founded by two figures deeply rooted in the world of fine watchmaking and the creative minds behind BOKEN Watches.

United by a shared obsession with detail, craft, and the rhythm of time, they saw a natural connection between horology and distilling. Both worlds demand precision. Both reward patience. And both create objects of meaning; designed not to be rushed, but to be appreciated.

So began Horology House Spirits with a mission to distil the spirit of horology itself.

Our first expression, being released at the end of August 2025, is crafted in small batches, non-chill filtered, and naturally coloured, it embodies everything we admire in great watches: character, complexity, and timeless appeal.

This is whisky made by watch people.
We call it the "unofficial pour of the watch world".

Name: RAER Alliance
Description:
RAER Alliance is the French partner of RAER Scotch Whisky LTD
                                                                                                                   
Become part of a treasured, historic relationship spanning over 700 years, which still exists today, between the Kingdom of France and Bonnie Scotland. Celebrating the history, nature, culture and creativity of both nations, our friends from RAER Alliance have joined The Domaine National de Chambord to bring you unique Scottish spirits aged in vintage oak casks lovingly hand crafted from our very own forest. Each stave is air dried among the blossoms in the heart of the estate for two years and assembled by French coopers to create the highest quality casks. These special spirits produce an exceptional flavour which only improves when shared with loved ones. 
 
“Long live La Belle France, and long live the beautiful RAER Alliance!”

Name: DomJuly's GmbH
Description:
Wir sind DomJuly‘s eine aufsteigende Marke, seit März 2025 vertreiben wir unseren Likör. Selbst aus der Gastronomie mit einer 18 jährigen Erfahrung und den Rückmeldungen von mehreren 100 tausend Menschen, die uns dazu bewegen, diesen Likör großflächig zu verkaufen. 
Durch die steigende Nachfrage und die positiven Rückmeldungen konnten wir unsere Firma „DomJuly‘s“ gründen und unsere Marke patentieren. 
Nun sind wir hier, als aufstrebendes Start-Up im Großhandel für Getränke. 
Doch die Zukunft hält noch viel mehr bereit, denn DomJulys‘s sollte weitaus mehr Menschen erreichen, freut euch, auf die alkoholfreie Limo von DomJuly‘s. 
Wir stehen für: Qualität vor Quantität, Menschlichkeit vor Konsummissbrauch, feste, zuverlässige Geschäftspartnerschaften. 

Sprechen Sie uns gerne für mögliche Kooperationen oder Belieferung an.

In 1984, Dimitri launched Dimitri Wine & Spirits, Inc. Description:
le mix-marketing cadeaux & événementiel pour les professionnels
Communiquer, Promouvoir, Stimuler et Fidéliser


Cadeaux-mix est une agence conseil en cadeaux d'entreprise, promotionnels, stimulation et d'affaires et en prestations événementielles, pour communiquer, promouvoir, stimuler et fidéliser.


Le mix-marketing cadeaux

Cadeaux-mix revendique une extension du mix-marketing produit classique, le mix-marketing cadeaux & événementiel, qui prend en compte l'évolution des technologies WEB 2.0 et les modifications des comportements d'achat de plus en plus opportunistes et versatiles.


L'image de marque adopte de nouveaux médias

La "publicité institutionnelle de papa" perd de son efficacité pour se voir préférer des pubs locales ou web, des événements virtuels sur les réseaux sociaux et, aujourd'hui, l'acheteur attachera plus d'importance aux commentaires dénichés sur un forum qu'à un argumentaire détaillé dans une publicité.


Pourquoi offrir un produit de Marque, "griffé" ?

Offrir un cadeau portant la signature d'une marque accroît la valeur perçue du geste et garantit un excellent impact sur le destinataire : vous êtes ainsi certain de communiquer une image positive qui renforce votre propre image de marque avec une garantie de qualité.

Ce sont ces préoccupations pour communiquer, promouvoir, stimuler et fidéliser qui ont guidé le choix des marques que nous vous présentons officiellement.


Nos marques de champagne, vins & spiritueux

A.de Luze - Maison de vins de Bordeaux, Champagne De Venoge, Champagne Deutz, Delas -  Vins de la vallée du Rhône, Grands Vins de Gironde, Champagne Lamotte, Champagne Jacquart, Champagne Montaudon.
