delivery to hotels, bars and restaurants; 

- A retail shop: wine cellar, cold beers, spirits.

Name: Wohlfert Craft Distilling
Description:
They say you can't escape your past so why not honor it?
Prohibition created an opportunity for our great grandparents to turn their successful bakeries into more "spirited" business. Wohlfert Distillery proudly builds on their legacy. We tease the "bakers mix" of grain, sugar, and yeast into small batch, hand crafted product for adventurous spirits.
John & Karen Wohlfert, Distillers

Name: WEINundALT
Description:
Entdecke die Welt des Weins : Ein Glas, ein unvergessliches Erlebnis ! 

 Discover the Fascinating World of Wines! 

Welcome to our page dedicated to the universe of wines! Here, we share our passion and knowledge about this ancient art, and we are excited to have you as part of this community. Here in our store, we believe that wine is much more than just a beverage. It represents history, culture, and precious moments shared with loved ones. We want to be a part of your celebrations, special dinners, and toasts to life's small pleasures.

Follow our page and stay updated on the latest news, unmissable offers, and events that promise to surprise even the most demanding palates.

Celebrate life with the finest wines with us !

Name: MFW Wine Co.
Description:
At MFW, with everything we do, we strive to advocate for the interests of those we work with and those we work for.

To accomplish this, we have created a company founded on the principle of empathy, where the needs of our producers, customers, and employees are always put first since, without them, we have nothing.

We work for the producers we believe in, who strive to make real, terroir-driven wines, serving as their megaphone to the market so they can continue to make their products for the long term.

We work with our customers, trying to understand their needs and offering products they feel inspired to sell so they may continue to have a viable business.

We work with our employees, helping them pass on these guiding principles to those who share our beliefs, so they can achieve success, as we are their partners in mutually successful endeavors.

MFW operates in New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Washington, DC. You can also find some of our producers in other markets throughout the United States and Canada through our local distributor partners.

Name: Ever Grand Group LLC
Description: Founded in 2022, and headquartered in New York, NY, Ever Grand Group is an independent importer of alcohol beverage products from China. The Company is the exclusive U.S. importer of Snow Beer, the best-selling-beer brand in the world.

Name: ТОО Казахстанская пивная компания
Description:
В 2005 году было приято решение о создании «Казахстанской пивной компании», с целью распространения и продажи пива и других алкогольных напитков, сервиса и розничной торговли. К этому времени в портфеле есть уже такие, известные и пользующиеся успехом во всем мире, пивные бренды как «StellaArtois», «Hoegaarden», «Leffe», природная столовая вода «SPA» и более 50 наименований вин со всего света. Также мы являемся дистрибюторами портфеля Bacardi-Martini на территории Казахстана. 
 2008 году портфель пополняется: норвежской природной бутилированной водой «VOSS», пользующийся популярностью у знаменитостей со всего мира, немецким пивом «Spaten». 
Важным событием 2009 года, становится запуск завода по производству пива — «LineBrew» в предгорной зоне города Каскелен, Алматинской области, где начался процесс варки светлого пива «LineBrewLager» и нефильтрованного «LineBrewWheat», созданного в соответствии с древними бельгийскими традициями и изготавливающегося из натуральных высококачественных компонентов и сырья.
Основными городами Казахстана являлись Алматы, Астана представительства в регионах Атырау, Актау, Актюбинск, Кызылорда, Усть – Каменогорск, развита сеть дистрибуции в системах off-trade, on-trade, отели, частные компании, «кейтеринг» - выездные банкеты. В реализуемый пакет винной продукции уже входят такие страны как: «Италия», «Аргентина», «Чили», «Новая Зеландия», «Испания», «Франция», «ЮАР», «Калифорния», «Австралия», количество наименований выросло уже за сотню.
Сегодня «КПК» является одним из ведущих поставщиков элитных алкогольных и безалкогольных напитков на рынок Казахстана. За 13 лет работы мы собрали пакет сильных премиальных брендов известных мировых производителей. Успешная деятельность позволила создать репутацию надежного партнера. Доверие поставщиков позволяет нам заключать долгосрочные эксклюзивные контракты.

Name: Weinimport Milanko
Description:
Weinimport Milanko is a wine wholesale company based out Unterföhring, Germany. Our main business is distributing wine to retail and Horeca.
Since 2006 our goal is to inspire our customers with high quality wines in different price segments.

Name: Nu Africa Cash and Carry Eswatini
Description: Nu Africa Cash and Carry (Nu Africa) is an offshoot of Nu Africa Duty Free. Nu Africa primary sells liquor and other goods to the consumer. Currently, the company is established in Eswatini and sells in the BLNS region (Botswana, Lesotho, Namibia, South Africa and Swaziland)

Name: Vins Vibrants
Description:
Swiss Wine distribution company established in Geneva in 2024.
We work throughout Switzerland with both professionals and private clients, providing an exclusive selection of niche and high end wines

Name: Craft Spirits Company
Description: We leven in een markt waar het steeds meer gaat om kwaliteit dan kwantiteit. Hier willen ook wij ons steentje aan bijdragen! Het is onze missie om gedistilleerde dranken te importeren die een eerlijke herkomst hebben en gemaakt zijn met passie, ambacht en kunde. Kortom: Craft Spirits Company gelooft in dranken met een ziel.

Name: Coco Loco Hard Seltzer
Description:
Coco Loco, made of the Wonderfruit.

Kindness is at the heart of Coco Loco — it's who we are. Our products are all-natural, free from nasties, and made to be as clean as possible. We will always be positive and inclusive.

Coco Loco is committed to kindness — not just to people, but to the planet. We minimise our footprint through low-carbon emissions, infinitely recyclable packaging, Australian ingredients, and local manufacturing.

Our Purpose drives everything we do: To make great products, for a good life, while being kinder to people and planet. We continuously strive to be better by supporting local businesses, putting people before profit, creating opportunities for all, and advocating for thoughtful drinking habits through our Drink Better mission.

We're on a mission to encourage everyone to drink better.
We know this mission may seem counterintuitive for an alcohol brand — but that’s exactly why it matters. While many in the industry focus on selling more, we stand for something different: drinking better, not more.

We believe in thoughtful drinking habits and are proud to be an alcohol brand that openly advocates against the excessive consumption of alcohol. Our goal is simple: we want people to truly enjoy Coco Loco — sip it, savour it, don't overdo it. And we will put our money where our mouth is, we are putting people before profit, by always encouraging responsible enjoyment.

Beyond how people drink, we also care about what they drink. Too many categories are filled with cheap, mass-produced options that prioritise cost over quality. We’re changing that by creating better beverages — conscientiously made, high-quality drinks that offer a more considered choice.

Name: Vaudville
Description:
Originally inspired by home brews from wild growing fruits in Transylvania, Vaudville now produces its flavours using the best varieties of fresh whole fruit from all over the world to bring you joy, authenticity and character in every glass.

When you drink Vaudville you know you are drinking world class spirits made with expertise and without any chemicals such as flavourings or colourings. There are over 123 berries in each one of our bottles. Sip responsibly and enjoy!



Sip responsibly and enjoy!

Name: Glenor Cask Company
Description:
Glenor Cask Company, a subsidiary of Rare Whisky Holdings, connects passionate whisky lovers from around the globe with the opportunity to own a cask of Scotch whisky heritage.

We have an amazing lounge and tasting room in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong where we invite our clients and buyers to learn more about cask investments, bottling opportunities and how to preserve their wealth with cask whisky.

Name: Shy Guy Beverages
Description: Shy Guy was born on Sydney’s Lower North Shore by three good mates passionate about brewing up good times and great conversation!

Name: Top Vinum
Description:
Somos una empresa mexicana dedicada a la importación y venta de vino de selectas marcas nacionales e internacionales. 

Contamos con una cuidada selección de vinos de marcas en exclusiva para nuestro país, con el objetivo de acercar el mundo del vino al consumidor mexicano. A través de nuestra tienda en línea www.topvinum.com ofrecemos un proceso de compra fácil y amigable, junto con un servicio de excelente calidad y garantía al mejor precio.

Name: SPECTUS Wines
Description:
SPECTUS was founded in 1997, with the purpose of importing and promoting selected fine wines, premium spirits, exquisite chocolates and delicacies like Foie Gras, to Cyprus. From the beginning, our guidance is SPECTUS team’s passion, as well as our valued associates – a value that permeates through everything we do here at SPECTUS.

The experienced team of wine and spirit professionals of our company, meticulously taste and select the wines we represent. Based on strict criteria, we examine the character of each wine and spirit, taking into account the producer's personal style, the wine quality and of course, the consumer’s preferences and trends of the season.

Our values:
S for Specialisation, On the products and services we offer
P for Passion, For quality and product knowledge
E for Enthusiasm, In promoting and selling our fine products and services
C for Commitment, Towards our products and customers
T for Training, Our customers on how to best enjoy fine wines and spirits in a clever and responsible manner
U for Uncompromising, Quality standards
S for Service, Our customers needs with the most complete range of products and services in our country

Come and discover all our products!

Name: Masskrugflasche GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei der Masskrugflasche GmbH, wo Fantasie auf Passion trifft und Berufserfahrung auf die Kunst der Spirituosenherstellung stößt.

Unser Schaffen ist geprägt von der Liebe zur Kreativität und dem Streben nach Perfektion.

In unserem Team vereinen sich einfallsreiche Köpfe, die eine gemeinsame Vision teilen: außergewöhnliche Spirituosen zu kreieren, die die Sinne beflügeln.

Jeder von uns ist ein Künstler auf seinem Gebiet – sei es das Mischen von Aromen, das Entwickeln innovativer Konzepte oder das Handwerk der Destillation.

Wir brennen förmlich für die Welt der Spirituosen und lassen diese Leidenschaft in jeden Tropfen unserer einzigartigen Kreationen einfließen.

Unsere Berufserfahrung erstreckt sich über Jahre intensiver Arbeit und stetiger Weiterentwicklung, was jede Flasche zu einem Meisterwerk macht.

Tauchen Sie ein in die Welt unserer Marke KRUGMEISTER, wo jeder Schluck eine Geschichte erzählt.

Cheers!

Name: De Druivenstamper
Description:
Met De Druivenstamper lever ik wijnen aan zowel particulieren als de horeca. Van een mooie fles voor thuis tot een volledig assortiment voor een restaurant. Of het nu gaat om een uniek relatiegeschenk voor bedrijven of een persoonlijk pakket voor een speciale gelegenheid. Ik zorg dat de juiste wijn altijd op de juiste plek belandt.

Daarnaast deel ik mijn passie door het organiseren van wijncursussen en proeverijen. Op een gezellige en toegankelijke manier laat ik mensen ontdekken hoe veelzijdig en bijzonder wijn kan zijn. Voor mij draait het niet om ingewikkelde regels, maar om genieten en beleven.

Om die liefde voor wijn nóg dichterbij te brengen, deel ik elke twee weken op woensdag een wijntip via WhatsApp. Zo krijgt iedereen een vleugje inspiratie voor een nieuwe fles of een verrassende combinatie, gewoon direct op de telefoon.

Mijn missie? Wijn leuk, laagdrempelig en verbindend maken. Want wijn is er om samen van te genieten.

Name: Direct Whisky Co
Description: Welcome to Direct Whisky Co, a distinguished firm catering to astute investors in the Fine Wine and Rare Whisky markets. With a strong family foundation and operations spanning across Asia and Europe, we are dedicated to providing professional-grade services and strategic insights. Our curated selection of premium offerings reflects our commitment to excellence. Partner with Direct Whisky Co to navigate the world of alternative investments with confidence and expertise

Name: Sebastiaan Wijnimport
Description:
Sebastiaan Wijnimport is een jonge, onafhankelijke en dynamische wijnimporteur.
 
Of dat u nu op zoek bent naar een relatiegeschenk om indruk mee te maken, of een sprankelende wijn voor uw horecagelegenheid. 
 
“U weet zeker dat u de gewenste wijn bij ons zult aantreffen. Want zo persoonlijk als uw smaak, zo persoonlijk is ook ons wijnadvies”
 
Wij kopen onze wijn direct van de wijnmaker,waarmee we een goede relatie onderhouden, dit is van cruciaal belang zodat wij u van goede achtergrond informatie kunnen voorzien over de wijnen.
Wij houden van korte lijnen en persoonlijk contact met onze afnemers als ook met onze toeleveranciers zodat we snel en slagvaardig kunnen reageren op de wensen van onze klanten. Sebastiaan Wijnimport is flexibel, zelfs buiten kantooruren. Ons team is klein, waardoor wij u een uitstekende en persoonlijke aandacht kunnen geven.

Name: Rouffignac & Lafont
Description:
Oenologists by profession and winemakers by passion, Julie Rouffignac and Gérald Lafont have launched their craft wine company having the ambition to put forward the diversity of their terroirs.

Having grown up between the Mediterranean, the lavender fields, and the red pebbles of the Rhone, Julie and Gérald are fine experts of their territories and terroirs, this is why they are able to make the best out of it. Today, they combine their savoir-faire to offer qualitative and environmental-friendly wines in Chateauneuf-du-Pape, Rasteau, Côtes-du-Rhône Villages Signargues, Tavel, Lirac, and Coteaux-d’aix-en-provence.

Consultant in oenology for important wine companies, Gérald Lafont is a careful listener of his clients; he combines technique and professionalism by offering balanced wines made of fineness, elegancy and freshness. 

On her side, Julie Rouffignac has worked with all types of wine companies and seen all aspects of the sector. With a great sense of adaptability and empathy, she knows how to reach all kind of customers. By the past, she has taught playfully wine tasting to clients, has advised them, and selected wines that were the best suited for them.

Trustworthy, solution and people oriented, Julie and Gérald, are committed to produce wines of excellence in the respect of the environment and their terroirs.

Name: Tequila Casafina
Description:
En un mundo de ruidos, CASAFINA eligió ser la voz de lo real y de lo vivido.

Nacimos con una visión distinta: no queremos repetir el eco del tequila, sino crear algo propio. Somos originarios de Arandas, Jalisco, donde nuestro terruño nos enseña la esencia de lo natural.

El tequila suele estar asociado con grandes celebraciones ruidosas. Hoy, una nueva generación busca momentos de calidad, donde lo simple y lo sincero son los verdaderos protagonistas.

CASAFINA es para ellos. Para quienes entienden que lo fino no es superficial: es cuidado, es intención. Para quienes saben que el verdadero lujo está en elegir bien con quién brindar.
Nuestra casa abre sus puertas con una llave especial: la del momento presente. Al girarla, se revela una escena distinta. Dos leones custodian la entrada, no con fiereza, sino con una mirada que invita. Aquí no hay puertas cerradas; hay encuentros. Hay calma. Hay verdad.

Cada botella de CASAFINA es una celebración de lo auténtico. No necesita escenario ni reflectores. Su elegancia está en lo que no presume: en su suavidad, en su fuerza y en su capacidad de acompañar sin protagonismo.

En esta casa, el tequila no se toma por inercia; se comparte con sentido. No se bebe para olvidar; se brinda para recordar.

Name: Valhalla Spirits
Description:
The Legend of Valhalla Vodka
Some winters ago, adventurous hikers took shelter in a cave near the sacred volcano Fagradalsfjall, dormant for over 6,000 years. What they found there would alter their destiny and change the vodka spirits industry forever. Hidden at the back of the cave near a Nordic ceremonial site were the remains of a goatskin bound bundle of black bottles. These bottles appeared to contain an alcohol similar to vodka and a glass and metal contraption filled with crushed volcanic rock. Realizing their find, they took the bottles and rocks back with them. But not before raising a toast to the Gods...“Valhalla!... See you on the other side.”

Patent-pending Volcanic Rock Filtration.

Valhalla Vodka starts with Swedish Winter Wheat distilled and filtered three (3) times, starting with lava rock (from Icelandic volcanos). The porous lava rocks act as a sponge or filter where impurities stay in the rock, leaving a cleaner liquid behind. Valhalla Vodka continuously imports new lava rock from Fagradalsfjall to replenish this patent-pending process.

The Power of Fagradalsfjall in Every Botttle.

 Each bottle of Valhalla Vodka is filtered through ancient sacred Icelandic volcano rock atop Fagradalsfjall prior to a triple filtration process. This process changes the spirit towards its signature "velvet smooth" taste.

Produced and Bottled by Doundrins Distilling, Cottage Grove, WI

https://www.facebook.com/valhallavodka

https://www.instagram.com/valhallavodka/

Name: Le Vin en direct
Description:
Een gepassioneerde denkwijze

Waar Jules Verne in 80 dagen rond de wereld reisde, is Le Vin en direct nog steeds niet uitgereisd. Onze speurtocht naar kwaliteit duurt al ruim 20 jaar en gaat continu voort. Niet alleen zoeken naar de beste producenten maar ook het onderhouden van de relatie, proeven van de verschillende oogstjaren en het volgen van beslissingen met betrekking tot de wijngaarden behoort tot de kerntaken van een betrokken importeur. U vindt bij ons niet alleen de top importeurschappen zoals Domaine de la Romanée Conti en Bodegas Vega Sicilia maar wij maken ons ook sterk voor die producenten die nog niet de erkenning genieten, maar wel met dezelfde passie werken en kwaliteit leveren.

Na een intensieve carrière als kok en restaurant-eigenaar is het weer al meer dan een kwart eeuw geleden dat Henk Maas het wijn importeurschap oprichtte in zijn geboortestreek. Wat voorzichtig ontstond uit zijn passie en liefde voor de wijn is een prachtige vertegenwoordiging van wijnproducenten geworden die steeds blijft evolueren. Natuurlijk zijn er wijnen én op dronk. Doch blijft zijn eeuwige zoektocht naar kwaliteit hier niet bij. Proeven kan hij als geen ander en in terroirlanden zijn zeker nog vondsten te doen....Klanten blijven verrassen is de boodschap, maar nooit ten koste van kwaliteit! En wanneer Henk niet proeft, dan vind je hem steevast in de nabijheid van een circuit, U raadt het al...racen is zijn tweede liefde na een glas Romanée-Conti!

"Het leven is te kort om slechte wijn te drinken!"

Name: Racimo AB
Description:
Racimo AB är ett familjeägt importföretag med visionen att introducera ukrainska kvalitetsprodukter på den svenska marknaden.

Bolaget grundades 2019, och efter flera års arbete med att bygga relationer, skapa struktur och bana väg för något helt nytt, nådde våra första vinflaskor kunder i Sverige den 4 juli 2023.

Vi blev det första företaget i Sverige att importera ukrainska viner, öl och andra alkoholhaltiga drycker och är idag stolta över att erbjuda det bredaste sortimentet av ukrainska varor på Systembolaget.

Med passion för både kvalitet och kultur bygger vi broar mellan Ukraina och Sverige, och strävar alltid efter att ge våra kunder unika upplevelser.

 Racimo AB – A Better Idea Always.

Racimo AB arbetar direkt med flera av de ledande ukrainska vinproducenterna som står för kvalitet, innovation och unika druvsorter. 

Biologist Craft Winery – en modern vinmakare med fokus på naturliga metoder och småskalighet.

Koblevo – en av landets största och mest kända vingårdar.

Kolonist – boutiqueproducent i södra Ukraina med premiumprofil.

Oreanda – klassiska viner med bred tillgänglighet.

Cikera – innovativa mjöd och fruktdrycker.

Chizay Winery – ikonisk producent i Transkarpatien, känd för terroirdrivna kvalitetsviner och internationell export.

Bayadera Group – stor aktör med bred portfölj och global räckvidd.

MOVA Brewing – modernt ukrainskt bryggeri som förnyar ölkulturen.

Genom dessa samarbeten kan vi erbjuda svenska konsumenter det bredaste sortimentet av ukrainska drycker på Systembolaget, och bygga broar mellan Ukrainas terroir och svenska vin- och ölälskare.

Name: Carpaty Wine Society
Description:
A dynamic and innovative company founded in Romania by a team of young entrepreneurs with a passion for wine and a wealth of experience in the industry.
Our mission is to introduce the delicious and diverse wines, spirits and botteled waters of the Carpathian Basin to markets outside of Europe, and to help establish the region as a premier destination for wine lovers around the world.

The wines we sell come from wineries that produce and bottle their wines in centuries-old wine-growing regions. The wineries and their wines that make up our portfolio come from Romania, Hungary, Slovakia and Croatia.

The grape cultivation covers more than 200,000 hectares in the Caprathian Basin, where the unique climate and soil composition anable the creation of high quality, award-winning wines.

Our goal is to help increase the international recognition of the region and to make the special and historical flavors here available to wine lovers.

Originally, we are hop growers, in that capacity we bring our knowledge to breweries and form the link between our growers and brewers. In this role, we also seek connection with beer lovers, who ultimately consume the hops of our growers.

Together with our hop growers, we constantly ensure a high-quality product. Quality that comes from how the plant is grown, harvested and processed into a product with which the brewery brews beer.

Read all about us at hollandshophuis.com

Name: Orbis Vini
Description:
Orbis Vini ist eine spezialisierte Weinagentur mit Schwerpunkt auf dem Import und Vertrieb hochwertiger portugiesischer und georgischer Weine sowie Spezialitäten – mit Fokus auf den B2B-Bereich.

Wir beliefern Gastronomie, Fachhandel und Wiederverkäufer mit sorgfältig ausgewählten Weinen, die durch Qualität, Charakter und Herkunft überzeugen. Dabei arbeiten wir eng mit handverlesenen Weingütern zusammen, die unsere Leidenschaft für authentische Weinerlebnisse teilen.

Neben unserem B2B-Geschäft betreiben wir eine kleine, feine Vinothek in der Mainzer Neustadt, in der auch Privatkund:innen herzlich willkommen sind. Hier laden wir ein, die Exotik georgischer und die Vielfalt portugiesischer Weine in entspannter Atmosphäre zu entdecken.

Name: The Pembrokeshire Cider Co.
Description:
Step into a world where the rich tapestry of history intertwines with the artistry of cider-making. Croeso i'r Pembrokeshire Cider Company, a micro-brewery nestled in the heart of Wales, paying homage to the storied past of Pembroke Castle and the captivating historical figures that shaped the town of Pembroke itself.

Immerse yourself in the captivating saga of Pembroke Castle, a formidable fortress that has withstood the test of time for over nine centuries. Picture yourself walking in the footsteps of medieval knights, Welsh princes, and noble families who left an indelible mark on this legendary stronghold. At the Pembrokeshire Cider Company, we draw inspiration from this captivating history to craft ciders that embody the essence of this noble heritage.

Raise a glass to the brave William Marshal, the legendary knight and Earl of Pembroke, whose gallantry and chivalry have become the stuff of legends. Experience the bold and robust flavours of our Marshal's Reserve cider, a fitting tribute to his enduring legacy.

Discover the legacy of Henry VII, the first monarch of the Tudor dynasty, born on the 28th of January 1457, within the walls of Pembroke Castle. Immerse yourself in the royal intrigue and enjoy the regal notes of our Henry VII cider, a tribute to his pivotal role in reshaping the course of English history.

Uncover the spirit of resilience so cherished by the Welsh people, as we reflect upon the eventful times of Oliver Cromwell. In 1648, Cromwell's forces laid siege to Pembroke Castle during the English Civil War, leaving a mark on the castle's history. It is with admiration for our indomitable Welsh spirit that we present Cromwell 1648 cider, a bold and spirited blend that pays homage to the courage of our Welsh ancestors during that turbulent era.

Name: ABVALCO
Description:
ABVALCO is Turkey's largest importer of alcoholic beverages, with a focus on premium Russian spirits. Since our inception, we have expanded to include a diverse range of high-quality products from around the world, ensuring consumers have access to the best international beverages. Our portfolio features premium vodka, gin, whiskey, brandy, tequila, liqueurs, and beer, all crafted from the finest ingredients and produced using advanced technologies.
ABVALCO’s commitment to quality and excellence is reflected in our rigorous production standards and innovative approaches to distribution. Our products are featured in over 800 Carrefour supermarkets and numerous regional distributors, making us a trusted name in the industry. We take pride in our unique product offerings, including our flagship vodka lines, crafted from the purest water and finest grains.

Our mission is to bring the rich flavors and traditions of alcoholic beverages from around the world to the Turkish market, promoting a culture of premium beverage enjoyment. Join us as we continue to expand our product range and reach new heights in the world of premium alcoholic beverages.

Name: Zii Wines (Zii Group s.r.o.)
Description: Jsme rodinná firma, bráchové David a Lukáš Strýčkovi, kteří se rozhodli svoji vášeň pro víno posunout zase o kus dál, a tak jsme se začali věnovat dovozu pečlivě vybraných italských vín z většiny italských vinařských regionů a to jak těch notoricky známých, tak i pro vás třeba zatím nepoznaných. Víno milujeme, a proto se můžete spolehnout, že vám přinášíme to nejlepší, neboť jsme všechna vína osobně nachutnali, potkali se s vinaři a víme tak přesně, co vám nabízíme.

Name: Vinonia OG
Description:
cken Sie die faszinierende Welt edler Weine bei VINONIA, Ihrem exklusiven Wein Onlineshop und Wein Marktplatz in Österreich. Tauchen Sie ein in eine einzigartige Auswahl erlesener Tropfen und bestellen Sie bequem Ihre Lieblingsweine für besondere Anlässe oder einfach zum Genuss in gemütlicher Runde.

Unsere Mission bei VINONIA ist es, die Leidenschaft für Wein mit Ihnen zu teilen und Ihnen ein unvergleichliches Einkaufserlebnis zu bieten. Wir verstehen, dass die Suche nach dem perfekten Wein manchmal mühsam sein kann, aber mit unserer breiten Palette sorgfältig ausgewählter Weine aus den renommiertesten Weinregionen wird Ihre Suche zum Vergnügen. Ob Sie ein erfahrener Weinkenner oder ein neugieriger Einsteiger sind, bei uns finden Sie genau das Richtige.

In unserem Wein Onlineshop erwartet Sie eine beeindruckende Auswahl an Rotweinen, Weißweinen, Roséweinen, Schaumweinen und weiteren besonderen Weinsorten. Unsere Experten haben jeden Wein mit großer Sorgfalt ausgewählt, um Ihnen nur die besten Jahrgänge und Winzer anzubieten. Sie können sich sicher sein, dass jeder Wein in unserem Sortiment von höchster Qualität ist und mit Liebe zum Detail hergestellt wurde.

Unsere Benutzeroberfläche ist intuitiv gestaltet und ermöglicht es Ihnen, mühelos durch unser umfangreiches Sortiment zu stöbern. Sie können nach Weinregion, Rebsorte, Geschmacksprofil und Preiskategorie filtern, um genau den Wein zu finden, der Ihren Vorlieben entspricht. Darüber hinaus bieten wir detaillierte Beschreibungen für jeden Wein an, um Ihnen bei Ihrer Entscheidung zu helfen.

Name: Kelly Distributors
Description: J.C. Dodd Distributing was founded in 1948 by J.C. "Jack" Dodd in Easton, Maryland and changed its name to Kelly Distributors in February 2004. Kelly Distributors is currently owned and operated by the Kelly family, descendants of Robert Lee Hall, Jr., founder of Bob Hall, LLC. Our company proudly distributes a world class portfolio of Beer, Wine, Spirits, and Non-Alcohol beverages to licensed retailers in Talbot, Queen Anne's, Caroline, Dorchester, and Kent Counties of Maryland.

Name: Drankenhandel van Dorst
Description:
Drankenhandel Van Dorst is een familiebedrijf, en dat voel je. Met alweer de vierde generatie aan het roer wordt de passie voor dranken nog altijd doorgegeven. Ons uitgebreide assortiment biedt voor ieder wat wils. We nemen écht de tijd voor je, met meer dan 100 jaar ervaring en expertise delen we onze kennis voor de beste match

Drankenhandel Van Dorst is al jarenlang een begrip in de regio Roosendaal, waar we sinds 1916 al heel wat drank leveringen hebben verzorgd. Van de lokale horeca tot bedrijven, evenementen en sportverenigingen. Verzorgen en ontzorgen, dat is wat we doen. Bij ons ben je verzekerd van een totaalservice. Van bestelling tot levering. We staan 6 dagen per week voor je klaar, je kunt bij ons ook in het weekend terecht. Onze eigen chauffeurs staan gegarandeerd snel voor de deur met je bestelling.

De deuren van onze slijterij staan voor je open. Van dure, exclusieve dranken tot gangbare en betaalbare bieren en wijnen. Iedereen kan bij ons terecht voor persoonlijk advies. Een bezoek aan slijterij Van Dorst is een beleving, onze professionals geven de beste wijn- en spijs tips. Op basis van je persoonlijke smaak zoeken we samen naar nieuwe alternatieven om uit te proberen. Wat je vraag ook is, wij doen er alles aan om de beste service te verlenen.

Dorstig? Stap eens binnen!

Name: Jassas Import GmbH
Description:
Jassas Import GmbH is an import company based in 33175 Bad Lippspringe, Germany, specialising in bringing authentic Greek flavours to the world. With a deep appreciation for the rich culinary heritage of Greece, Jassas Import GmbH has established itself as a trusted source for quality Greek food and beverages since its founding in 2012.

More than 700 different items are imported directly from Greece by over 80 manufacturers and delivered to both private and business customers. The product range extends from olive oils, balsamico, ouzo, tsipouro, wines, lemonades and beer to honey, coffee, tea, spices, olives and pickled meze.
In addition to a wide range of well-known branded products, the assortment in the areas of olive oil, delicatessen and spirits also includes three high-quality own brands with the names Jassas, Nostos and ToKalo.

The Jassas team currently consists of 9 employees who ensure that the orders of over 90,000 private customers and 150 business customers reach them as quickly as possible. 
In addition to the private customer online shop, which has already been in operation since 2019 www.jassas-shop.de, Jassas Import GmbH has had a business customer online shop at www.griechischer-grosshandel.de since the middle of 2023. In addition, all articles are also sold via the marketplaces Amazon, Ebay and Kaufland. 

Whether customers enjoy a glass of Jassas Ouzo or taste the flavour of Greek olive oil, Jassas Import GmbH brings the taste of Greece to your customers' homes!

Name: JuffWine Srl
Description:
Acquisto dopo aver assaggiato al ristorante. 
Quante volte vi è capitato di aver gustato un vino al ristorante ed aver pensato di acquistarlo per condividerlo a casa con gli amici? 

JuffWine è un eCommerce di curiosity. 
Il servizio eCommerce di JW privilegia la qualità e la particolarità dell'offerta. 

JuffWine è l'eCommerce a supporto dei ristoratori. 
Ogni singola bottiglia gestita da JW è identificata con un QR Code univoco e tracciata. Inquadrando il QR Code sulla bottiglia accedi al sito e rapidamente puoi acquistare e ricevere a casa l'etichetta che hai appena assaggiato. Il ristoratore riceve una commissione per ogni bottiglia venduta tramite l'accesso all'eCommerce dal QR Code di una sua bottiglia.

JuffWine è anche l'eCommerce che premia chi promuove JW: se un amico acquista una etichetta inquadrando il QR Code a casa tua riceverai uno sconto sul tuo prossimo acquisto. 

Un altro special service offerto a te ristoratore è la carta dei vini digitale. JW mette a disposizione dei tablet per la gestione della carta dei vini, sempre aggiornata con le tue giacenze. La carta costituisce una opportunità per raccontare e promuovere i tuoi vini di qualità. La carta è personalizzabile con gli abbinamenti al tuo menu. Può inoltre costituire un modo per raccogliere informazioni circa i consumi e le preferenze dei tuoi clienti. 

JW usa la tecnologia Blockchain per garantire la trasparenza tra gli attori coinvolti nelle transazioni e strumenti di Artificial Intelligence per la previsione dei consumi.

Description: Etéreo's founder Hamade Nasser had the vision and desire to bring a luxurious Mexican heritage to Europe by Creating an ultra premium tequila with a unique recipes that he has developed in Mexico. The climate of the region is also a determining factor in characterising the crops that bear the Tequila Denomination of Origin.

Name: iDeal Distribution (Cambodia) Co., Ltd.
Description:
iDeal Distribution, was established in 2021 in Thailand. It was founded with the idea of strengthening the presence of Italian products for F&B in the Kingdom - to provide innovative solutions to professional operators in the Hotel, Restaurant, Bar and Retail sectors, guaranteeing high quality, competitive pricing and reliability.

iDeal Cambodia was born in 2023 and operates predominantly in the Italian Wine sector. A portfolio that includes 40 producer brands, supplying 140 labels from boutique wineries and distilleries intended for professional operators. We believe Cambodia is a logical next step to introduce Italian products to the Cambodian consumer.

In a globalized market that is highly competitive with shifting customer demands, iDeal represents a leading company in Cambodia for Italian wines. Italy is rightly famous for its variety of produce which varies from region to region and, being founded by Italians, we are able to offer a comprehensive selection with constant innovation of new and established products supported by our intensive research and development activity. Although we are Italian focused, more exciting International products will be added to the portfolio offering imminently.

We work with responsibility and passion to constantly guarantee healthy, good, and tasty products capable of satisfying the needs of all types of consumers.

iDeal is a market leader in terms of eco-sustainability, utilizing the benefits of the supply chain without causing negative social and environmental impacts.

Our logistics partner in Cambodia is JWD Asia Logistics, offering logistics services and tailor-made supply chain solutions from warehouse to distribution. Teams of experts apply global knowledge and local know-how to ensure that our products are stored at the correct temperature, handled with care and efficiency, and delivered in compliance with all legal regulations.

Name: O'Connor Distributing
Description:
At O’Connor Distributing, we build brands for our suppliers. We work with a sense of urgency for our customers. We create long-term sustainable equity for owners and employees. Our operating principles: accountability, professionalism, personnel safety, selling integrity, and continuous improvement.

We started back in 1993, with one distributorship—White River Beverage—servicing three Arkansas counties, with sales of just 256,000 cases a year. Now we operate three divisions—Three Rivers, Three Lakes, and White River Beverage–with annual case sales of over 2 million. We distribute to 1,100 retailers with over 45,000 points of distribution in 25 counties.

O’Connor Distributing is a family-owned organization with three generations committed to our long term success. Our business strategy is simple: hire, train, and retain a growing team of hardworking Arkansans in communities across the state.

Amaro Rubino, è il primo prodotto uscito dalla creatività dapprima amatoriale di Matteo Rubino: dopo 2 anni di sperimentazioni della formula e di una ricerca appassionata all’aperto, a inizio 2020 fa il suo esordio sul mercato. E’ Prodotto in piccoli lotti, e certificato bio, a base di miele locale e botaniche tipiche delle Prealpi Lombarde. Nel 2022 è  Miglior Liquore d'Erbe al Mondo 2022, per la giuria dei World Liqueur Awards, mentre nel 2023 è medaglia d’oro per Usa Spirits Ratings. Description:
Grape ‘N’ Green: geniet van heerlijke biologische wijnen voor een gezondere wereld
Grape ‘N’ Green is een jonge onderneming die biologische wijnen importeert rechtstreeks van de wijnboer. Het bedrijf wil de Nederlandse consument bewuster maken van biologische wijnbouw en hen laten genieten van heerlijke wijnen die goed zijn voor het milieu en de gezondheid.
De wijnen van Grape ‘N’ Green zijn geen massaproducten, maar wijnen die met trots en vakmanschap worden gemaakt door veelal kleinere wijnboeren. De wijnboeren die de wijnen produceren, zijn gepassioneerd over hun vak en zetten zich in voor het maken van de beste biologische wijnen. Dit maakt de wijnen uniek en bijzonder.
Biologische wijnbouw is een duurzame manier van wijn maken. Het gebruik van chemische bestrijdingsmiddelen en kunstmest wordt vermeden, wat beter is voor het milieu, klimaat en de gezondheid. Biologische wijnbouw draagt bij aan de biodiversiteit. Biologische wijnen hebben vaak een intensere smaak en aroma's dan conventionele wijnen.
Grape ‘N’ Green is ervan overtuigd dat iedereen moet kunnen genieten van de smaak en kwaliteit van biologische wijn. Daarom willen wij de wijnen betaalbaar houden.
Grape ‘N’ Green is een betrouwbare bron voor biologische wijnen van topkwaliteit. Het bedrijf heeft een breed netwerk van wijnboeren in Europa, waardoor het altijd de beste wijnen kan aanbieden.

No buscamos ser la opción de todos, sino la elección de quienes valoran la calidad y el descubrimiento. Somos una empresa boutique, con grandes aspiraciones y una comunidad en crecimiento que aprecia los buenos productos y las buenas historias.

Bienvenidos a High Spirits Co.
Un lugar donde cada copa cuenta una historia.

Name: GoDrinks Indonesia
Description:
Wine. It’s more than just a drink. Each bottle tells a story of hard work, practice, and patience. Each glass recalls a memory of happy times spent with friends and family.

Each sip carries you to different places and different people. Sharing wine is sharing life, at its simplest, and most profound point. Good wine is for everyone. Or at least, it should be.

Due to the high tariffs imposed on alcoholic imports, it may be more difficult than you think to afford your favorite glass of vino in Bali. But we believe you shouldn’t have to pay extra for paradise. Go Drinks was founded to provide you with the finest wine the world has to offer, at the fairest prices. So you can continue to share wine and share life’s best moments, worry-free.

The greatest wines take time to mature: and so does business excellence. With over 25 years of experience in the industry, we’ve worked hard to establish ourselves as trusted distributors of premium products. Our meaningful global presence has guaranteed us strong purchasing power in the international market. And while other companies rely on retail ‘middlemen’, our advanced logistics system allows us to process all of our imports and deliveries within Bali personally. For you, this means only the highest caliber for the lowest cost. For us, it means the culmination of our company’s vision: supplying good wine to good people.

But it’s more than just business with us: we care about quality, and we care about the community. Our team of experts has meticulously sourced products from a network of exceptional suppliers. And over many years, we’ve carefully cultivated long-lasting relationships with some of the best vineyards in the world, supporting sustainable practices and family-run farming. After all, good business is the same as good wine: it takes time and effort, but most of all, it takes a lot of love. Cheers to the good life, with Go Drinks.

Name: Sugarbird Cape Fynbos Spirits
Description:
WORTHY OF THE NAME :
Promerops cafer, or Cape Sugarbird as she is known, is the dusty copper-brown, long-tailed songbird, inherent to the regions where we source our spirit range's floral ingredient profile.She is a specialist nectar feeder and will be found roaming in search of perfect nectar, her long feathers, with the tell tale yellow, flitting between protea and fynbos buds. Like us, she would be nothing without Proteaceae (and indeed they without her) She is the graceful, unassuming, yet diligent hustler of the Cape Floral Kingdom she calls her home. She is our ideal ambassador for the genesis of our journey which began with gin, ambition and entrepreneurial spirit.

SUGARBIRD SIGNATURE GIN RANGE - THE TASTE OF THE CAPE :
A lightly floral gin, reminiscent of London Dry, she offers notes of rooibos, honeybush, rose geranium and the Cape May Flower, sourced by botanists from the slopes of our iconic mountain. Perfect on ice or as a mixer, Sugarbird Gin is perfect for socialising or collaborating over big ideas. 

BECOMING SUGARBIRD CAPE FYNBOS SPIRITS :
Since its inception in 2017, Sugarbird Cape Fynbos Gin has extended its footprint in the South African alcohol beverage industry, beyond the original gin, which has necessitated a change in name, from ‘Sugarbird Cape Fynbos Gin’, to ‘Sugarbird Cape Fynbos Spirits’

After winning the Luxury Lifestyle award of best premium gin in South Africa in 2021, we went on to launch a pure potstill 14 year aged Brandy - the award winning and SA Brandy Foundation recognised Sugarbird XO Brandy. Later in 2021, we entered the Rum category with Sugarbird Cape Fynbos Rum.

Name: Winest.Gr
Description:
Winest was founded in 2016 as a wine network in order to represent Greek boutique wineries as well as some selected wineries abroad. Bearing in mind the abundance of indigenous varieties available in our country - over 600 in number - our goal is to promote them in the Greek market.

Our vision begins from the vineyard, where the grape is created and ends at the winery where the final product is produced. For us, consulting and correct practice in the vineyard, using precision viticulture and gentle interventions are crucial for the promotion of the 'terroir'. The subsequent vinifications capture the terroir and the identity of each indigenous variety.

Our goal is for the consumer to have easy access to quality wine, which is why the development of sales in different places or regions (cellars, restaurants, e-shop) is our primary concern. Our main asset is the education of both professionals in the field and ordinary consumers and wine lovers, through seminars, master classes and staff training sessions. The creation of the winest e-academy, an online 'school' for wine, where anyone can access, is another important tool in this direction.

Description:

En un mercado saturado de marcas, nuestra apuesta puede parecer una locura. Sí, ciertamente lo es, pero creemos firmemente en la diferenciación y nos enorgullece navegar a contracorriente.

Nos aventuramos en este viaje mirando hacia el futuro, buscando lo nuevo, pero también abrazando nuestro pasado. Nuestra historia está tejida con muchas pequeñas historias: relatos de campesinos, héroes anónimos, pero también grandes viajes navales, batallas y épica. El legendario Canary Sack no solo inspira nuestro nombre, sino también nuestro propósito: hacer frente al desafío de la insularidad. 

Nuestra alianza directa con los productores es el pilar de nuestro compromiso. Te brindamos acceso a vinos excepcionales y proyectos que normalmente no llegan a los circuitos comerciales, siempre a precios justos, asegurando que cada elección sea un placer tanto para tu paladar como para tu cuenta bancaria.

Name: Lakai Liqueurs
Description:
Lakai Liqueurs is elevating what it means to enjoy liqueur by blending Haitian Creole heritage with modern craftsmanship. Every bottle is rooted in tradition, inspired by recipes passed down through generations, and refined with a contemporary sensibility that speaks to today’s discerning drinker.

At the heart of Lakai is a belief that true luxury comes from authenticity. The brand preserves time-honored methods while embracing meticulous, modern techniques that highlight depth, richness, and cultural identity. The result is a liqueur designed to be both indulgent and sophisticated, with flavors that reflect their origins and leave a lasting impression.

Lakai aims to bring liqueurs back into the spotlight, moving them from overlooked to unforgettable. The bottles are crafted for versatility and elegance, offering a refined option for mixology, celebrations, or moments of quiet enjoyment. Whether sipped neat, added to a favorite cocktail, or shared among friends, Lakai creations invite drinkers to appreciate the art, history, and warmth within every pour.

As a proudly Haitian American-founded company, Lakai represents more than spirits. It stands for culture, community, and the preservation of legacy. Each product celebrates the richness of Haitian Creole identity while presenting it with a modern, elevated lens suited for premium experiences.

Wierzymy, że premium oznacza więcej niż tylko produkt – to doświadczenie, kultura i emocje. Nasza pasja do wyselekcjonowanych alkoholi idzie w parze z zaangażowaniem w budowanie relacji z naszymi partnerami biznesowymi. Oferujemy nie tylko wyjątkowe produkty, ale także wsparcie w ich wyborze i dopasowaniu do indywidualnych potrzeb.

Zapraszamy do współpracy właścicieli firm, menedżerów oraz klientów indywidualnych którzy chcą wzbogacić swoją ofertę o produkty z najwyższej półki. Łączymy tradycję i nowoczesność, tworząc unikalne doświadczenia smakowe, które zadowolą nawet najbardziej wymagających klientów.

Dołącz do naszej sieci kontaktów i odkryj świat alkoholi premium z nami!

Name: Racines
Description:
Une ambition

L’ambition de créer du lien autour de la tradition du vin entre les vignerons et les professionnels des arts de bouche.

Une aventure 

Une aventure depuis ces huit derniers millésimes. Vinification, distillation, caviste en province Normande, sommellerie en étoilé Parisien. Racines à mis un point d’honneur à comprendre chaque étapes de vie du vin.

Une promesse

La promesse de vous partager nos connaissances, vous épauler et dénicher le meilleur de notre terroir pour faire briller vos cartes.

Du pied de vigne au verre à pied

Name: Pasieka Jaros Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Pasieka Jaros powstała w 1978 roku. W założeniu była firmą rodzinną, zajmującą się hodowlą pszczół i przetwórstwem produktów pszczelich. Od roku 1991 firma zaczęła produkować miód pitny, który jest podstawą jej działalności.
 

Obecnie firma zatrudnia 16 osób. Właścicielem firmy jest Maciej Jaros i jego synowie - Marcin i Bartłomiej. Syn Marcin pełni funkcję głównego technologa.

Działem technicznym zajmuje się syn właściciela - Bartłomiej. Drugim działem produkcji jest ceramika użytkowa i ozdobna.
Nasze miody pitne produkowane są metodami naturalnymi, bez konserwantów, polepszaczy, sztucznych barwników i aromatów. Surowcem do ich produkcji jest miód pszczeli, woda i soki owocowe. Swoje wybitne walory smakowe osiągają w czasie kilkuletniego leżakowania.

Od kilku lat z powodzeniem bierzemy udział w Międzynarodowym Konkursie Miodów Pitnych w USA (Mazer Cup, Boulder, Colorado).

Name: BROSKI WHISKY LTD
Description:
BROSKI is a modern take on classic single malt whiskies from around the world including Scotland, Ireland, Japan and the USA. 

BROSKI is a term of endearment that means brother and friend. 

The BROSKI website will be launching in October 2023. Our first batch of BROSKI Whisky will be 300 bottles of 12 year old Scotch Whisky. Labelled 1-300 making them exclusive. 

We look forward to you joining us on this journey.

Name: Mister Wine
Description:
Der italienische Spezialist, Partner der Gastronomie.

Mr. Wine ist der erste Österreichische Weinhandel, der sich ausschließlich auf italienische Weine fokussiert. In unserem 800qm großen Lager im Salzburgerland, haben wir Weine aus 1200 Weingütern von allen Regionen in Italien

Name: Birrificio Quattro Elementi
Description: La società opera nel settore del Beverage, in particolare nella produzione e nel commercio di Birre Artigianali con l’obiettivo di inserirsi in un mercato inizialmente territoriale e successivamente nazionale e/o internazionale al fine di presentare alla clientela un prodotto qualitativamente superiore rispetto alla concorrenza, avvalendosi a tendere di materie prime a chilometro zero.

Name: WineMerchants
Description:
We are the Export Department for top winemakers and wineries. 

Winemakers hire us to run their sales and marketing exports so they can focus on viticulture, winemaking, and management.

Name: Carbon Group LA EAS
Description:
Fundada en diciembre de 2022 en Paraguay, Carbon Group SA se posiciona como una importadora líder en bebidas de alta gama, combinando la rica tradición de los viñedos portugueses con la sofisticación del Champagne francés.  

Creada por dos socios visionarios, uno francés y otro alemán, la empresa refleja su pasión por las bebidas excepcionales y su conexión profunda con América Latina. Cada botella seleccionada representa siglos de historia y artesanía, diseñada para transformar cada ocasión en una experiencia inolvidable.  

Con sede en Ciudad del Este, Carbon Group SA no es solo un puente entre Europa y América Latina, sino también un símbolo de excelencia y compromiso con la calidad. Nuestra misión es ofrecer productos que reflejen tradición, innovación y el placer de compartir momentos únicos.  

Carbon Group SA: donde la elegancia europea se encuentra con la calidez latinoamericana para brindar experiencias incomparables.

Name: Borravino
Description:
Borravino es una distribuidora argentina especializada en la comercialización y desarrollo de bebidas premium.
Representamos marcas que apuestan por una presencia sólida y cuidada en el mercado, con foco en calidad, identidad y valor de largo plazo.

Combinamos una red nacional de distribución con gestión estratégica y acompañamiento cercano, tanto para proveedores como para clientes: vinotecas, bares, restaurantes y hoteles.

Cada marca que trabajamos recibe un tratamiento integral, desde el posicionamiento hasta la ejecución comercial, garantizando coherencia, visibilidad y servicio.

Nuestro propósito es conectar productos excepcionales con quienes saben apreciarlos.

Name: DVINO
Description:
Leverandør til restaurationsbranchen siden 1996.

Vi er en import og engrosvirksomhed, der udelukkende beskæftiger sig med italienske kvalitetsvine.

- Direkte handel med vinbonden -
Alle vores vine kommer fra små til mellemstore vinbønder, som er dedikerede og passionerede omkring deres levevej. Med ydmyghed og fødderne solidt plantet i vinmarken, skabes fantastiske vine med god historie, som vi er stolte over at kunne præsentere.

- 25 års erfaring og ekspertise -
Erfaring, grundighed og evig nysgerrighed er drivkraften. Vine udvælges grundigt ved at smage rigtig mange vine igennem inden den endelige udvælgelse, så pris og kvalitet er i top. Vor spidskompetence er food and wineparring.

- Altid kunden i centrum -
Vores mission er at kunne give fantastiske vinoplevelser. Vi bestræber os på at finde de helt rigtige vine, der passer ind i jeres sortiment, menu og smag. Vi ser derfor os selv mere som en sparringspartner fremfor vinsælgere.

Name: UPIC
Description:
Premium liquor importer, distributor and marketer for South Korea market

- Whisky : Amrut, Douglas Laing, Kilchoman, Raasay, Wolfburn
- Brandy : Boulard Calvados, Hine Cognac, Janneau Armagnce
- Rum : Diplomatico
- Pisco : Tabernero
- Liqueur : Mr Black Coffee Liqueur
- Vermouth : Mancino
- Port Wine : Dalva

Name: Nordic-River
Description:
N°rdic River Is producing GIN and Vodka in the mill house of the historical Hunsfos Fabrikker. With a focus on craft and quality.

The factory production used to be a paper factory in the olden days, and we have integrated elements from its past into the modern distillery. It’s all about keeping Hunsfos’ industrial history, values and culture alive.

Awards:
Gold - San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2022

Name: EruptCinn
Description:
EruptCinn is a natural, premium cinnamon-infused rum that’s all about smooth flavor and good times. Crafted and produced in the USA, this veteran-owned brand is perfect for sipping, shooting, or mixing. We’re proud to bring you a drink that’s as adventurous as you are.

 It's time to LAVA UP!

Name: Pinewood Wine Limited
Description:
Founded in 2013, Pinewood Wine is “The Best Online Wine Wholesaler”, known for representing quality wines with the best value. The world of Pinewood Wine leads the market with 30 exclusive brands including some prestigious wine estates and family-owned boutique winery mainly from Old World, which are imported directly to Hong Kong & Macau. 

 Driven by pioneering spirit and passion, our young and energetic wine specialists always strive for excellence. With over 1,000 wines sourced, we continue to thrive with our partners by offering the best marketing and distribution solution. 

 Cave du Marmandais has been our long term partner since day one and the brand has achieved record-breaking sales record. We’ve also invested in wineries and vineyards in the world’s best wine producing regions, We are committed to ceaselessly seek new partners and reach out to iconic brands to inherit the tradition and cultivate their own uniqueness to strengthen the appeal and reputation of the brands.

Name: Harmonie Vins et Spiritueux
Description: Vins de collection & allocation

Name: Dolomiti Alpenfeinkost GmbH
Description:
Unsere Schnäpse und Edelbrände sind so unvergleichlich wie die Alpen. Wir verwenden ausschließlich handverlesenen Zutaten für unsere Produkte. Diese werden meisterlich destilliert und in Ruhe ausgebaut. Dabei nutzen wir die Vorteile modernster Brennereitechnik, wie das besonders schonende Vakuumverfahren, durch welches unsere Destillate ihren besonders sortentypischen, intensiven Geschmack bewahren.
Dolomiti Produkte werden im DACH Raum im Lebensmittelhandel und Getränkefachhandel vertrieben.

Name: Citywine
Description:
Vous cherchez à offrir à vos clients des vins de qualité  ? Ne cherchez plus ! Citywine est votre partenaire idéal en vous proposant une variété large de vins rouges, vins blancs, vins rosés et vins effervescents pour tous les goûts. 

En tant qu'importateur et spécialiste dans la vente de vins roumains et moldaves, nous sommes fiers de vous proposer les meilleures sélections. Nos vins sont soigneusement choisis parmi les meilleurs producteurs et œnologues passionnés pour vous garantir une qualité exceptionnelle à chaque bouteille.

Choisir Citywine comme fournisseur de vins pour votre restaurant, entreprise, cave à vins ou établissement Horeca, c'est choisir la qualité, l'authenticité et la passion du vin. Nous sommes convaincus que nos vins sauront ravir les papilles de vos clients les plus exigeants, et ajouter une touche d'originalité à votre carte des vins.

Name: Advine AB
Description: Advine AB imports and distributes premium wines from South Africa, prioritising ethical sourcing and sustainability.

Name: Mireva Weinhandel KG
Description:
Willkommen bei Mireva Weinhandel! Wir sind ein renommiertes Familienunternehmen, das sich auf erlesene Weine und Feinkost aus dem bezaubernden Piemont spezialisiert hat. Unsere Auswahl umfasst einzigartige Weine, die Sie weder in Supermärkten noch bei anderen deutschen Weinhändlern finden werden. Dank unserer engen Verbindungen zu kleinen Winzerfamilien können wir Ihnen authentische und nachhaltige Produkte von höchster Qualität anbieten.

Entdecken Sie unsere erlesene Weinkollektion, die verschiedene typische Rebsorten des Piemonts umfasst. Von Barbera über Nebbiolo und Grignolino bis hin zu Ruché - jeder Wein hat seinen eigenen einzigartigen Charakter, der von den Böden, dem Klima und dem Können der Winzer geprägt ist. Für Liebhaber von Weißweinen bieten wir Favorita, Arneis, Sauvignon Blanc, Chardonnay und Viognier an. Egal, ob Sie nach einem fruchtigen Barbera d'Asti, einem eleganten Nebbiolo oder einem erfrischenden Favorita Langhe suchen - bei uns werden Sie fündig.

Neben unseren erlesenen Weinen bieten wir Ihnen auch Feinkostprodukte aus dem Piemont an, darunter hochwertige Öle und exquisite Gebäckvariationen. Diese Produkte werden von kleinen Produzenten hergestellt, die auf natürliche Zutaten und traditionelle Rezepte setzen, um Ihnen ein authentisches Geschmackserlebnis zu bieten.

Erleben Sie die Kultur und Küche des Piemonts bei unseren Degustationen, bei denen Sie nicht nur unsere Weine und Feinkost probieren können, sondern auch faszinierende Geschichten und Anekdoten aus der Region hören. Sie haben auch die Möglichkeit, unsere Degustationen als Geschenk oder für Firmen- und Gruppenveranstaltungen zu buchen.

Besuchen Sie Mireva Weinhandel und entdecken Sie die unvergleichliche Vielfalt und den einzigartigen Charme unserer erlesenen Weine und Feinkost aus dem Piemont. Wir teilen gerne unsere Leidenschaft für diese Region mit Ihnen.

Name: The Malbec House
Description:
The Malbec House
Importamos carácter, distribuimos autenticidad.
Con sede en Barcelona, The Malbec House nace en 2022 con una visión clara: acercar al canal HORECA y al consumidor final una cuidada selección de vinos auténticos del Nuevo Mundo y de España. Nuestra especialidad son etiquetas con historia, elaboradas por pequeños y medianos productores comprometidos con la calidad, la sostenibilidad y la expresión de su terroir.
Durante más de tres años hemos recorrido regiones vitivinícolas clave —especialmente en Argentina— para construir un portfolio distintivo que enriquece cartas de vinos en restaurantes, bares y hoteles. Operamos con enfoque consultivo, acompañando a nuestros clientes en la selección y rotación de productos que generen valor y diferenciación real.
Distribuimos a nivel nacional, trabajamos estrechamente con partners en restauración y retail especializado, y canalizamos ventas directas a través de nuestra tienda online y nuestra vinoteca en Barcelona: La Sala, Club de Vinos.
Nuestro equipo —Mariano Werner (CEO), Jorge Oggero (Sommelier y responsable comercial), y Sarra Arous (Administración)— combina pasión, conocimiento técnico y orientación al cliente.
En The Malbec House, cada vino que representamos es una invitación a descubrir, disfrutar y contar una historia distinta.

Name: MJota SPA
Description:
Conectamos el mundo a través del sabor

Con más de 10 años de experiencia, en Mjota Spa nos especializamos en la importación y distribución de bebidas alcohólicas y no alcohólicas en América, ofreciendo productos exclusivos de reconocidas marcas internacionales.

 Nuestras principales líneas de negocio:
 Distribución exclusiva: Representamos en América marcas icónicas como:
 Maradona Energy Drink (Vitamisu, Polonia)
 Aguardiente Antioqueño y Ron Medellín (Fábrica de Licores de Antioquia, Colombia)
 Legend of Dracula Wines (Rumania)

 Producción de Pisco Condorito: En alianza con World Editors Chile S.A., llevamos la esencia de Condorito a una línea única de piscos y bebidas.

 Compromiso con la calidad y la autenticidad
Cada producto en nuestro portafolio es seleccionado con altos estándares de calidad para ofrecer experiencias únicas a nuestros clientes y consumidores. Nuestro enfoque en la distribución estratégica nos permite garantizar disponibilidad y presencia en mercados clave de la región.

 Más que importadores, somos creadores de experiencias
Entregamos más que productos; llevamos historias, tradiciones y culturas a cada copa. En Mjota Spa, trabajamos con pasión para brindar lo mejor del mundo a nuestros clientes.

 Contáctanos y llevemos juntos estas grandes marcas a nuevos mercados.

Name: Palác vína
Description: Specializujeme se na dovoz kvalitního vína z předních vinařských regionů Evropy. Nabízíme širokou paletu vín, která pocházejí z pečlivě vybraných vinic. Naší srdcovkou jsou i vinaři z Čech a Moravy. Kromě vína nabízíme také delikatesy k vínu od malých farmářů, kteří pěstují své produkty s láskou a respektem k přírodě.

Name: SAVA GIN
Description: Modern, handcrafted gins distilled in Poland.

Name: Leeder Quay
Description: We are an independent beverages retailer that specialises in great value products sourced from around the world. Most of the products are only available exclusively at Leeder Quay. Come visit us in Mui Wo or Central for free tastings and chill out vibes.

Name: Castle Liquors Group
Description:
Introducing Castle Liquors, your premier destination for a world of libations. With a kingdom spanning distribution prowess and a royal array of curated alcohol and beer selections across multiple stores, we are the reigning monarchs of the beverage realm.

 DISTRIBUTION DOMINANCE:
At the heart of our empire lies a robust distribution network that ensures the seamless flow of the finest spirits and beers. Castle Liquors takes pride in connecting producers to enthusiasts, bringing a diverse portfolio to the doorstep of businesses and homes alike.

 EXCLUSIVE STOREFRONTS:
Step into our enchanting stores, where each one is a haven for those who appreciate the artistry of crafted beverages. Immerse yourself in an unparalleled shopping experience, surrounded by a regal ambiance that showcases the very best in alcohol and beer selections.

 A GLOBAL SELECTION:
Castle Liquors sources from every corner of the globe, offering a handpicked assortment of beverages that tell stories of tradition, innovation, and exquisite craftsmanship. Our shelves boast a diverse range, ensuring there's something for every palate and occasion.

 PASSIONATE EXPERTISE:
Guided by a team of passionate experts, Castle Liquors is more than a retailer or distributor – we are curators, educators, and enthusiasts. Our knowledgeable staff is dedicated to providing personalized recommendations, ensuring that every visit is an adventure in taste and discovery.

 COMMITMENT TO QUALITY:
Quality reigns supreme at Castle Liquors. We are committed to delivering excellence in our service. Your journey through our stores is a testament to our unwavering dedication to quality libations.

Join us on a royal quest for the finest in alcohol and beers. Castle Liquors – Where Distribution Excellence Meets Unmatched Store Elegance. Cheers to a kingdom of taste, variety, and unforgettable moments!

Name: Wholesale Drinks
Description: Welcome to Wholesale Drinks, where we are excited to introduce a fresh perspective to the wholesale alcohol market. Specialising in a diverse range of products from cask and keg beers to spirits, wines, soft drinks, bottled beers, and flavoured alcohol beverages (FABs), our goal is to provide high-quality beverages at competitive prices. Although we are new to wholesale, we bring over 40 years of valuable experience from the licensing trade, having successfully managed our own bars, pubs, and clubs. This extensive background allows us to leverage a deep understanding of both current and historical trends within the alcohol industry. At Wholesale Drinks, we are committed to offering fair pricing and personalised service, ensuring that even the smaller establishments have access to the best products and trends in the market, without being overshadowed by larger companies.

Name: Twijn
Description: Wijngroothandel- en Import

Name: Golden Wat Spirits
Description: Golden Wat is a proud Asian-American owned business. We have dedicated our time and resources to bring you a high-quality cognac that you will not only enjoy but be proud to support. Using only the finest ingredients, Golden Wat Cognac is made from 100% Ugni Blanc grapes grown in the nutrient rich soils of the Petite Champagne and Fin Bois terroirs of Cognac, France. Our cognacs are expertly crafted with over 200 years of cognac experience to bring you elegant and bold blends that are worth celebrating.

Name: Grandis Distillery
Description:
It’s 2020 in the Land of Silver Mist, at the foothills of the Magoebaskloof Mountains, an inspired hobbyist set out with an
ambitious curiosity to create the finest of Gins. Through much hardship and even more determination, Grandis Gins was born
and has fought to find its feet during the time of the Pandemic, turning a hobbyist’s dream… into a reality.

Through a burning desire for success and the gift of time in isolation, Grandis has achieved a unique taste, that from the first
sip, clearly reflects the evergreen subtropical forest that the gin is crafted in. Most of our botanicals are specifically locally sourced
to convey the taste of Mother Nature herself in the bliss of the Magoebaskloof Mountains. Here at Grandis, we do our utmost
to ensure that you too can relive the very source of inspiration that has allowed us to make this gin possible.

Name: Hedonista
Description:
Įmonė užsiima didmenine ir mažmenine prekyba aukštos kokybės vynais. Mūsų klientai tai geriausi Lietuvos restoranai, viešbučiai bei specializuotos parduotuvės. 
Įmonė valdo internetinę parduotuvę www.hedonist.lt bei vyno parduotuvę Vilniuje The Hedonist. Tai unikali ir vienintelė vieta Baltijos šalyse, kur galima paragauti daugiau nei 200 skirtingų vynų pilstomų taurėmis. Čia vyksta teminės vyno degustacijos, bei profesionalūs someljė kursai.




Hedonista imports and distributes fine wines in On Trade Channel. Our customers are the best restaurants, hotels and specialized shops in Lithuania. Company owns an internet wine shop www.hedonist.lt and a wine boutique The Hedonist, which is based in Vilnius. In our boutique wine lovers can taste more than 200 wines by the glass. It is a unique place which does not have analogues in the Baltic countries. Wine tastings and courses are organised here regularly.

Name: Art&Wine - RN
Description:
A Art&Wine é referência em vinhos no Rio Grande do Norte, reconhecida como a loja com o maior número de rótulos em Natal e a principal distribuidora do estado.

Com 5 anos de atuação no mercado, oferecemos uma curadoria cuidadosa de vinhos nacionais e importados, além de experiências únicas que unem arte, cultura e prazer em cada taça.

Nosso propósito é aproximar as pessoas do universo do vinho, com atendimento especializado, eventos exclusivos e parcerias que fortalecem o cenário enogastronômico local.

Name: NOX (Formerly Sous Soleil)
Description: We aim to deliver a non ordinary experience to our customers.

Name: Ron 1703
Description: Ron 1703 surge buscando integrar al mercado juventud, innovación y una calidad irrefutable.

Name: Liquid Distro
Description: Liquid Distro was born from an admiration for the virtuosity of select breweries blending common elements with sublime effect creating singular beers and brands.  We are proud purveyors of this alchemy and curators for fine retailers in Virginia, Washington, D.C. and North Carolina.

Name: Liquid Asset Group Ltd
Description: We are committed to delivering superior investment opportunities in the whisky industry, backed by extensive research and analysis, to help our clients achieve their financial goals. Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to providing personalised attention and tailored investment strategies to help our clients maximise their returns and grow their wealth over the long term. We strive to build lasting relationships with our clients based on integrity, transparency, and trust.

Name: WinePro Nigeria
Description:
Winepro was born out of the need to bridge the gap between sales and consumption of alcohol in Nigeria by providing wine & spirits education to consumers for a healthier drinking experience. 

Even though alcohol is everywhere, we pride ourselves in offering you 100% authentic liquor, unmatched customer service, and good value for money. 

We are sharing our love for wines and spirits by providing you with a wide range of drinks at your fingertips. Just sit back, relax and drink outside the box.

Name: Mosaic Beverages UK Ltd
Description: Collecting experience, we assemble unique moments in each bottle. Private company, global distributor of quality wines.

Name: Animal Spirits
Description:
Your trusted curator, bringing hidden gems for the enjoyment of fine spirits lovers.

Founded by enthusiasts, we aim to be the trusted brand that spirits connoisseurs rely on for indulging in the finest spirits. With an unwavering focus on quality and value, we tirelessly search the globe, handpicking hidden gems from distilleries. Each bottle we curate represents the pinnacle of craftsmanship, showcasing the artistry and dedication of the distillers.

Embark on a journey of discovery as we invite you to unlock the world of exceptional spirits.

Name: TAU KuDa GmbH
Description:
TAU is crafted in the careful hands of the Draft Brothers in Winterthur, where distillation is an art form. When we presented our recipe to the masters of gin, our ambition was clear: we aimed not just to replicate traditional Hierbas, but to create an unforgettable experience in both bottle and taste. An exquisite Hierbas that not only seduces the palate but also leaves a lasting impression.

We rely on pure Swiss botany in organic quality—for our herbs and fruits, what roots in Swiss soil makes its way into our Hierbas. For the exotic ingredients that our climate avoids, we trust the quality of local suppliers. Without artificial additives, our Hierbas remains a natural product, identifiable by its authentically darker color compared to the current original from the south.
TAU is a Hierbas of local character, shaped by predominantly local ingredients and crafted with a great deal of passion.

Name: Reif Rum
Description:
Reif Rum is more than just a spirit — it’s a story of authenticity, premium quality, and craftsmanship. Every bottle reflects our commitment to tradition and innovation, delivering a distinctive taste experience that resonates with today’s consumers.
Beyond the pour, we partner with retailers and distributors by providing activation support that drives awareness, engagement, and category growth. From in-store promotions to digital campaigns, our goal is to help partners maximize sales while offering customers a premium rum they can connect with.
Reif Rum: Authentic. Premium. Crafted for Growth.

Name: Teawine Lux
Description:
Cave à vin 'Teawine Lux' (Bertrange -Luxembourg)est l'adresse des amateurs de vins et de thé ! Nous offrons non seulement du vin et du thé, mais aussi d'autres produits tels que des accessoires pour le thé, du champagne, du saké, des boissons, d'autres boissons alcoolisées, etc..avec les services vente en ligne et livraison à domicile.
La plupart de nos produits sont importés : Vins, champagne et cognac de France, nombreux thés de Chine, saké du Japon et spiritueux comme le whisky & le gin principalement d'Angleterre.
Il y a encore quelques petites différences entre nos thés : Nous avons des thés naturels, des thés biologiques, en vrac ou en paquets. Les saveurs sont le thé vert, le thé blanc, le thé noir et le thé Wulong.
Location: 贝尔特朗日, 卢森堡

Name: Bac Wine Ecommerce
Description:
Bac Wine es un ecommerce argentino especilizado en la venta y distribución de los mejores vinos de Argentina. 
El trato personalizado a través de Whatsapp es nuestro diferencial a la hora de recomendar y ofertar para cada situación y evento.

Nos especializamos en Bodegas Boutique y Vinos de Autor, con las que sorprenderás a quien desees regalar un vino para el recuerdo.

Name: Frenchsip
Description:
Welcome to Frenchsip—where the elegance of French winemaking meets the Australian market.

At Frenchsip, we specialise in importing and wholesaling premium French wines from renowned vineyards across France, bringing the tradition, craftsmanship, and richness of French terroir to wine lovers across Australia. Each bottle we curate is a testament to heritage and passion, offering a true taste of France.

Driven by a commitment to sustainability and innovation, we proudly offer practical, eco-friendly packaging solutions, like the BIB (Bag-in-Box) format, without compromising the quality that defines French wines.

Whether you are a wine enthusiast, restaurateur, or retailer, Frenchsip is dedicated to elevating your wine experience through thoughtful curation, exquisite taste, and a deep respect for the art of winemaking.

Join us in celebrating the spirit of France—one sustainable pour at a time.

Cheers to new connections and shared passions!

Name: Easy Seltzer
Description: At Easy Seltzer, we believe great taste shouldn’t come with compromise. That’s why we craft premium alcoholic seltzers made with all-natural ingredients, completely gluten-free, and low in calories—so you can enjoy every sip without the guilt. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or celebrating with friends, Easy Seltzer is here to deliver refreshing, crisp flavors that fit your lifestyle.

Name: Weinkontor Sommer
Description: Wir teilen Ihre Leidenschaft für exzellente Weine! Die Liebe für das besondere Genusserlebnis spiegelt sich in den, von uns persönlich für Sie ausgewählten, japanischen Weinen wieder. Deren Vielfalt und Raffinesse ist hierzulande oft unbekannt – umso stolzer sind wir darauf, Ihnen exklusive japanische Weine auf Spitzenniveau präsentieren zu können.

Name: Hugo Bleu Liqueurs and Hugo Cognac's

Name: Vairuni Wines
Description:
In 2017, I embarked on my first journey to Italy, a country known for its stunning landscapes, rich history, and of course, its renowned wineries. Little did I know that this trip would mark the beginning of a lifelong love affair with the world of wine and the remarkable individuals who bring it to life.
Italy's winemaking culture was unlike anything I had ever experienced. The vineyards stretched out before me, each row of grapes a testament to the dedication and craftsmanship of the winegrowers. As I toured the wineries, I was welcomed with open arms, not just as a tourist, but as a guest eager to learn about their traditions, their art, and their way of life.
It was during this visit that I had the privilege of meeting countless inspiring individuals from the world of wine. These passionate winemakers, who poured their hearts and souls into each bottle, opened my eyes to the beauty of the industry. They shared their stories, their struggles, and their dreams, and it was in those moments that I felt a seed of inspiration being sown within me.
As I explored Italy's diverse wine regions, a dream of bringing the hidden gems of European winemaking to a broader audience, of sharing the stories of these dedicated vintners, and of creating a bridge between these artisans and wine enthusiasts around the world.
Over the next seven years, that dream never left me. It simmered in the background, quietly fueling my determination. And then, in a moment that felt like destiny, I decided to take a bold step. I realized that it was time to turn that dream into a reality.
As I embark on this new chapter of my life, I'm filled with gratitude for that fateful trip to Italy in 2017. It was a journey that changed the course of my life, sowed a dream in me, and ultimately allowed me to follow my passion. I look forward to the years ahead, as I continue to explore, discover, and share the beauty of the world of wine with others.

Direct Relationships: We work directly with independent Portuguese winemakers, ensuring authenticity and competitive pricing.
HoReCa Focus: Purpose-built for restaurants, bars, and hotels - we understand your business needs.
Expert Support: Our team provides sommelier consultation, staff training, and pairing recommendations.
Curated Selection: Every wine is personally selected and tasted by our team - quality over quantity.

Our Portfolio:

Services:
Direct wine import and distribution across Stockholm
Sommelier consultation and menu pairing support
Restaurant staff training and wine education
Flexible ordering and competitive HoReCa pricing
Exclusive access to limited production wines

Why Portuguese Wine?
Portugal offers exceptional quality-to-price ratios with unique indigenous grape varieties unavailable elsewhere. As consumer interest in Portuguese cuisine and wine grows in Stockholm, we're positioned to support restaurants capitalizing on this trend.

Partnership Approach:
We view our restaurant clients as long-term partners. Whether you're launching a new wine program or refreshing your current list, we provide personalized support to help your business succeed.

Vi importerer vore vine fra udvalgte producenter og områder, hvor passionerede vinmagere varetager hele processen i både mark og vinkælder året rundt.

Vi er specialister i vine fra Tyskland, hvor der fremstilles hvidvine i verdensklasse, og rødvine nu også nyder stor anerkendelse i verdens vinøse fora. 

At smage og opleve vin hører hjemme i sansernes verden. Her slår ord ikke rigtig til, og det er derfor svært at vælge vin alene ud fra vinetiketter, beskrivelser og anmeldelser. Derfor synes vi, at du skal have mulighed for at smage vinen, inden du køber den.  Det er filosofien bag begrebet "vinothek".

Vi tilbyder individuelle vinsmagninger både i erhvervsmæssige sammenhænge og til firmaer, foreninger og vinklubber, og du kan også opleve vores vine på vinmesser og til åbne smagninger.  Du finder information om kommende arrangementer på vores website under menupunktet 'events'.
