Name: Makatay Mezcal
Description:
Makatay es una empresa familiar 100% mexicana que busca llevar al mercado mezcales de la más alta calidad.  
 
Para lograr esa calidad nos dimos a la tarea de encontrar a un productor que cuente con la experiencia, la visión, y los valores de calidad y excelencia que para nosotros son tan importantes. Conseguimos el directorio del COMERCAM (Consejo Mexicano Regulador de la Calidad del Mezcal), donde se encuentran inscritos la gran mayoría de productores serios del país. Les marcamos a todos y cada uno de los más de 150 productores Oaxaqueños del directorio, con el fin de seleccionar a aquellos que comparten nuestra visión. Una vez finalizado ese proceso nos dimos la tarea de visitar a todos los productores seleccionados, con el fin de visitar sus palenques, conocerlos en persona y probar sus Mezcales. Después de meses de este cuidadoso proceso de selección es como encontramos al que ahora es nuestro socio productor, y a nuestro Maestro Mezcalero de tercera generación con más de 25 años de experiencia.  
 
Los dueños de Makatay y su familia se han dedicado por generaciones a la comercialización y a lanzar productos al mercado de manera profesional y hoy en día están dedicados 100% a Makatay. Contamos ahora con un Maestro Mezcalero que se ha dedicado por generaciones a perfeccionar los procesos de producción y calidad, porque sabemos que al final del día lo que hace a un mezcal mejor que otro es la buena materia prima, el cuidado de todos los detalles del proceso de elaboración, y la mano y conocimientos de un excelente Maestro Mezcalero. 
 
Nos enorgullece pensar que gracias a éste cuidadoso proceso de selección, contamos con unos de los mejores mezcales del país y un equipo de profesionales dedicados a brindar servicio y seguimiento del más alto nivel a todos nuestros clientes.

We’ve long been in the habit of “giving it a shot.” CraftCadia came from a desire to share the unique spirits we love with the broader world. Our customers get a sensory experience of the Pacific Northwest, and of the daring and individuality that makes the producers here so special.

Our strategy is simple: celebrate our local producers in a global marketplace. CraftCadia maintains a hyper-local portfolio of producers that stick to our standards of being fiercely independent, of a unique perspective, and whenever possible, organically farmed. We bring years of logistical expertise to make these small batches affordable and accessible to our buyers by grouping them into container shipments. Great relationships are the keystone of our business: our importers get the best of the Pacific Northwest, our artisans enjoy a hugely expanded network of fans.

Name: The Mad Marquess Blended Irish Whiskey
Description:
Painting the Town Red since 1837 
Blended Irish Whiskey  

The Mad Marquess Irish Whiskey is inspired by the storied exploits of Henry de la Poer Beresford, the 3rd Marquess of Waterford, whose legendary 1837 escapade gave rise to the phrase “painting the town red.” 

Crafted at Great Northern Distillery and rooted in the historic Curraghmore Estate in County Waterford, The Mad Marquess delivers a smooth, versatile blend designed to energize contemporary social occasions—equally suited for neat pours, lively shots, or mixing with cola. With tasting notes of pineapple, vanilla, and caramel, it stands out in a competitive market by celebrating boldness, fun, and camaraderie while still honoring Irish whiskey’s rich heritage. 

Whether you’re toasting new partnerships or gathering with colleagues, The Mad Marquess brings a dynamic spirit to every occasion, reminding us all that great stories (and successes) begin with a dash of daring.

Name: Solstice Collection South Africa
Description:
WHO WE ARE

Solstice Collection is a South African beverage company driven by one bold mission: to reimagine refreshment for the modern, health-conscious consumer. Born in 2025, we develop premium, low-calorie alcoholic beverages that fit seamlessly into balanced lifestyles - delivering full flavour, elevated design and zero compromise.

WHAT WE DO

We create drinks that celebrate freedom, fun and feeling good - without the guilt. Our portfolio is built around insight-led innovation, rooted in a deep understanding of consumer needs and moments of consumption.

OUR LAUNCH PRODUCT

Our debut brand, Solstice Seltzer, introduces a fresh take on a South African classic: Summertime – the iconic vodka, kola tonic & sparkling water, now in a convenient, better-for-you canned format.

 27 calories per can
 Low sugar, gluten-free, vegan-friendly
 4.5% alcohol, made with sparkling water
 Packaged in premium 300ml slender cans

WHY WE EXIST

Consumers today want more than just a drink. They want a lifestyle choice that aligns with their values - wellness, balance and enjoyment. We exist to meet that need, one great sip at a time.

OUR VISION

To become South Africa’s leading platform for premium, better-for-you alcoholic beverages - starting with seltzers, and evolving into a diverse collection of innovative drinks designed for modern living.

LET’S CONNECT

Whether you're a retailer, distributor, brand partner or talent looking to join an ambitious team - we’d love to chat. Follow our page for news, product updates and company growth stories.

Il progetto Spagnolli è uno stretto connubio tra logos e techne, il “sapere” che si concreta nel “saper fare”, e Disìo ne rappresenta la pietra angolare. 

Un vigneto frutto di una brillante intuizione e della grande forza di volontà della famiglia Spagnolli, che da tre generazioni si impegna nella coltivazione eroica delle vigne sugli sgrebeni di Cimone.

Il risultato di una storia lunga ed avvincente, iniziata con l’intuizione di Francesco Spagnolli e Gino Veronelli, capaci di comprendere la vocazione spumantistica di quel piccolo frammento di terra ripida, dopo averlo osservato insieme, di ritorno da una diretta radiofonica a cui parteciparono nell’ormai lontano 1978.

Name: De Geluksdruif
Description:
De Geluksdruif?
'De Geluksdruif' (translating roughly into: The Lucky Grape) is a wine importer and distributor with wines from classic European wine countries. We supply mainly the hospitality and retail sectors. 

Surprising, gastronomic wines with a classic touch: that is one of the main characteristics on which we selects our wines. And in that light, it is not surprising that the French Jura, which many currently believe to be the most exciting wine region in France, has become one of the most striking eye-catchers in our range, with top producers such as Stéphane Tissot, Domaine Labet and Macle.

But also in other regions within Europe we look for the smaller, quality-driven producers where beautiful things happen: think Corsica and Savoie in France, several regions in Portugal and Northwest Spain. The focus is on price-quality, originality and employability at the table: wines that stand out for their character, finesse and purity.

In addition, De Geluksdruif is part of Sommelierwijnen, an alliance of seven small, specialized wine importers who offer a joint counter to the hospitality industry.

Exporting the Best Spanish Wines: Sustainable, Non-Chemically Produced, and Carefully Selected for Your Palate.

We prioritize non-chemical wine production and seek out vineyards that share our commitment to sustainability.
We believe that sustainable wine production is not only good for the environment, but it also results in better tasting wine. That's why we only work with vineyards that use sustainable farming practices and avoid the use of harsh chemicals. We are proud to promote socially responsible business practices and work with vineyards that prioritize fair labor practices and support local communities.
We invite you to explore our selection of Spanish wines on our website, where you can learn more about our vineyards and their production methods. From building distributor relationships to executing impactful activations and promotions, Pour & Prosper offers the expertise and local knowledge needed to navigate Florida’s competitive beverage landscape. Let us help your brand thrive—one success at a time.

Name: MON-YÉ Vodka
Description:
A different flavor, a different hemisphere, a different world. A blend of modern sophistication and old-world tradition. Distilled from pure cane sugar and infused with coconut water, MON-YÉ offers a taste of the tropics and a departure from the mainstream. 

This is not your typical vodka. Our methods and inspiration spring from the rainforests of Sierra Leone and the savannahs of Nigeria. 

MON-YÉ is the passport to a different way of life, where gentle rains caress the lowlands. Where you might pick a perfect mango off your own tree or make a snack of raw sugar cane. Where market vendors cut open a fresh coconut and give it to you with a straw. 

In MON-YÉ, the spirit of the tropics is distilled into every bottle. We welcome you to a world without strangers. A world refreshing, yet familiar. A place where friends, old and new, gather in a circle for an experience to be savored among kindreds.

Name: Standard Sales MS dba A&B Distributing
IBÁ Spirits, Inc.
Description:
IBÁ Mezcal is a super-premium agave spirit born in Santiago Matatlán,
Oaxaca, Mexico—hailed as the World Capital of Mezcal. The name 'IBÁ'
comes from a Zapotec word meaning 'sky' or 'heavens,' reflecting both
the brand’s origin and its spirit of boundless possibility. IBÁ is rooted in
four generations of tradition while boldly embracing innovation, offering
the most complex, smooth, and layered mezcal in the world.

Each bottle of IBÁ Mezcal is a visual celebration, reflecting one of six distinct hues of the sky as seen over Oaxaca from dawn to midnight. These colors are not merely aesthetic—they symbolize the evolving journey of life, change, and renewal. Every expression is tied to a moment in the sun’s daily travels across the sky.

IBÁ Mezcal expressions include Espadín Joven, Frutos Rojos, Cítricos, Ensamble, Jabalí, and Tepeztate.

Each bottle is a work of art, a symphony of flavors and aromas that captivate the senses and celebrate life's most extraordinary moments.

Luxespirits is more than a distributor; we are curators of luxury, passionate about sharing the Lamborghini Champagne legacy with the world. We invite you to join us on this journey of refinement and opulence, where every bottle is a testament to the extraordinary, and every occasion is elevated to a celebration of life's finest moments. Indulge in the luxury of Lamborghini Champagne with Luxespirits, and experience the true essence of magnificence in every glass.

At Veranda, we're proud to embrace the pure essence of nature, leaving no room for artificial additives or chemical flavors. Description:
Indulge in a true masterpiece crafted by a maestro experto catador, where every sip reveals the rich heritage and artistry of Jalisco tequila. Founded by Joan Dominique and her mother, our award-winning tequila reflects a legacy of dedication and skill, showcasing the flavors and aromas that define this exceptional spirit.

In the heart of Jalisco, where tradition meets innovation, our tequila is produced using sustainable practices that honor the environment and the agave plants that are the foundation of our spirit. We believe in a process that respects nature, ensuring that every bottle embodies our commitment to purity. Our tequila is completely additive-free, allowing the natural flavors of the agave to shine through, delivering an authentic tasting experience that is both smooth and complex.

Each batch is a celebration of craftsmanship, with the maestro's expertise guiding the selection of the finest agave and the precise distillation techniques that enhance its character. From the first aroma to the final finish, this tequila invites you to savor its distinctive profile, making it perfect for both sipping and mixing in your favorite cocktails.

Join us in experiencing a journey through taste, where every glass tells a story of tradition, sustainability, and exceptional quality. Discover the elegance and depth of our tequila, and let it elevate your moments, whether shared with friends or enjoyed in solitude.

Taste the masterpiece and appreciate the artistry that goes into every bottle, a true reflection of Jalisco's rich tequila heritage, proudly founded by Joan Dominique and her mother.

Name: MonRey Rum
Description:
Found Lashawn Johnson's passion for mixology turned into a desire to create her own brand. 

"The first time I made a piña colada I knew this is what I wanted to do. I went to mixology school and started working in nightclubs and bars throughout Queens New York. I loved my work, this was the best job I had to date but at the time I never imagined owning my brand of rum. Now, I can’t help but think this is full circle for me. I remember my first day working as a mixologist in a night club. I was so nervous that I forgot all the recipes, but I soon I noticed that the patrons kept coming back and specifically requesting me. They complimented me on how good the drinks I made were. Not long after that I became the "go-to" mixologist there and was asked to do private parties as other bar owners would request me. 
I was having the time of my life, but eventually became a parent and left the scene to raise my children."

After Lashawn, I took every opportunity to get behind the bar during family gatherings, parties for friends and even entered a mixology contest on a cruise, winning with the original drink she called the "blue boogie". At this point, she felt that it just made sense to create her own brand of rum and name it after her 2 children.

Among them are : Ruinart Champagne, Petrus, Louis Jaodt, Albet Bichot, Henri Bourgeois, Guigal, Gaja, Casanova di Neri, Ricasoli, Querciabella, Zenato, Zardetto Prosecco, La Scolca, Planeta, Wine Art Estate, Gavalas, Hatzidakis, Bogle Family Vineyards, Lapostolle, Norton, Niepoort and many more.   

Upon returning to Cyprus, Victor recognized a growing demand for high-quality imported wines. Seizing the opportunity, he established relationships with some of the world’s leading wine producers, ultimately founding the first La Maison du Vin in Limassol, providing a gateway to premium wines for the local market.

Name: Revolt Distribution
Description:
Revolt Distribution is a European craft beer and drinks distribution company that understands European Direct to Consumer (DTC) and B2B/trade alcohol sales. 
 
We offer craft breweries, alcohol brands, or drinks producers a turnkey distribution solution for Europe that enables them to directly sell to consumers and businesses in Europe, thus shortening supply chain and lowering your end consumer pricing versus the convuluted current model used in most of Europe.
 
We handle the transport logistics, customs clearance, and excise tax compliance from the brewery to the end consumer or to trade accounts.  Think of us as being your "European Subsidary" without the overhead costs and complicated tax consequenses this would entail to more effectively sell DTC and to trade. 
 
The Revolt Distribution platform was founded by two European craft beer professionals that have been bringing US craft beers to Europe since 2015 with a strong understanding of the European Craft Beer market and understand the regional nuances in selling to Scandinavia versus Benelux, versus Spain, versus The Baltics.

Name: Vignoble & Cave Audrain
Description:
Le Vignoble Audrain est une histoire de famille, nous travaillons de père en fils depuis plus d’un siècle et demi sur les mêmes terroirs que nos ancêtres. 
Les 30 ha de vignes se trouvent au sein de plusieurs communes fondatrices de l’AOC Muscadet Sèvre & Maine, plus particulièrement à la Haie-Fouassière où se trouve la table des 8 vignerons précurseurs de l’appellation. A travers une équipe de passionnés travaillant avec le savoir-faire familial, notre ambition est de réaliser les plus grands vins du Muscadet, notamment notre Muscadet Cru de la Haie-Fouassière élevé en amphore. 
Nous possédons également une diversité de cépage propices à notre climat océanique tel que le Sauvignon gris et blanc, le Pinot gris, le Chardonnay, le Sémillon et le Merlot. 
À partir de 2016, nous proposons une partie caviste au sein de notre domaine familiale, la Cave Audrain propose des vins de toute la France et fortifiés, des whiskys, des rhums et des bières.

Vi sætter service i højsædet og er dybt engagerede i at rådgive hver enkelt kunde ud fra deres ønsker og behov. Derfor er vi blandt de førende leverandører til restauranter i hele Danmark og Sverige, herunder flere Michelin-stjerne restauranter. Vi har desuden stor erfaring som leverandør til virksomheder og private.

Vi rejser personligt rundt i verdens vinområder for at finde kvalitetsvine og nye, dygtige producenter. Vi importerer alle vine direkte og sikrer vores kunder kvalitetsvin til rimelige priser.

Vi sætter høje standarder og alle vores producenter er nøje udvalgt. Derfor kan vi præsentere et utroligt udvalg af vine, der opfylder vores strenge krav.

I den nyeste version af virksomheden er vi fusioneret med Strandgaarden Wine & Spirits A/S, hvilket har givet os mulighed for at udvide vores aktiviteter i Danmark og Sverige. Vores vine er distribueret i vinbutikker, restauranter og online på kbvin.com.

Name: Wolf of the Willows Brewing
Description:
Wolf of the Willows is a brewing company established by Scotty and Renae McKinnon who first landed on the Australian brewing scene after releasing their XPA in 2014.
Wolf of the Willows name came from a story about a Roman naturalist who first identified the hop vine. The hop was described as wild and untamed, twining and choking the willows, taking them down like a wolf to the flock. They were named Lupus Salictarius, Latin for Wolf of the Willows.
Since that 2014 we've hand built our own brewery and taproom in Mordialloc, Victoria and are lucky enough to work with some of the most talented and incredible human beings going around.
We have a passion for producing hand crafted, small batch, modern beers that are distinct in quality, flavour and character. From award winning smashable lagers, through to barrel aged stouts, we're here to make the best beer, no short cuts, no compromise.
Our satisfaction comes from taking raw, natural ingredients and turning them into beers that we love to drink. We take pride in the fact that we're still family owned and operated, and brew all our beers.
This all said, if we can simply provide you with a moment of enjoyment from a pint of one of our humble ales, then our job is done.

Name: Finivin
Description:
Vi er en lille familieejet- og drevet vinimportør som sælger udvalgte vine til både privat og erhverv.

Målsætningen er at kunne levere de bedst mulige vine til rimelige priser. For at leve op til det, rejser vi hvert år ud og smager os næsten bogstaveligt talt igennem mange spændende vinområder, inden vi – ud fra vores smagsløg og pengepung – udvælger nye vine fra de vindistrikter vi har besøgt.

”Vores” vinbønder er alle passionerede. Typisk ejer de små, familiedrevne vingårde, hvor de lægger al deres sjæl og nerve i deres ”håndlavede” vine. Vi kender dem personligt og ved, at de brænder for at lave den topkvalitet, som vi mener, man kan smage i de vine de producerer.

Vores motto er derfor:
Husk: Sandheden findes alene i glasset

Name: Wine Point
Description:
Wine Point | Вино. Міцне. Смак життя.

Ми — Wine Point, мережа магазинів та інтернет-майданчик, де кожен може знайти свій ідеальний напій. 39 магазинів у Києві та області, тисячі позицій на складі — від культових вин до рідкісних зразків віскі, рому, текіли, шампанського й не тільки.

Працюємо з перевіреними імпортерами, не продаємо «що-попало» й завжди можемо щось порадити, навіть якщо ви самі не знаєте, чого хочете.
У нас є все:
— італійське червоне на вечерю,
— подарунок для шефа (щоб і смак, і етикетка «кричали» статус),
— текіла, яка відкриває нові горизонти.

Ми про якість, чесність і задоволення — від першого перегляду на сайті до останнього ковтка з келиха.

Wine Point — більше ніж магазин. Це настрій.

Name: BIO CONCEPT FOOD
Description:
Welcome to Bio Concept , where we specialize in the art of crafting exquisite alcohol beverages and botanical extracts. Established with a passion for quality and innovation, we pride ourselves on producing a diverse range of premium products that cater to refined tastes worldwide.

Our Products:
Alcohol Beverages:

Wine Distillate: At Bio Concept Food, we transform carefully selected wines into smooth and aromatic distillates that capture the essence of their origins.
Brandy: Our brandies are a testament to traditional craftsmanship, blending age-old techniques with modern expertise to create rich, nuanced flavors.
Gin Dry: Crafted with a meticulous balance of botanicals, our gin dry offers a refreshing and complex taste experience that appeals to gin enthusiasts.
Liqueurs: From classic to innovative flavors, our liqueurs are meticulously crafted to provide a delightful addition to any cocktail or as a standalone indulgence.
Botanical Extracts and Essential Oils:

Prune Extract: Our prune extract is derived from the finest prunes, capturing their natural sweetness and nutritional benefits for various culinary and nutritional applications.
Essential Oils: We produce a wide range of essential oils sourced from premium botanicals, ensuring purity and potency for aromatherapy, skincare, and culinary uses.

Other Extracts: Explore our collection of botanical extracts, each meticulously prepared to preserve the unique flavors and beneficial properties of the plants they are derived from.

Our Commitment:
At Bio Concept , quality is at the heart of everything we do. From sourcing the finest raw materials to employing advanced production techniques, we maintain rigorous standards to ensure that every product meets our exacting specifications. Our dedication to quality extends to sustainable practices, as we strive to minimize our environmental footprint and support the communities from which we source.

Name: Status Wines

Founded in 2017 in Northern California and now headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada, STATUS is more than just a sparkling wine brand it’s a lifestyle. Born from a close knit group of friends turned family, we built STATUS with a shared vision of bringing people together through every bottle we pop. With deep roots in the spirits and RTD beverage industry, we spent years perfecting our craft, ensuring that each sip of STATUS delivers a memorable and elevated experience.

At STATUS, we pride ourselves on innovation and bold flavors, offering classic and tropical inspired sparkling wines that cater to every occasion. Our Platinum Brut delivers a crisp, refined taste with notes of grapefruit and pear, while our VIP Peach Mango introduces a vibrant, fruit forward experience with hints of guava. More exciting flavors are always on the horizon as we continue to push the boundaries of tradition.

Whether you’re celebrating milestones, achievements, or everyday moments, STATUS is designed to complement life’s finest experiences. From exclusive tastings to large scale events, we create meaningful connections through every glass. Because at the end of the day, it’s not just about what you drink it’s about how it makes you feel. So, what’s your STATUS?!

Description:
Prius Winery is a premium wine producer based in Lüleburgaz, Kırklareli, cultivating 650 acres of vineyards and operating a facility built on high standards and equipped for small-batch precision at scale, with a total production capacity of 850,000 liters.

Founded in 2020, Prius began planting its vineyards in 2021 in the village of Ahmetbey, growing 17 grape varieties across a single, integrated estate.

With a focus on quality, sustainability and character, Prius builds on the region’s natural strengths such as rich soil and ideal climate through thoughtful cultivation and disciplined production methods to craft expressive and distinctive wines.

Rooted in the area's deep winemaking heritage, Prius brings a fresh perspective to tradition, honoring the past while cultivating a future defined by integrity, care and a strong sense of place.

With a commitment to quality and an extensive network of partnerships, ESLPIRITS GROUP has established itself as a reliable player in the industry.

1. Alcoholic Beverages: As a major distributor, the company houses a diverse selection of spirits from across the globe. From fine single malt whiskies to luxurious cognacs and vodkas, ESLPIRITS GROUP provides its clientele with a plethora of choices. Their collection reflects a blend of tradition, craftsmanship, and innovation, catering to both conventional and modern palates.

2. Wines: ESLPIRITS' wine selection is an ode to vineyards worldwide. Their collection encompasses everything from vintage classics from the vineyards of France and Italy to new-age wines from emerging regions. Red, white, rosé, or sparkling – they ensure a wine for every occasion and taste.

3. Beers: Craft beers, lagers, ales, and more – the group's beer portfolio is as expansive as it is diverse. They collaborate with both well-known breweries and microbreweries, ensuring that they capture the essence of global beer culture.

4. Soft Drinks: Not just limited to alcoholic offerings, ESLPIRITS also caters to a non-alcoholic audience. Their array of soft drinks includes carbonated beverages, fruit juices, tonic waters, and more. They ensure that even those who prefer non-alcoholic beverages have a wide array of refreshing choices.

5. FMCG Goods: Beyond beverages, ESLPIRITS has delved into the world of FMCG goods, ensuring that they cater to a broader segment of the market. Their selection in this category ranges from snacks, packaged foods, personal care items, and more. By doing so, they've positioned themselves as a holistic provider for retailer

Name: Gascogne Vins
Description:
Gascogne Vins (Grands-crus.net) has implemented a renown wines merchant company using the En Primeurs system in use for the most famous Grands Crus of Bordeaux.

Since 2012, its director developed a solid network of the most prestigious wine producers of the area and is also well connected with the crème de la crème wines of Bourgogne (Burgundy).

At Gascogne Vins we are also sensitive to the fact that the best wines are too often used as speculation tools and the bottles tends to be never tasted with friends and family. Our wish in creating grands-grus.net is to challenge this situation by offering the best price and largest choice of wines to the end customers.

Our cellar offers the best available prices to the end customers either by offering En Primeurs prices direct from the producers, and Deliverable wines. En Primeurs allows you to purchase wines at the best price possible, with a delivery 18 months after purchase. For deliverable wines, grands-grus.net has crafted a unique automation technology using best price bidding, allowing the customer to purchase wines at bid price.

It’s all about trust. It is in this philosophy that we have been able to forge privileged relationships over the years with the owners of the most Grands Crus Classés. The prestigious Châteaux trust us to distribute their rare wines in the best conditions. It is this rarity that we pass on to you when you are allocated the Grands Crus that will contribute to the prestige of your selection.

Constantly on the lookout for the main Bordeaux and Bourgogne appellations, we go beyond the sale of wines in helping you every day to source your prospective wines. All the regular offers that are made to you, regardless of the type of wine, are supported by careful tastings, our recommendations and comprehensive information to obtain the most relevant wines for your market.

Name: Chilango
Description:
We love hard seltzer. We love mezcal. But when we couldn’t find a drink that brought them together, we made our own. Our philosophy behind Chilango is simple: we honor each ingredient and its journey, from Mexico to can. You’ll only find the real deal here — no vague “natural flavors” or “essences.”

We source smoked agave spirits from Oaxaca, partnering with longtime farmers to ensure quality and sustainability. This agave spirit is blended with antioxidant-rich hibiscus, known as jamaica in Mexico, for its vibrant taste and color. Organic agave syrup gives the drink a touch of sweetness. Then we add bubbles. Nothing more, nothing less.

Chilango is about resilience, reinvention, and adventure. It’s a fearless way of living. #comingsoon

Desarrollamos cinco líneas: 
- Color Spritz, cócteles listos para beber inspirados en recetas de aperitivos italianos. 
- Gin Dr. Masker, 4 destilados innovadores con insumos nacionales.
- Alcohol Free, una amplia variedad de licores sin alcohol.
- Base de coctelería para tragos populares, como mojitos, sangrias, margaritas, entre otros.
- Desarrollo de Clientes, donde creamos productos personalizados.

Utilizamos ingredientes como el vino del Maule, peumo (endemico chileno), enebro, entre otros. Tras un proceso de investigación y pruebas, logramos adaptar recetas internacionales al paladar chileno, añadiendo un toque local y artesanal, pero con estándares industriales.

Nuestro objetivo es innovar en el mercado global, ofreciendo productos sofisticados y sostenibles. A futuro, buscamos seguir liderando tendencias en la coctelería nacional y expandir nuestras líneas Sin Alcohol y Sin Sellos, siempre priorizando la calidad chilena.

Name: Viña Terruña
Description:
Historia

Viña Terruña se encuentra en Magdalena Alto, Coelemu, Ñuble, Chile, en pleno corazón del Valle del Itata, y nace del legado y la tradición vitivinícola de la familia Arteaga Parra. Sus viñedos han permanecido en la familia durante ocho generaciones y son parte de la histórica hacienda La Magdalena, un importante polo vitivinícola desde 1613, época en que era administrado por los jesuitas.

En la actualidad, son sus mujeres, Alicia Arteaga Parra y su hija Katherine Concha Arteaga, las encargadas de dar continuidad a este excepcional terroir, impulsadas por la pasión de preservar el legado del vino. Su filosofía se centra en establecer una conexión armónica con la naturaleza, basada en la observación y comprensión de sus ciclos y cambios, para elaborar vinos nobles de cepas ancestrales.

Viñedos

Viñedos centenarios ubicados en Magdalena Alto, comuna de Coelemu, Valle del Itata, a unos 300 metros de altitud. Cultivados de manera orgánica, utilizan el sistema de conducción en cabeza. Tienen un clima mediterráneo, con exposición noroeste para la uva Cinsault y País, y exposición noreste para las variedades Moscatel de Alejandría y Chasselas. Los suelos, de tierra roja arcillosa y pendiente pronunciada, son de secano interior, con una importante influencia marina para su hidratación, proveniente del río Itata, que se encuentra a 3 kilómetros al norte en línea recta y del océano Pacífico, a tan solo 20 kilómetros.
Cepas plantadas: País, Cinsault, Moscatel de Alejandría, Chasselas.

Name: McCarter Reserve Spirits
Description:
Our premium bourbon is a symphony of enticing flavors that captivate the senses with each sip. The initial notes enchant the palate with a delicate balance of smooth caramel and velvety vanilla, creating a luscious and inviting foundation. As the bourbon unfolds, layers of complexity emerge, revealing hints of rich dark chocolate and toasted oak that add depth and sophistication.

The mid-palate introduces a medley of warm spices, such as cinnamon and nutmeg, which harmonize with the sweet undertones to create a tantalizing contrast. These subtle yet distinct spices bring an element of intrigue and provide a gentle warmth that lingers gracefully.

Completing the flavor profile is a harmonious combination of dried fruits, including raisins and figs, which contribute a touch of sweetness and a pleasing fruity dimension. These fruit notes intertwine with the other flavors, creating a delightful interplay of tastes that evolve with each sip.

The finish of our premium bourbon is a testament to its exceptional quality, leaving a long and satisfying trail of smoothness. As the flavors gradually dissipate, you are left with a lingering essence of fine oak and a whisper of toffee, a gentle reminder of the artistry and craftsmanship that goes into every bottle.

Indulge in the remarkable notes of our premium bourbon, where complexity, elegance, and richness intertwine to deliver an extraordinary sensory experience. Each sip is an invitation to explore the depth of flavor, as this bourbon unveils its distinct personality and leaves a lasting impression.

Name: TOVINO  SP. Z O.O.
Description:
Jesteśmy spółką rodzinną zajmującą się bezpośrednim importem i dystrybucją francuskiego wina. Wina,
 które tworzą ludzie zgodnie z tradycją regionu i sztuką produkcji opartą na wiekowych doświadczeniach.
Nasze winnice dobieramy bardzo starannie. W większości są to niewielcy, rodzinni producenci
uprawiający winorośl od kilku pokoleń, ale przede wszystkim to pasjonaci wkładający serce w swoją pracę i dbający o środowisko naturalne. Pozostajemy w ścisłej współpracy z naszymi winiarzami i jesteśmy ich wyłącznym przedstawicielem na rynku polskim.
W doborze win do naszej oferty kierujemy się przede wszystkim wysoką jakością i bardzo dobrą relacją do ceny. Wina zanim trafią do naszej oferty degustujemy i oceniamy wspólnie ze współpracującymi z nami sommelierami.
To wina, które swoim smakiem i jakością wyrażają terroir, ciężką pracę, ale też pasje i ciekawe historie winiarzy. 
Sami jesteśmy ludźmi, którzy z pasją podchodzą do życia, a kuchnia i wino jest jego nierozerwalną częścią.
Szczególnie bliska jest nam francuska kuchnia oraz ich kultura picia wina, bowiem z Francją jesteśmy związani od ponad 100 lat, kiedy to po raz pierwszy do tego kraju przybył nasz wuj. Od tego czasu Francja stała się domem dla kolejnych pokoleń naszej rodziny.
Wino składujemy w specjalnie przystosowanym do tego celu własnym magazynie, w którym zachowana jest odpowiednia temperatura i wilgotność. To jakie wino kupujemy ma ogromne znaczenie, ale nie możemy pominąć etapu przechowywania zanim trafi ono do konsumenta, a jak wiadomo przechowywanie wina w nieodpowiedni sposób obniża jego jakość.
Naszym celem jest nawiązywanie dobrych i trwałych relacji z Klientami oraz zagwarantowanie im pełnej satysfakcji. Dlatego podejmujemy wszelkie starania, by spełnić ich oczekiwania i budować wzajemne zaufanie.
Zapraszamy do podróży po francuskich regionach winiarskich z kieliszkiem dobrego wina w dłoni.

Name: VISENTIN Vins Français d'Exception
Description:
Seit über 20 Jahren importieren und vertreiben wir die Elite der französischen Weine und Winzer. Unsere Philosophie basiert auf Authentizität, Exzellenz und einer tiefen Leidenschaft für Wein.

Unser Team besteht aus kompetenten Weinliebhabern und ehemaligen Sommeliers aus der Gourmet-Gastronomie. Jeder Mitarbeiter verfügt über umfassende Expertise und langjährige Erfahrung in der Weinbranche, um unseren Kunden fundierte und persönliche Beratung zu bieten. Unsere Beziehungen zu Winzern, Partnern und Kunden basieren auf Vertrauen, Respekt und enger Zusammenarbeit, was dauerhafte und gegenseitig bereichernde Austauschbeziehungen gewährleistet. Die Qualität unserer Produkte und Dienstleistungen steht im Mittelpunkt unserer Bemühungen, und wir streben kontinuierlich danach, die Erwartungen unserer Kunden zu übertreffen.

Unsere Lieferanten, die wir größtenteils exklusiv in Deutschland vertreten, sind das Herzstück unseres Unternehmens! Zu unseren Winzern zählen etablierte Persönlichkeiten, die weltweit Kultstatus besitzen, aufstrebende junge Talente, echte Geheimtipps, eigenwillige, geniale Naturburschen und feinsinnige „Künstler” – allesamt Produzenten mit Charakter. Sie folgen traditionellen, biologischen und biodynamischen Methoden, um echte und unverfälschte Weine zu produzieren, die das einzigartige Terroir und ihre Herkunft widerspiegeln.

Description:
Drew and Taylors Hard Tea: Revolutionising Refreshment, One Sip at a Time

Welcome to the official LinkedIn profile of Drew and Taylors Hard Tea, where innovation meets tradition in every bottle. Founded by New Zealand sisters Drew and Taylor, we are at the forefront of beverage innovation, offering premium, non-carbonated iced teas crafted for the discerning drinker.

Our journey began with a simple yet profound vision: to create a beverage that not only refreshes but also resonates with the sophisticated tastes of today’s consumers. From our humble beginnings, we have defied expectations and established ourselves as icons of entrepreneurial success. Our commitment to quality and flavor has quickly positioned us as leaders in the non-carbonated beverage market, making every sip a delightful experience.

At Drew and Taylors, we believe in pushing the boundaries of what a drink can be. Each blend is meticulously crafted using the finest ingredients, ensuring that every bottle delivers a unique and satisfying experience. We pride ourselves on our innovative approach and our dedication to sustainability and ethical production.

As we expand our horizons beyond New Zealand, our mission remains clear: to offer the world a superior iced tea that stands out in a market saturated with carbonated options. Join us on our journey to revolutionise refreshment and explore a world where tea tradition meets modern innovation.

Follow us down the rabbit hole and discover the wonders of Drew and Taylors Hard Tea.

#InnovationInEverySip #TeaTimeAdventure #BeverageRevolution

Name: Amazing Cocktails

Jsme prémiové koktejly, před-míchané v Itálii, rovnou připravené k pití. Pečlivě vybrané destiláty a ingredience si vychutnáte v každé kapce a prožijete zážitek na úrovni návštěvy vyhlášeného baru.

Nabízíme vám jedinečný požitek z pití drinků, ať jste kdekoliv – doma i na cestách a tím přinášíme revoluci do koktejlové kultury. Atraktivní balení potěší oko a originální příchutě zase chuťové buňky.

Nakonec, zasloužíte si možnost cítit se jako v tom nejlepším baru, i když sedíte u sebe doma. Nebo kdekoli jinde.

Potřebujete už jen dobrou společnost a led!

Description:
At South Street Imports, we're passionate about bourbon — not just as a spirit, but as a cornerstone of American craftsmanship and culture. Founded by two bourbon enthusiasts who saw a gap in the New Zealand market, we set out to bring a richer, more diverse bourbon experience to local shelves and bars.

While single malts have long dominated the whisky scene in Aotearoa, we believe bourbon has its own bold story to tell. Our mission is to import and showcase award-winning, premium bourbons that highlight the heritage, innovation, and flavor diversity of America's native spirit.

We work closely with top-tier distilleries in the U.S. to curate a selection that goes beyond the mainstream — from small-batch and single barrel expressions to rare finds and cult favorites. Whether you're a seasoned connoisseur or new to bourbon, we’re here to help you discover what makes this spirit so special.

Name: Lekkeur
Description:
Lekkeur is een likeurmerk uit Noord-Holland. Wij ontwikkelen lekkere likeuren, die nieuw van smaak zijn voor de Nederlandse markt van dat moment.
De eerste likeur van Lekkeur, ('anna' ananas gember) is in de markt gezet als een likeur voor iedereen. 

Lekkeur is begonnen met twee hoofdgedachten: Allereerst wilden we nieuwe smaken in de Nederlandse markt zetten. We hebben voor likeur gekozen om te kunnen spelen met specifieke smaken, ingrediënten en eigenschappen.
Daarnaast brengen wij een nieuwe boodschap voor likeur in het algemeen. Traditioneel worden likeuren op specifieke manieren gebruikt, een soort ongeschreven regels van gebruik. Bijvoorbeeld triple sec wordt eigenlijk alleen gebruik als zoet- of smaakmaker. 
Dat doorbreken wij met onze likeuren; wij zien het glas als halfvol, en schenken het bij tot het vol is.
Voor elke generatie zijn er manieren om van de likeur te genieten, zonder verplichtingen of regels.
Natuurlijk zijn er mensen die al met de mogelijkheden van likeur bekend zijn. Maar wij hebben ontdekt dat er ook mensen zijn die likeur wel kennen van hun grootouders, maar het nog niet zelf drinken. Deze groep bieden wij de inspiratie om de mogelijkheden te leren kennen en likeur ook als iets voor hen te gaan zien. 
Lekkeur is niet het nieuwste goedkope shotje, maar likeuren waar passie en waarde achter zitten. Een lekker shotje, mixje, cocktail, toetje, wat jij maar wil.
Een lekkere likeur om mee te zingen-vechten-huilen-bidden-lachen-werken en te bewonderen. Dit is meer dan lekker, dit is Lekkeur!

Under the leadership of founder Amseshem Henderson, Oyays secured a strategic partnership with one of the world’s leading beverage companies—an endorsement of its unique cultural appeal and commercial potential.

Today, Oyays is entering an exciting new phase of growth. As the demand for high-quality, culturally resonant RTD products continues to rise, Oyays is expanding its reach—and we’re actively seeking new partners and investors who share our vision of bringing legacy-inspired drinks to a global market.

Whether you're a seasoned collector, premium bar owner, or just stepping into the world of rare spirits, LiqrIt makes global alcohol commerce seamless, secure, and sensational.

Em um momento pandêmico, onde tudo era incerto e as pessoas estavam separadas pela distância física, um objetivo em comum aproximava as amigas Flávia, Jeane e Thaís: a vontade de brindar. Elas se reuniram algumas vezes com outras amigas por vídeo-chamadas, e, em meio a muitos brindes virtuais, surgiu a ideia de dar vida à uma bebida que fizesse a diferença e representasse seu espírito brasileiro e autêntico, de mulheres empreendedoras.

Nasceu, assim, Trevo Raro, um gin London Dry, artesanal, 100% brasileiro e criado a partir da cana-de-açúcar. Existe bebida mais Brasil que isso?! E não só isso define a brasilidade da marca, mas também a vontade de desfrutar de boas companhias, de curtir e valorizar cada acontecimento da vida, a qualquer hora e em qualquer lugar. O lema é: Todos os momentos merecem ser brindados

 

E aí, vamos brindar?

Name: Campfire Coffee Liqueur
Description:
Not your average Coffee Liqueur – this is a whole experience in a bottle.
Bold, smooth, and just the right amount of indulgent, Campfire Coffee Liqueur is crafted for those who appreciate rich coffee, premium spirits, and damn good cocktails. Made with Colombian coffee, Madagascar vanilla, and six-times distilled vodka, it delivers a velvety-smooth sip with notes of caramel, vanilla, and a lingering coffee finish—like that perfect cup of coffee, but with a boozy twist.

What makes Campfire Coffee Liqueur different, unique, and stand out from the other coffee liqueurs? Campfire Coffee Liqueur distinguishes itself in a crowded spirits market by offering a genuinely premium experience that resonates with both casual sippers and discerning connoisseurs. Unlike many coffee liqueurs where flavors blend into a single sweet note, Campfire’s profile is deliberately crafted to let each ingredient shine independently, the vanilla, and soft caramel in harmony but with distinct presence. This liqueur is made from high-quality ingredients, developed to be enjoyed on its own—not just as a cocktail mixer. It invites comparison with  established favorites like Baileys and Licor 43, standing confidently beside them not just in taste, but  also in its premium positioning. In fact, Campfire is one of the highest priced coffee liqueurs available  on shelves at Total Wine & More, a testament to its elevated formulation and brand presence. The  name “Campfire” evokes warmth, storytelling, and lifestyle—sparking curiosity while anchoring the
 brand in a relatable and aspirational identity. This lifestyle branding sets it apart from generic labels and  makes it ideal for brand-loyal customers looking for an emotional and flavorful connection. In terms of  market alignment, Campfire Coffee Liqueur is perfectly positioned. With a 20% ABV, it hits the sweet  spot of the growing trend toward  today’s consumer is increasingly willing to spend more for quality, artisan-crafted beverages.

Name: Shucked Bourbon
Description:
Broadway Producers Bring Shucked Bourbon to Life: A Journey from Stage to Bottle

Broadway producers Christopher Allen and Kevin Duda, were instantly inspired by the idea of turning the whiskey featured in Shucked into a real-world brand. What started as a simple idea quickly grew into a six-month journey filled with meetings, tastings, artwork discussions, and consultations with top experts in the spirits industry. After numerous tastings and fine-tuning, Shucked Bourbon was born, supported by the Broadway team and fueled by the excitement of Shucked fans worldwide.

Launching in October 2024, Shucked Bourbon is set to become an instant classic, much like the hit Broadway musical itself. This limited release will follow the National Tour of Shucked across the country, offering tastings and exclusive promotional events along the way. Crafted as a premium Straight Bourbon, Shucked Bourbon can be enjoyed neat or mixed into your favorite cocktail, delivering a taste as memorable as the show that inspired it. Name: Pelvins Somelier
Description:
Lidé z Pelvins Somelier Vám připraví koncept vína, který respektuje jedinečnost Vašeho podniku. Pomohou jej dotáhnout v úspěšný projekt a jsou vždy po ruce. Proškolí personál nejen na začátku a také v průběhu celé spolupráce.

 Dodávky vín s příběhem z celého světa
Spolehlivě expedujeme a zavážíme vína původem z ČR a celého světa, která vyprávějí osobité příběhy.

 Vlastní vinařství Hrabal Velké Bílovice
Produkujeme atraktivní vína vhodná pro rozlévání na skleničku, svěží a voňavá přívlastková vína a také velká vína s potenciálem zrání více jak 15 let. 

 Koncepty vína na míru
Sestavujeme koncepty, které nejlépe vyjádří filozofii Vašeho podniku. At´ se jedná o hotel nebo bistro.

 Vinné lístky 
Vytváříme vinné lístky, které nejen graficky zaujmou Vaše hosty a také pomáhají k vyšším prodejům vína.

 House wine
U nás ve vinařství si můžete vybrat víno z několika stylů a mnoha odrůd. Vlastní etiketa nebo Vaše logo bude tou správnou „třešničkou na dortu“.

 Školení personálu 
Intenzivně zaškolíme Váš personál při zahájení obchodní spolupráce a následně provádíme tréninky obslužného personálu a managementu v prodeji vín i pomocí umělé inteligence AI během celé spolupráce.

 Vinařské exkurze 
Organizujeme exkurze do vinařství v moravských regionech Velkopavlovicka, Mikulovska, Slovácka a Velkých Bílovic. Oblíbený team building pro Váš personál s prohlídkou vinařství, řízenou degustací a večerním programem.

 Marketingové akce 
Marketingové akce na podporu zvýšení prodeje letních vín, Svatomartinských vín včetně řízených degustací.

Name: Amaro Zen
Description:
Il progetto nasce a fine 2022 ma nella testa di Giuseppe Spinella c’è da anni: appassionato Liquorista, Giuseppe è innamorato della sua terra, la Sicilia, e delle sue potenzialità uniche e peculiari. Forte della sua esperienza lavorativa presso distillerie del territorio etneo, ha deciso di intraprendere la creazione di un prodotto che raffigurasse la sua identità e la visione nel mondo degli alcolici, come Zen, originale liquore digestivo.
Zen è un amaro siciliano gustoso ed esclusivo, prodotto alle pendici del vulcano più alto d’europea l’Etna!
L’amaro è composto da carrube, erbe aromatiche endemiche, arance ed un tocco di zenzero, il tutto ben proporzionato che conferisce un gusto deciso ed armonico!

Name: Medusa Vodka
Description:
Medusa Vodka: A Premium Experience

Medusa Vodka is a premium vodka brand crafted from the finest quality corn, offering a pure and smooth taste that is distilled to perfection. This unique vodka undergoes a meticulous 7 times distillation process to ensure exceptional purity and a velvety smooth finish that sets it apart from other vodkas. By using corn as the base ingredient for Medusa Vodka, several benefits are achieved. Firstly, corn is naturally gluten-free, making this vodka suitable for individuals with gluten sensitivities or celiac disease. Additionally, corn is packed with antioxidants and essential nutrients, contributing to a cleaner and more flavorful vodka profile. Medusa Vodka's commitment to using corn as its main ingredient highlights its dedication to producing a spirit that is not only delicious but also health-conscious. The smoothness and purity of this vodka are achieved through careful distillation methods that result in a luxurious mouthfeel and a clean, crisp taste. Whether enjoyed neat, on the rocks, or in cocktails, Medusa Vodka promises a drinking experience that embodies elegance and refinement.

You’ll notice our logo is a mountain bisected by water to represent our journey.

Negli anni, il nostro amore per l’arte della distillazione ci ha portato a evolverci, diventando non solo un centro di produzione, ma anche un punto di riferimento per degustazioni, eventi e incontri dedicati agli amanti e ai curiosi del mondo della distillazione.

Name: The Alt-Format Agency
Description:
Our aim is to create a unique portfolio, devoid of single use glass bottles; glass bottles which so often make up 40% of the total carbon footprint of the drinks we buy. 

Over the last ten years we have been lucky enough to work with some of the best alt-format BWS brands, packers, producers and innovators out there. ("Alt-format" stands for alternative format and BWS is short for Beer, Wine & Spirits). 

We bring all these amazing brands and products under one roof, providing complete solutions for those looking to take positive action.

We celebrate different ways of doing things and we want to accelerate their adoption, specifically in the On-Trade and Independent Off-Trade but we can certainly help accessing other popular routes to market too.

“Dropping” (pun intended) single use glass will help to; decarbonise your business, save your business money by reducing wastage and recycling costs and make you feel all warm and fuzzy inside knowing you’re doing something positive for the planet. Plus, the liquids inside our Cans, Pouches, Kegs and Bag-in Boxes are simply outstanding so your customers will be happy too!


Join us.
Make the switch.
Ditch the glass.

Name: Dutch Heritage Spirits
Description:
Dutch Heritage Spirits BV exists to transform the rich tapestry of Dutch history into exceptional premium spirits experiences. We believe that the most compelling stories deserve to be tasted, not just told. Through masterful distillation and authentic storytelling, we create spirits that serve as liquid ambassadors of Dutch ingenuity, resilience, and cultural heritage. Our mission is to bridge centuries of Dutch innovation with contemporary craftsmanship, creating premium spirits that honor our past while delighting modern palates. Each product in our portfolio represents a carefully researched chapter of Dutch history, transformed into a sensory experience that connects drinkers to the remarkable stories that shaped the Netherlands. Our Vision is 
to establish a new category in premium spirits: Heritage Spirits - where authenticity, place, and story are as important as taste and quality. We envision Dutch Heritage Spirits as the curator of the Netherlands' most fascinating historical narratives, making them accessible and meaningful to a global audience through exceptional spirits. Bastion Gin: Our Foundation. Our inaugural product, Bastion Gin, is inspired by the UNESCO World Heritage Dutch Water Defence Lines. Available directly at waterline locations and partner businesses throughout the region, Bastion Gin transforms heritage tourism into immersive taste experiences. Expanding the Heritage: as we grow, we will continue exploring the rich tapestry of Dutch history to discover new stories worthy of transformation into premium spirits. Each future product will follow our proven approach: authentic historical foundation, production at meaningful heritage locations, and distribution through partnerships with local heritage sites and businessesin surrounding areas.

Il nome Venev è molto più che un nome palindromo, è un'etichetta le cui origini derivano dalla pittoresca regione Veneto, che rispecchia il territorio italiano, così ricco e unico nel suo genere, la cui bellezza e il cui passato sono imparagonabili.

Name: Aramitz sas
Description:
Le domaine d’ARAMITZ se situe sur les terres du Gers, en plein cœur de l’appellation “BAS-ARMAGNAC”, dans le Sud-Ouest de la France. Sous la direction de Jean CHABERT, éleveur d’armagnacs, les vignes ont été réaménagées pour produire des vins blancs propices aux meilleurs arômes de l’Armagnac.
Les vignes, dont les premières furent plantées en 1871, se répartissent sur 3 grands cépages : Ugni Blanc, Folle Blanche et Colombard. D’autres vignes environnantes de cépages rouge, Merlot et Cabernet Sauvignon entre autres, sont utilisées pour la production des vins rouges de la maison.
Le vieillissement se fait sur place, avec des millésimes allant jusqu’à 1897. Un contrôle régulier assure une qualité très particulière aux Armagnacs d’ARAMITZ.
Les fûts de chêne servant au vieillissement sont sélectionnés en fonction des récoltes : fûts de basse chauffe pour les eaux de vie très fruitées, et fûts de haute chauffe pour les eaux plus boisées. Des vieux fûts ou des jeunes fûts, ainsi que des cépages variés, amènent une large palette d’arômes qui serviront à bâtir des Armagnacs aux saveurs inégalées.

We offer six different types of mezcal made from five different types of agave, including Espadin, Tobala, Tepextate, Cuishe, and Cirial. Each variety of agave brings its unique flavor profile and character, and we carefully craft each batch to showcase the individuality of each agave species.



At Por Lo Bueno Mezcal, we take pride in using only the finest ingredients and artisanal methods to produce a premium product. Our mezcal is made with the utmost respect for the land, environment, and local communities, ensuring sustainability and fair trade practices. All of our mezcal is bottle at origin in San Dionisio Ocotepec, Oaxaca and certified by the Consejo Regulador del Mezcal (CRM)



We believe that mezcal is more than just a drink; it's a cultural experience that brings people together. We're dedicated to sharing the unique flavors and rich history of our mezcal with the world. Join us on this journey and discover the exceptional taste of Por Lo Bueno Mezcal.

Name: Lhacienda Côte d'Ivoire
Description:
Lhacienda Côte d'Ivoire - Spécialiste de la Distribution de Produits
Présentation de l’Entreprise
Lhacienda Côte d'Ivoire est une entreprise dynamique et innovante dédiée à la distribution de produits, offrant des solutions complètes adaptées aux besoins variés de nos clients. De son expérience dans le domaine, nous avons développé une expertise solide qui nous permet de garantir un service de qualité et une satisfaction client optimale.

Notre Mission
Notre mission est de faciliter l’accès aux produits grâce à une distribution efficace et fiable. Nous cherchons à établir des partenariats durables avec nos fournisseurs et clients, en nous engageant à livrer des produits de manière rapide et sécurisée.

Services Proposés
Distribution Multicanale : Nous couvrons une large gamme de canaux de distribution, notamment la vente au détail, l’e-commerce et les grossistes, permettant à nos clients d’atteindre leurs consommateurs de manière efficace.

Logistique et Transport : Nos solutions logistiques incluent la gestion des entrepôts, la préparation des commandes et le transport, garantissant que les produits sont livrés dans les délais impartis et en parfait état.

Gestion des Stocks : Nous offrons des services de gestion des stocks qui permettent à nos partenaires de contrôler leur inventaire en temps réel et d’optimiser leur chaîne d’approvisionnement.

Assistance Client : Notre équipe dédiée est à l’écoute de nos clients et s’engage à fournir un accompagnement personnalisé pour répondre à toutes leurs questions et besoins en matière de distribution.

Name: Mr. Mezcal
Description:
Mr. Mezcal, a distinguished luxury brand in the spirits realm and Guticom LLC subsidiary, specializes in crafting and distributing Mexico's treasured Mezcal. This opulent brand represents sophistication and elegance, delivering an unmatched sensory experience to refined palates globally.

Dedicated to preserving ancestral heritage and artisanal techniques, Mr. Mezcal weaves a rich tapestry of flavors that encapsulates Mexico's cultural and biological diversity. By harmonizing age-old practices with cutting-edge innovation, the brand ensures each bottle showcases the intricate medley of smoky, fruity, and earthy notes cherished by aficionados.

The skilled Mr. Mezcal team diligently supervises the entire Mezcal production process, selecting premium agave plants and employing masterful roasting and fermentation techniques. Their meticulous approach and dedication to perfection are evident in the exceptional presentation of each bottle, featuring upscale packaging and an award-winning design.

Leveraging Guticom LLC's resources and expertise, Mr. Mezcal thrives as a wholesaler, forging strong partnerships with luxury retailers and high-end hospitality establishments globally. Their shrewd business acumen and unrelenting passion for sharing Mezcal's spirit have elevated this once obscure regional delight into an exclusive, sought-after luxury experience bridging tradition and modernity.

Under Guticom LLC's ownership, Mr. Mezcal serves as both an artisanal powerhouse and a visionary force in the luxury spirits market, preserving the ancient craft's legacy while boldly propelling it forward. Their steadfast commitment to quality, authenticity, and sustainability has established them as proud tradition-bearers, captivating and inspiring connoisseurs worldwide.
Mr. Mezcal's commitment to excellence has garnered multiple accolades, including Best Bottle Design at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition, where they secured Double Gold, Gold, and two Silver medal

Name: Marna
Description:
Marna è un’azienda specializzata nella selezione e importazione di vini internazionali. Nasce a Roma nel 2018 e tratta esclusivamente vini esteri, distribuendoli nel mercato Ho.re.ca. nazionale.

Avanguardista e in costante aggiornamento, con un’esperienza pluriennale nel settore, ricerca e scopre le eccellenze del mondo vitivinicolo mettendo in luce la personalità dei produttori e la tradizione del territorio da cui provengono.

Alla direzione della società c’è Claudia Araneo, che ha saputo trovare nella sua grande passione la motivazione per esplorare e scoprire il mondo del vino. Con il suo lavoro sfida in modo audace gli schemi soliti, evolvendosi di continuo. Fonda Marna selezionando vini internazionali che emozionano. Avvicina vino e cultura spagnoli al mercato italiano, come nessuno ha mai fatto prima. Con lo sguardo attento al Nuovo Mondo sceglie con cura realtà emergenti di altissima qualità della Nuova Zelanda e dell’Argentina.

Marna seleziona prodotti facili, nella bevuta e nella comprensione, coerenti con un mercato moderno, curioso ed esigente, indirizzati a consumatori che ricercano e apprezzano la qualità.

Name: Maison Mère
Description:
Maison Mère is an Australian small-business/start-up alcohol producer that exists to compliment and empower the emerging culture of shared and meaningful experiences.

One guiding principle is to detach the enjoyment of cocktails and strong spirits from masculine connotations and ‘the bar scene,’ with a focus on being gender-neutral and all-encompassing. Our goal is to develop a new language for the creation and marketing of alcoholic products which disrupts traditional gate-keeping of ‘who is allowed to enjoy what’ and instead focuses on shared experiences.

We are doing this by capitalising on the growing online sales channels and their emergent consumer behaviour, with a focus on direct to consumer and marketplaces (such as Amazon).

Maison Mère launched the first line of ready-to-drink bottled cocktails for Australia-wide distribution at the end of 2021, under the brand PRIVÉE. PRIVÉE has been featured in Broadsheet and our signature Gin Martini was a finalist in the Drink Easy Award’s 2022 competition.

Name: MARKHOR Vodka

It is vodka full of passion and commitment to the highest quality – from the selection of the best Polish raw materials, right down to the smallest packaging detail. It is made from spelt spirit, hemp, water and honey.

MARKHOR is manufactured according to the principles of craft production – from selected raw materials, under constant quality and technological supervision, with due attention and care to the details.

It’s about warmth, welcome, and good banter shared around the table. In a spirits market hungry for reliability, ease of enjoyment, and joyful moments. 

Banter brings people home to rum and the community it creates.

Name: Sur Marchands
Description:
En SUR Marchands, nuestra misión es llevar lo mejor del vino francés a los consumidores argentinos. Estamos orgullosos de nuestro portfolio, que abarca una selección de vinos de diversas regiones, cada uno elaborado por productores que se destacan por su dedicación y atención meticulosa a cada terroir.

Buscamos que cada botella llegue a manos de nuestro cliente de manera seria y cuidadosa, no solo garantizando la trazabilidad de cada botella. Sino que cuidamos cada estadio de las mismas desde su salida de bodega. Cada despacho es realizado con temperatura controlada y las botellas inspeccionadas al ser recibidas en nuestro depósito, dándole la tranquilidad a nuestra clientela de que cada botella descorchada ha sido cuidada en todo su proceso y que tiene todo nuestro respaldo.

Estamos orgullosos de colaborar con una clientela selecta, que incluye algunos de los mejores restaurantes y vinotecas especializadas en vino internacional. Contamos con un equipo de sommeliers expertos que brindan capacitación y asesoramiento a nuestros socios comerciales, asegurando que cuenten con las herramientas necesarias para ofrecer experiencias excepcionales a sus clientes. Además, contamos con el respaldo de la Embajada de Francia.

Name: Barrel Bridge
Description:
Navigating the U.S. alcohol market is complex, even with Park Street’s support. Many international independent brands struggle with distribution, compliance, inventory management, and supply chain operations—taking valuable time away from growing their business. That’s where Barrel Bridge comes in.

We provide end-to-end operational support for international alcohol brands already working with Park Street, ensuring their backend runs smoothly while they focus on sales and expansion.

What We Do:

 Distribution & Supply Chain Management – Streamlining logistics, inventory, warehousing, and order fulfillment.

 Compliance & Regulatory Support – Ensuring seamless adherence to U.S. alcohol laws and Park Street requirements.

 Inventory & Purchase Order Management – Optimizing stock levels, preventing delays, and keeping operations efficient.

 Seamless Brand Support – Acting as an extension of your team so you can focus on selling, not supply chain headaches.

Why Choose Barrel Bridge?

 We simplify operations. You get expert management of the critical backend functions that keep your brand moving.

 We drive efficiency. Our hands-on approach ensures smoother workflows, fewer delays, and cost savings.

 We free up your time. Focus on what you do best—growing your brand—while we handle the rest.

Ready to scale your brand effortlessly? Let’s connect.

Description:
HYPT is a Belgian spirits company bringing its own drink brands to the market. Each brand being a combination of an engaging story, attractive packaging, fair pricing, and absolute quality in the bottle. 

But HYPT represents more than just a brand. It’s a shared vision of how spirits should be produced and the ingredients we use to craft them. With every bottle, we’re committed to bringing flavor and the joy of discovery to connoisseurs and adventurers alike. In addition from distributing our bottles, we also offer personalized corporate gifts for professionals, as well as mobile cocktail bars for both professionals and individuals.

Name: THOUGHTS Bourbon
Description:
Founded in February 2020, Kreyòl Spirits is a minority-owned bourbon brand. We produce a smooth-tasting straight bourbon whiskey and a premium Manhattan cocktail.

The founder, who also serves as the company's Creative Director, has over 30 years of experience directing creative initiatives for companies like Kraft Foods, Godiva Chocolatier, MICROS, Oracle, and Canon. This experience led to the creation of the award-winning spirit called THOUGHTS, The Spirit of Creativity.

As a creative, he wanted to produce a product that reflected his imagination and creativity. THOUGHTS Bourbon is aged in smaller barrels — putting more wood into contact with the bourbon. It's proven to increase and accelerate the rate at which the bourbon absorbs characteristics from the wood. Combining this method with the purest Rocky Mountain water delivers a superior and unique taste to the bourbon market.

Currently, THOUGHTS is available in California, Colorado, Florida, Georgia, and New York, with distribution handled by Kelly Family Distributors and Liberation Distribution (LibDib).

Product quality is rapidly becoming an important competitive issue.
While most spirit producers like to talk about their story, we want to focus on the main objective—taste.

Name: Xalisco DrinXspirits
Description:
We are an American company located in the heart of Los Angeles, California (DTLA), with proudly Mexican roots, focused on the importation (at a federal level in the USA) of spirits, especially agave distillates from Mexico, to promote them in the United States.

Our purpose is to promote and support new agave distillate and Mexican-origin brands that wish to enter the U.S. market, as well as established companies and brands looking to expand and gain exposure through various public and social events, as well as festivals.

SERVICES:

*PARTNERSHIP*
◙ Importation of spirits, mainly agave-based, like Tequila and Mezcal made in Mexico, to the USA.
◙ We create synergies between Mexico & the United States with distilleries, Tequila & Mezcal brands, alcoholic beverage distributors (with presence throughout the United States), art, culture & Mexican folklore, etc.

*CONSULTING INSIGHT*
◙ We create your brand from the ground up or provide consulting services at any stage of your process, guiding you through to the final step (selling your product in the USA) and offering ongoing support.
◙ Guidance, quotation, consulting, and advisory services from product selection; bottle and image design; branding; business planning; general paperwork (IMPI, CRT/CRM, SAT, etc.); financial projections; marketing and advertising plan; legal, accounting, financial, and administrative advisory; logistics; distribution; customs agency; warehousing; promotion and commercialization of your product, both in Mexico and the United States.

*EXPERIENCE*
◙ We create unique experiences through the organization of social and entertainment events, parties, festivals, mixology sessions, tastings, classes and/or courses, posadas, and pop-ups as advertising platforms, etc.

*CONNECTION*
◙ We connect Mexican art and culture to create unique and personalized designs.

Description:
Clase 33 is a premium tequila brand born from the Camarena family legacy and a deep commitment to preserving the essence of Mexico through its most iconic spirit. Founded by Mauricio and Agustín Camarena, Clase 33 pays tribute to the nation’s history with four distinct blanco tequila expressions, each inspired by one of Mexico’s transformative eras: Conquest, Independence, Revolution, and Democracy.

Each expression authentically replicates the artisanal production methods and tools of its corresponding historical period — from pre-industrial techniques to modern refinements — offering a sensory experience grounded in time and place. More than a drink, Clase 33 is a journey through Mexican identity, created for those who value authenticity, heritage, and excellence.

Name: Crimson
Description:
Crimson – Le cocktail prêt-à-boire qui réinvente la vodka

Née au cœur des Yvelines, à Orgeval, Crimson est l’histoire de deux jeunes passionnés qui ont décidé de dépoussiérer l’univers des cocktails à base de vodka. Notre pari : créer une boisson festive, rafraîchissante et accessible, à contre-courant des standards trop sucrés ou excessivement alcoolisés du marché.

 Un goût unique, une recette équilibrée
Crimson, c’est l’alliance explosive de la vodka française — distillée cinq fois à partir de blé local — avec la douceur fruitée de la grenadine, relevée par une pointe d’agrumes et une fine effervescence. Résultat : une canette de 33 cl à 10 % vol., pensée pour procurer un plaisir immédiat, sans compromis sur le goût.

 Une production locale, artisanale, engagée
Chaque canette est produite à la main, en petite série, avec une attention rigoureuse portée à la qualité de chaque ingrédient. Ce choix d’une fabrication artisanale traduit notre volonté de rester fidèles à notre démarche : indépendante, exigeante, transparente.

 Notre ambition
Offrir une nouvelle manière de consommer des spiritueux : plus simple, plus festive, plus sincère. Crimson n’est pas qu’une boisson, c’est une atmosphère. Un instant partagé. Une envie de célébrer autrement.

 Et demain ?
Crimson se structure pas à pas, entre circuits courts, évènements festifs, partenariats étudiants et premières distributions. Avec une vision claire : faire grandir une marque libre, jeune, audacieuse — sans jamais renoncer à son exigence gustative.

 Envie de collaborer, distribuer ou juste goûter ? Écrivez-nous. L’aventure Crimson ne fait que commencer — et elle se partage.

Name: G&G Legado
Description:
G&G Legado nace con una misión clara: compartir el alma del Perú a través del Pisco.

Desde Ica —tierra de sol eterno, uvas nobles, vendimia y tradición— elaboramos marcas que no solo celebran nuestras raíces, sino que las proyectan con orgullo y perfección al mundo. Somos una empresa que cree en el poder de un legado: familiar, cultural y profundamente peruano.

Cada marca que nace bajo G&G Legado es un tributo. A quienes nos enseñaron a hacer las cosas con amor, y a una tierra que nos inspira a dar siempre lo mejor. Cuidamos cada detalle porque creemos que la calidad no es una meta, es una actitud.

Name: Nonno Turi Ciauru Siciliano
Description:
Nonno Turi – Volcano Spirits è una piccola realtà familiare siciliana nata dal desiderio di raccontare, attraverso distillati e liquori d’eccellenza, l’anima più autentica dell’isola.
Ogni nostra creazione è un viaggio tra tradizione artigianale e innovazione contemporanea, realizzata con botaniche locali selezionate, ingredienti naturali e tecniche di infusione lente e rispettose dei tempi della natura.

Dalle pendici dell’Etna imbottigliamo la ricchezza, l’intensità e la storia della Sicilia, trasformandole in elisir premium capaci di emozionare i palati più esigenti.
Il nostro obiettivo è costruire connessioni con importatori, distributori e professionisti del settore che condividano la passione per prodotti autentici, di alta qualità e con una forte identità territoriale.


---

 
Nonno Turi – Volcano Spirits is a small family-run Sicilian company born from the desire to capture and share the island’s authentic soul through premium spirits and liqueurs.
Each of our creations is a journey between craft tradition and contemporary innovation, crafted with carefully selected local botanicals, natural ingredients, and slow infusion techniques that respect the rhythms of nature.

From the slopes of Mount Etna, we bottle the richness, intensity, and history of Sicily, transforming them into premium elixirs designed to inspire and delight discerning palates.
Our mission is to build connections with importers, distributors, and industry professionals who share our passion for authentic, high-quality products with a strong territorial identity.

Name: High Octane
Description:
Tworząc markę High Octane od początku wiedzieliśmy, że chcemy być blisko motoryzacji oraz ludzi dla, których jest ona pasją. Motoryzacji klasycznej, zabytkowej, customowej. Bliżej nam do sześćdziesięcioletniego Chevy’ego w patynie niż wypolerowanej salonówki z gwarancją na 5 lat. Wolimy chromy na motocyklach od trzeszczących plastików nowych ścigaczy. Oldtimery, youngtimery – to pojazdy za którymi oglądamy się na ulicy. Te na dwóch jak i czterech kołach. Z naszym obiektywem odwiedzamy miejsca gdzie motoryzacja spotyka się ze sztuką, rzemiosło z zajawką a dobra zabawa z ogromem wiedzy i talentu. Wyjątkowe adresy na mapie Polski gdzie na co dzień można spotkać maniaków motoryzacji. Nie zawsze to będą tak oczywiste miejsca jak warsztaty czy garaże. Fanów High Octane będziemy szukać również w barbershopach czy salonach tattoo. Takich miejsc będziemy wypatrywać i odwiedzać coraz więcej.

Tworząc produkty z logotypem High Octane czerpiemy inspirację z odwiedzanych miejsc i wydarzeń. Stawiamy na jakość i nietuzinkowość. Rzemiosło będzie nam towarzyszyć w każdej dziedzinie naszej działalności. Krótkie, limitowane serie produktów. Niebanalna oprawa graficzna projektu. High Octane – marka dla ludzi, którzy swój czas poświęcają pielęgnując swoje zainteresowania. Jeżeli wolisz zapach benzyny i dźwięk silnika od przełączania kolejnych seriali w TV to szybko znajdziemy wspólny język.

Name: LG'in'BT+  London Dry Gin premium
Description:
Com anos de experiência na organização de eventos, sempre estivemos atentos às necessidades e desafios dos nossos clientes da comunidade LGBTQIA+. Ao longo dessa trajetória, vimos as dificuldades e injustiças que muitos enfrentam para encontrar produtos personalizados, únicos e inclusivos, além do preconceito que infelizmente ainda persiste, inclusive entre a classe de fornecedores.
Desse carinho a comunidade, a observação e experiência nasceu o LG'in'BT+, um London Dry Gin premium. Cada detalhe foi cuidadosamente pensado, da destilação feita com precisão a escolha de botânicos selecionados que garantem o sabor único e sofisticado. Mais que um destilado, LG'in'BT+ é um abraço a comunidade LGBTQIA+, um brinde a diversidade e a liberdade de amar e viver o amor.
O rótulo LG'in'BT+ é reflexo desses valores, valores primários e absolutos ao nosso ver. Desenvolvemos uma embalagem inclusiva, que celebra todas as formas de amor e identidade. Queríamos que cada garrafa fosse um símbolo de elegância, respeito e diversidade, algo que nossos clientes pudessem exibir com orgulho. Disponível em garrafas de 750ml e 50ml, o LG'in'BT+ se adapta a diferentes momentos e ocasiões, de um brinde íntimo a grandes celebrações.
Ao criar o LG'in'BT+, nosso objetivo era ir além de um simples produto no mercado das bebidas espirituosas. Queríamos uma marca que representasse a luta por igualdade e inclusão, algo que a comunidade LGBTQIA+ pudesse sentir como seu. A escolha dos ingredientes, o processo de destilação e o design do rótulo foram feitos pensando em cada detalhe que pudesse transmitir nossa mensagem de apoio e celebração à diversidade.

Estamos prontos para atender seus eventos, seus convidados, seus amigos, sua empresa, seus colaboradores! estamos prontos para brindar contigo
